| **Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has launched attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.

name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: Deb will always fight to make sure Indigenous voices are heard.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Back in 2021, Deb ran the Boston Marathon on Indigenous Peoples’ Day.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5033%2E400544%2EfwIHWf)
Did you know Deb runs races? Literally.
She started her running journey in the middle of her life and continues to run for good causes, including in the Marine Corps Marathon, Army Ten-miler, and the Canyon De Chelly Ultra.
**Back in 2021, Deb ran the Boston Marathon on Indigenous Peoples’ Day as a tribute to missing and murdered Indigenous peoples, their families, and the victims of Indian boarding schools.**
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_2_ipd.kQqOS_&refcode=em20251013-5033&t=2&akid=5033%2E400544%2EfwIHWf)
At the time, Deb wrote:
_“My feet will pound the ancestral homelands of the Massachusett, the Mashpee Wampanoag, and the Pawtucket people and will follow in the footsteps of Indigenous runners who have participated in this race over its 125-year history.”_
This Indigenous Peoples’ Day, we know that – no matter what – we can always count on Deb to stand up and fight fiercely for the safety and protection of Indigenous, and all, people from violence here in New Mexico and beyond.
[**If you want to stand with Deb and help elect her as the first Native American woman governor in America, will you chip in $5 to support her campaign today?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_2_ipd.kQqOS_&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-5033&t=3&akid=5033%2E400544%2EfwIHWf)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_2_ipd.kQqOS_&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-5033&t=22&akid=5033%2E400544%2EfwIHWf)**
Thank you,
Team Deb Haaland
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251013-2-a&t=23&refcode2=5033_400544_fwIHWf&akid=5033%2E400544%2EfwIHWf)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=24&akid=5033%2E400544%2EfwIHWf)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=25&akid=5033%2E400544%2EfwIHWf)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
clean_body: Back in 2021, Deb ran the Boston Marathon on Indigenous Peoples’ Day. Did you know Deb runs races? Literally. She started her running journey in the middle of her life and continues to run for good causes, including in the Marine Corps Marathon, Army Ten-miler, and the Canyon De Chelly Ultra. Back in 2021, Deb ran the Boston Marathon on Indigenous Peoples’ Day as a tribute to missing and murdered Indigenous peoples, their families, and the victims of Indian boarding schools. At the time, Deb wrote: “My feet will pound the ancestral homelands of the Massachusett, the Mashpee Wampanoag, and the Pawtucket people and will follow in the footsteps of Indigenous runners who have participated in this race over its 125-year history.” This Indigenous Peoples’ Day, we know that – no matter what – we can always count on Deb to stand up and fight fiercely for the safety and protection of Indigenous, and all, people from violence here in New Mexico and beyond. Thank you, Team Deb Haaland

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: What the federal government shutdown means for Oregon
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&contactdata=xsOuxo+H8zZ8qgR1lBWujSat882rwB8tcxLD3234MwBukaqG0la3sZkr5ARQKDohB4JsBbDWGkNkFeOpwdB07t+JWK2J4t2X04sghX5hdy0I+8SGpWO0fLvszYYwdvc6 [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&contactdata=xsOuxo+H8zZ8qgR1lBWujSat882rwB8tcxLD3234MwBukaqG0la3sZkr5ARQKDohB4JsBbDWGkNkFeOpwdB07t+JWK2J4t2X04sghX5hdy0I+8SGpWO0fLvszYYwdvc6]
Dear Peter,
Over a week ago, Trump and his allies shut down the federal government, severely impacting our communities and environment. This government shutdown means higher costs, less access to life-saving healthcare, unattended and unprotected public lands, and people out of work. It provides Republicans with the perfect opportunity to cut clean energy projects and jobs, allow the oil and gas industry to take over our public lands, and pursue Trump’s energy agenda that dirties our air and increases utility costs.
During the shutdown, the Trump Administration has already proposed another major funding cut for clean energy projects all in blue states, losing Oregon over $400 million for these very projects ( read more [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/10/02/climate/doe-clean-energy-programs-shutdown.html?unlocked_article_code=1.qU8.AD_Q.vwEsrzDOPhpI&smid=url-share] ).
We need your help, Peter. The consequences of this federal government shut down could be severe if our state does not take action. Will you make a generous contribution of $ 20 now to keep Oregon home? [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&contactdata=xsOuxo+H8zZ8qgR1lBWujSat882rwB8tcxLD3234MwBukaqG0la3sZkr5ARQKDohB4JsBbDWGkNkFeOpwdB07t+JWK2J4t2X04sghX5hdy0I+8SGpWO0fLvszYYwdvc6]
Renew your membership [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&contactdata=xsOuxo+H8zZ8qgR1lBWujSat882rwB8tcxLD3234MwBukaqG0la3sZkr5ARQKDohB4JsBbDWGkNkFeOpwdB07t+JWK2J4t2X04sghX5hdy0I+8SGpWO0fLvszYYwdvc6]
Our work here in Oregon is more important than ever. Just last week, Governor Tina Kotek signed an Executive Order to speed up the permitting process for clean energy projects, ensuring that they will be underway before the tax credit deadline next year — another Trump administration attack.
Now is the moment for our state lawmakers to take action. Oregon can stand up to Trump and his anti-climate agenda. We have already taken our first steps.
It’s crucial that our state lawmakers take action, but we need your support [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2] to continue applying pressure on them to protect our environment and health, and bring relief to Oregonians. Oregon must be a leader on climate, and an example to the rest of the country of what climate action looks like.
Please, renew your membership and make your impact in this movement with a generous gift of $20 now. [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2]
Renew your membership [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&contactdata=xsOuxo+H8zZ8qgR1lBWujSat882rwB8tcxLD3234MwBukaqG0la3sZkr5ARQKDohB4JsBbDWGkNkFeOpwdB07t+JWK2J4t2X04sghX5hdy0I+8SGpWO0fLvszYYwdvc6]
Join us to work together to keep Oregon the home we know and love, ensuring we stick to the commitments we value. The situation is dire, and now is the time to give and take a stand for Oregon. This will take all of us, but if we each contribute what we can, there’s so much we can do for our home.
Our work begins with you . Thank you for making it possible.
In solidarity,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Lindsey.png]
Lindsey Scholten (she/her)
OLCV Executive Director
P.S.: You can also make a free donation of $50 or $100 to OLCV PAC using Oregon’s Political Tax Credit. Click here to see if you qualify [https://secure.everyaction.com/2aYH7oLMDUGCzowlqvcGrQ2] !

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Over a week ago, Trump and his allies shut down the federal government, severely impacting our communities and environment. This government shutdown means higher costs, less access to life-saving healthcare, unattended and unprotected public lands, and people out of work. It provides Republicans with the perfect opportunity to cut clean energy projects and jobs, allow the oil and gas industry to take over our public lands, and pursue Trump’s energy agenda that dirties our air and increases utility costs. During the shutdown, the Trump Administration has already proposed another major funding cut for clean energy projects all in blue states, losing Oregon over $400 million for these very projects ( read more [] ). We need your help, Peter. The consequences of this federal government shut down could be severe if our state does not take action. Will you make a generous contribution of $ 20 now to keep Oregon home? [] Renew your membership [] Our work here in Oregon is more important than ever. Just last week, Governor Tina Kotek signed an Executive Order to speed up the permitting process for clean energy projects, ensuring that they will be underway before the tax credit deadline next year — another Trump administration attack. Now is the moment for our state lawmakers to take action. Oregon can stand up to Trump and his anti-climate agenda. We have already taken our first steps. It’s crucial that our state lawmakers take action, but we need your support [] to continue applying pressure on them to protect our environment and health, and bring relief to Oregonians. Oregon must be a leader on climate, and an example to the rest of the country of what climate action looks like. Please, renew your membership and make your impact in this movement with a generous gift of $20 now. [] Renew your membership [] Join us to work together to keep Oregon the home we know and love, ensuring we stick to the commitments we value. The situation is dire, and now is the time to give and take a stand for Oregon. This will take all of us, but if we each contribute what we can, there’s so much we can do for our home. Our work begins with you . Thank you for making it possible. In solidarity, [] Lindsey Scholten (she/her) OLCV Executive Director P.S.: You can also make a free donation of $50 or $100 to OLCV PAC using Oregon’s Political Tax Credit. name: The Democratic Party
subject: You are not an ATM.
body:
You are an invaluable part of our organization and our mission.
---
Derek, If you’re on other email lists, you probably receive panicked emails that try to scare you into taking action. Too many PACs and politicians view their supporters as their own personal ATMs. Here’s what we believe, Derek:
* You are _not_ an ATM. You are an invaluable part of our organization and our mission.
* Instead of trying to scare you into contributing, we want to provide you with information about the DNC’s work that inspires you and makes you _want_ to join us.
* Instead of misleading you, our goal is always to make sure you have accurate, up-to-date information about how we will put your contribution to work.

So here’s the truth: The DNC is the organization best positioned to distribute funds and resources to the candidates, state parties, and races that need it most. We have a team of experts on staff who spend their days strategizing to help Democrats fight back, organize, and win elections. We set our fundraising goals thoughtfully and intentionally to ensure that we have the resources we need to continue that work, all over the country. [**So, Derek, when you receive an email from the DNC asking for your support, that’s exactly where your contribution goes. Your contribution today will help us elect Democrats in states like Virginia and New Jersey, lay the groundwork to take back Congress next year, and ultimately win the White House in 2028:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251013_4798_fr&refcode2=4798_22930333_Jyc5cn&akid=4798%2E22930333%2EJyc5cn) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251013_4798_fr&refcode2=4798_22930333_Jyc5cn&akid=4798%2E22930333%2EJyc5cn)**

name: Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Please give us a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter -
We're pretty sure you didn't wake up this morning, jump out of bed and say "Today is the day I am going to donate to Jon Ossoff's U.S. Senate campaign!"
_(If you did, great! Here’s the link and thank you in advance:[**https://act.electjon.com/go/Wake-Up**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251013-1-b-f&t=1&akid=919%2E5691347%2E-dM3Ah))_
Otherwise, please give us a second to explain why we’re asking you to chip in and why particularly right now.
Jon won his last election by building the largest on-the-ground movement that Georgia had ever seen.
Doing it again — and going _even bigger_ — is not going to be easy. It is going to take sustained effort from now through Election Day. And we have to get to work right away.
Unfortunately, a lot of people think maybe it's too early to give. Or they'll wait until later. We get that.
But the truth is _early money to a campaign is more important than a donation at any other time._
Your donation now will help us build the strong foundation we need to win, and ensure we’re ready for anything that comes our way on this campaign, from Donald Trump, our MAGA opponents, or anyone else. **So what do you say?**
[**Can Jon count on you to chip in $5, or any amount today? We’ve got a tough road ahead of us, and every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251013-1-b-f&t=2&akid=919%2E5691347%2E-dM3Ah)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: The National Guard is being used as a political weapon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This is about control, intimidation, and fear

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1063%2E49239%2EYM_5Hs)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6793?t=2&akid=1063%2E49239%2EYM_5Hs)
---
null, it’s Haley Stevens.
Right now, our military is being used as a political weapon against American citizens. We have to stop it before it’s too late.
Following National Guard deployments to D.C. and Los Angeles – President Trump is set to send even more National Guard troops to go to Oregon next.
This isn’t about keeping people safe, null. If Trump cared about that, he wouldn’t have cut hundreds of millions of dollars in funding for public safety. He wouldn’t be ordering ICE agents into the streets to tear families apart. He wouldn’t be using the National Guard in the same way that led to the tragic shootings of unarmed protesters at Kent State.
**This is all about control, intimidation, and fear – and it comes straight out of an authoritarian’s playbook.**
I’m running for Senate to stop dangerous abuses of power like this. But first, I need to raise the resources to defeat Trump’s MAGA ally in Michigan – Mike Rogers.
**That’s why my team has set a $100,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and I need your help to reach it before midnight on Wednesday:[Will you chip in $5 or more to help me win in Michigan, flip the Senate for Democrats, and keep the American people safe from Trump’s abuses of power?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6684?t=3&akid=1063%2E49239%2EYM_5Hs)**
| | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6684?t=4&akid=1063%2E49239%2EYM_5Hs)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6794?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1063%2E49239%2EYM_5Hs) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6793?t=6&akid=1063%2E49239%2EYM_5Hs)
---

Thank you,
Haley

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/Removal420.png]
A message to young Latinos:
Half of all new eligible voters in the U.S. are Latino, and here in California, nearly one in three eligible Latino voters is between the ages of 18 and 34 . That makes us one of the youngest and fastest-growing voting groups in the country, which means young Latinos have the power to shape California’s future like never before.
The November 4th statewide special election is our opportunity to do something. We’ve seen the harm the Trump administration has inflicted on our communities across California, from targeting Latino families with cruel immigration policies to rolling back opportunities for young people. These attacks have gone unchecked since day one because MAGA Republicans control every branch of government and continue to enable Trump.
Prop 50 is our chance to fight back. It's how we protect our families, our future, and the community that raised us. When everything is on the line, we have to show up. This is it. We must pass Prop 50.
https://linktr.ee/cadem [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
TAKE ACTION WITH VOTA [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
Through our VOTA program, the California Democratic Party is leading the charge to engage Latino voters and meet them where they are. Here’s how you can take action with VOTA:
* Make calls in English and Spanish [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833417] on Thursdays and Sundays.
* Join phonebanks 6 days a week [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833391] and talk directly with voters.
* Find a canvass near you [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/map/?lat=36.7378&lon=-119.7871&tag_ids=27747&zoom=5.0] or host one in your neighborhood.
* Share information on social media in English or Spanish [https://app.sosha.ai/toolkit/stopelectionrigging-7a15] with ready-to-go graphics and captions. Make sure to tag @cademocrats & @YesonCA50!
In addition to getting out the vote, we’re also protecting it. Our Voter Protection Team helps ensure elections remain fair and safe, but we need more bilingual English-Spanish speakers to ensure ALL voters are protected. If that’s you, join our Voter Protection Team today [https://fs3.formsite.com/CADEM2011/CADEMVOTERPROTECTIONTEAM/index?nvep=&hmac=&emci=8c5339e9-f79e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] .
I hope you will consider getting involved in this critical election. It starts with us.
Gracias,
Andrea Guzman & VOTA Team

If that’s you, join our Voter Protection Team today [=] . I hope you will consider getting involved in this critical election. It starts with us. Gracias, Andrea Guzman & VOTA Team [] [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump's sham roundtable = war on ALL grassroots Democrats
body:
Peter, this is it. It's all out in the open now.
The Trump administration recently held an “Antifa Roundtable” - a staged event designed to brand Democratic organizers, grassroots fundraisers, and progressive movements as domestic threats.
They’re targeting Democratic PACs, nonprofits, and voter outreach groups in coordinated political hit jobs, claming that they're engaging in TERRORIST ACTIVITIES.
They’re calling your $5 donations “money laundering.”
This is a CRUCIAL MOMENT. We must fight back NOW.
We’re launching an emergency rapid-response fund to protect Democratic operations under attack. Chip in $10 or whatever you can right now to show the Trump administration that grassroots Democrats will never be silenced. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?refcode=101325_4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_4&amount=5] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_4&amount=10] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_4&amount=50] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_4&amount=100] DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_4&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?refcode=101325_4&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=101325_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=101325_4]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Join me Tuesday in Duncan Park.
body:
Early voting starts October 20.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a93cc2a8f0e3/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6422043?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
# Join me tomorrow for a meet & greet in Duncan Park!
---
| |

Join me at the home of Witney Fisher on Tuesday, October 14 at 6pm for a meet & greet before early voting starts October 20-31. No contribution is necessary to attend this event, but campaign donations are welcome. [**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=851dacc890&e=edbde6c9b1)**.**
Checks can be mailed to: Kathryn for Council PO BOX 7102 Spartanburg, SC 29304
---
|
---
| |
And if you'd like to show your support with a yard sign,[ request one here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e9840297e4&e=edbde6c9b1). We’ll deliver to folks living in the Council District (Eastside of Spartanburg, Pacolet, Cowpens, Mayo).
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bfee073d10&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Request a yard sign](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9f2022245c&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |
# Early voting starts October 20
# Knock doors with me on Saturdays & Sundays
---
| | Join me every Saturday at 10am & Sunday at 3pm for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! [You can register to volunteer ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b6fa6eb381&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
| [Knock doors with Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6173920fc1&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=54733311b7&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
Interested in phone banking for my campaign? This is a great opportunity to volunteer on your own time and help my race for County Council. Register at the link below and you'll [receive a link to make calls. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c447ad6d5c&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| | ****Canvass with Kathryn Harvey every Sunday at 3pm**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=042577aa55&e=edbde6c9b1)******
* October 14 - Meet & Greet in Duncan Park
* October 6-17 - Early Voting for Senate 12 Primary
* October 18 - No Kings Rally in Spartanburg 11-1pm St. John & Church St.
* October 21 - Senate 12 Primary Election Day
* October 20 - 31 Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30- 5:00
* **November 4: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)**
* November 4: Senate 12 Primary Runoff
* **November 10: SPCDP Monthly Meeting**
* November 18 Run off elections
* **December 1: SPCDP State-wide Candidate Forum **

---
| |
# Join me October 23 in Columbia
---
| |
Join me October 23 in Columbia to support [Emerge SC](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ffb05f9dff&e=edbde6c9b1), and celebrate Inez Tenenbaum, Adair Ford Boroughs and Rep Courtney Waters!
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=693bf14dab&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Get tickets ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c4092a1d24&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | **CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 **Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online.
---
|
---
|
---
| |

# The Supreme Court Case that could change voting rights for generations
---
| |
[**What to know about the impact of this case.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=90ec101e3a&e=edbde6c9b1)

The Court will examine whether Louisiana’s court-ordered creation of a second majority-Black congressional district, drawn to fix a Voting Rights Act violation, is [unconstitutional](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=83375b141d&e=edbde6c9b1) due to its consideration of race.
But at the heart of this case is **Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act** – the safeguard that protects voters of color from racially discriminatory political maps. For decades, Section 2 has been the central safeguard against racially discriminatory redistricting, requiring states to fix discriminatory maps so minority communities can have a fair chance to elect candidates of their choice.
The Supreme Court will now decide whether considering race to fix racial discrimination in political maps can itself be called “discrimination.” If the justices decide that remedies for discrimination violate the Constitution’s Equal Protection Clause, it would be a seismic shift – weaponizing the Reconstruction-era Amendments to dismantle the very rights they were created to protect.
If Section 2 is gutted, protections against discriminatory maps could nearly vanish nationwide. Courts have already given politicians a green light to gerrymander for partisan advantage. That means congressional districts, state legislative maps, city councils, even school boards could be redrawn in ways that silence entire communities.
---
| | | | The Supreme Court will hear arguments in _Louisiana v. Callais_ on **October 15** –Here are a few ways you can engage:
📍 [**Join the rally**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d81d351379&e=edbde6c9b1)**at the Supreme Court** in Washington DC on October 15 to defend the Voting Rights Act.
📝****[**Sign this petition**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e6c2c81a5d&e=edbde6c9b1)**** to tell the Supreme Court and Congress you demand urgent action to defend voting rights.

Last Friday I was honored to attend the Be Her Champions event raising awareness about Breast Cancer with the Spartanburg Regional Foundation. My mom was diagnosed earlier this year, and because it was detected early they were able the swiftly act. She is doing fine, and we are grateful for the medical care she received!We hosted Spartanburg’s Sheriff-elect Bill Ryhne at our monthly party meeting on Monday and held an informative discussion around his vision for our community.
On Tuesday I attended the Art & Elections event hosted by Alix Refshauge and Cat Judice, highlighting female candidates running in Spartanburg County this year. It was so inspiring to hear from each candidate. And finally, I took a whirlwind trip to NYC, the place I called home for 16 years, to celebrate the Sister Senators big news - Actor Julianna Margulies has signed on as an executive producer! They had an incredible showing of support for their film, and received a matching $25,000 gift. Let's help them get this film to the finish line - support their efforts at [**https://www.sistersenatorsfilm.com.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=73828181fc&e=edbde6c9b1)
**Please call your Senators and tell them we won't stand for Senate Bill 323 that persecutes women, doctors, and even pastors.**[**Learn more here.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f6e6778f36&e=edbde6c9b1)
Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=99b273d0fc&e=edbde6c9b1).

name: Andrea
subject: Events for Democracy October-November
body:
Join us to protect democracy and fight for strong leadership for Indianapolis | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/andreahunley/events-for-democracy-october-november?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| |
# ENGAGE WITH YOUR DEMOCRACY THIS FALL
Dear Friends,
In the last few weeks, we have seen repeated assaults from the White House on our democracy here in Indiana. I have been fighting hard at the State House against the Washington Republican assault on our legislative maps, and have been heartened to see the outpouring of community action against this blatant attempt to sabotage our elections. If we want to protect our communities, we need this kind of action to continue at all levels, particularly here locally in Indianapolis.

If you are looking for ways to join the fight, or to support my work fighting for democracy, I am hosting a few events in the coming month, as well as a town hall where you can bring your concerns to me ahead of the upcoming legislative session. All these would be great spaces to take meaningful action, and meet other people committed to the fight.
* If you're in Irvington, I'd love to see you at our fundraiser hosted by Ariel Ream and Marie Hitze at **Jockamo's Pizza, on Thursday, 10/23 from 6 to 8 pm,** where you can meet me and other Hoosiers passionate about making a change, and help contribute to my efforts to protect our communities. [RSVP here](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=397dde57ec&e=d9ebccf591).

* I also am rescheduling the **make and meet at Tuggle's Gifts & Goods to Sunday, 11/2 from 6:30 to 8 pm. **I was very sad to have to cancel the event last month, and am looking forward to getting it together again, it promises to be lots of fun! You can join me for an evening of civic creativity. We will decorate tote bags with patches, pins, stencils and more, all while enjoying bubbly drinks, sweet treats, and great conversation. [Get tickets here](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=d7aeb19517&e=d9ebccf591).

* I'll be hosting a **town hall, at the West Indianapolis Library on Saturday, 11/1 at 10 am**. As I am getting ready to return to the State House, I want to make sure that I am taking your concerns with me to make sure that I represent you as well as possible. I am looking forward to discussing many topics of concern for our community, particularly as energy prices, gerrymandering, education and health care costs. Please come, and invite anyone you know: democracy works best when everyone is engaged, and the best way to have your voice heard is to come and speak up at events likes this.

Check out the flyers below for more information about all these events!

I have also been quite busy advocating for the community in the past few weeks, I've included some reporting on the issues I've been working on below. When so much of the national news feels overwhelming, it's important to recognize the challenges right in front of us that we can tackle head on.

I appreciate your support, and am looking forward to seeing you again soon, Andrea
---
|
---
|
---
| [RSVP](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=6fdf4e883f&e=d9ebccf591 "RSVP")
---
|
---
| [PURCHASE TICKETS](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=8d70640e75&e=d9ebccf591 "PURCHASE TICKETS")
---
|
---
|
# SENATOR HUNLEY IN THE NEWS

**Buttigieg headlines rally opposing redistricting: ‘Cheaters never win’**
[Capital Chronicle](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=79209170c7&e=d9ebccf591) _Democrats hold just two of Indiana’s nine congressional seats, located in deep-blue Marion County and the northwestern corner of Indiana near Chicago. Both are more racially and ethnically diverse than the rest of the state, potentially opening the door for legal challenges, though their minority voting populations are relatively small. _ _“We have to call this out for what it is: this is a racist power grab to silence voters who look like me,” said Sen. Andrea Hunley, D-Indianapolis. “... things feel really tough right now, but we stand on the shoulders of ancestors and freedom fighters who’ve been here before and who’ve done the work before, and so we need to follow their lead.”_ **After JD Vance's Indiana visit, Republican lawmakers promise redistricting decision 'soon'**
[Indy Star](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=b333b31022&e=d9ebccf591)

_"Vance isn't here to talk about skyrocketing utility bills," Sen. Andrea Hunley, D-Indianapolis, told the crowd. "Or the grocery bills. Or the medical bills. Or the cost of child care."

Instead, she said, he was here for the "arm-twisting tour."_

**‘It doesn’t have to be this way’: Indy students protest gun violence in national walkout**
[Mirror Indy](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=afc503fb52&e=d9ebccf591) _State Sen. Andrea Hunley, D-Indianapolis, a former IPS principal who took office after the 2022 permitless carry bill passed, spoke to students at the event._ _“It doesn’t have to be this way,” Hunley told students from the Statehouse steps. “What we could do here as legislators in this building is we could make sure that people need a permit to carry a gun. We could make sure that people have to register their gun and all of their gun sales.”_

**Martindale Brightwood residents meet for a second public meeting about a possible data center**
[WRTV](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=5fc739e4ef&e=d9ebccf591) _"I serve on our Indiana State Senate Utilities Committee, which is where we talk a lot about data production, data centers, and the utilities. That will then hook into them to help power them, how the environmental impact will have an impact on our water supply or things like that," State Senator Andrea Hunley said._
---

---
| | |

subject: 4,800+ votes in — and we’re just getting started!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | Early voting is on fire, Friend! than 4,800 Virginians have already cast their ballots in this race, and momentum is on our side. We’re officially at a 68% chance of winning , according to a nonpartisan forecast. That’s incredible progress — but it’s still way too close for comfort. MAGA super PACs are pouring money into Virginia trying to smother this surge before it breaks through. So here’s the plan: we out-hustle them. Every door we knock, every text we send, every early vote we win bank pushes us closer to flipping this seat — and flipping Virginia blue. We have the energy. We have the people. Now we just need the resources to finish strong. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. This is the moment campaigns dream of — momentum, energy, and a clear path to victory. Let’s make sure that when the final votes are counted, the story is simple: grassroots power beat dark money every time. Thanks for your support. Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . subject: Trump Was Right The System Is Rigged And Here Is Your Way Out
body:
You worked. You saved. You did what they told you.

| | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd1vo6t521shut75hecltc2amptfdff5cgt9qgv8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j64ob1cph2bs)
---
**You followed the plan.** You worked. You saved. You did what they told you. Then Trump said what millions were already feeling: _“The system is rigged.”_ Not just in politics or the media. But in **finance** too.
**Yet thousands of Americans over 59 have refused to keep playing the “rigged” game.** Instead, they made a move that changed everything - starting what they now call their **“Second Retirement.”** It’s a little-known but perfectly legal way to _walk away from the establishment_ and their traditional expectations. A quiet shift from _dependence..._
And a bold move toward **independence**.
These fed-up Americans are taking a stand by putting a portion of their retirement savings into something they actually believe in... While opting out of stale, outdated ideas. As inflation drags on and millions search for a way out... **Thousands have already made their move...

...with a Second Retirement.**
| **They’re not waiting for permission.** They’re not hoping the system will suddenly work. They’re simply **taking control** , and _rewriting their story_.
---
**If You’re Tired of Doing What’s Expected of You, Then the Second Retirement Kit Was Made For YOU.**
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmaiaod4mkon7l2t26f57ebl6f6sb3l300qmitlg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j64ob1cph2bs)
_It’s your next chess move, while the masses are still playing checkers._ [Get Your Second Retirement Kit Today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8cqr129ia83u0kja7cgj1dfs9dk3gddla24mrdo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j64ob1cph2bs) _(Takes 30 seconds. No cost. Just clarity.)_
Inflation looms. Red tape piles up. And Congress keeps kicking the can down the road... And it’s putting pressure on your **savings** , your **retirement** , and **your future**. **How much longer before you say _enough is enough?_**

body:
Hope to See You There! No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qhdtjtl-hhlljjcji-h/) Dear Hoosier Republican,This is the last chance to reserve your spot for our Party's Annual Fall Dinner on **Monday, October 27, 2025, in Indianapolis!** We're excited to welcome **RNC Chairman Joe Gruters, Governor Mike Braun, and Republican leaders from across Indiana!** As we look to 2026, the stakes couldn't be higher! We're fighting for safer communities, stronger families, and a government that puts Hoosiers first! Fall Dinner is our chance to come together, hear from leaders who share our vision, and leave ready to take the fight to every corner of our state!We only have a few tables left, and they're selling out fast! If you have not yet secured your spot, please contact our team at **rsvp@indiana.gop** while there's still time!Happy Columbus Day and yours in service, **Lana Keesling**
Indiana Republican Party [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhdtjtl-hhlljjcji-r/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhdtjtl-hhlljjcji-y/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhdtjtl-hhlljjcji-j/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhdtjtl-hhlljjcji-t/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhdtjtl-hhlljjcji-i/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhdtjtl-hhlljjcji-d/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious

| |
---
| | | | | | | My back is against the wall, Patriot.

The Left has too much influence, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now, their sights are set on me:
---
| | **[**Jeffries super PAC looks deep into GOP territory for 2026 map**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zra6ssih4acq9flrh1pgc2pjommk487r5qefb0kg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c9h2bs)**
---
_[_Axios_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z296ei8vqlm3ppd8mse1g3qerq28bcku32olao10_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c9h2bs)_
---
| | If I don't catch up, I'll be handing the keys to the radical Left and surrendering our Republican majority to the same forces hell-bent on destroying our country.
---
**Patriot, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's first Secretary of the Interior and was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**

**I 'm also desperately trying to hold on to the most critical seat in Congress. **
---
And if Schumer and Jeffries can take me down, then I can guarantee you no other Republican will stand a chance.
a new paragraph block.
---
**In 2022 and 2024, I led the team of Navy SEALs that held onto the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I 'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington, D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. **
---
So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Patriot. **[I _f you chip in just $5 right now_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zekts6b16f3dn9jbda7b4mflu5ejrg1fpteeeo4g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c9h2bs)** __, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Left 's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfrisf89447d1ijgmu1c1jkgpirqtuf4mhjfnh8g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c9h2bs)
---
You have my word; as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqmmtvnjs4imok2046lrphn558q7443qiba9uplo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c9h2bs)

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5lrmhdiqc2ts66ohkmtl7miggdp2kccoevboil8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c3h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvp5m7sld216of9crcsial3tti9s9ac3ajgol6kg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c3h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z25qlm3sifgfoel8rpp4feap0p8nlq0076np5oao_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c3h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuq7tk8ndnhumnpsh5nth52c32in75rch8pukggo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c3h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z36phdlnan0sk300diktrimau8n5lb91ljprn9i8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5j66o32c3h2bs)

It’s no wonder hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# **[ESPN forced her to get the COVID shot — then fired her anyway](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/GVcGpxO4KZ3MCAt_hqtCWw)**
---
Former ESPN anchor Sage Steele was among those in 2021 forced to take the COVID-19 vaccine in order to keep her job — but after complying and getting the shots, her employer let her go anyway.Steele was taken off the air following a podcast appearance on “Uncut with Jay Cutler,” where she called vaccine mandates “sick” and “scary.”“You’ve had this long career, this illustrious career, and it came to a point when truth was on the line, and you took a risk,” BlazeTV host Allie Beth Stuckey says to Steele.“I had been suspended, punished at ESPN in 2021. As we tape this, exactly four years ago I was suspended and in bed, sobbing and scared to death of what was next,” Steele explains.

---
[ ](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJycUbuO3DAM_Bq584J6WBsXLhZrGEhxQYpDUgqyJNsMZEuwpF3c3wdK7tKlOVbEzIDkDH--qBeNHo_1m97dYB6ozqQ2p088Vo02_SopryHnzeE5o2LAupZCS4WKZ0jRmaxYYwdjJWeNG-hVguASGDTb0NPO8S-96TohBYdO9Bw6YL21IKi1psGhzqNABQUAyi9MOqeZNeZq-6UTnAgo0ers0sWEI7nzoTM-HB5HqF04LibsjR-2nGMi_EbYRNj0fD4v1UIlCZssYdPsUv6wpaovpZcFaNXzSZtM-Hi7v0ItCVTC7f5KmCx5VymU0zjCx_nNvkO7s1h2wke9LOhRZ_dOGL1HjetB-FiScofSvi5V_3RqfrMVaT2uW56Ln1sbyuydiiFqk7X6zxWxzB7T5k6FlvDxe4g3kzVhMpX5L3T_8bX9SLM5Bxuf6D0meSUC1l2j_xNV_uyLHwP7HQAA__8skreH)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJycUbuO3DAM_Bq584J6WBsXLhZrGEhxQYpDUgqyJNsMZEuwpF3c3wdK7tKlOVbEzIDkDH--qBeNHo_1m97dYB6ozqQ2p088Vo02_SopryHnzeE5o2LAupZCS4WKZ0jRmaxYYwdjJWeNG-hVguASGDTb0NPO8S-96TohBYdO9Bw6YL21IKi1psGhzqNABQUAyi9MOqeZNeZq-6UTnAgo0ers0sWEI7nzoTM-HB5HqF04LibsjR-2nGMi_EbYRNj0fD4v1UIlCZssYdPsUv6wpaovpZcFaNXzSZtM-Hi7v0ItCVTC7f5KmCx5VymU0zjCx_nNvkO7s1h2wke9LOhRZ_dOGL1HjetB-FiScofSvi5V_3RqfrMVaT2uW56Ln1sbyuydiiFqk7X6zxWxzB7T5k6FlvDxe4g3kzVhMpX5L3T_8bX9SLM5Bxuf6D0meSUC1l2j_xNV_uyLHwP7HQAA__8skreH)
[ ](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJycUbuO3DAM_Bq584J6WBsXLhZrGEhxQYpDUgqyJNsMZEuwpF3c3wdK7tKlOVbEzIDkDH--qBeNHo_1m97dYB6ozqQ2p088Vo02_SopryHnzeE5o2LAupZCS4WKZ0jRmaxYYwdjJWeNG-hVguASGDTb0NPO8S-96TohBYdO9Bw6YL21IKi1psGhzqNABQUAyi9MOqeZNeZq-6UTnAgo0ers0sWEI7nzoTM-HB5HqF04LibsjR-2nGMi_EbYRNj0fD4v1UIlCZssYdPsUv6wpaovpZcFaNXzSZtM-Hi7v0ItCVTC7f5KmCx5VymU0zjCx_nNvkO7s1h2wke9LOhRZ_dOGL1HjetB-FiScofSvi5V_3RqfrMVaT2uW56Ln1sbyuydiiFqk7X6zxWxzB7T5k6FlvDxe4g3kzVhMpX5L3T_8bX9SLM5Bxuf6D0meSUC1l2j_xNV_uyLHwP7HQAA__8skreH)
What makes hear.com's IX hearing aid so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com's IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJycUbuO3DAM_Bq584J6WBsXLhZrGEhxQYpDUgqyJNsMZEuwpF3c3wdK7tKlOVbEzIDkDH--qBeNHo_1m97dYB6ozqQ2p088Vo02_SopryHnzeE5o2LAupZCS4WKZ0jRmaxYYwdjJWeNG-hVguASGDTb0NPO8S-96TohBYdO9Bw6YL21IKi1psGhzqNABQUAyi9MOqeZNeZq-6UTnAgo0ers0sWEI7nzoTM-HB5HqF04LibsjR-2nGMi_EbYRNj0fD4v1UIlCZssYdPsUv6wpaovpZcFaNXzSZtM-Hi7v0ItCVTC7f5KmCx5VymU0zjCx_nNvkO7s1h2wke9LOhRZ_dOGL1HjetB-FiScofSvi5V_3RqfrMVaT2uW56Ln1sbyuydiiFqk7X6zxWxzB7T5k6FlvDxe4g3kzVhMpX5L3T_8bX9SLM5Bxuf6D0meSUC1l2j_xNV_uyLHwP7HQAA__8skreH)

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: Voters confused as hell in critical 2025 PA Supreme Court election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Because the justices don’t have a D or R next to their name, it's up to voters to figure out on their own. Now polls are showing that voters are uncertain on whether voting “yes” or “no”
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S_EYN15RTsEWtiIPcasnnhXtPQ_QqnKp5sBlgPqEpb-In3lWgCa6SrJB86-4rDhZ7qinY9bylA66uqfKTVQduWgjn8HpMqmhOAt4Cl2bkFWYHvwrL4DMxnsToJJ6dWVybZ3Zn14sMSfegMh6W2Z0qqImPHoy9M06IkUB0ilD-t__QveZhjAwYtZX_IPQjzqK_4lFUa8vKnUyGAkyk-ZsRk-VYBW9bEgCsMpZ_PClZYE=&c=kMtkCcjwvcU-g_RonQKc1tmGNOElNA4dTBRb-nXrtWKxHaxFKRVq6A==&ch=jxOJkYS_v7ZAZgH2m3SnfbE2epRFxMoXNT6lMfwkvFJfVlhjKRkHpQ==)
---
| Peter,
MAGA is presently trying to remove three Democratic justices on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court in an obscure November 4th 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Judicial Retention election.
If we Democrats lose our court majority, MAGA will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict PA's maps, and take control of elections in this key swing state all but guaranteeing Democrats lose PA and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond.
With less than 21 days until election day voters are confused as all hell.
Because the justices don't have a D or R next to their name, it's up to voters to figure out on their own. Now polls are showing that voters are undecided and uncertain on whether voting "yes" or "no" on judicial retention will support or oppose MAGA.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S_EYN15RTsEWtiIPcasnnhXtPQ_QqnKp5sBlgPqEpb-In3lWgCa6SrJB86-4rDhZ7qinY9bylA66uqfKTVQduWgjn8HpMqmhOAt4Cl2bkFWYHvwrL4DMxnsToJJ6dWVybZ3Zn14sMSfegMh6W2Z0qqImPHoy9M06IkUB0ilD-t__QveZhjAwYtZX_IPQjzqK_4lFUa8vKnUyGAkyk-ZsRpGy4Hpgpcr5u9CNdDGXsXM=&c=kMtkCcjwvcU-g_RonQKc1tmGNOElNA4dTBRb-nXrtWKxHaxFKRVq6A==&ch=jxOJkYS_v7ZAZgH2m3SnfbE2epRFxMoXNT6lMfwkvFJfVlhjKRkHpQ==)
---

The GOP is taking advantage of this and is spending millions on deceptive ads and mailers to try to convince Democratic and Independent voters to vote no and remove their Supreme Court Justices.
Take for instance the below mailer which is being sent to Democrats via Commonwealth Partners, a PAC run by ultra MAGA billionaire Jeff Yass. Its mission is to misinform Democrats into voting for the MAGA cause:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S_EYN15RTsEWtiIPcasnnhXtPQ_QqnKp5sBlgPqEpb-In3lWgCa6SrJB86-4rDhZ7qinY9bylA66uqfKTVQduWgjn8HpMqmhOAt4Cl2bkFWYHvwrL4DMxnsToJJ6dWVybZ3Zn14sMSfegMh6W2Z0qqImPHoy9M06IkUB0ilD-t__QveZhjAwYtZX_IPQjzqK_4lFUa8vKnUyGAkyk-ZsRn9rfcgbw5P_nxZTg2ci5dA=&c=kMtkCcjwvcU-g_RonQKc1tmGNOElNA4dTBRb-nXrtWKxHaxFKRVq6A==&ch=jxOJkYS_v7ZAZgH2m3SnfbE2epRFxMoXNT6lMfwkvFJfVlhjKRkHpQ==)
---
|
Defend Our Courts is fighting back with mailers, ads, and door to door canvassing, to inform Democratic and Independent voters that voting yes is the correct way to fill out their ballots.
[Time is running out and we can't let MAGA poison the well and trick our own voters into voting against us. Can we count on you to make a donation of whatever you can spare to supercharge our efforts to educate voters and combat disinformation in the run up to this life or death election?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S_EYN15RTsEWtiIPcasnnhXtPQ_QqnKp5sBlgPqEpb-In3lWgCa6SrJB86-4rDhZ7qinY9bylA66uqfKTVQduWgjn8HpMqmhOAt4Cl2bkFWYHvwrL4DMxnsToJJ6dWVybZ3Zn14sMSfegMh6W2Z0qqImPHoy9M06IkUB0ilD-t__QveZhjAwYtZX_IPQjzqK_4lFUa8vKnUyGAkyk-ZsRkPSuqyYcdlQjh_hVc_LtfM=&c=kMtkCcjwvcU-g_RonQKc1tmGNOElNA4dTBRb-nXrtWKxHaxFKRVq6A==&ch=jxOJkYS_v7ZAZgH2m3SnfbE2epRFxMoXNT6lMfwkvFJfVlhjKRkHpQ==)
---
| | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---

body:
Because the justices don’t have a D or R next to their name, it's up to voters to figure out on their own. Now polls are showing that voters are uncertain on whether voting “yes” or “no”
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gZidGotxi1vnMo80D_tU9moWxyhsD5Is1LYCMKT5MLPcfcPteplgEp6ObX6d9IvBGzn5bQVUpktkAfGVF62jErUWhfKspnToWKCxRAuXuWxZczBFXGw5kwjZiGQKNNRqId_RCgwikVJ4xJl4TTvZJK9G1MgmX-XjoQaIy9mwoCfPJ5XMHDKfPuJPR9KQujW9bpUDhnmCa2RA7-0LLPdkjXdvE1uRl26Jx--zoVr0kYY=&c=ouzKaf6G9KeEa9681JzhNQY_LQU7FTh-tXZEIGLQiuLRpjoMsCSF2Q==&ch=6mzj6n7wwRi1J5uyAyBL6_5-3AzuBF3BO-j3MC1ybs5tFImrEFA7HQ==)
---
| Peter,
MAGA is presently trying to remove three Democratic justices on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court in an obscure November 4th 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Judicial Retention election.
If we Democrats lose our court majority, MAGA will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict PA's maps, and take control of elections in this key swing state all but guaranteeing Democrats lose PA and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond.
With less than 21 days until election day voters are confused as all hell.
Because the justices don't have a D or R next to their name, it's up to voters to figure out on their own. Now polls are showing that voters are undecided and uncertain on whether voting "yes" or "no" on judicial retention will support or oppose MAGA.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gZidGotxi1vnMo80D_tU9moWxyhsD5Is1LYCMKT5MLPcfcPteplgEp6ObX6d9IvBGzn5bQVUpktkAfGVF62jErUWhfKspnToWKCxRAuXuWxZczBFXGw5kwjZiGQKNNRqId_RCgwikVJ4xJl4TTvZJK9G1MgmX-XjoQaIy9mwoCfPJ5XMHDKfPuJPR9KQujW9bpUDhnmCa2RA7-0LLPdkjc-LbA9MXgpR5bXv9F0n3h8=&c=ouzKaf6G9KeEa9681JzhNQY_LQU7FTh-tXZEIGLQiuLRpjoMsCSF2Q==&ch=6mzj6n7wwRi1J5uyAyBL6_5-3AzuBF3BO-j3MC1ybs5tFImrEFA7HQ==)

clean_body: Because the justices don’t have a D or R next to their name, it's up to voters to figure out on their own. Now polls are showing that voters are uncertain on whether voting “yes” or “no” | | | | | == | Peter, MAGA is presently trying to remove three Democratic justices on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court in an obscure November 4th 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Judicial Retention election. If we Democrats lose our court majority, MAGA will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict PA's maps, and take control of elections in this key swing state all but guaranteeing Democrats lose PA and its 19 electoral college votes for the next decade and beyond. With less than 21 days until election day voters are confused as all hell. Because the justices don't have a D or R next to their name, it's up to voters to figure out on their own. Now polls are showing that voters are undecided and uncertain on whether voting "yes" or "no" on judicial retention will support or oppose MAGA. | | == The GOP is taking advantage of this and is spending millions on deceptive ads and mailers to try to convince Democratic and Independent voters to vote no and remove their Supreme Court Justices. Take for instance the below mailer which is being sent to Democrats via Commonwealth Partners, a PAC run by ultra MAGA billionaire Jeff Yass. name: Russell Cleveland for U.S. House MT-01
subject: This shutdown hurts Montanans. Not Washington insiders.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLEVELAND FOR CONGRESSP
body:
This shutdown isn’t about border politics. It’s about working families losing healthcare, food, and hope.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://russellcleveland.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7cef8d6a1da540dae5618949&id=a31e72e89a&e=375cee343b)
| | **They’re not cutting waste. They’re cutting your neighbors off.**
---
| | | | | | I want to take a moment to clear this up, for those confused by the current shutdown that is being blamed on the Democrats, perpetuated by the lying billionaire bootlicking far right legislators in D.C., including our own MT-01 Rep. Ryan Zinke.
This shutdown is not about kicking “illegals” off of healthcare, they are not on it. The hold out is only aimed at benefiting those with excessive wealth... you know, those standing right near President Trump on Inauguration Day. To those folks, this shutdown is about these things;
It is about kicking your neighbor Lisa off of Medicaid, so that despite working two jobs and barely having enough money to pay for heat, she is now forced to go without health insurance.
It’s about kicking your Uncle Steve off of Medicare, so that instead of having a little peace after a life of hard work, he has to now go back to work at age 80 to have money to afford his medications and healthcare.
It’s about kicking those two kids, Jake and Jenny, on your son and daughters soccer team off snap, so that they don’t have healthy food options, and are forced to eat the more affordable but far less nutritious foods because their mom Laura was widowed by her husband Tom, who was killed in an accidental logging accident last spring.
It is about removing marketplace subsidies for John, that gentleman who has ran that little country store down the road from you the last 30 years, his only hope for health insurance as a sole proprietor small business owner, so that privatized healthcare can nearly double its profits next year at John’s expense.
It’s about removing the things that help us take care of our neighbors, our community members, our friends and family, so that another ultra wealthy individual can have even more wealth.
These are real scenarios, and this is not ok. We must fight back, and it starts at the ballot box. Help me defeat our MT-01 Rep Ryan Zinke, who aims to impact your community in this exact way.
I can’t do it without you.
-Russell Cleveland
[**👉 Donate.**](https://russellcleveland.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7cef8d6a1da540dae5618949&id=55a34c9b3d&e=375cee343b)****[**Endorse.**](https://russellcleveland.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7cef8d6a1da540dae5618949&id=ebced85bab&e=375cee343b)****[**Volunteer.**](https://russellcleveland.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7cef8d6a1da540dae5618949&id=c5259cae44&e=375cee343b)
Be part of something bigger than politics. Be part of Cleveland for Congress.
-Team Cleveland

|
# A Critical Election Is Coming
---
| |
---
| **This coming Monday** , Early Voting begins for the Constitutional Amendment and Special Election. During this election, all Texans will decide on **17 proposed constitutional amendments** that could reshape our state forever. Among them is Proposition 15, which would **enshrine Parents’ Rights** into the Texas Constitution and create a constitutional safeguard against tyrants who want to interfere with your parental decisions. This election is also significant because of a few down-ballot local contests. In Tarrant County’s **State Senate District 9** , TFVC is thrilled to _wholeheartedly support_ **Leigh Wambsganss** , who is running in the special election to fill a now vacant seat. And in **Granbury ISD** , we’re backing **Jessica Wark for Place 7** on the school board—a hyper-local race where every vote counts. No matter where you live, **your vote matters**. Visit our [Common Voter Questions](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY4MjM3ODQxNjA4ODY5NjE0LFwiclwiOjE2ODIzNzg3MjgzNjUxMTA5NH0iLCJzIjoiOWFhNzdiNGYzMTUzZTlhZCJ9) to find answers and our [Voter Guide](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY4MjM3ODQxNjEzMDYzOTIxLFwiclwiOjE2ODIzNzg3MjgzNjUxMTA5NH0iLCJzIjoiMGU1MzNmNWI0ODFmYTUzNSJ9). Then show up to vote YES on Prop 15, check the box for Leigh Wambsganss in Senate District 9, and support Jessica Wark for Place 7 if you live in Granbury. **Early voting runs October 20 – October 31. Election Day is November 4.** **Make your plan to vote today! Together, we can ensure Texans do not co-parent with the government.**

---

| Join TFVC for **an evening with Aaron Siri** , America’s leading legal advocate for vaccine choice! Hear his **inspiring keynote and Q &A on his new book** _Vaccines, Amen_ near Austin on Wednesday, November 12. Each ticket includes a copy of the book, with a VIP hour for a personal meet-and-greet and signing. Secure your **early bird tickets** by October 26!

## Apply To Be a TFVC OC

clean_body: | | Get Ready to Vote! | | | | | | A Critical Election Is Coming | | | This coming Monday , Early Voting begins for the Constitutional Amendment and Special Election. During this election, all Texans will decide on 17 proposed constitutional amendments that could reshape our state forever. Among them is Proposition 15, which would enshrine Parents’ Rights into the Texas Constitution and create a constitutional safeguard against tyrants who want to interfere with your parental decisions. This election is also significant because of a few down-ballot local contests. In Tarrant County’s State Senate District 9 , TFVC is thrilled to wholeheartedly support Leigh Wambsganss , who is running in the special election to fill a now vacant seat. And in Granbury ISD , we’re backing Jessica Wark for Place 7 on the school board—a hyper-local race where every vote counts. No matter where you live, your vote matters. Visit our to find answers and our . Then show up to vote YES on Prop 15, check the box for Leigh Wambsganss in Senate District 9, and support Jessica Wark for Place 7 if you live in Granbury. Early voting runs October 20 – October 31. Election Day is November 4. Make your plan to vote today! Together, we can ensure Texans do not co-parent with the government. | | | | | | | | Exclusive Event: Aaron Siri LIVE | | | | | | Join TFVC for an evening with Aaron Siri , America’s leading legal advocate for vaccine choice! Hear his inspiring keynote and Q &A on his new book Vaccines, Amen near Austin on Wednesday, November 12. Each ticket includes a copy of the book, with a VIP hour for a personal meet-and-greet and signing. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: 🙏🙏 I am asking, humbly, for you to join the 2% of Democrats getting this message who donate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Please don't skip this 1-minute read. It's Tuesday October 14, and we have our final, official fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days.

| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250925-1&refcode2=2668_4767699_OCXNp9&akid=2668%2E4767699%2EOCXNp9)
**Voting is underway and we are getting hammered with attack ads on TV and online. We could lose.**
October 14: Supporters like you deserve an explanation of what's happening in California.
---|---

Please don't skip this 1-minute read. It's Tuesday October 14, and we have our final, official fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days.

If you have ever found yourself wishing there was some check on Donald Trump's power, then that means you know the stakes of this election.

So I am asking, humbly, for you to join the 2% of Democrats getting this message who donate what they can to help stop Donald Trump rigging the next election.
---

The truth is, I wasn't sure whether or not we'd get to this point. Even when talk started about Trump calling Greg Abbott for the five seats he said he was entitled to.

But as time went on, and I heard the calls for Democrats to "Do Something!" I agreed. No more holding hands. No more talk. It was time for action. Concrete action.

So we made the decision to move forward.
---

Most people donate because they realize if we lose this election in California, it means Democrats have virtually no chance of taking back the House. If you feel the same, I hope you'll donate today. Any contribution helps.

Our average donation to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee is around $30. Many donors give less. Some give more. All that matters is you are choosing to act to help pass the Election Rigging Response Act to give Democrats a fair chance in the next election.

[**If stopping Trump's efforts to rig the next election seems worth $3 to you, we're humbly asking you to make that donation today. Thank you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250925-1&refcode2=2668_4767699_OCXNp9&akid=2668%2E4767699%2EOCXNp9)

name: With Honor Action
subject: Coming Together in Divided Times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
How With Honor Action is fostering unity and principled leadership during the shutdown. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/withhonor/coming-together-in-divided-times?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=a2d99fb381&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | Friends,

Fourteen days into a government shutdown, we’re reminded that gridlock isn’t an act of fate — it’s the product of polarization.

When Congress can’t work together, our troops, families, and public servants pay the price. Now more than ever, America needs leaders willing to rise above division — to have hard conversations, bridge differences, and put service above self.

That’s why With Honor continues to champion principled, bipartisan leadership dedicated to restoring trust and functionality in government.

Thank you for standing with us as we work to build a Congress — and a country — grounded in trust, service, and shared purpose.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=57d0640b06&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| The **Strength in Democracy Forum** convened leaders from across government, the military, and business to discuss global security, emerging technologies, and how bipartisan veteran leadership strengthens democracy at home and abroad.

**Together, we reaffirmed that democracy is strongest when veterans lead with integrity and allies stand united.**
---
| [🎥 Watch the Full Forum Recording ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=9c470ab57a&e=33f53a5b1a "🎥 Watch the Full Forum Recording ")
---
| **The conversations explored the future of national security, innovation, and collaboration** — underscoring why dialogue across differences matters.

As the program concluded, we continue to reflect on the stakes in this moment:

**_“The divisions we have, have real consequences. If we can’t talk across party lines or oceans, then we are putting ourselves in a difficult position.” -_**_Rye Barcott, With Honor Co-Founder & CEO _
---
|
---
| Honoring Our Co-Founder: David Gergen
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=80b507ff02&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| This month, we**** paid tribute to our co-founder **David Gergen** , **a man whose life and work embodied the belief that love of country can, and must, rise above love of self**.

In many ways, **David Gergen was an idea in himself: the idea that in America, service is not a burden but a calling.** That unity is not a relic of the past but the beating heart of our nation. That patriotism is rooted not in division, but in devotion to something greater than ourselves.

That’s how David lived. And **he dedicated his life to ensuring that idea lived on**. He understood that this moment of hyper-partisanship is not “politics as usual,” but a test of our character, our courage, and our commitment to the common good.
---
| [🎬 Watch our Tribute Video](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=5f8101aa99&e=33f53a5b1a "🎬 Watch our Tribute Video")
---
|
---
| Celebrating Principled Public Service
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=36cec99eca&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| We were honored to present the **inaugural David R. Gergen Lifetime Leadership in Public Service Award** , r**ecognizing a lifetime of principled service and commitment to the common good.**

This year’s **recipients were Secretary Leon and Mrs.Sylvia Panetta** , whose careers exemplify integrity, leadership, and bipartisan cooperation.
---
| [🎖️ Watch The Honorable Leon Panetta’s Remarks](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=a330b9f634&e=33f53a5b1a "🎖️ Watch The Honorable Leon Panetta’s Remarks")
---
|
---
| ⚓ Celebrating 250 Years of the U.S. Navy ⚓
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=f9d157353a&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| _Image and video courtesy of the Defense Visual Information Distribution Service (DVIDS). Source: “America’s Navy 250th Celebration” by Seaman Gina Gallia, Defense Media Activity – Navy Production (Public Domain)_
---
| Monday, October 13th, marked the 250th birthday of the United States Navy — protecting our nation’s freedom since 1775.

As we celebrate this milestone, we honor the men and women who have served and continue to serve at sea and ashore.

The Navy was established before the Declaration of Independence — authorized by the Continental Congress to defend the colonies and disrupt British supply lines.

To all who have worn the uniform of the U.S. Navy — thank you for your courage, sacrifice, and dedication to service.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | Please follow With Honor Action on Twitter via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=475c142e7b&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.
---
| | | | | | [](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=c48a4ebfc6&e=33f53a5b1a)
