| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7225ae3e-0137-4708-898a-58dac66f5e9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Democrats say get in line and deny that Antifa is real.
It was an invite I was not expecting at all. I was flying back from covering the chaotic protests in Portland, Oregon when I got a message from a White House staffer asking for my participation in their roundtable about Antifa.
The invite was shocking to be honest. Being on the ground for different stories across the country, week after week, often times feel like a blur and you forget that sometimes those stories are seen by those working in the White House.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4FFCNqC0I8X02ovtlJrFlByzFG6ybVr807HYGnJ_bHQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=176136116)
Once in Washington, D.C., it was clear the roundtable's existence was for several reasons, even amid the Democrat-induced government shutdown. One of the biggest reasons was to force the media to acknowledge that Antifa exists in the first place. With barely five minutes for each of us to tell President Donald Trump about the subject, I wanted to focus on the simple truth that Antifa has been causing havoc in certain cities in response to the President's mass deportations.
The main, bad-faith argument used by Leftists to say Antifa is not real is because there is no national leadership or national organization. This is bunk because law enforcement has gone after Antifa cells, such as in San Diego, in a similar manner as with other groups who commit different types of crime.
**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Logical Health Alternatives](https://substack.com/redirect/437ed145-a8a5-4b8e-a105-55f5e52cdae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [Buried Hiroshima secret finally EXPOSED](https://substack.com/redirect/437ed145-a8a5-4b8e-a105-55f5e52cdae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you thought history books taught you everything you needed to know about Hiroshima... **[you need to see this shocking video.](https://substack.com/redirect/437ed145-a8a5-4b8e-a105-55f5e52cdae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
The full story is finally coming out... and it's incredible. **[Watch Now.](https://substack.com/redirect/437ed145-a8a5-4b8e-a105-55f5e52cdae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/437ed145-a8a5-4b8e-a105-55f5e52cdae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The full story is finally coming out... and it's incredible. **[Watch Now.](https://substack.com/redirect/437ed145-a8a5-4b8e-a105-55f5e52cdae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Click To Watch Now](https://substack.com/redirect/437ed145-a8a5-4b8e-a105-55f5e52cdae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
It does not matter that there is no main Antifa spokesperson for them, followers of anarcho-communism gather together and plan attacks on federal law enforcement or property, like in Portland, Oregon. That is a group. A group that acts in concert to advance their twisted goals. Antifa, a misnomer to begin with, purposefully decentralize themselves to make it harder for police to break up their cells. It is a tactic that has proven successful, but not in every case.
Sure enough, the media dismissed our reporting by labeling us as "social media influencers," even though our work more closely resembles the mold of World War II correspondent Ernie Pyle as opposed to random Twitch steamers and Instagram product sellers.
**[Left-wing rag The Guardian](https://substack.com/redirect/8e891ce0-5fea-42ac-b59b-94cf277d833c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** took it a step further by writing that we are "self-described independent journalists who might better be called partisan conservative social media influencers. The influencers cover leftwing protests in a highly political manner, more akin to opposition research than nonpartisan reporting."
The ever-reliable hack Jimmy Kimmel mocked the idea of having a roundtable, once he was finally done crying about people being mean to him after he falsely implied Charlie Kirk's shooter was a Trump supporter.
"There is no Antifa. This is an entirely imaginary organization. **[There is not an Antifa.](https://substack.com/redirect/3d6c464a-9827-48d6-b707-7ce778eb5c06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** This is no different than if they announced they rounded up a dozen Decepticons. 'We've captured the chupacabra, everyone!,'" he said.
These weak arguments were to be expected, but they can't hide the fact that Antifa is still causing problems in cities like Chicago, Portland, Seattle, and Los Angeles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c91bb9be-352e-4db9-bfed-04b6e12cfe8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Most disturbingly, those involved in the Antifa movement are not the only people who are attacking federal law enforcement. Countless videos have been posted on social media showing seemingly everyday people attacking federal agents or their vehicles while the agents arrest illegal aliens. "Bystanders" are now using their cars to ram federal vehicles.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4FFCNqC0I8X02ovtlJrFlByzFG6ybVr807HYGnJ_bHQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=176136116)
This proves that the sustained political violence happening right now is not a "both sides" issue. The Left in general has become radicalized and violent because of Trump returning to office and carrying out his campaign promises. I have not been busy this summer covering violence in the streets because of people on the Right, it has been because of Leftists.
Charlie Kirk's memorial service was a large gathering of conservatives and it was peaceful. No one on the Right rioted after he was unjustly killed in such a brutal and public fashion. Let's not forget the left-wing rioted for months in the name of "social and racial justice" in 2020 even though those actions did not result in such progressive outcomes.
I'll finish by saying it was an honor to be among those chosen to brief President Trump and the nation about this radical group. While riot season is coming to a close with the cold setting in for most of the country, this issue is far from over as long as enhanced deportations continue.

Once in Washington, D.C., it was clear the roundtable's existence was for several reasons, even amid the Democrat-induced government shutdown. One of the biggest reasons was to force the media to acknowledge that Antifa exists in the first place. Sure enough, the media dismissed our reporting by labeling us as "social media influencers," even though our work more closely resembles the mold of World War II correspondent Ernie Pyle as opposed to random Twitch steamers and Instagram product sellers. took it a step further by writing that we are "self-described independent journalists who might better be called partisan conservative social media influencers. The influencers cover leftwing protests in a highly political manner, more akin to opposition research than nonpartisan reporting." The ever-reliable hack Jimmy Kimmel mocked the idea of having a roundtable, once he was finally done crying about people being mean to him after he falsely implied Charlie Kirk's shooter was a Trump supporter. "There is no Antifa. This is an entirely imaginary organization. This is no different than if they announced they rounded up a dozen Decepticons. 'We've captured the chupacabra, everyone!,'" he said. These weak arguments were to be expected, but they can't hide the fact that Antifa is still causing problems in cities like Chicago, Portland, Seattle, and Los Angeles. | | ---|---|--- Most disturbingly, those involved in the Antifa movement are not the only people who are attacking federal law enforcement. Countless videos have been posted on social media showing seemingly everyday people attacking federal agents or their vehicles while the agents arrest illegal aliens. # _A Letter from Warren Howell_
---
| [Donate NOW!](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=f6b70d00bc&e=7c92d84deb)
---
| |
Dear Friends and Neighbors,
We are at a crossroads in Harris County. Do we continue down a path of bloated budgets, wasteful spending, kick-backs, and political gridlock — or do we bring real-world experience and accountability to local government?
As a **business owner** , I’ve spent years making tough decisions, balancing budgets, and streamlining operations to get things done. I know what it takes to run an organization that delivers results — and I believe Harris County deserves nothing less.That’s why I’m running for **Harris County Judge** — and why I’m proposing something no one else is talking about:
👉 **The Department of County Efficiency (DOCE).** This new Department will audit county operations, cut waste, and ensure taxpayer dollars actually serve the people — not bureaucracy. It’s about smart spending, transparency, and building a streamlined government that works for all of us.
**Will you chip in $50, $100, or whatever you can today to help us build a government that works smarter?**

DONATE TODAY 👉 [www.howellforharriscounty.com](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=79a6431dac&e=7c92d84deb)
Every contribution fuels a campaign rooted in efficiency, integrity, and results. We’re building this from the ground up — with you.
Let’s seize this moment — and choose a better path for Harris County.
With gratitude,
**Warren Howell**
Business Owner | True Conservative Candidate for Harris County Judge
---

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: He gave us Boebert. In 21 days he wants to drag Pennsylvania into hell
body:
The 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Election and my fight to beat Boebert are two sides of the same coin.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rGhv7lsqUsD_D1Q0X48E3kRPvWidkGDNBUfkNx-wHLtUkpcsOzWBxL71jhsdHuVnaw9JdYSX0cSjginXwR0D1uh1xQZ9oLe1QSz2dmGZ4bmrQ-XSkOr6MPNRAAvp8mNarlRJqMD9SCoFmTMLPAmepkSKuMcbMgSHdRRsekJRiZ7KUD9Ejza53A4Nnm-zREhBaS35XA-a9G7kLhh1hI1iRXi7Iw2gxQYujca4kw3CjM1vBs2B6cYYew==&c=VTto2aGAhXnQ9KpXx9_jHQia7qJXvRqjl46PuZbnV5rCEv07Ey0thg==&ch=10bAdhF9kOSunNy42i_xJPMcbh8ma6tfQCH_tTpfrJHzjj0VwY8hLg==)

| Peter,
My name is Trisha Calvarese, I am the Democrat running to unseat Congresswoman Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th Congressional District.
I am writing to warn you that the MAGA billionaire who saddled Colorado with the problem of Lauren Boebert is now 21 days out from his attempt to drag Pennsylvania into hell via the upcoming November 2025 PA Supreme Court election.
If this court falls to MAGA, they can impose an extreme abortion ban, conduct a blood red redistricting of the PA congressional map, and ensure Democrats never win PA and its 19 electoral college votes again.
Right now the GOP is winning and the man behind their unprecedented breakthrough is none other than Jeffrey Yass, the richest man in Pennsylvania.

---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rGhv7lsqUsD_D1Q0X48E3kRPvWidkGDNBUfkNx-wHLtUkpcsOzWBxL71jhsdHuVnaw9JdYSX0cSjginXwR0D1uh1xQZ9oLe1QSz2dmGZ4bmrQ-XSkOr6MPNRAAvp8mNarlRJqMD9SCoFmTMLPAmepkSKuMcbMgSHdRRsekJRiZ7KUD9Ejza53A4Nnm-zREhBaS35XA-a9G7kLhh1hI1iRXi7Iw2gxQYuXKKxCT_xmEQfskqgTibI2Q==&c=VTto2aGAhXnQ9KpXx9_jHQia7qJXvRqjl46PuZbnV5rCEv07Ey0thg==&ch=10bAdhF9kOSunNy42i_xJPMcbh8ma6tfQCH_tTpfrJHzjj0VwY8hLg==)

| In 2020, Yass's PAC the Club for Growth backed Lauren Boebert during her initial run for Congress. In the years since he has propped up her campaign to the tune of tens of millions.
Outside of MTG and Trump himself, no one is more responsible for our present climate of political violence than Lauren Boebert. And no one played a bigger role in her election than Yass who provided the seed capital to get her into Congress.
Now Yass hopes to manifest another nightmare into reality via his attempt to seize the Pennsylvania Supreme Court where he is alleged to have committed over $30 million dollars towards removing the courts Democratic justices.
Over the last few weeks, Yass's PACs have flooded PA with misleading ads and mailers that attempt to confuse Democratic and Independent voters into voting for the MAGA cause. We need to help Defend our Courts counter these efforts before it is too late.
[My fight against Boebert and the fight to save Pennsylvania are two sides of the same coin and time is running out to save this key court. Can I count on you to split a donation of whatever you can spare between my campaign and Defend Our Courts to help us defeat Yass's abominations?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rGhv7lsqUsD_D1Q0X48E3kRPvWidkGDNBUfkNx-wHLtUkpcsOzWBxL71jhsdHuVnevOQorqyVzrfLjGg85fG41lGpnU6lbO6nEePePoYesXgkBgXVJttEBkdHlGUrwWp4YDnpsRtItq4acyrpKmFL98RTsW74mL1sMajxp5WMGVw0y3pfR-sIcO0Q0ys99Jc-W7eFNE2ZYSQa0zDiwcaFmenmpoaZW4WSIz2XOgm-i5osM-Od1mJkuhkpaPHDc-_&c=VTto2aGAhXnQ9KpXx9_jHQia7qJXvRqjl46PuZbnV5rCEv07Ey0thg==&ch=10bAdhF9kOSunNy42i_xJPMcbh8ma6tfQCH_tTpfrJHzjj0VwY8hLg==)

| I don’t tolerate bullies, Peter. So when Donald Trump personally called me out and threatened to withhold federal funding from Maine unless we folded to his demands, I told him I’d see him in court. So I did. And we won. Rather than back down, we were able to restore millions in funds for Maine students. This is proof that when we fight, we win. Now we’re bringing that fight to Susan Collins. For too long, she has failed our state, and it’s time we finally defeat her. [Republicans are desperate to keep Susan Collins in the Senate, and will spend millions of dollars to attack me and spread lies about my record. I’ll need you every step of the way. Split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action today to help us kickstart this campaign in the strongest position possible to win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb53c08b0-9a7a-4766-8b62-bce4c8ef5e73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Photo by [Unseen Studio](https://substack.com/redirect/45a7fef2-760e-47b5-b2e7-05c55ec3acff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/58686ed0-666a-45ad-8bf4-4ea5ce153b36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When I served in the Legislature, every time I spoke up for school choice I heard the same tired line: "If you support choice, you're anti-school." Nonsense. Mississippians value education--and we pay for it. The question is whether our kids are actually learning and whether parents have the power to put their child in a school that fits.
## What we spend
Mississippi now spends roughly **$12,000 per student (that is a lot of money)** , right in line with our neighbors. We are not starving the system. We're funding it. Taxpayers have done their part.
## What we get
**Some wins:** Our early-grade reading reforms worked. Fourth graders have posted some of the best gains in the country. Graduation is up, too. That's good news and it took effort.
But**,** by eighth grade the edge fades. Too many students are walking across the stage without the skills they need for college, a trade, or the military. That's not a funding problem; that's a results problem.
## How we stack up to private schools
Private high schools typically graduate more of their seniors and post stronger scores. Yes, some of that reflects family factors, but it also reflects mission, discipline, and the freedom to run a school that fits its students. Families who can match a child to the right school usually see better outcomes. That's not "anti-public." That's pro-student.
## Are we getting our money's worth?
Partly. We paid for improvement and got some--especially in early literacy. But taxpayers aren't buying fourth-grade scores; we're investing in adults who can read, reason, and work. If a child spends twelve years in a school system and still isn't ready for what's next, the system--not the child--failed. Paying more into the same structure and expecting different results is the political habit we need to break.
## How school choice helps Mississippi kids
**Choice isn 't a threat to public schools; it's a promise to parents.** When money follows the student, every school--district, charter or private--has to earn a family's trust.
Mississippi has proven we'll pay for education. That should end the slur that conservatives are "anti-school." We're anti-excuses. If we truly value kids more than systems, we'll let parents choose, let schools compete, and demand results worthy of the dollars we already spend.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

When Brad Anderson became CEO of Best Buy, the company was worth $20 billion.
When he retired, it was worth over $40 billion.
**[GET YOUR TICKET TODAY.](https://substack.com/redirect/e58619fa-8a99-4c60-a16a-0cc750bafdb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
That kind of transformation doesn't happen by accident -- it happens through leadership, innovation, and an unshakable belief in people.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e58619fa-8a99-4c60-a16a-0cc750bafdb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Brad Anderson didn't just grow Best Buy; he redefined how America buys, sells, and serves. Under his leadership, a small electronics store became a global giant by focusing on something deceptively simple: human relationships in a technological age.
Today, Brad is helping leaders, entrepreneurs, and communities understand the next great transformation -- the **[Future of Work](https://substack.com/redirect/e58619fa-8a99-4c60-a16a-0cc750bafdb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Artificial intelligence, automation, and demographic shifts are rewriting the rules of business faster than ever before.
**[CLICK HERE TO PURCHASE YOUR TICKET](https://substack.com/redirect/e58619fa-8a99-4c60-a16a-0cc750bafdb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
At the _Seed & Roots Summit 2025_, Brad Anderson will share how America can navigate this new frontier -- not with fear, but with faith, courage, and a renewed sense of purpose.
🗓 **Saturday, October 25, 2025**

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: He gave us Boebert. In 21 days he wants to drag Pennsylvania into hell
body:
The 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Election and my fight to beat Boebert are two sides of the same coin.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SKBnAEJu7Zx9u3Wo4SdD_CgQn-iaw0XlkIdb3tApbR3qI509lYVoClqn_GCjJhfN0QS045rJb2ORcgmVowrK1UTQGbP6p37rxLbOjaic8paoRXu83mLJTIURzqNIlQqFNs2RR1m2l-jctKyfdmtXS5UWORBH3T245hfO_hs3o40CcHkhaRAKzQqMmFljn_lzQXBh1QkelYe4Adxs8Csuula5OqpTQ70IAp_izJ4Zl_Q=&c=54Tn8gfne4E9ePWSWCFLGXdH_iWxRFhdSXL8ds9RMg9TxaNXv1cC_A==&ch=0CIG3Ev7a_7M-XDtTr8BNhnLMEdkJg3embhfhQIbiDv1O9BkvjnwvA==)
---
|
Peter,
My name is Trisha Calvarese, I am the Democrat running to unseat Congresswoman Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th Congressional District.
I am writing to warn you that the MAGA billionaire who saddled Colorado with the problem of Lauren Boebert is now 21 days out from his attempt to drag Pennsylvania into hell via the upcoming November 2025 PA Supreme Court election.
If this court falls to MAGA, they can impose an extreme abortion ban, conduct a blood red redistricting of the PA congressional map, and ensure Democrats never win PA and its 19 electoral college votes again.
Right now the GOP is winning and the man behind their unprecedented breakthrough is none other than Jeffrey Yass, the richest man in Pennsylvania.

---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SKBnAEJu7Zx9u3Wo4SdD_CgQn-iaw0XlkIdb3tApbR3qI509lYVoClqn_GCjJhfN0QS045rJb2ORcgmVowrK1UTQGbP6p37rxLbOjaic8paoRXu83mLJTIURzqNIlQqFNs2RR1m2l-jctKyfdmtXS5UWORBH3T245hfO_hs3o40CcHkhaRAKzQqMmFljn_lzQXBh1QkelYe4Adxs8CsuupCTRs8ZZUoHNQZqbfwFFxw=&c=54Tn8gfne4E9ePWSWCFLGXdH_iWxRFhdSXL8ds9RMg9TxaNXv1cC_A==&ch=0CIG3Ev7a_7M-XDtTr8BNhnLMEdkJg3embhfhQIbiDv1O9BkvjnwvA==)
---
| In 2020, Yass's PAC the Club for Growth backed Lauren Boebert during her initial run for Congress. In the years since he has propped up her campaign to the tune of tens of millions.
Outside of MTG and Trump himself, no one is more responsible for our present climate of political violence than Lauren Boebert. And no one played a bigger role in her election than Yass who provided the seed capital to get her into Congress.
Now Yass hopes to manifest another nightmare into reality via his attempt to seize the Pennsylvania Supreme Court where he is alleged to have committed over $30 million dollars towards removing the courts Democratic justices.
Over the last few weeks, Yass's PACs have flooded PA with misleading ads and mailers that attempt to confuse Democratic and Independent voters into voting for the MAGA cause. We need to help Defend our Courts counter these efforts before it is too late.
[My fight against Boebert and the fight to save Pennsylvania are two sides of the same coin and time is running out to save this key court. Can I count on you to split a donation of whatever you can spare between my campaign and Defend our Courts to help us defeat Yass's abominations?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SKBnAEJu7Zx9u3Wo4SdD_CgQn-iaw0XlkIdb3tApbR3qI509lYVoClqn_GCjJhfN0QS045rJb2ORcgmVowrK1UTQGbP6p37rxLbOjaic8paoRXu83mLJTIURzqNIlQqFNs2RR1m2l-jctKyfdmtXS5UWORBH3T245hfO_hs3o40CcHkhaRAKzQqMmFljn_lzQXBh1QkelYe4Adxs8CsuugYg3ggllZ9Nar5dffrjV2I=&c=54Tn8gfne4E9ePWSWCFLGXdH_iWxRFhdSXL8ds9RMg9TxaNXv1cC_A==&ch=0CIG3Ev7a_7M-XDtTr8BNhnLMEdkJg3embhfhQIbiDv1O9BkvjnwvA==)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: County Takeover, Antonov Visits Midland, and 80 State Fairs in a Row
body:
Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a lawsuit in sparsely populated Loving County, accusing an Indiana man of trying to "take over" the county government by promising his social media followers free homes and payments of $5,000 a month.

Eisenhower](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngQ7kNYY4hYuTcnS59kq0wAKrc-zI7OHw9r_4X-FvR6NPo_n7HJ7InsP6B1_k5LPEIVDePYlQGqb4P8gp-I_iQQmDxBCPg3cetNJtBaoCM8zI_hxMObtRzXcoycGtU8ZY29pyu8JOAaKF-31UrdWgbrhAB9i0hpqpZHdhoMBA0xho6w5a6KwF1ehOL2QLo2hmiamWjYQ-uC_-vAbVU3yV3m0i771ofhW6L3Sfc67HxIIh8IRXpdD9yHFN-N7OQvePzOsm1aP6zTuFLWZKZXLzO7P3vHe3wqj1hey_dfnZJ4fTXwEAAP__5Jx2YQ) was born in Denison. ## Plane Crashes in Fort Worth
Both occupants of a twin-engine Beech King Air C90 were killed [when it crashed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAUhE9Ddc_g_0oFCzfqNilTClzx0XoxRRokba1vH2ivkG6ADxh8M38-l09PifLtl9_R9e9YloxHS9g71mUtz9zf3d-xvLD63Esurxc1WiSXBgQHoZfgKb0XPQT3xcMkBnTiw3Ktx9GMw-aMXT1aFa01o7FaKMnNpKZgUa1acDGQO8sEF1oopYW5WGGEHUfBlbQy4sg0x0C91EvfsOO3bzG9T6HLWvYhua33R2PqyuTM5Hwcx2Vv-WRMzpjh2Zicz1FMzj_5Rj53-PIpQYkQqSJIuFNKGCA8K-UbtP2kj-Qzwlp924AyxFI7HKX2DTL6Chut9waeaiRMgcnZV7hexe_732kaqguPg1KiZj-Y5rfdU_rx7f_38svJfwEAAP__5P-R3g) in a "giant ball of fire" at a Fort Worth business near Hicks Airfield Sunday afternoon. Security cameras captured [harrowing footage](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GOiOPMeAULrahy7ZbIgNDGMXYyB4gefsV9xVueaSj8_P9ew5PR57C66_b0PJniUPAK3tkxjRM8Qj8ZffGeGJygWOI50mZBiVVI0AK0MPsyH8HXc52lPMDSrTQtVJrYxpTrlZqmIyCxuga6keLpp1mOXbjY57cMta6JHuHgQQNda2hqVpooDUGZK1ataAptMSZOKaKV2T8uLz47z2omuJWersy77mo_xSqL1R_XVe1xE_njswUbkuh-vtTofrdu4BiSi6vIsTE64WZxRITi-uWYjs80-5RZNxIcDqmdxYLJSyTnfeLvKfcdoWWr82R_-nn31E7rfofAAD__0OchD8) of the crash. The victims, who have not yet been named, departed from Alliance Airport, about eight miles away. The plane crashed at a business that stores 18-wheelers, at least 10 of which [were ignited](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yqzAQhZ9GdGKklcC6hYrb0DltSmYtLUYTGXnQBszbZ3AeIe3unJ_vfF7HK6aclvsHPsjzayrjQnvNxEzrGMr3wgfjF5WNVly4LGXbUk0jKOikVlLbMWLKx2ib6G8q_tMNeX3plbXOda6ZPbnuhsoF4zq6YEDl4qStAet0H4yDJvnTTCtttTFWd22vO907p5WBHiZywiqKicva8kxML6xTPs5CbSiPJvuZ-VmF-S9gEDDs-96GWz0pzr-A4S0RMJwnAcOWIhUZCWM-5DPjQjKsWGfJuJ6M8pdawNCsPj73lHOq_UVYdX9gyu9Q_ttUm4efAAAA__8nL37k) in the explosion. Multiple fire departments [responded to the crash](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL8Gd1iAMYaCIo27lzaldQ2XNQprVvjG3v37yMknvHo0o3Pm19fyBbnk_fETnujpneqy43UUJMK2hPpnpw_Bb6wnNtip7vU885EXJdTIpeBSLxFy-Sy6i34V0ckOvZyM0Nra0XabdysqE8UgXZAOcU0CVpy00QExBuW67O8xKaSWw6Dl2Bs5SmOtFIMyKqFlWmDMVFtPGxK-4UjlcwP1oT674jei18GGH0zNTM3XdfVXArhDpmZolENBpubbi6m51ACFqflVYEceGhwbT7URv2qjjRO0W5T_V-cpt7ur7MS11GkczMpRjJbrJAfu7DpxHZ0LQqSA2nbNx9eVS8mHmZgWjyfk8g-Tvnfu6dXfAAAA__-JEo0T). The Fort Worth Department had 60 personnel at the scene along with 10 firetrucks, 14 support vehicles, and three ambulances. The fire was extinguished within 35 minutes. A witness, Gregory Delano, said the blaze [was so big](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO2yAURp8Gb0SAAeOBoYu3dO1oEXOxr0Igwjd20qev0lf450_6ztH5c52vATOW9Xd4gKd3qnOBc89ABG1e6qvQh8Id6gEtFKqlHgfuOCuhDJeCSz3HgPkz6y76m4ij7MDLwQqtnTOu27wKMOg0GhvteNNG25Cc7p2D0aTeDLFD_z2TQmrZ91qai5VGWuek6JVVCRzTAiJSbRfagOAd9pQ_X6HLUh9d9hvRc2f9L6YmpqZwnHD7LkxNr7IEgrU2_AuRqYnOyu-YM0QeEkHjdywrD9j40sK-8VQb8bM22piauubj88SccbcD02J9BMz_kfSzUIdX_wIAAP__Kwl-NA) that "you honestly couldn’t even tell a plane was inside that fire." The FAA and the NTSB are investigating the crash.
## State Aims to Block County Takeover
Attorney General Ken Paxton [filed a lawsuit](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SqzAQhE8DmSj9gUWg4CVkfumGlIxGRrWCoaQB7Ntv4T3C5jPd_X1f9_HuYorr879bwNIr4LjCWRIQQR4n3Fd6k_sGPCC7lXDF44gljpLLlgnOhB69i-k96trbB_e9qMGKW8e1NqY19WxB3bzTUvcPZfjEQwtBmU71vheib02oo73CBBdaKKVF23SiFZ0xgivZyQCm0hx8JMwNzUDwciWk9zWomXCpk52JtlKpf5UcKjmc59lMuGeacS9wwVxnlRw-n6zsUBghK4Qbe2bcNxYyLqwA0eWBxZUFl9kJhdgvfyWHOlu_nTGlWLpbpflzcTF96ulv0g4rfwIAAP__0qSDrA) in sparsely populated Loving County, accusing an Indiana man of trying to "take over" the county government by promising his social media followers free homes and payments of $5,000 a month. [Loving County](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb7F4gDEZGLp4S9eO1gs8J6gYIvvVTv6-cvoJ3Y-O7j1fl_GCKady-8SZPD-nOhba10zMtIyh_hR-MX5T3WjBwrXUbUtrGpVU3QnkCcwYMeXXaJrorzKeoSEPvZXGONe55u6jdH3Xn-0UNF611lEZ0sFeYwA5Qeya5A8ZSDCgtYGutdCBdQ6kVlZN5ISRFBPXpeU7MT1xnfLrGNSGOjfZ35kfq9AfQg1CDfu-t28I84wFwwEJNTwyBlqFGnLdUrmd_q41i4-PPeWcVtsLI28zpvzW8v9ibF79BgAA__9jjnTM) has about 70 permanent residents but collects millions in taxes from oil industry activity. Malcolm Tanner, who [leads a self-directed movement](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQhU9jOiPbGIcULtLQZbfcEk1gTEZrbIQnkNx-RfYIfzfSSO-97_tzH-5AkdL8Cxb0_A55SHiUiMy4DWN-Jf4w_MW84waJc8r7ToUGo0wrtZLaDhNQ_Ay2mvxDTVddodcXp6zturarnt41Uxse8Lg2eoSgncbpguYK7eiMaQNU5M8wrbTVTWN1Wzvdatd1WjXGmYCdsAon4rzV_ETGN5QQP-egesxLFf2TeS2iuQnTC9Mfx1EvJZ0_YXpM8lWE6U8oYfrv_Y2QOQQaCWKRlHYsTDMwynnLr7XINUKSnOWJLs8qGfNOaZb_jQjTwyZvN_0bGueqzU_rQTFScRdh1bwAxe82_pnR3Zt_AQAA___-LYzl) called the "Melanated People of Power,” purchased two adjoining five-acre tracts in Loving County in January. About three dozen transplants have been living on the property in RVs and tents, with no access to running water or a septic system. "_I have taken the entire county over, out here in Loving County, Texas_ ," [Tanner said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL9GZFAzQshyoOASMl96ISXQYKYsSxTMgf33W979hI27qrvf-3cbboET5_vf8CQvr7kMmc49kQhtw1T-Z3lLeFA5aAtZSi7HwTsPGnRXI9Rohhg4vQdTRT9CvGJFHi8WjHGuc9Xio5uNMwHsDCPFSNCZsR0jWR2vEe1csf-UIaDBtjXYNRY7tM4htNrqmZwyQJGlbI0sJPQK-5zen0PNVJ5V8ovIuqv2j9K90v15ns20bCV_UqX7tSQWnnal-7AJT4mU7h-U6zW8pOQ6lYPzvf5BrTXC1UGHzbqs1ebjenJKvNuLMnB_Bk7fm_I7U4fXXwEAAP__MHd-ag) in a July TikTok video. "_When these elections hit in 2026, we're going to wipe the board. Everybody that I selected will be elected_." Paxton accused Tanner of [health code violations](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OgzAMgJ8mbEH5g6ZDhlvYeuuNKCWBWnUTRFygb3-ipz7BTR4sf_r8_Vz6iweENH37R3S0j7lPcSsYieLSD_mZ6EX-HvMaF58op7yuUKBXQjVcCi5NHzzgqzdVcFcRzrKKTp5aYYy1ja1u7qQbPSotrR5Ucw1mUMFKK7QP7bkx17ECd8CkkEZqbWRTt7KRrbVSaNWqMVpmRAxAeanpFinuvoz4OoTqIT8qdDeiuTD9xVTHVLdtW33ffTqWTHXHN0x177PP5H7is98pJz4CxsLRb-UJxA8o94hxioHPGYFg8Mg_ATgkjnmFNPG_Mkx11eLCvAEilPbEjJgeHvAtRv_LuTr1GwAA__8EoYyM), threats against local officials, deceptive marketing, and using illegal tactics to influence elections. "_Indiana resident Malcolm Tanner has no right to try and take over Loving County with illegal schemes that endanger real Texans_ ," Paxton said in a [statement](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSnCAUhZ9GOxxARP6CIo3dnzalc5WryyyCgbu6vn3GneQJ0p3imzPfOb--x2_wwcf1J2xo6b2kMeJZAhJhHuf0inQRPDEdmCFSiuk4fPGj5LJjgjOhRgc-XKOqnZ24-xI1WtFrrpQxnakf1ujeiZk7rqepn5Yvw1vO-YJ9q7RziLW3d5ngQom2VaJrtOiENkbwVmq5oKkUR-cp5YYeSPiGsoTrFmrmtNXBPoj2UrU_KjlUcjjPs_lAQJRyxGvFiBlCs6ajksO9rpJDxoBQ8I7_OPYXZE-MbIc3pcgWH7CwAGd5eWIQHcv4-4WFCqOcGKzgYyG2QZhT2BhBjJjZnhPhTCykw8e1ztbtpw_BF91Xiq8b-PBRp_87_LDyTwAAAP__sJybtQ).
## Medina Lake Drying Up
After a brief respite from drought conditions over the summer, the water level in Medina Lake has [begun falling again](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOoyAURp9GdxhAVFyw6MbNpF1NMslsDC2XQopg4Fbr2_-xr_Bvz809Ofn-Xeer9sHH500voPBj0xxhLwEQIc-P9I54oH5B2iDriCmmbfPFz5zyjjBKmJiN9uGYRW3UnZqR1aDY0FMhpOxk7ZTlZhiMlncNtqdUC2rp2DMrRStHOna1V6eMUSZY2wrWNT3rWC8loy3vuQVZCQrGY8oNOkD46GLDcQY1j7TUQTnEtVTtpeJTxad935ulxPNW8QkieZeTgkYHueITprVgyh5OjM4XUtIbHfmKSdAvIE4XYnJaVzAkgs7hIJxYACQ-EtwTWVJEd_7rTC4Xdvvz3_6tszLr7kPwpR8qQZ-L9uFbiL_bdVP8JwAA__-R2I5d). The lake exceeded 6% of its capacity in August after dropping below 2% in May, but it’s currently [down to 5.6%](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwjAQRk_jdET-izGFi23Sse2W0QRPYLSOjewhkNuv4Arbf_re0_s5T2egRPn6DSsGfi1lyvhsCZmxTpfyyLwz_GLZsELmksu2UaNJSz0clDwoO0WgtE-2i2GW8aQ6DOropLXeD767BT8MTqFBdM4Z4yw4N8_OH0_yomfwtqPwPlNSWWWMVUPv1KCc90oa7fSCXliJkbjUnm_I-IK2pP0t1F_K2qVwY743Yb6EHoUen8BYIzAspX7GfalXoceKDetWqDahR8qRNooPSEKPK0bK0NUQ709KiZo7CiuvK1D6EPh_Xbag_wIAAP__FK94gA)—more than 80 feet below its conservation pool—according to the Texas Water Development Board. _"It did not break the drought_ ," [said Dave Mauck](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uqzAQBOCnMR1obcxf4eI2dLntKZGDl7CKsZG9gfD2R8krnHY0Gn2an9t0s-QpPP7bDQ2_lzgFPLNHZkzTHF-BL7ZPjAcmGziGeByUaVKgmlJCKfXkLPlr0oUzd3CDLNDIrgWt-77pi9UMcwtzXc_3rllUfUcJDoYZOsSuWyxAQeYzJkFqWddaNlUrG9n2vYRatWrBXmhARxxTxSsyvm1e_PUBVXPcCm9W5j2L-p9Qo1DjeZ7VdmUbvlyKn5JQo6cFM18ehRrji12MKQs12sQ0f8MNHQVbevvE8rSMqfR4oM-lkjCA0rra171Ixu0neU-57YSGx2bJfxn8t_MOo34DAAD__4b-hQU), general manager of the Bandera County River Authority & Groundwater District. "_We did not see any real benefit to the aquifer, other than, the decline might have slowed. It's just been so dry for so long_." At least eight new data centers are slated for development in Medina County, which promises to spur economic growth but threatens to exacerbate the [dire water situation](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzGSgyAUxvHTQBeHh4CkoNjGLttuyRB5KrMoGXnRePud5Ap7gO833__n5m8h5bRO32FBR6-x-BWPmpEINz-U50onhV8sO25hpbKWfU81eSmkvoC4gPIxpHx6xaO7i3gFjg46I5SyVls-O-zuCqIF6NT1OupBo7IyoumkuI-Imif3xkCAgrZVoBsDGoy1IFpp5IiWKYExUdkampHwFeqYz_ehZigLz24melTWfjHZM9kfx9HErTynmZqp7Ez2lQJhZbL_bPnm4uNIOadqOqbEtISUPxL9r3938i8AAP__Yddvrw). "_These things are big ice boxes_ ," said Medina County Commissioner Larry Sittre. Some residents have complained about the lack of transparency in the permitting process. "_If the place, a business, that affects all the residents in this area, then yeah, I think we should have some say in what happens and how that happens_ ," [said resident Rob Scholes](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3SAQRp8Gd1j8mUsKijR0mzalNTbjNVoMVzCx7337yMkjbD3SmfOd3x_zB6ScyucvONDTa6tzwatnJMI2r_VPoTfBF9YTGxSqpZ5n6mlWQk1cCi7NHCHl92yG6BcRf8gBvXxYYYxzkxt2D3HSq3MbLsvDOXROaTSTm5zT22KtHZK_YVJII7U2chqtnKR1TgqtrNrQMSMwJqptpB0JX9C3_L6FxrUeQ_Y70bMz_ZOpwFS4rmv86kD3kalwr2Eq5LpCZircr5gKUjAVhGYq0I48HU9YideNLynnVAuPNWdoPAIBX7EQts5T4RcQNt6pYe8Y-YExFeD_KzEVhubj87oR3T6YEZ8HpPxPkr6X9vTqbwAAAP__0SyN2Q).

On this day in 1890, was born in Denison. As supreme commander of the Allied Expeditionary Force in Europe, he planned and supervised the invasion of Normandy in 1944. In 1952, he was elected the nation’s 34th president. He spearheaded the development of the and helped establish NASA. SpaceX conducted its 11th Starship test flight yesterday. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Plane Crashes in Fort Worth Both occupants of a twin-engine Beech King Air C90 were killed in a "giant ball of fire" at a Fort Worth business near Hicks Airfield Sunday afternoon. Security cameras captured of the crash. The victims, who have not yet been named, departed from Alliance Airport, about eight miles away. The plane crashed at a business that stores 18-wheelers, at least 10 of which in the explosion. Multiple fire departments . The Fort Worth Department had 60 personnel at the scene along with 10 firetrucks, 14 support vehicles, and three ambulances. The fire was extinguished within 35 minutes. A witness, Gregory Delano, said the blaze that "you honestly couldn’t even tell a plane was inside that fire." The FAA and the NTSB are investigating the crash. State Aims to Block County Takeover Attorney General Ken Paxton in sparsely populated Loving County, accusing an Indiana man of trying to "take over" the county government by promising his social media followers free homes and payments of $5,000 a month. has about 70 permanent residents but collects millions in taxes from oil industry activity. Malcolm Tanner, who called the "Melanated People of Power,” purchased two adjoining five-acre tracts in Loving County in January. About three dozen transplants have been living on the property in RVs and tents, with no access to running water or a septic system. "I have taken the entire county over, out here in Loving County, Texas ," in a July TikTok video. "When these elections hit in 2026, we're going to wipe the board. Everybody that I selected will be elected." Paxton accused Tanner of , threats against local officials, deceptive marketing, and using illegal tactics to influence elections. "Indiana resident Malcolm Tanner has no right to try and take over Loving County with illegal schemes that endanger real Texans ," Paxton said in a . Medina Lake Drying Up After a brief respite from drought conditions over the summer, the water level in Medina Lake has . The lake exceeded 6% of its capacity in August after dropping below 2% in May, but it’s currently —more than 80 feet below its conservation pool—according to the Texas Water Development Board. "It did not break the drought ," , general manager of the Bandera County River Authority & Groundwater District. "We did not see any real benefit to the aquifer, other than, the decline might have slowed. It's just been so dry for so long." At least eight new data centers are slated for development in Medina County, which promises to spur economic growth but threatens to exacerbate the . "These things are big ice boxes ," said Medina County Commissioner Larry Sittre. Some residents have complained about the lack of transparency in the permitting process. "If the place, a business, that affects all the residents in this area, then yeah, I think we should have some say in what happens and how that happens ," . | Flying together with our sponsor Every diabetic needs to see Stanford scientists recently discovered a mind-bending solution shown to lower your blood sugar effortlessly... name: Team Evergreen
subject: On October 18, we say "No Kings"
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Join advocates around the country for a powerful show of resistance
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4089991/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

In June, millions of people peacefully took to the streets and declared with one voice: **America has no kings.**

And it mattered.

The world saw the power of the people. President Trump’s birthday parade was drowned out by protests in every state and across the globe. His attempt to turn June 14 into a coronation failed, and the story became a rallying point for a movement rising against his authoritarian power grabs.

Since then, the Trump regime has gone to extremes to weaponize the federal government and enrich themselves while propping up dangerous fossil fuels, and cutting jobs and services for the rest of us.

That’s why on **October 18** , we’re joining what might be the largest mass mobilization in our nation's recent history to once again say “No Kings.” [**Find an event happening near you and join us.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4089992/87SdQ4wZ) |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4089993/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
[SAY "NO KINGS" ON OCTOBER 18](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4089994/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Over the past few weeks, we’ve seen the threats from the Trump regime escalate—from gutting healthcare and environmental protections, to deploying armed troops against Americans in multiple cities. **He’s using OUR tax dollars to pay for HIS power grabs** —even as we struggle to pay our bills, access transportation, put food on the table, and recover from disasters.

But the backlash is growing too, and next week millions of us will take to the streets, peacefully and defiantly, **to show that the people— _the majority_ —are taking action to stop the corruption and remind Trump that this country has no kings.**

America isn’t a dictatorship, it’s a democracy—and it’s not too late to save it. [**Attend a No Kings rally near you on October 18 to defend freedom, dignity, equality, and a future that belongs to all of us.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4089995/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4089996/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| In solidarity,

The Team at Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

clean_body: Join advocates around the country for a powerful show of resistance | | | | | ---|---|--- | Hi Friend, In June, millions of people peacefully took to the streets and declared with one voice: America has no kings. And it mattered. The world saw the power of the people. President Trump’s birthday parade was drowned out by protests in every state and across the globe. His attempt to turn June 14 into a coronation failed, and the story became a rallying point for a movement rising against his authoritarian power grabs. Since then, the Trump regime has gone to extremes to weaponize the federal government and enrich themselves while propping up dangerous fossil fuels, and cutting jobs and services for the rest of us. That’s why on October 18 , we’re joining what might be the largest mass mobilization in our nation's recent history to once again say “No Kings.” | | | ---|---|--- | Over the past few weeks, we’ve seen the threats from the Trump regime escalate—from gutting healthcare and environmental protections, to deploying armed troops against Americans in multiple cities. He’s using OUR tax dollars to pay for HIS power grabs —even as we struggle to pay our bills, access transportation, put food on the table, and recover from disasters. But the backlash is growing too, and next week millions of us will take to the streets, peacefully and defiantly, to show that the people— the majority —are taking action to stop the corruption and remind Trump that this country has no kings. America isn’t a dictatorship, it’s a democracy—and it’s not too late to save it. | | In solidarity, The Team at Evergreen | | Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. name: Niki Conforti
subject: Will the Government Open Today?
body:
Will the Government Open Today? | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b2374d9eacdc/conforti-for-congress-10611347?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter, Later today, Congress will once again vote to open the Government. Will Democrats end the pain they are inflicting on the American people?

We are at 14 days of a shutdown - with no end in sight. The Democrats are once again showing what is most important to them - prioritizing benefits for illegals over providing paychecks for Americans.

Democrats have continued to keep American citizens at bay by voting not to reopen the government and pushing to expand healthcare to pay for illegals. Many Americans are having difficulty paying for their own healthcare, yet Democrats - including Sean Casten, want us to pay to cover free healthcare for illegals.

Having spent over 12 years delivering healthcare to the American people, I plan to use my experience to benefit Americans with more transparency and lower costs. Help me make a difference and bring common sense back to WDC!

Please consider a contribution to help me take back our District. You can be a part of the movement to turn District 6 RED again!

Click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=5cd734e719&e=25f4fa3311)

Don't stop believing in what we can achieve when we work together!
Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=bb438fb1f0&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=978746d93a&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=afc0dd23ba&e=25f4fa3311)!

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhlmsj4hkr78ri8mkntpucpl71qo6eds83h1ahuo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5hmcp72clh2bs) [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4p68543201so9prj0oqvolsdaf69o5hol5m7sgo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5hmcp72clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7o2s77l9dvlcgjbs9rifochp5g3ke0muaills98_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5hmcp72clh2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsjhld5tj3tulp2k03vkevln1t4ctab0bfje6ukg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5hmcp72clh2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl7tipos8rejji1vuqmdfjd0c6nodisbp54eeceg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5hmcp72clh2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7ivq51i4mc2j2ea944kcfvdm6lrbrdkdgqr9cu0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5hmcp72clh2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

## Tears, Praise as Trump Signs Peace Deal
President Trump signed a [landmark peace agreement in Egypt](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAQhU-DOyz-vS4o0rjbtCmtWTPYJHhZAbGzOX1ElBukHM3T0_e9t-t8hRDDfX2FHW31ab7jWSLWinneUqmwYlnSjlvasdS0fJTymWfBhKacUa5mByE-Z9U56xEFyg4tHwxTmhkhus064xc9Ijp3kdLwEUG5QYHWI4C83MYu2NbGGVdcMalYf0M3GGk0Ki9GoT1RDF2oKffvKdzrhj4-04G5X9LeRbvV-ihEvhAxETGd59n79NUs2p-IKYYDabuJmFb4BrogFPQhIw0lA0a6wQ6F_tnSjLEFaFpqumGmXNIG2GXrHmeIMRQzEMXWHUL8Raj_2u2w4icAAP__OQeDrw) on Monday, officially ending more than two years of war between Israel and Hamas. As part of the deal, 20 Israeli hostages were released after more than two years in Hamas captivity, while Israel freed nearly 2,000 Palestinian prisoners in a broad exchange agreement. The agreement followed a [direct, last-minute meeting](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDvOnDAYRVdjOo_8GsgUFBNFdH9SpEiJDL6AEz-IPw9osvqIbCH1ka7uOT8-xg_rg0_rVxvR1yWPCScF1IoybpmqXUFzjthyBNU8_yJ6lVEJdedScGlGZ314j6Zx_QIo6Aa97Fph7qJVqtl6N2mtO5hPblkeTk-ynTot9PSYu0U-2qnx_bUmhTTSCG3EbYLrWt3eYRb1UPeFGQHnay63n9mnumEJ73yg3OYcm9Bvte7E9JOpganhPM9bpHQxpgYk_iKmhkvqgrkEx9RAc847d75grjwC1aeVT6gnkHgtr7hzpCO_idvk-GajJR5gHQpxgg1wfLV_LHewganBFv58ym_x97ExPeTZO6a_fL6i4qTvKHtTerefPgRPbceMWKP14d_9-l_Nj179DQAA__8rOpjv) between Trump’s envoys, Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, and senior Hamas leaders in Egypt, where the U.S. team gave personal assurances that the ceasefire would hold if Hamas upheld its part of the deal. Emotional reunions unfolded across Israel, including a tearful embrace between Avinatan Or and Noa Argamani, the couple infamously captured at the Nova Music Festival and separated for the entire duration of their captivity. Watch the [video of their reunion here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFOwzAQgOGncbZGzuXi0MEDSxBDEUyIyUrsS2NwepV9bZS3R-UVmH_pG_7PkzuNMcXL-W1cycrM7kJbSSRC2S1cZDxT8bzSwisVYf9Tyi070NAdGn1o0IUxpt1hFexMBNRWZJveaOy0AagWqxHBh-Cnnp6Mx2kOLfXBax-OXWgNVNE-tEY32KBuUdcThd60piOc4QjdrFBTiMK5_uZ4kYXmtPOdcu15rZJdRK5Ftc8KBgXDtm31zje5TfToCoaycJaiYNCO78eXj9P712uVbbhuMaVYTK9Qn9cxpj9P_jXhbuE3AAD__8v8cWc). Other hostages returned home gaunt, pale, and weakened—some forced to dig their own graves on camera, others emerging blind in one eye or suffering from untreated illness and malnutrition. See the [hostages' photos before and after](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu2zAMxvHTyBsDWZaVZPDQxdvr2tHQsyiLjSwGEpPAty9coCfowoXAH_h9v76WL0-ZyvbT7zhJ5KXgp2UUwbokbuI3bCvvmHjHJrw-WnvVxWgzQq-ht0vwlI_FdmGKiAaHDqf-6rQdtTOmS9M6uqGPd4f6FsIYtXNmHYf77W5xvcXw3dF01nrd297qwerLN4arG9yINpq7GaOyGgMJ18tvpiIJYz74jfWy8t7lKYk8mxp-KDMrM5fjyU3OlzLzGVZm7vV5BmXmD9cc4CQqM1OrHjPBPyZUlFctVDYQBklIFaLfKRM2yMwPaInXB5UtHxAoRqxYBHwUrLBzRZDkC8iH4UBfG1CB5HffYPVPoTfJoczc1Sk8P5QzNXdVVm-7p_yXIv-1_3syfwIAAP__nqydSw). Trump received bipartisan praise in the U.S. and abroad, with former President Bill Clinton and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer commending the deal. The Jerusalem Post ran a cover featuring Trump, saying "God Bless The Peacemaker." [See it here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGngc0WXDA4A0MXb-naERFziUlxiOA2Vt6-Sl-h85E-6fxfZ38OueT79TPs6ChVf8ejFyTC5rfaKVyxr3XHre7Yqa7fvf80DwKmQYpBah9DLi-veXQJEVBxdNIaoSdhAPjmZhOVVdEEA3NMEk8JrZrlaq2d0F4sz-6tSSG11EJpMV4wWqPMhDrBCabEtMCYqbbxVvOdNkzlVZ_YxrXuvLiN6NGZ-mCwMFiO4xhvj9rpvTJYcm8By_B-xWAJjfJacJitUErx5uLjyKXkbizT4rqHXP5U-leKp4PfAAAA__-UpHJI).
## JPMorgan to Direct $10B into U.S. Security Firms
JPMorgan announced Monday it will invest $10 billion of its own capital in U.S. [companies deemed critical to national security](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGu2yAQRb8G74jwgJ1kwSJV5U312kUXXVoEj-N5BcYCEit_X9FFf6DbmXuPdM-vj_nDUaD0-O4i2rrynPAoAWvFPG9cqntg8Rxx44ilsv9dyjPPoGCQvZK9mRdH4T2bbrErIqDu0PbnUZlBjQDdZpfr4BAv2vTegFY4qjNch4u-ezDD5Yod2UbrVW96o7RRpzsu51GPA5oVrjCswihcqHI-fTKluuEa3vzCfPIcu2C3Wvci9E3AJGA6juMUS2o_ARMm-SwCpsgJ3wImz3F3ibDdPvfI-eGSrCwpvbDUtuhOIRAnSa0p_-Wlz1TJu9DSyVXi5IIs6J-ZaiO7LG-3_kfk9ZvQE3tahP76pYnFo_zEvHfZLvvR6GU8C6Me0VH4O6H-l_eXhT8BAAD__35XmY4), including defense contractors, rare earth producers, and AI firms. The investment is part of a broader $1.5 trillion initiative over 10 years to strengthen America’s economic resilience amid rising tensions with China. CEO Jamie Dimon said the U.S. has become too reliant on “unreliable sources” for essential materials and manufacturing. The effort will include loans, investments, and third-party financing. JPMorgan says the move is [strictly business, not charity.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb9GMyx4IGpAsIlZb7qhhfIQesFnCdNW__1Uzy9MfuueOuffY3nYmOKx_7UZTfW0HHiXhLXitQQq1e5YNsoYKGOptP0v5etagEPPBGdCLc7G9F5U64xHBJQtGjFornquAdpgVjs5p7wblBxBasvRratzbhz5OMAwttF83gQXSiguFe9WdIOWukflYYLeN4qji5Wu7knxqAF9etMLr26j3CYTaj1LI_80MDcw-3jYY8PubQPRZ9HA_FFqYH6ema7dHuxFd2FnopsJ1jM-9RImrmUXak7tZdx5x5Ri0UOj-J5tTD-k-qs8LwPfAQAA___8t3kZ)
## Florida Revives Bear Hunt After 10 Years
For the first time since 2015, Florida is [bringing back its black bear hunt](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEHSoyAQRk-DOyxsUJMFi9m4y2xnabXQaE9QLCCxcvupzBX-A3zfe_X-POYHcuRj_Y072RrSfNBVItVKed5SqbhScWmnLe1UanLPUl55BgW97JTszOyR42c2jbeBCEg3ZLtxUKZXA0Cz2QVvt9ENcDNG34PW2ngPo-kVeA1Lrxq237dOdaYzShvVLuTHQQ89mQB36IMwijzXlNu_iY-6UYif9KbcurQ30W61nkXoXwImAdN1XS3GyCt-BymvAibMlV0kAdOXJGDqlIApxJTZozwznZipyJCyDJxLlUtE95QLYZbb66iSD4nSk0NPTbb-vDhGLsMojFp35PjfpP4o39vCvwAAAP__sf6D7Q), citing a growing population of over 4,000 bears and rising human-bear encounters across the state. Wildlife officials approved a [172-bear harvest for the Dec. 6–28](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DGchuGgOBg03IZtMNkTHtsXcNnrWbQXP7L_4VflZSSVV6789jeZgQw_H8bXbS7NJy0FUiMVNefCpsnlRs2smnnQon-6-UMy8goG-kaCQumwnxs2C9aUcE1NWk5aAE9kIB1F4rsJMiAhzQjkYhObH2q7ITWTNOm6mDvtekkChRdCjalbZBdaondDBB7yoUtAVOuf2bwsGeXPykN-XWpr2O2jO_StX9qmCuYL6uq_0Yn9LdVjDfOBXMJnOwke7oLttk2k5LpVnJ5MafBzf_z8SmkaNEHKcBWs97rLPeXleIMRQ1VCieuwnx-5V_pOqt4SsAAP__OLx-MQ) hunt, issuing permits via a lottery that drew more than 160,000 entries. Conservation groups jumped in too, [scooping up at least 39 permits](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd1hwDXZSUGzjLttuaRG4BHbBRHATK_v1T36_8LqRRprROX9u282mnPbHb1vQUKjbjkfPSIRti7WTfWB3tWCsBTtV96_3V9tAgOZScKk2b1P-bGrwJiACTgMaucxCaTEDDNFMl4tV-h7A-smD9V4G0AtenXdCaqeHZM41KaSSSkxKjHf0yzzNGlWAK-jAlECfqLbxb007RQz5U9_YRlfLkE0kenY2_WKwMliP4xg_NtZ6tgzWE4fBahsll_GMvv7HvfOQa0ve8jvaxuNrJ_7EVhJ1Li9qFkIteoxU8tCMfx4p59TnhSnxKDbl72v6ka-3ga8AAAD__8_PgDQ) to keep hunters out of the woods in a “bag a tag, spare a bear” effort. Each permit allows one bear to be taken, and only licensed hunters 18 and older can participate. clean_body: President Trump signed a on Monday, officially ending more than two years of war between Israel and Hamas. As part of the deal, 20 Israeli hostages were released after more than two years in Hamas captivity, while Israel freed nearly 2,000 Palestinian prisoners in a broad exchange agreement. | | | | | | Tuesday, October 14, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1947, Capt. Chuck Yeager became the first person to break the sound barrier in the XS-1 research jet, launched from the bomb bay of a B-29. () After more than two years in captivity, 20 Israeli hostages held by Hamas have finally returned home, . Their release has stirred powerful emotions across the region and around the world. Feel free to reply to this email and share your thoughts about the situation. 💯 Watch your inbox later today: found nine hidden Prime perks that just might make your membership pay for itself. If you’ve ever wondered how wealthy families legally protect their money from taxes and pass on more to their kids, this simple gold-based strategy may surprise you from today's sponsor, . | Tears, Praise as Trump Signs Peace Deal President Trump signed a on Monday, officially ending more than two years of war between Israel and Hamas. As part of the deal, 20 Israeli hostages were released after more than two years in Hamas captivity, while Israel freed nearly 2,000 Palestinian prisoners in a broad exchange agreement. The agreement followed a between Trump’s envoys, Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, and senior Hamas leaders in Egypt, where the U.S. team gave personal assurances that the ceasefire would hold if Hamas upheld its part of the deal. Emotional reunions unfolded across Israel, including a tearful embrace between Avinatan Or and Noa Argamani, the couple infamously captured at the Nova Music Festival and separated for the entire duration of their captivity. Watch the . Other hostages returned home gaunt, pale, and weakened—some forced to dig their own graves on camera, others emerging blind in one eye or suffering from untreated illness and malnutrition. See the . Trump received bipartisan praise in the U.S. and abroad, with former President Bill Clinton and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer commending the deal. The Jerusalem Post ran a cover featuring Trump, saying "God Bless The Peacemaker." . JPMorgan to Direct $10B into U.S. Security Firms JPMorgan announced Monday it will invest $10 billion of its own capital in U.S. , including defense contractors, rare earth producers, and AI firms. The investment is part of a broader $1.5 trillion initiative over 10 years to strengthen America’s economic resilience amid rising tensions with China. CEO Jamie Dimon said the U.S. has become too reliant on “unreliable sources” for essential materials and manufacturing. The effort will include loans, investments, and third-party financing. JPMorgan says the move is Florida Revives Bear Hunt After 10 Years For the first time since 2015, Florida is , citing a growing population of over 4,000 bears and rising human-bear encounters across the state. Wildlife officials approved a hunt, issuing permits via a lottery that drew more than 160,000 entries. Conservation groups jumped in too, to keep hunters out of the woods in a “bag a tag, spare a bear” effort. Each permit allows one bear to be taken, and only licensed hunters 18 and older can participate. Officials say the hunt is guided by data, not politics, despite the controversy. 🌞 Want more Sunshine State news in your inbox? You’re in luck. I want to thank Katherine Clark for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Last month, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most. As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. **[Peter, will you split a donation of $10 or whatever you can today between my campaign and Katherine Clark to help us fight back and make sure their obstruction backfires?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117247089/575846273/-1601956053?amount=10&refcode=AU_KMC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjE3OWY5Ny0wNmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPkCoVbmOl9zaiSyCQvZuzsN8FSZ-0QP9FGcu9Xbp38=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Katherine Clark and Adelita Grijalva will go through immediately:_ | | _[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117247091/575846275/-1181368094?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_KMC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjE3OWY5Ny0wNmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPkCoVbmOl9zaiSyCQvZuzsN8FSZ-0QP9FGcu9Xbp38=)_

body:
The stakes for our democracy just got even higher.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K7HGZCCAXTTJ3E30RQXYWA5M_0)
---
| | | | The Supreme Court just agreed to hear Louisiana v. Callais—a case that could dismantle Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and cripple fair representation. If extremists on the court win, states will gain powerful new tools to dilute the votes of Black and Latino communities. This is how democracy is lost—not in one big moment, but through quiet, calculated attacks on our rights. These attacks have been beaten before, not just in courtrooms, but by everyday people who organize, mobilize, and refuse to be silenced. We have to do it again. Peter, I'm running because I love Maine with everything I've got.

My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it's where I've broken barriers as the first woman district attorney, first woman attorney general, and now as the first woman governor.

I've fought — and won — a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I'm proud of what we've accomplished.

But I can't sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. Frankly, I would never forgive myself if I didn't do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.

And, Peter, I'm the only Democrat to win a statewide election in Maine in the last 20 years.

So I'm running. And I'm going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.

This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.

Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's win this thing, – Janet Mills Governor of Maine = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Hey Everyone!
Today, October 14th, would have been Charlie Kirk's birthday had an assassin not taken him away from us far too soon.
In that spirit, we are hosting a Prove Me Wrong-style meeting in honor of Charlie at this month's meeting.
We would like to invite anyone who would like to engage in beneficial dialogue to attend and engage with our Chairman and Fmr. Member of the RNC Youth Advisory Council, Weston Imer, as he debates the issues of the day with those who disagree with him.
We invite any TPUSA Chapter that wishes to attend, as well as folks from all across the political divide.
As always, you can RSVP by clicking the button or image below.

name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: How Many Women Have to Give Birth in an Ambulance?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
That is the devastating reality right now in parts of our district, after the hospital in Halifax County decided to close its birthing unit.

| | | | | [|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=202a3d72c1&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | | | |
---
| |
Friend,

I'm Dr. Gary Miller, running for the 49th House of Delegates district here in Southside Virginia.
Long before I got into politics, I became a doctor to serve my community. There are many problems we face, but none more so than healthcare access. We just released a new video about a problem that faces many places, **but especially Southside.**
**Hospitals scattered across our Commonwealth and country are under attack**. They're under attack by cost-cutting corporate monopolies and by our own Federal Government. **A third of my patients depend on Medicaid to pay for their care.** In other places, it's more.

**The attacks are already succeeding.** Augusta Health Group in the Shenandoah Valley **just closed three primary care facilities,** anticipating the fallout from Washington D.C.'s "Big Beautiful Bill" that **slashes Medicaid by hundreds of billions of dollars.**
Long before this mess, Sentara Health in Halifax County had begun winding down their operations due to an aging population and profit-saving measures, cutting their birthing unit. **Now, women in labor have to drive anywhere from forty-five minutes to two hours to get care in an actual hospital** \- be it Danville, Lynchburg, Durham, or South Hill.**D.C.'s mistakes with Medicaid and Medicare could force Sentara to cut even more or even shut down.**
If one could turn back the clock, our hospitals in Danville and South Boston were once nonprofit, publicly-owned facilities, created during the Hill-Burton Act of 1946 in the New Deal. Most of our people were born there. In the present day, they were sold to the highest bidder after the Great Financial Crisis of 2009. **Now, women are routinely giving birth in ambulances.**
[**I can remember a time when we believed in our community's future. I don't remember rolling over.**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=18c8e3398e&e=606d7e9aa2)
If Halifax hospital shuts down, people in need will come to Danville, or South Hill, putting more stress on their systems, staff, and resources. If Martinsville hospital falls, they come to Danville as well, putting stress on us. Federal cuts will do the rest. Similar holds true across the country. **We can't afford to give an inch.**
**Too many folks don't know what's going on.** Too many folks don't know what's at stake. **We have to save our hospitals and shore up Medicaid in Virginia.**
[**Lives hang in the balance. I'm asking for your help to get the word out.**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=86268c2738&e=606d7e9aa2)****
If that video struck you, [$20 gets us 300 advertisement views. $100 gets us 15 yard signs for polling places. $500 gets us 1,250 door hangers.](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=a76a754363&e=606d7e9aa2)
I'd be grateful for anything you can send.
With gratitude,
Dr. Gary MillerCandidate for House of Delegates District 49

---

You may not know this about me: When I first ran for Congress in 2018, my district hadn't elected a Democrat in 50 years.
A lot of people tried to discourage me. They said it was a pipedream.
_Well, they were wrong._
Growing up, my parents used to tell me to never do anything half-hearted, and that advice has stuck with me all these years: from my time as a federal law enforcement officer taking on narcotics traffickers; a CIA officer working undercover to keep Americans safe; and a U.S. Representative for Virginia's 7th District creating bills signed into law by presidents of both parties.
**Now, I'm running for Governor in the biggest election of 2025 — and I'm giving this everything I've got.**
I've seen the momentum on the ground, I've heard the enthusiasm of people all across the country who see our race as a beacon of hope.
But the last thing we should do is get complacent.
[_**So, what do you say? I hope I've said enough to earn your $25 contribution. If we stand together, we can overcome the odds yet again and win the biggest race of 2025.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117249865/575854583/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYThhZjk2OTgtMGFhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=G2mVqIs9857DguUnfcTnZv-SyAjLKd50ghfXxXOanm8=)

clean_body: I don't just want to win in a few weeks, I want to win big and set an example for the entire nation. = Peter, you're one of my strongest supporters, and I'm counting on your contribution today. We've set an ambitious fundraising goal ahead of Thursday's mid-month deadline, and your $25 before midnight is needed to close the gap. I'm used to winning tough races, but I've always done it with a strong team behind me. = = = = = = = You may not know this about me: When I first ran for Congress in 2018, my district hadn't elected a Democrat in 50 years. A lot of people tried to discourage me. They said it was a pipedream. Well, they were wrong. Growing up, my parents used to tell me to never do anything half-hearted, and that advice has stuck with me all these years: from my time as a federal law enforcement officer taking on narcotics traffickers; a CIA officer working undercover to keep Americans safe; and a U.S. Representative for Virginia's 7th District creating bills signed into law by presidents of both parties. Now, I'm running for Governor in the biggest election of 2025 — and I'm giving this everything I've got. I've seen the momentum on the ground, I've heard the enthusiasm of people all across the country who see our race as a beacon of hope. But the last thing we should do is get complacent. = = = = = = = I can't do it without you, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

name: Janet Mills
subject: I’m running to defeat Susan Collins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117251600/575858558/1240337417?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTczZTgwYy0wZGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJWQ82vggNRW8gyXRLcg5joPVEd40BtjcvSuMZWDFbo=) I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I would _never_ forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover. Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger _every single day_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it. **So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins.[_MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority. Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117251601/575858559/1240337417?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTczZTgwYy0wZGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJWQ82vggNRW8gyXRLcg5joPVEd40BtjcvSuMZWDFbo=)** | | [ DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117251603/575858561/1240337417?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTczZTgwYy0wZGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJWQ82vggNRW8gyXRLcg5joPVEd40BtjcvSuMZWDFbo=)
---
I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And I'm the only Democrat to win a statewide election in Maine in the last 20 years._
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[_Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign from Day One by splitting a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117251605/575858563/1240337417?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTczZTgwYy0wZGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJWQ82vggNRW8gyXRLcg5joPVEd40BtjcvSuMZWDFbo=)**

clean_body: because I love Maine with everything I’ve got. = I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover. Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger every single day and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it. So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins.= | | = I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got. My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor. I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished. But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. Frankly, I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love. And I'm the only Democrat to win a statewide election in Maine in the last 20 years. So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you. This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Janet Mills and Kirsten Gillibrand immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Let’s win this thing, – Janet Mills Governor of Maine * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m running for another term as Governor.
body:
Peter, it’s Governor Wes Moore. The Real Texas PAC said I could reach out today to share some important news with you.
When we first launched our campaign four years ago, I had never run for political office. I was an Army Captain, the son of a single mom, and I ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country.
So I traveled the state, listening to your stories and sharing mine. I heard the same thing again and again: That the career politicians had been telling us everything was great, when we knew it wasn’t.
Ever since I took office, I’ve been on a mission to change that. To lower taxes for middle class families. To make health care and prescription drugs cheaper. To make our communities safer.
But our mission is far from over.
Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Because our work isn’t done yet.
Will you split a contribution of $15 or more to my campaign and The Real Texas PAC now to help power our movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac]
While we’ve made a lot of progress over the last three years, our fight is even more important now because of who is in the White House.
The President of the United States is bending over backwards for billionaires and big corporations. He’s firing federal civil servants, gutting Medicaid, and raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries for families. His reckless attacks are hitting Maryland hard.
It’s time for us to come together across counties and party lines to prove that even in the face of dysfunction in D.C.: We can show there’s a better way forward.
We already have Republican opponents in this race, and with the President and his allies working to undo our progress, the stakes couldn’t be higher. This campaign has always been about partnership – I’m grateful to have The Real Texas PAC’s support in this race, and I’d like to have yours too. So please, give whatever you can and split a contribution between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac]

Peter, join us. Let’s build a state where we leave no one behind.
Elevate,
Wes

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: 🚨 Donald Trump just attacked me on Truth Social
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.
#
Donald Trump just attacked me on Truth Social.
_I will not be rattled._
I will not be intimidated by somebody who's fired thousands of Virginians and shut down the federal government.
_Trump is attacking me because he feels threatened._
He knows that I will call out the chaos he's unleashed as President. He knows that I will stand up for Virginia at every opportunity as Governor. And he knows that we are on the verge of flipping the Governor's office from red to blue on November 4th.
**[But I can't do this alone, Peter. Can I count on you to help us stand up to Trump's attacks by splitting a $10 contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee? This is the biggest election of 2025, and we need to raise more resources to reach voters with the truth.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96399?refcode=em20251014-9571&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9571%2E614464%2EQ8GloK)**
