name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m listening to your stories on the health care crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We’re not going to stand by while millions of people lose their health insurance.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2675%2E4032634%2E2vAVMX)
---
Here’s where we’re at right now: Trump and the Republicans would rather shut down the government than work with us to restore the Medicaid funding that they cut and that will result in 15 million people getting kicked off their health care. Trump and the Republicans would rather shut down the government than prevent tens of millions of people’s health care premiums from more than doubling if they’re covered under the Affordable Care Act. Trump and the Republicans would rather shut down the government, fire federal workers, and withhold Congressionally-approved funding from communities than solve the health care crisis they’ve escalated. I realize that there are lots of big numbers being thrown around during these conversations, but it’s not just about the numbers. It’s about the real people who are impacted by these decisions. The real lives who count on the funding we’re discussing. The real pain that will be inflicted by these cuts. **Republicans are trying to lie and pretend that the health care crisis they created isn’t happening. That’s why one of the most powerful things you can do to fight back right now is to share your story.** [**So, I want to know: Have you been impacted by Republicans’ cuts to Medicaid? Are you covered under the Affordable Care Act and seeing your costs go up next year? Are you struggling to afford your health insurance already? Have you seen hospitals and clinics in your area close their doors? Trump and the Republicans would rather shut down the government, fire federal workers, and withhold Congressionally-approved funding from communities than solve the health care crisis they’ve escalated. name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Things fall apart, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: - I'm making one final plea for help before it's too late. My situation is desperate, and I need you to read every word of this email carefully. While I was barred from accepting campaign donations, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, collected hundreds of hundreds of thousands of dollars. Then, a Soros-backed group handed her $500,000 all in one shot. She's outraised me by MILLIONS, but the polls are now virtually TIED! But here's the hard truth: I'm on pace to miss my next crucial Fundraising Deadline Goal. I'm over $10,000 behind, and I desperately need your help to close the gap. As a Christian, a Marine, and a mother, not backed by billionaire donors or Hollywood liberals; I'm 100% reliant on patriots like you. That's why I'm asking you to send in any amount you can to help me reach this CRUCIAL Goal before midnight. grateful for your support, Peter. Together, we can beat my liberal opponent and take back our country. Thank you, and may God bless you. -Winsome Earle-Sears| . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Joe Jaworski
subject: Greg Abbott’s war on kindness
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
Texas Republican leaders like the black and white of conformity, so removing rainbow crosswalks feels good to them. But here is the truth. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/fed-up-14189766?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=ce827937b6&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , **Texas Republican leaders like the black and white of conformity, so removing rainbow crosswalks feels good to them.** But here is the truth. Governor Greg Abbott cannot make rainbow crosswalks illegal. There is nothing unlawful about city leaders accepting private funds to paint a crosswalk in rainbow colors to show support for gay, lesbian, and transgender Texans. These crosswalks are meaningful, locally inspired public art, and they are fully legal under the First Amendment. They send a simple, positive message: _we are a tolerant community, and hate is not welcome here._ **No one forced these cities to act. They chose to because it mattered to them.

[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=ba43fe3b63&e=5d8d80652b)** Greg Abbott does not care about that. He bullies local governments, especially those led by Democrats, and now he is threatening to withhold state and federal transportation funds from communities that show solidarity with the LGBTQ community. **That is not leadership. It is an abuse of power.** The Texas Constitution does not give him the authority to punish cities for embracing diversity. He is acting as a political enforcer in Donald Trump’s culture war, trying to intimidate Texans who believe in kindness, inclusion, and pride. I have walked these crosswalks myself to enter City Hall in Galveston and in Houston’s storied Montrose neighborhood. **They are vibrant and welcoming, a celebration of who we are as Texans.** And I am ready to fight for them. The law is on our side, and there is a remedy in the courts. I look forward to applauding the first city or county that stands up and sues Abbott for this clear abuse of power. **I am Joe Jaworski, and I am running for Texas Attorney General to defend Texans’ rights to speak, celebrate, and live freely.** [**If you believe in standing up to bullies, join me today and contribute to our movement.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=10d184a490&e=5d8d80652b) Onward,

****

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: RSVP -- Utilities Fair This Thursday
body:
|

---
Friends and neighbors, As this Republican government shutdown carries into yet another week and this Administration continues to callously fire federal workers, I would like to invite you to join us for a utilities fair this Thursday at Coppin State University. The event will feature utility providers from across the state and serve as an opportunity for consumers to get information, help with their bills, and learn about affordability programs and rate structure. Representatives from utility providers will be on-site to offer assistance to consumers. Space is limited so please RSVP [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15675.12905170.5698667.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdocs.google.com%2fforms%2fd%2fe%2f1FAIpQLSeUmI3v_5Eurc27o9JI9trA9JmV54VG9YIraB-2ttdC_zOyLw%2fviewform&redir_log=101128615694660) to reserve your spot. [](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15675.12905170.5698667.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdocs.google.com%2fforms%2fd%2fe%2f1FAIpQLSeUmI3v_5Eurc27o9JI9trA9JmV54VG9YIraB-2ttdC_zOyLw%2fviewform&redir_log=101128615694660) Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks

name: Moms for America
subject: What You Should Know about "Banned" Books
body:
We're sharing the latest with "banned" books in our classrooms. Are conservatives taking books away from kids or do we have an
obligation to protect our children from harmful content?

No More Sexually Explicit Content for Kids and Lies About “Banned” Books

There is still a lot of buzz about "banned" books. Radical Leftists claim that the Trump Administration and concerned parents
across America are taking books away from kids in public school. What you do not often hear is that the books in question contain
obscene content, radical ideological messaging, and dangerous messages that should not be given to children of any age.

There are some things kids can’t unsee, and we as moms must stand as the guards against the infiltration of pornographic and
explicit materials aimed directly at our children in our schools and communities. Keep reading to learn what you can do:

What can you do for a mom facing an unexpected pregnancy? Gina Tomes has dedicated more than three decades to walking alongside
women and families facing unexpected pregnancies and championing life.

After the fall of Roe v. Wade, Gina recognized the urgent need to expand the pro-life safety net and create a long-term care
approach. She founded the Guiding Grace Family Support Network. They create novel, scalable services that focus on removing the
barriers that can cause families to choose abortion. Like, subscribe and share.

clean_body: We're sharing the latest with "banned" books in our classrooms. Are conservatives taking books away from kids or do we have an obligation to protect our children from harmful content? If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] October 14, 2025 • Newsletter Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] No More Sexually Explicit Content for Kids and Lies About “Banned” Books There is still a lot of buzz about "banned" books. Radical Leftists claim that the Trump Administration and concerned parents across America are taking books away from kids in public school. What you do not often hear is that the books in question contain obscene content, radical ideological messaging, and dangerous messages that should not be given to children of any age. There are some things kids can’t unsee, and we as moms must stand as the guards against the infiltration of pornographic and explicit materials aimed directly at our children in our schools and communities. Keep reading to learn what you can do: Read the Blog [] Helping Moms Choose Life Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] What can you do for a mom facing an unexpected pregnancy? Gina Tomes has dedicated more than three decades to walking alongside women and families facing unexpected pregnancies and championing life. After the fall of Roe v. Wade, Gina recognized the urgent need to expand the pro-life safety net and create a long-term care approach. She founded the Guiding Grace Family Support Network. They create novel, scalable services that focus on removing the barriers that can cause families to choose abortion. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

clean_body: | | | — Big news: Gabby Giffords supports our campaign! And she’s out in the streets with Elizabeth to help pass real, life-saving gun safety legislation in Virginia. Gabby’s courage is legendary. She survived gun violence, built a national movement, and never stopped fighting. Now she’s putting her voice behind Elizabeth, the common-sense gun safety champion in this race, because she knows our race is crucial to passing these laws. A Democratic flip means we can finally pass background checks, safe storage, red-flag laws, and limits on high-capacity magazines. The gun lobby is pouring money into this district to stop us. We beat them by turning out voters — now . ** you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. **When leaders like Gabby show up, it’s because victory is within reach — if we meet the moment. Let’s turn her visit into a surge of votes and send a message the gun lobby can’t ignore. Onward, Team Elizabeth ****** | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising text from Democrats talking about how they're fighting fascism... Because it's such B.S. We're not idiots. Everyone knows most of them aren't doing jack right now to fight back. People are being kidnapped into unmarked vans by masked police. There is a genocide happening in Palestine. Literal billionaires have taken over our government. And all Democratic leadership can do is send us another fundraising text? **My name is Graham Platner, and I 'm the Marine Corps veteran and Democrat running for U.S. Senate against Susan Collins here in Maine. **I'm not going to speak in platitudes or shy away from what I believe. There is a war going on in this country, and the oligarchy and the fascists are winning right now. **Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country.** We have an opportunity to replace her with a working-class Democrat - one who won't take money from corporations or AIPAC. But I'm not a wealthy guy, and we're still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win.**If I 'm going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I need folks like you to chip in now to my campaign.** [**Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and No Dem Left Behind****to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate with a Democrat who will actually fight to defend our democracy like Democrats oughta be?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvjAQF1uUBxrg-sjZUtZ3KM5H7eB_uaB9V07PcSuEtwTrgvguc2Xp4RnKHbA97M0adyAaHWSuRjgutIH62QyefRsKOQYGJzDx4BF9Lu9LnXyTQ7X3vF_LK-6coKD0Ay83-ZfC6Wu3qG5i7p1CjieHgX9QC_AGLZ7H9VKGPE0kmZudg7-Uj-e3Q4tGUhN_mqiThUaxaBEF6O2C7kXRE4SZ7pKjy0jKUU58Vk5bSTDRbG4UQWTI6ZQ2hQoU9YigCVpcx8tjB_G2uVVuucNLmDtEuHsq8nUAl-mJq7VvWKT3Nim5goq3DdR4-SSHSczetXOqQsfFeFVL4V8i89WxNyekRsceKVc3-x8P0MuV9JpDKvvw/4kq/MxpTIvw_SB6UJfylsaZbbg/h1/h001.7owIgWY5LMk1JdPypQrTTIC88XtmO5EAQUUZmoOa4bY)

I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.

My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.

I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.

But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**

_And I'm the only Democrat to win a statewide election in Maine in the last 20 years._

So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.

This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.

[**_Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and the MAGA movement the power of this campaign from Day One by splitting a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me >> _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117254933/575869616/513678374?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjgyNTk2Zi0wZmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qw_FWNm7vbtat-ih54ANiij1oPO0ecPwr-ZdtC5D82s=)

CNN reported that the FBI disbanded a team of specialists charged with combating foreign threats to U.S. elections.
The shuttering of the FBI Foreign Influence Task Force and reassignment of team members follows a directive from President Trump's Attorney General Pam Bondi. body:
because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117256757/575875442/-742683546?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5622-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWI5OTlmMC0xMWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISWTvED_hDOL1wCPLXtgycCB177S23EyZkEOJYfX910=)
Friend, I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.
Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger every single day and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it.
**So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins.[MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority. Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Jacky Rosen right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117256758/575875444/-742683546?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=10&refcode=jtk5622-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWI5OTlmMC0xMWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISWTvED_hDOL1wCPLXtgycCB177S23EyZkEOJYfX910=)**
| | [Donate Now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117256759/575875445/-742683546?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5622-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWI5OTlmMC0xMWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISWTvED_hDOL1wCPLXtgycCB177S23EyZkEOJYfX910=)
---
Friend, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.

My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.

I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And friend, I'm the only Democrat to win a statewide election in Maine in the last 20 years._
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.

And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor. I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. Peter,
While Virginians sit at home without paychecks, Chuck Schumer is holding them hostage—and******Mark Warner is throwing a pig roast at his million-dollar mansion in King George.**
That’s right. Instead of being in Washington doing his job,**** Warner and almost every elected Virginia Democrat spent the weekend at a posh party.**** Not one of them demanded Schumer reopen the government. **Not one of them fought for working Virginians.**
I was raised to believe you stay until the work gets done. But Democrats don’t seem to get that.
**Here’s the truth:****** Republicans want the government open. Every single one of us. But in the Senate, it takes 60 votes. We only have 53. And Warner, Schumer, and their allies are blocking every effort to end the shutdown.
That’s why we need to hold Warner accountable.******He’s one of the wealthiest members of Congress—****and it’s going to take every one of us to send him packing in 2026.**

clean_body: | | | | Virginians missed paychecks. VADems roasted pigs at a mansion. Peter, While Virginians sit at home without paychecks, Chuck Schumer is holding them hostage—and****Mark Warner is throwing a pig roast at his million-dollar mansion in King George. That’s right. Instead of being in Washington doing his job,** Warner and almost every elected Virginia Democrat spent the weekend at a posh party. Not one of them demanded Schumer reopen the government. Not one of them fought for working Virginians. I was raised to believe you stay until the work gets done. But Democrats don’t seem to get that. Here’s the truth:**** Republicans want the government open. Every single one of us. But in the Senate, it takes 60 votes. We only have 53. And Warner, Schumer, and their allies are blocking every effort to end the shutdown. That’s why we need to hold Warner accountable.**He’s one of the wealthiest members of Congress—and it’s going to take every one of us to send him packing in 2026. | This is our moment. We can take the momentum from this year and roll it into victory in 2026—but only if we start NOW. | Together, we’ll end the corruption, the arrogance, and the party politics that put elites first and Virginians last. Onward, Orlando Martinez Deputy Executive Director Republican Party of Virginia \- = PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

name: Janet Mills
subject: I’m running to defeat Susan Collins
body:
because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251014-1.kHYI-5&refcode=em-20251014-1&t=3&akid=756%2E1086043%2EjzzmsI)
Peter, I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I could _never_ live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.
Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger _every single day_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it.
**So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins.[MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority. Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Wes Moore right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251014-1.kHYI-5&refcode=em-20251014-1&t=4&akid=756%2E1086043%2EjzzmsI)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251014-1.IPCuTB&amount=5&refcode=em-20251014-1&t=5&akid=756%2E1086043%2EjzzmsI)**
Peter, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And Peter, I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years._
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign from Day One by splitting a donation between my campaign and Wes Moore – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251014-1.IPCuTB&refcode=em-20251014-1&t=6&akid=756%2E1086043%2EjzzmsI)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251014-1.IPCuTB&amount=5&refcode=em-20251014-1&t=25&akid=756%2E1086043%2EjzzmsI)**
Let’s win this thing,
– Janet Mills
Governor of Maine

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251014-1&t=26&refcode2=756_1086043_jzzmsI&akid=756%2E1086043%2EjzzmsI)**

BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Today is the last day to register to vote!
body:
Hi Peter,
Today is the last day to register to vote or update your voter registration! You may have an election coming up on November 4th, so make sure that you’re ready to use your voice by midnight tonight (Tuesday, October 14th). [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en]
Register to vote [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en]
Thank you for taking part in our democracy,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en]
Hi Peter,
It’s that time of the year again... We’re only a few days away from the voter registration deadline on Tuesday, October 14th! You may have an election coming up on November 4th, so it’s time to check your registration and make sure you’re ready to use your voice. Make sure you’re registered or check your registration here — it only takes a second! [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en]
Register to vote [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en]
With all the attacks on our democracy we’ve been seeing from the Trump Administration, it’s more important than ever for us to continue showing up and standing up for what’s right. Exercising your right to vote whenever possible, and to vote for climate action, is a perfect way to do just that! But, you won’t be able to take a stand unless your voter registration is correct.
Even if you haven’t recently moved or are sure that you’re registered to vote, it’s always a good idea to check your voter registration to make sure that you are ready to receive your ballot in a few days. Check your registration using My Vote here - it only takes a second! [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/myvote.aspx?lang=en]
Register to vote [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en]
The Oregon My Vote [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/myvote.aspx?lang=en] system can also help you track the status of your ballot once it’s been mailed, locate your nearest ballot drop box, and look up contact information for your county election office - so be sure to save this website.
Thank you for taking part in our democracy,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=Bvmim6ttn2isPrIioRljBA57zGIeBxNbyzikLhXxCd4FwGBov%2Bp1Ar50LuCqqxMMSWoxbb402gpDP1B1rSoIh302DXW7GmN47yRUdE1IO261pyAbqQqgeO%2Ff3xaQGjETTHPXSoMmuCtVJEhXKmoLkdP02tk9HC0Dx9CL%2FdFIV2CWK17DcFR0jnYQi8rOmd3znc3QI%2Bh3YeDJNnaAxkBj%2Fva9A5fDie0xMZ3X3%2BBCf2mb56ASMW%2B%2BrsT9UPSeXGFfG7bLL013BZKHSAHtEXRKd7WeiNRJzvNv1LR66fKUfDF7yILtDdWeLr3mATfgx5sGrrVtOQ4aicalNKNE98uua%2BOt2ba5i9%2F0%2BR2wUrq6elPAmIgzvEdGzAt68LTn2B8g0sxGhjkR%2Bek%2BHtI8PxTPbDhTLcIgM%2FVv%2BBcqDu6tpsI%3D .

name: No Kings via Our Revolution
subject: No Kings - Are you with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1012&refcode=email-20251014_v&akid=9565%2E5885482%2EBcPeS9 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

We have just 4 days left to come together in unprecedented numbers to show
Trump and his MAGA regime that in America, there are **no kings.**

October 18 is No Kings Day and with over 2,400 events planned in every
corner of the country, together we CAN make this the largest single day of
protest against Trump's authoritarian agenda in HISTORY.

But to turn this vision into reality, Our Revolution is putting
**everything** on the line. We're preparing thousands of grassroots
volunteers to host, lead, and join peaceful mass protests to counter
Trump's dangerous escalation and military takeover of our cities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1058&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251014nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9565%2E5885482%2EBcPeS9 ]Will you rush a donation now to help us do EVERYTHING we can in these
final days to get as many people into the streets as possible – mobilizing
our grassroots movement, making calls to turn people out, and make sure we
send a clear message to Trump?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251014nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9565%2E5885482%2EBcPeS9 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1044&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251014nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9565%2E5885482%2EBcPeS9 ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1048&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251014nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9565%2E5885482%2EBcPeS9 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1049&amount=9&refcode=email-20251014nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9565%2E5885482%2EBcPeS9 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

In June, over 5 million people came together at more than 2,000 No Kings
Day actions.

But now, the threat Trump poses to all of us is even more dangerous. He's
sending armed forces into our cities, declaring “war” on the left, and
coming after anyone who dares to stand up to his authoritarianism.

This Saturday, we have a chance to show him that the more he tries to
scare us, the more the people rise up. From small towns to huge cities,
millions are mobilizing on October 18. Our Revolution's job is clear but
urgent: turn out our movement, and make sure every organizer and every
protester gets the resources, training, and support they need.

That means providing support for local leaders – including legal guidance,
rapid-response tech, and posters and flyers. It means turning out every
last voice willing to say “no” to authoritarianism. But we can't finish
this fight without your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1055&amount=22&refcode=email-20251014nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9565%2E5885482%2EBcPeS9 ]With just 4 days left, help us power this national movement to stand up
and show Trump that the people will NOT be intimidated by his military
takeover of our cities. Together let's make October 18 the biggest day of
nonviolent resistance America has ever seen.

Thank you for being part of this movement. Let’s make history – together.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Friend, **Jay Jones is HIDING.**

Since his **twisted murder fantasies** went public, **Jones has been cowering in his basement** — cancelling Soros fundraisers, dodging campaign events, and refusing to face Virginia voters.

He thinks he can skip Thursday night's debate, hide out until Election Day, and let the far-Left machine _**INSTALL**_ him as your Attorney General.

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: From Communist China to New Hampshire — why I’m running again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
My story isn’t political. It’s personal. | | | [](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=1dc42f93e7cd4e6380162875f3bc6985&_e=ncD435GEkiRHwItwO6-lHgZeij8cxNyZyDrqCrhJNzBoacYep4D2B9JJX57HrtP_0OEF6hXd4wBnrqRGFMxGAG6rRjb5SwWkAfVF2-0mV6cPAATMiLoFxNZkm9GyJ6pmCfURZM8NXg6CrOOMWrGsg8mMkNiP7TkkGfQE2IHeIGcSpxHP8wla2m8P_Mtq2McmMYSn8VwqA8SnYpFcu5JWCWWrYoAFNmHGX87FCNg-4fMwAhcKhSBQog8L3JvKK_ioPGKchgAYHjfFPXYtrwKDVqJXNMCUAa9qRaBF2APr8YPBVk64ZHY7LM2sQc4C_iHtQKnxS6_gDtivOrALD0wJucVv6FfycJ0OgkIYNRv4EK4AeCHKlSqKC4HDnujn7sat81kys9FmhxN6gNEiL8lAY7sTNWkei7W_OCzwGrJrF_M%3D)
---
Friend, I was born in Communist China under the leadership of Chairman Mao. From the moment I could speak, I was told he was God. I saw families torn apart, neighbors reporting on neighbors, and millions of people brainwashed into silence. **My parents and I lived in constant fear.** There was no freedom of speech, no right to worship, no chance to build a better life. We had nothing — not even hope. But even as a young woman, I knew deep down that human beings are meant to be free. And so, I left. When I arrived in America in the 1980s, I only had $100 in my pocket. But this country gave me something priceless: **opportunity.** I worked hard, built a life, raised my family, became a business owner, and became a proud US citizen. America let me rediscover God, and it gave me the liberty to live by my own values, not the dictates of a dictator. [That’s why I am running for Congress as a proud conservative.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=1dc42f93e7cd4e6380162875f3bc6985&_e=ncD435GEkiRHwItwO6-lHgZeij8cxNyZyDrqCrhJNzBoacYep4D2B9JJX57HrtP_0OEF6hXd4wBnrqRGFMxGAG6rRjb5SwWkAfVF2-0mV6cPAATMiLoFxNZkm9GyJ6pmMRpkgUy4AIKNalYiA6S1_0vp-pt8DWP6dL9tdLOWTKgdhRsdmDM3fekRMQuONtI-puIvQAQhwL5J_3oPb4QqJrhsTTc_kTSjP-pYUcYFVjhmnro9uTsspJmCp1TrAEKPiJgkOUEC5MMUaaBCydHu67fQ4W3UohAgPRLsLfjCWrJmGt20z0OXWPsssXyEXwRwSmp0E2cdscPtb8WvLD5VJUCUvlSftVdrjM4nlRZtIfDWIlxbrooT-GmWqFN79Ufv4vgsMOBWNAfaV_rguMevVesx6JMC2u8QOLO3wOYQWqw%3D) I see warning signs from the Left that remind me too much of where I came from. **Government overreach. Attacks on faith and family. A culture of dependency instead of opportunity.** I refuse to sit back and let our country drift toward the same failed system I escaped. But I can’t fight this battle alone. My woke opponent, Maggie Goodlander, has the backing of Washington insiders and coastal elites. They will pour millions into this district to silence my message of freedom. That’s why I’m asking you: [will you stand with me today?](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=1dc42f93e7cd4e6380162875f3bc6985&_e=ncD435GEkiRHwItwO6-lHgZeij8cxNyZyDrqCrhJNzBoacYep4D2B9JJX57HrtP_0OEF6hXd4wBnrqRGFMxGAG6rRjb5SwWkAfVF2-0mV6cPAATMiLoFxNZkm9GyJ6pmSvj1WEfNWUcO2GqiimNu_AY_04Q8mJWx3BG5UNXrjJqieVoRFHQIKCevNsU31u6VhqQW81Nypajxx_RjTiAxpquts6HaX93K0qyFBH56P__vkHvnaUaTTWzvJEh5LxQjDLUGBe-2lPf49RJBQ-bpaJeVskCSOp_FDnqQR35ebAuHhbkFZcNplua9ch-VGIIaTR6Ofx2CIHW8_MXmZ6eiBFzQcEiAu6LB_ONzDaM8_p-oBny4fqb7xTSbqf9wLgfpAv-2LsYMxfRbJmaJNQz9fZrXfLiDYBsPXohuikvAhis%3D) [Your gift — whether $25, $50, or $100 — will help us build a grassroots army strong enough to take on the establishment.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=1dc42f93e7cd4e6380162875f3bc6985&_e=ncD435GEkiRHwItwO6-lHgZeij8cxNyZyDrqCrhJNzBoacYep4D2B9JJX57HrtP_0OEF6hXd4wBnrqRGFMxGAG6rRjb5SwWkAfVF2-0mV6cPAATMiLoFxNZkm9GyJ6pmijynNJLljelz4yPCEYy1sS3HBBL3nIWeAKUMO9TzSogWQDB6NwWjBdJ679VlCQqo0yVPiCa6dfeG7sAVX72sJS1ExUAxwdpzo0JMYRi9MB8yBH4cGPTPnJvVS4evZTzeWu9n2CDhAWx2EJDDsdyFRqxKzsVp-8hXgPMshQylnmjj4k2GoTVMrw-l5rdSlf7O8z4Xj4Sb8ld8w7UdYlS7viqL90rSSOH1KpLpVveNWiB-h2ATRs7Kld1BtCBxM7ssBju4Fb2GCGih11p4iGXx9W7Abu6SoWTv8VuArileaPw%3D) It will help us get my story and our message out to every voter in NH-02.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Stop Cheering for Collapse
body:
Kyle Sammin | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **The politics of despair**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=118280fd19&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| ''There has always been loose talk of civil war in certain corners of the online media world. People who believe, for whatever reason, that America’s differences are too vast to bridge and that separation — even to the point of war — is the only solution. We saw this in 2004, when after George W. Bush’s reelection, [frustrated Democrats circulated a map](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5e74eabbab&e=b7b3eddce2) dividing the nation into “Jesusland” and “the United States of Canada.” It was good for a laugh, but in those less volatile times, that was all it was..."
---

subject: Taking on AIPAC Together

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_stephanyendorsement_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_stephanyendorsement_act]
Peter,
Stephany here . As Executive Director of Politivist Action PAC and lead spokesperson for Movement for Freedom, I want you to know how deeply honored I am to endorse Cori Bush for Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_stephanyendorsement_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_stephanyendorsement_act]
Cori and I met back in 2019—both running for Congress, and both determined to shake up a system that had failed too many of our people. From the very beginning, she’s been more than a colleague; she’s been my sister in solidarity.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_stephanyendorsement_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_stephanyendorsement_act]

She is the embodiment of a Politivist: someone who leads with love, fights with courage, and refuses to compromise on justice, peace, and human rights. I have no doubt about her ability to push our movement forward. Not one. She is exactly who we need back in Congress.
Look, if we want to take on those same AIPAC mega-donors who overspent her last year, and truly shift the balance of power, we need more than one champion. We need a movement in Congress.
Can we count on you to invest in this movement today so we can elect Cori and a slate of Politivists to the halls of power? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_stephanyendorsement_act]
Cori inspires me every single day, and I know she inspires you, too. Let’s show her she’s not in this fight alone.
With love and determination,
Stephany

Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded under Politivist Action PAC, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our websites at PolitivistActionPAC.com [https://www.politivistaction.com/] and Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My trip to Western PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
If there's one thing to know about me, it's that I believe the Midwest Is Best.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)

Friends -
If there's one thing to know about me, it's that I believe the Midwest Is Best. That's why I've started to travel across the Midwest to elevate next generation leaders from the middle of the country.
A few weeks ago, it was a visit to Wisconsin. And this weekend, I took a trip to Pittsburgh -- which, for the record, I absolutely believe is Midwestern (I have learned this is a controversial opinion). While there, we had a packed schedule, supporting great candidates and helping to Get Out the Vote before important 2025 local elections there.
**First, I spoke at the Allegheny/Fayette Central Labor Council's annual dinner.** Just like Michigan, Western PA’s middle class was built by generations of workers in strong labor unions. Today, just like then, the labor movement continues to be on the front lines in the fight for a fair economy that rewards work.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-padem.RB-N2J&t=2&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)
But Western PA's labor leaders didn't just have a nice dinner -- they showed up the next morning to work.**Alongside U.S. Representative Chris Deluzio and Governor Josh Shapiro** , we rallied hundreds of union workers before they hit the doors and phones to support a strong slate of judicial candidates up and down the ballot.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-padem.RB-N2J&t=3&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)
**I ended the weekend speaking to the Beaver County Democrats at their annual dinner.** Beaver County reminds me so much of working class areas of Michigan that used to be solidly blue. Think Macomb County. The truth is that the Democratic Party has left these folks behind, and places like Beaver County need to be at the center of how we rebuild our party.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-padem.RB-N2J&t=4&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-padem.RB-N2J&t=5&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)
Of course, in between these events, we made time to experience Pittsburgh. **We got a tour of the Carrie Blast Furnace** , which for over 70 years produced about 1,000 tons of iron per day. That iron went into the steel that helped build Western PA, Michigan, and America. **We also took a quick ride up the Duquesne Incline** , one of the few working funiculars in the United States.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-padem.RB-N2J&t=6&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-padem.RB-N2J&t=7&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)
**Right now, one of the most important things we can do is to win in November 2025 -- in big races from Virginia, to New Jersey, to Pennsylvania. We can show the nation that we are not going to just stand by while President Trump tries to fundamentally change America.**
**[That's why I'm asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and the Pennsylvania Democratic Party, who is funding so many of these critical local judicial races.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-padem.RB-N2J&refcode=em250922-1&t=8&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-padem.-4ff21&amount=3&refcode=em250922-1&t=27&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-padem.P3dvoT&refcode=em250922-1&t=28&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-padem.o54g4S&refcode=em250922-1&t=29&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-padem.lXP0Us&refcode=em250922-1&t=30&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-padem.8V4OBP&refcode=em250922-1&t=31&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-padem.-4ff21&refcode=em250922-1&t=32&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)**
---
****
Thank you for reading,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=33&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=34&akid=2360%2E135344%2EnV79OU)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidate and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She is not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

# When Everything You've Worked For Is at Risk, There's Only One Move That Makes Sense...
**The debt is exploding. The dollar is shrinking. And seniors are going back to work just to survive.** Dear Friends, Imagine waking up one morning and realizing that everything you thought was safe... isn’t. Your savings, your retirement accounts, even the value of the dollar in your wallet—it’s all being quietly eroded. You’ve already seen the warning signs:
* **$37 trillion in national debt** —and growing by a trillion every hundred days.
* Inflation making it harder and harder to stretch a dollar.
* **Bank of America confirming** the dollar has already lost **10.7% of its value this year**.
* Banks failing, BRICS rising, and the global stage shifting against America.

And now? **Senior citizens across the country are being forced out of retirement—back to work—because they can no longer live on what they saved.** Let me ask you: _Will you wait until it’s your turn? name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: Picking Up A Major Endorsement
body:
Following another great week of campaigning around the state, we receive a great endorsement!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4ed51eb04b68/picking-up-a-major-endorsement?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| |
# A Major Endorsement!
---
|
---
| | I wanted to first start this email off to celebrate a major endorsement from an amazing organization. The **Armenian National Committee of America** has officially this week endorsed the Haggard for Congress campaign and put their faith in me to speak for the rights of Armenian-Americans and support one of the worlds oldest Christian countries that survived for hundreds of years despite attempts to erase their people and their history from adversaries. I had the unique opportunity in August to attend one of their cultural festivals in August and after I was able to learn so much about their people and their culture. If you want to read more about it, here is a link!
---
| [ANCA endorses Craig Haggard for Congress!](https://hoosiersforhaggard.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9e7cbafb97c2110b065cece3&id=82e4b893f7&e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
|
---
| | I started my morning off right at the Zionsville Firefighter Pancake Breakfast. These fine men and woman celebrated 40 years of a great community event! It was an amazing time catching up with friends and allies in town!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | I made it up later that night to the White County GOP Bingo event in Monticello and all though I didn’t win, I still had a great night meeting people and seeing supporters alike. Chairman Mattix and Vice Chairwoman Austin know how to put on an amazing event!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | I also will continue highlighting the endorsements I continue to receive throughout the district from local leaders and groups that put their faith in me to represent them in Congress. Our momentum is just getting started and I can’t wait to continue to share with you who is already on board. If you ever want to get involved or endorse, please reach out!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Check out our website here!](https://hoosiersforhaggard.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9e7cbafb97c2110b065cece3&id=8feabf42e9&e=72dace1453)

clean_body: Peter, The screams from Democrat headquarters are so loud that we can almost hear them here at House GOP HQ. We've identified the 13 most vulnerable Red-District Democrats -- Democrats who won in districts that voted RED for President last November. These races are the Left's weakest links, their Achilles heel. And we're not targeting them one by one. This means every single dollar you donate today is not just a donation. It's a political bunker buster. This is the they were warned about, and they are caught without a lifeboat. If we succeed, we don't just win a few seats. We OBLITERATE their power base. If we fail? They will unleash: ❌ OPEN BORDERS & millions of illegal Democrat voters!❌ DESTROY the DOGE reforms!❌ The DEEP STATE rebuilt stronger than EVER before!Peter, their only hope is that you do nothing. They are praying for your silence. Do not give them that victory. , House GOP War Room| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyU0b2u3CAQBeCnwR0Wf8Z2QRHpapPmpkgTpUIYZr0jGVgB9u6-feQoiVLmtqOjM_pmvr_bd4cbpvWri2D8Yku18VWx7a5hTlgxvfJebi6FWqxgYqCcUa7OHO-C8TMItagODB81U5pJobubEcs0zsBmmNmgrvoa3MLZ4mBwTnKu5g7N2cUZV1yrQcheM8e9lmrSXjHOHFEMArZcep9ThXK4hgcsJbvgXW19gtZt5tbavRL5iYgLEZcKfi_QPzAVCL3PkYjLA1PNEeg1F7rmA0rK5Z9xfNG_WIqVYqKnl_4C03rLpV1zOYuIvMSc4GXvG4QViHxrZQci9N6i9S7eHa6JyLffLmE_f6E_vvWcT2IcbOOjUNM0UqnYSISGp20Y_jv-3NNxbjyoX-ify3XFhPsDtw2rHolia3S4neyuffiThxE_AwAA___YyKc8)

Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble request from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._ In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians. Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again. **Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >> ](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyU0b2u3CAQBeCnwR0Wf8Z2QRHpapPmpkgTpUIYZr0jGVgB9u6-feQoiVLmtqOjM_pmvr_bd4cbpvWri2D8Yku18VWx7a5hTlgxvfJebi6FWqxgYqCcUa7OHO-C8TMItagODB81U5pJobubEcs0zsBmmNmgrvoa3MLZ4mBwTnKu5g7N2cUZV1yrQcheM8e9lmrSXjHOHFEMArZcep9ThXK4hgcsJbvgXW19gtZt5tbavRL5iYgLEZcKfi_QPzAVCL3PkYjLA1PNEeg1F7rmA0rK5Z9xfNG_WIqVYqKnl_4C03rLpV1zOYuIvMSc4GXvG4QViHxrZQci9N6i9S7eHa6JyLffLmE_f6E_vvWcT2IcbOOjUNM0UqnYSISGp20Y_jv-3NNxbjyoX-ify3XFhPsDtw2rHolia3S4neyuffiThxE_AwAA___YyKc8)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyU0b2u3CAQBeCnwR0Wf8Z2QRHpapPmpkgTpUIYZr0jGVgB9u6-feQoiVLmtqOjM_pmvr_bd4cbpvWri2D8Yku18VWx7a5hTlgxvfJebi6FWqxgYqCcUa7OHO-C8TMItagODB81U5pJobubEcs0zsBmmNmgrvoa3MLZ4mBwTnKu5g7N2cUZV1yrQcheM8e9lmrSXjHOHFEMArZcep9ThXK4hgcsJbvgXW19gtZt5tbavRL5iYgLEZcKfi_QPzAVCL3PkYjLA1PNEeg1F7rmA0rK5Z9xfNG_WIqVYqKnl_4C03rLpV1zOYuIvMSc4GXvG4QViHxrZQci9N6i9S7eHa6JyLffLmE_f6E_vvWcT2IcbOOjUNM0UqnYSISGp20Y_jv-3NNxbjyoX-ify3XFhPsDtw2rHolia3S4neyuffiThxE_AwAA___YyKc8)**

Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That 's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkb2u2yAUx58Gb1hwINgePFS6crvcDl2qTgjDiXMkAxFgJ3n7KlK7t_tP_8-fn_bT0U5p--4izn61pdr4qtQO1ygnqpRe-Sg3l0ItFgRcuBRc6jcnuzD7CUGvusNZDkZoIxSY7jb7i9OrGYU36yBBTmsIYXXhOgmYtHJTR_NbSwqppdEXUL0RTnqj9Gi8FlI4pgUGarn0PqeK5XSNTlxLdsG72vqErdvnW2v3ytQXBguDpaI_CvYPSgVD73NksDwo1RyRX3PhWz6xpFwYLNQqz9creXI7U0vMCV_2vmPYkKmPVg5kYI4WrXfx7mhLTH38SQz26zf-60cv5QjDxTY5gB7HgSstBgYGn7ZR-Gf8eaTz7Xhyv_K_m3RlDvcH7TtVMzAttuhofxfq2n9_dM7wOwAA___M2JkS)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. clean_body: I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. | | | Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. This is a humble request from the heart, so please read it all the way through. In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians. Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again. Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few SERIOUS challenges right now: While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond! Now Spanberger has a GIGANTIC fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers! I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. body:
Peace in the Middle East

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/robforpa/robs-nepa-rundown-ms8vq2ytre?e=131e83a3c2)

| | | | |
---
| | Good Afternoon,
As the Schumer Shutdown enters its 14th day, Congressman Rob Bresnahan continues to fight to reopen the government. Rob already voted for a bipartisan, clean Continuing Resolution to keep services running, but Chuck Schumer continues to block any and all attempts to reopen the government. Rob is urging Senate leadership to put partisanship aside, do what's right for the American people, and vote to end this unnecessary stalemate.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | Rob has introduced and/or co-sponsored legislation to pay our troops during the shutdown, pay our border patrol agents during the shutdown, stop Congress from being paid during the shutdown, and to stop the collection of income taxes during a shutdown. This ridiculous stalemate has gone on long enough, and it is clear that Chuck Schumer is more concerned with a potential primary challenge from AOC than making sure federal workers get paid. Rob also enjoyed going to Naticoke’s Fall Fest and connecting with his constituents last week.
President Trump brokered peace in the Israel-Hamas War, and all living hostages were released. This historic peace deal is an example of what can be accomplished with real leaders in office.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | Our Volunteer of the Week is Gina, from Pike County. She’s been a rockstar collecting voter registrations to grow the Republican Party across our district. Thanks for all your hard work, Gina!
---
|
---
| | Portland Paige is campaigning for Congress against Rob while also seeking a second term as Mayor. She is a political climber and far-left extremist who has backed open borders, defunding the police, and even supports taxpayer-funded sex change operations for illegal immigrants. We must stop her and her radical agenda. **Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**
---

subject: Your Vote Can Change Your Community!

body:
| | | | | [|

| | | | | |
Dear Friend,Ballots have begun arriving in mailboxes this week, and with them, an opportunity to shape the future of your community.Municipal elections don’t always make headlines, but they’re where the most meaningful change begins. **The leaders we elect to city councils and school boards today often become tomorrow’s legislators, shaping the direction of our state for decades to come.** Local government is where we live our politics every day, from the roads we drive on, to the safety of our neighborhoods to how we plan for growth and invest in our future. These are the decisions that affect us most, and they’re made by the people we elect right now.At Governing Group, we’re proud to support candidates who lead with civility, integrity, and a commitment to getting things done. Beginning this week, we’ll be highlighting some of our endorsed candidates and the incredible work they’re doing in their communities. Follow along on our social media pages to learn more: @GoverningGroupWith so many municipal races happening across the state, it can be hard to know where to focus your attention. If you’d like to know whether Governing Group has endorsed candidates in your city, reply with your city name and we’ll share who we’re supporting in your area.**Your support makes this work possible.** Every contribution helps us provide resources, tools, and volunteer support to help our candidates cross the finish line, and build a stronger foundation for Utah’s future.Thank you for believing, like we do, that good governance begins close to home.With gratitude,
Governing Group

Hi Peter, it’s former PA-07 Representative Susan Wild.

I know first hand how hard it is to win in Pennsylvania’s 7th District, and that’s why I’m reaching out about Carol Obando-Derstine.

[_**Before I tell you more about the stakes of this race, will you give to Carol’s campaign now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117263487/575897593/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-10-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2M2MWRiODgtMWRhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-1LoVmY4O9lG9vQJwvMraoF6GvuguEXIcB1ScimnB7Y=)

This seat is one of the most competitive in the country. There are a couple of things I need you to know about this race:

→ This race is perpetually one of the most competitive on the map (trust me, I know). It will come down to the wire next year, too.

→ MAGA extremist Ryan Mackenzie was just named one of the most vulnerable Republicans seeking re-election. We have a real opportunity to take this seat back.

→ This district will once again determine control of the House Majority. All election experts are calling this race a toss-up, and if Carol flips this seat like I know she can, we WILL take back the House.

Carol doesn’t come from money or politics. She’s a mom, an engineer, and a community leader who has spent her career fighting for working families in the district. That’s why EMILYs List, Latino Victory Fund, and BOLD PAC are all standing with Carol — and why I’m asking you to do the same. clean_body: I know first hand how hard it is to win in Pennsylvania’s 7th District, and that’s why I’m reaching out about Carol Obando-Derstine. | = Hi Peter, it’s former PA-07 Representative Susan Wild. I know first hand how hard it is to win in Pennsylvania’s 7th District, and that’s why I’m reaching out about Carol Obando-Derstine. = | | | = This seat is one of the most competitive in the country. There are a couple of things I need you to know about this race: → This race is perpetually one of the most competitive on the map (trust me, I know). It will come down to the wire next year, too. → MAGA extremist Ryan Mackenzie was just named one of the most vulnerable Republicans seeking re-election. We have a real opportunity to take this seat back. → This district will once again determine control of the House Majority. All election experts are calling this race a toss-up, and if Carol flips this seat like I know she can, we WILL take back the House. Carol doesn’t come from money or politics. She’s a mom, an engineer, and a community leader who has spent her career fighting for working families in the district. That’s why EMILYs List, Latino Victory Fund, and BOLD PAC are all standing with Carol — and why I’m asking you to do the same. = | | | = | = | = | = | = This is our best chance to win back the House. I know Carol is up to the challenge — but she needs us to get there. Thank you, Susan Wild * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Janet Mills
subject: I’m running to defeat Susan Collins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6752?t=2&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)
null, I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I could _never_ live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.
Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger every _single day_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it.
**So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins. MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority.[Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6948?t=3&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6752?t=4&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)
---
null, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And null, I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years.
_
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign from Day One by splitting a donation between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me.>> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6752?t=5&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janet Mills and Haley Stevens will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6753?t=6&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6754?t=7&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6755?t=8&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6752?t=9&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)
---
Let’s win this thing,

– Janet Mills
Governor of Maine
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6949?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6757?t=11&akid=1082%2E49239%2E_70-uA)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

# [Don't Give a Nobel Prize to Trump Next Year Either](https://default.salsalabs.org/T823ed318-572d-4c7e-96fe-412aec562107/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Trump fluffers across America are outraged that he didn't win the Nobel Peace Prize this year, and are starting a full court press for him to get one in 2026. [**There's no way in hell that a guy who's declared war on his own country should get a Peace prize -- next year or ANY year.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9fe80666-4d90-4a5a-add0-ed7292411d11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump has poured troops into cities, told blatant lies about imaginary attacks, and purposely divided the country to maximize the odds of an actual civil war. Peace prize, my ass. Don't let it happen. [**Add your name, and tell the Nobel judges: "There's no way in hell that a guy who's declared war on his own country should get a Peace prize." **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td946e402-7f2d-4a27-ac0f-14ed3f5f55b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Republicans own this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117263569/575897822/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E0MDBiZDAtMWRhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5tfEGLgQ3bSE9b3ql6_RKKWUNt-k1WdpLTiNkCMMxUg=) It's officially been two weeks since Republicans shut the government down to avoid addressing the healthcare crisis they created. **In that time, I’ve been clear: Republicans own this shutdown. The ball is in their court to bring forward a funding bill that centers the American people, protects affordable healthcare, and lowers costs.** If Republicans get their way, 23,000 people in OR-05 will see their healthcare costs go up. Prices are high enough already. We need to be making care more affordable, not less. I’m ready to come to the table and get to work for Oregonians. It’s time for Republicans to end this chaos in Washington and negotiate with Democrats on a deal that reverses cuts to healthcare and puts hardworking people first — not billionaires. clean_body: = It's officially been two weeks since Republicans shut the government down to avoid addressing the healthcare crisis they created. In that time, I’ve been clear: Republicans own this shutdown. The ball is in their court to bring forward a funding bill that centers the American people, protects affordable healthcare, and lowers costs. If Republicans get their way, 23,000 people in OR-05 will see their healthcare costs go up. Prices are high enough already. We need to be making care more affordable, not less. I’m ready to come to the table and get to work for Oregonians. It’s time for Republicans to end this chaos in Washington and negotiate with Democrats on a deal that reverses cuts to healthcare and puts hardworking people first — not billionaires. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress Janelle Bynum For Congress 10121 SE Sunnyside Road #300 Clackamas, OR 97015 United States

Peter, I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.
Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger _every single day,_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it.
**So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins. MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority.[Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Tim Walz right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117263644/575898042/-71933300?amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjJjMDcxOC0xZWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reavRURmS9dkievMbmoPlkNOQxag24JcuRULpqRAM10=)**
Peter, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And Peter, I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years._
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
[**Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign from Day One by splitting a donation between my campaign and Tim Walz – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117263645/575898043/-71933300?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjJjMDcxOC0xZWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reavRURmS9dkievMbmoPlkNOQxag24JcuRULpqRAM10=)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: ACT NOW: Secure Our Elections
body:
Illegal Immigrants Must Not Register or Vote
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000199e3b084f8-398842b9-2ac1-46e3-ac8f-5d665fef255c-000000/1ANwRDpijidswbWRDggaftgI5XSH1_OQNNAUcQ5_63c=426)Patriot–**Non-citizens are voting in U.S. elections.** This threatens the integrity of our republic. It’s time to act—only Americans should be casting ballots in American elections!The U.S. Election Assistance Commission (EAC) is currently accepting public comments on a petition to require documentary proof of U.S. citizenship for federal voter registration. This commonsense step can stop illegal voting and protect our elections.**We need you to act now** : Follow [_**our quick online form**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/1/01000199e3b084f8-398842b9-2ac1-46e3-ac8f-5d665fef255c-000000/PgERUuALzZmGOGCbAhTJ0Q7n5sdVoXoAsd73z184L6s=426) to submit a respectful, powerful comment urging the EAC to approve this petition. We will deliver your message directly.[SUBMIT COMMENT](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/2/01000199e3b084f8-398842b9-2ac1-46e3-ac8f-5d665fef255c-000000/CRsaOxtVUdlkpKtpW0qIb32I_ipv_NoRhXbpjOfWAsE=426)Many patriots have already spoken out—thank you! But the clock is ticking, and the October 20th deadline is approaching fast.We must build even more support now.**Share**[ _**this message**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/3/01000199e3b084f8-398842b9-2ac1-46e3-ac8f-5d665fef255c-000000/YHL9l-tUxQfif7niuGIKlkBbWveOIQw418CpYAwYUVw=426)**with everyone you know.
