name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Celebrate 250 years of American valor with your free American flag
body:
For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation’s heroes.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsmo967qa0ajpf4pjie4n2kimah2soo9gcm1gkuo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h2bs)
---
Friend, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhlgdcd8bklgisdccpkfnibe8rl3a1s15cap2m90_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h2bs)
---
**We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale.**

[**To mark the occasion, I want to send you a full-size (3x5ft) American flag when you make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to support the American Veterans Center 's historic campaign: American Honor 2025.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4rgabbqj284qgvrkfou1ljh7qve8c71smgnoae0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your FREE Flag Today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z96k7o9puk6oiaq6auglv1c01csviuslr65vagug_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h2bs)
---
This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Friend -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Friend, make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time -- and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znev59neg1st8n6s3n63q6aor86chrocgda25gv8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your Free Flag Today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcjhc9t4d2lb9fi81ggplavnn3smdt9jo6ktf5g0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h2bs)
---
Friend, throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall.

**I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom.**

Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future.
---
Sincerely,

Tim Holbert
President
American Veterans Center
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu7gpvsaq2qfb2p6jl97lkdlg3apputpghlmoevg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5nmb222a68js6b0v60c1klfj5j3b2ffqnq649kg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pb0cdie4oj24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkdqnuq7vtofnnjspn56tat89ft2mkoch5tio8a0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsi20eqq70n4tvc5e507riklvrni9pmimdsmchn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmaor2c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Peter, Nine months into Trump's second term, the stakes have never been higher for working families in Wisconsin and across the country. The impact of this administration is clear: **Small business owners and farmers are struggling under Trump's trade war as inflation rises.** Trump's budget stripped healthcare from millions to benefit the ultra-wealthy. And now, a Republican-led government shutdown has sidelined any chance Democrats had to negotiate a way to protect healthcare. **This is not the America we’re fighting for.** Tammy is fighting back every day, ensuring that the voices of our families rise above corporate interests and partisan agendas — but she can’t do it alone. name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyckb2q3DAQhZ9G7rRIsmXLhYvAZZPmpkgTUglZmvUO6MdIsn399sFLElKGtMPhDN93vr_rd4Me4_LVBJisP3QuOpwF62YqpogF45m2_DTRlawFE5JyRnmn15zKCrZq2bhJKgFj38DEh551fcvZ2Dwn1RnDnLJmfAxzq8Zu5kKIXkmYR2esbHC6CjnjHR-45ONNMsek6q2aH_OsnCEdMx5yvdkUC-TdVNzB4wy5ngdmuNkUGj89a10LaT8RcSfiXsBuGW4HxgzuShBxPzCWFIA-UqZL2iHHlP86h5P-QaZYKEZ6UdMXNi3PlOsj5auItPeQIpx69eAWIO1bzRsQ0W81aGvCanCJpH37BSb05y_0x7cb50oMUlc-iE6pgbYdG4jo4UNXdP8c_9jifn3cqfUH_e2uyZNbD_QeSz-Qji3BoH-Zqf-76D6JnwEAAP__xguuvA)
---
Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble request from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._ In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians. Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again. **Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >> ](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyckb2q3DAQhZ9G7rRIsmXLhYvAZZPmpkgTUglZmvUO6MdIsn399sFLElKGtMPhDN93vr_rd4Me4_LVBJisP3QuOpwF62YqpogF45m2_DTRlawFE5JyRnmn15zKCrZq2bhJKgFj38DEh551fcvZ2Dwn1RnDnLJmfAxzq8Zu5kKIXkmYR2esbHC6CjnjHR-45ONNMsek6q2aH_OsnCEdMx5yvdkUC-TdVNzB4wy5ngdmuNkUGj89a10LaT8RcSfiXsBuGW4HxgzuShBxPzCWFIA-UqZL2iHHlP86h5P-QaZYKEZ6UdMXNi3PlOsj5auItPeQIpx69eAWIO1bzRsQ0W81aGvCanCJpH37BSb05y_0x7cb50oMUlc-iE6pgbYdG4jo4UNXdP8c_9jifn3cqfUH_e2uyZNbD_QeSz-Qji3BoH-Zqf-76D6JnwEAAP__xguuvA)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyckb2q3DAQhZ9G7rRIsmXLhYvAZZPmpkgTUglZmvUO6MdIsn399sFLElKGtMPhDN93vr_rd4Me4_LVBJisP3QuOpwF62YqpogF45m2_DTRlawFE5JyRnmn15zKCrZq2bhJKgFj38DEh551fcvZ2Dwn1RnDnLJmfAxzq8Zu5kKIXkmYR2esbHC6CjnjHR-45ONNMsek6q2aH_OsnCEdMx5yvdkUC-TdVNzB4wy5ngdmuNkUGj89a10LaT8RcSfiXsBuGW4HxgzuShBxPzCWFIA-UqZL2iHHlP86h5P-QaZYKEZ6UdMXNi3PlOsj5auItPeQIpx69eAWIO1bzRsQ0W81aGvCanCJpH37BSb05y_0x7cb50oMUlc-iE6pgbYdG4jo4UNXdP8c_9jifn3cqfUH_e2uyZNbD_QeSz-Qji3BoH-Zqf-76D6JnwEAAP__xguuvA)**

clean_body: I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. | | | Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. This is a humble request from the heart, so please read it all the way through. In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians. Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again. Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few SERIOUS challenges right now: While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond! Now Spanberger has a GIGANTIC fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers! I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. Our team is on the phone with campaign managers day and night, advising on strategy, disseminating resources, and ensuring that no candidate faces this final stretch alone. name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Celebrate 250 years of American valor with your free American flag
body:
For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation’s heroes.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdd7ojia7qhupc91evtb9td6e40htkoltcsth1sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h2bs)
---
Friend, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zso9ddnpgn61bdqrjfvnjqdhdt7c3826rklucvkg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h2bs)
---
**We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale.**

[**To mark the occasion, I want to send you a full-size (3x5ft) American flag when you make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to support the American Veterans Center 's historic campaign: American Honor 2025.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfg7u5kvrgdu0b4rm82723e8gvoklc4itk7c20lo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your FREE Flag Today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z88mfrep6tb46tehkc1ud9vre490iojk7bv79kr8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h2bs)
---
This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Friend -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Friend, make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time -- and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcubts765jkjuasca8ganib210ju4i9uarohs2bg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your Free Flag Today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqo2nql1fv1dl1haapbrc3euc3ntvpn273b6odmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h2bs)
---
Friend, throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall.

**I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom.**

Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future.
---
Sincerely,

Tim Holbert
President
American Veterans Center
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq1o744r76v6jkgh8f6ljasf889qft6sp59119fo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsfus9p9vkuutl2qj1d9l8md8mi6qi9kmmj4evlo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4clg66p76cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhbfr1mhp8mtdnqc9iha4r5oba83tnnt2gaftsoo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jm6pb4c3h2bs)_

body:
Big news out of Arizona: Republican David Schweikert is walking away from Congress to run for Governor.
That means Arizona’s 1st District — one of the most competitive in the country — is officially up for grabs.
CHIP IN NOW TO HELP DEMOCRATS WIN AZ-01 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-az01?refcode=101425_2]
David Schweikert is a guy who:
* Was fined a record amount for illegal campaign donations.
* Voted to slash Medicaid and mocked those who objected.
* Won his last election by JUST TWO PERCENTAGE POINTS
Now he's BAILING because he sees the writing on the wall... Arizona is turning blue!!!

# Scott Bessent reveals Charlie Kirk's influence on his career, and praises his relentless optimism for America
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent praised Charlie Kirk as a powerful advocate for financial education in America, as well as an aggressive advocate for his appointment to spearhead President Donald Trump's economic agenda.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a4ed88e-5b14-4375-a6bf-f07539d0b76a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"Charlie Kirk's belief in financial education and opportunity shaped a generation. Charlie was a patriot, teacher, and visionary who understood that the strength of our nation lies in an informed and empowered citizenry," **[Bessent wrote in an X post](https://substack.com/redirect/6a4ed88e-5b14-4375-a6bf-f07539d0b76a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ahead of the Medal of Honor ceremony.
Bessent appeared on the Charlie Kirk show earlier today, recounting Kirk's remarkable influence on if own career.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/381e9036-a895-4461-9023-3c3e269c11c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Everyone knows Charlie was a family man, he was a christian, and a patriot, bu the Charlie I knew was also an educator," Bessent explained. "One of the reasons I'm sitting here today is because Charlie was such an aggressive and forceful advocate for me to become Secretary of the Treasury because of the time we spent together."
"His financial breath and depth was incredible,... he was optimistic and always talked about the future, how do we get ahead and how do we stay ahead," Bessent added.
President Trump will **[posthumously award](https://substack.com/redirect/dd1eb738-c48e-4987-9a5e-85a736d70633?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Kirk the Presidential Medal of Freedom this evening at the White House, marking what would have been the 32-year-old's birthday--barely a month after his assassination at a Utah campus event shocked the nation and ignited a conservative revival.
Trump announced the honor on September 11 and joined Kirk's widow Erika at her Arizona memorial, **[the ceremony will begin at 4pm today.](https://substack.com/redirect/24f31d01-96a0-447c-9ba1-a6d0b694f8cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
## TPUSA's Future:
* **Charlie 's Widow Takes CEO Helm**--Erika Kirk, elected Turning Point USA's new chief executive, vows to rally young conservatives in his name, expanding merchandise to fuel the movement he sparked worldwide.
* **Faith-Driven Impact Echoes** : Colleagues like producer Andrew Kolvet praise Kirk for proving liberty's endurance across generations, while pastors credit his God-rooted conviction with awakening global faith and freedom revivals.

# **American rare earth mining stocks soar as Trump talks tough with China**
In the latest round of the fiery U.S.-China trade clash, President Donald Trump's tariff threats against Beijing's rare earth export curbs **[sparked a Monday stock surge](https://substack.com/redirect/6e8f9f0b-7c18-4b3c-b5fb-68bda8a0ccf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for American miners, exposing deep national security vulnerabilities in vital minerals powering weapons, EVs, and tech--while the Pentagon races to hoard $1 billion in stockpiles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6e8f9f0b-7c18-4b3c-b5fb-68bda8a0ccf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Miners ' Stocks Skyrocket Dramatically**: USA Rare Earth leapt over 18%, Critical Metals climbed 18%, Energy Fuels vaulted 11%, and MP Materials gained 8% in early trading, fueled by escalating trade tensions.
* **Pentagon Accelerates Mineral Hoard** : The Department of War intends to ramp up a $1 billion US critical minerals stockpile to counter foreign dependencies, targeting essentials required for advanced weaponry and robotics amid supply chain risks and accelerating global tensions.
* **JPMorgan Pledges Security Investments** : America's biggest bank has **[committed up to $10 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/c65a798f-c8f8-4e2d-97cd-b73a3a884e12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to U.S. national security firms, addressing over-reliance on overseas sources for minerals vital to manufacturing and defense.
* **Dimon 's Stark Security Warning**: JP Morgan's CEO Jamie Dimon decries America's "painful" foreign vulnerabilities in critical resources, signaling long-term push for domestic independence despite Trump's de-escalation hints.
* **Harsh Words :** Jeremy Siegel, professor emeritus of finance at the University of Pennsylvania went further. Speaking on CNBC **[he decried the failure](https://substack.com/redirect/31f09635-6d53-44f2-bf29-f872ad434302?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of previous administrations to confront this issue. "It's scandalous that we don't have a rare earth strategic reserve ... we let China monopolize 90% of refining rare earth materials," ... "Where were we, realizing the importance of these?"

* * *
* * *
# Silver prices cool slightly (but not by much) after London short squeeze
Silver prices **[rocketed to near their legendary 1980's peak Monday,](https://substack.com/redirect/63d86886-896b-4fc2-84e7-19e4718b65db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** surging above $53 an ounce in a brutal short squeeze gripping London's illiquid market, as investors scramble for bullion amid soaring demand and crippling lease rates over 30%.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/63d86886-896b-4fc2-84e7-19e4718b65db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Historic Price Surge Unfolds:** Spot silver hit unprecedented premiums, trading $1.60 above New York levels, forcing frantic (and expensive) transatlantic flights to **[ship silver bars across the Atlantic to bolster reserves,](https://substack.com/redirect/ef91fef2-12a5-4860-af49-da2454c893c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a privilege usually reserved for gold bars.
* **Global Liquidity Crunch Emerges** : Surging Indian demand depleted local bars, widening London-New York premiums to $3 an ounce last week, now narrowed to $1.6 amid the urgent air cargo flights for metal.
* **London 's Liquidity Crunch Intensifies:** Elevated one-month lease rates for silver (the cost of borrowing silver on the London market) has shifted above 30%, making exiting a short position or rolling over a current short position prohibitively expensive, amplifying volatility in a metal who's market is nine-times-smaller than gold.
* **Broader Metals Rally Echoes:** Gold broke through $4,100 per ounce during trading on Monday, brining to eight the number of weekly gains in a row. Platinum and palladium also jumped, fueled by ETF inflows and geopolitical tensions like U.S.-China trade wars.
* **Correction Risks Loom Large:** Without central bank buying to stabilize it, analysts warn silver's rally could trigger a sharp pullback if investment flows ease, unwinding London's supply tightness. Goldman Sachs warns of disproportionate pullback without central bank support, as waning investment flows could unravel the rally and heighten investor volatility.
* **Slight Ease Offers Respite:** Markets **[cooled slightly](https://substack.com/redirect/ef91fef2-12a5-4860-af49-da2454c893c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** before the US markets open with Silver dropping from its peak, but currently are still above $50 an oz.

* * *
* * *
# OpenAI announces a massive deal blitz as they seek to build the ultimate AI
In a bold infrastructure blitz, OpenAI **[will partner with Broadcom](https://substack.com/redirect/3d19b484-1001-43a4-b93d-531ad496e3b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to build custom AI accelerator racks, combined with their other recent deals it signals their intention to seize control of the "full AI stack" from chips to data centers, to consumer devices.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d19b484-1001-43a4-b93d-531ad496e3b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Custom Accelerators Revolutionize Inference** : OpenAI intends to co-develop Broadcom server racks optimized for AI model-specific tasks. The racks, deploying in late 2026, enable rack-level integration of computing power, memory, and Ethernet for unprecedented efficiency.
* **Massive Compute Deals Fuel Ambition** : Recent framework deals with Nvidia have secured 10 gigawatts of computing power with $100 billion backing, while their deal with AMD will supply 6 gigawatts of Instinct GPUs in a deal potentially granting OpenAI a 10% stake in AMD if milestones are completed.
* **Hardware Acquisition Sparks Innovation** : A $6.4 billion buyout of former Apple director Jony Ive's "io" startup intends to brings screenless, voice-driven AI wearables to market, aiming to redefine human-AI interactions beyond traditional gadgets.
* **DevDay Tools Lock In Developers** : At their DevDay event OpenAI announced software advancements including API bundles, and a ChatGPT App Store targeting 800 million users intended to foster vertical integration to supplant legacy products like Microsoft and Salesforce with AI workflows.

**Oracle 's AMD AI Gambit!**
Oracle Cloud Infrastructure announced Tuesday it **[will deploy 50,000 AMD](https://substack.com/redirect/ecb7b4a9-ff21-447e-b162-5e46afd7f8bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Instinct MI450 AI chips starting in late 2026, offering a powerful alternative to Nvidia's dominant GPUs for advanced AI workloads and intensifying competition in the booming cloud computing sector.
* **Massive AMD Chip Rollout** : Oracle plans to integrate 50,000 Instinct MI450 GPUs into rack-scale systems, enabling 72 chips to collaborate seamlessly enabling complex AI algorithm deployment.
* **Strategic Nvidia Alternative** : The move targets training AI models to handle new tasks, where Oracle executives predict strong customer uptake for AMD's offerings allowing them to break Nvidia's 90% grip on the market.
* **Market Competition Surge** : Oracle's bet, alongside their $300 billion cloud pact with Open AI, signals broader ecosystem shifts **[challenging Nvidia](https://substack.com/redirect/ecb7b4a9-ff21-447e-b162-5e46afd7f8bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and bolstering enterprise AI innovation against rivals like Microsoft and Amazon.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7918d899-8aa8-48b5-90bb-41c72110a3a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
* * *
# BlackRock, Goldman and Citi announce blockbuster 3rd Quarter results
**[BlackRock Inc.](https://substack.com/redirect/b6daba17-f1a5-42f3-92c8-e0dee62d9a19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** reeled in a staggering $205 billion in client inflows during the third quarter, fueled by surging ETF investments and a landmark acquisition of HPS Investment Partners, propelling total assets under management to a record $13.5 trillion amid booming markets.
* **ETFs Surpass Milestone Mark** : Exchange-traded funds hit over $5 trillion in assets, with $153 billion in net inflows, underscoring investor rush to liquid, diversified vehicles.
* **Alternatives Surge Post-Acquisition** : HPS deal added $165 billion in client assets, elevating private markets total to $663 billion and boosting performance fees 33% to $516 million.
* **Earnings Edge Analyst Expectations** : Adjusted EPS climbed 1% to $11.55, with revenue jumping 25% to $6.5 billion, despite higher integration costs from recent buys.
* **2030 Vision Targets Quadrupling** : CEO Larry Fink eyes $400 billion more in alternatives, entering a momentum-building Q4 with unprecedented potential for clients and shareholders.

**[Citigroup](https://substack.com/redirect/73929591-b06f-4240-87ba-59cd34cc5ab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** stunned Wall Street Tuesday with third-quarter earnings of $2.24 per share and $22.09 billion in revenue, smashing forecasts of $1.90 and $21.09 billion, fueled by record revenues across all divisions amid surging investment banking and trading activity.
* **Record Revenues Surge Across Board** : Every Citigroup division notched its best third-quarter performance ever, with markets up 15% and services climbing 7% year-over-year.
* **Net Income Jumps 15 Percent** : Profits reached $3.8 billion excluding impairments, a 15% increase from last year, highlighting robust business momentum.
* **Expenses Rise on Mexico Deal** : Costs swelled 9% due to fees tied to selling a 25% stake in Banamex ahead of its public offering.
* **Shares Soar, CEO Praises Strategy** : Stock rose 1% premarket--up 36% year-to-date--while CEO Jane Fraser credited AI and digital investments for driving innovation and returns.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/43a8833f-ac27-4cea-bc41-b63cbc22b4e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**[Goldman Sachs](https://substack.com/redirect/5ebd4cea-cd1b-449a-ae58-0d43945c4536?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** reports third-quarter earnings Tuesday, with analysts forecasting a blockbuster $11 per share amid tariff-fueled market volatility boosting trading desks and a 22% surge in investment banking fees from surging mergers and IPOs.
* **Tariffs Ignite Trading Surge** : Trump's tariff policies spark volatility in bonds, currencies, commodities, and stocks, priming Goldman's fixed-income trading for $3.19 billion and equities for $3.9 billion in expected revenue.
* **M &A Boom Fuels Fees**: Investment banking fees projected at $2.15 billion, riding a 22% year-over-year revenue jump was driven by accelerating mergers and IPO activity.
* **Wealth Arm Hits Peak** : Record-high stock markets supercharged the asset and wealth management division, with Monday's $7 billion Industry Ventures acquisition set to amplify growth in venture capital supervision.
* **Shares Soar 37 Percent** : Goldman stock is up sharply year-to-date, capitalizing on Wall Street's volatile edge as peers like JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley gear up for their own earnings reports this week.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/6c9633b6-2cdf-4657-9a19-a270c00ea814?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Poland gears up to defend NATOS's eastern border from Russia
Poland, fearing future Russian aggression, has transformed into NATO's largest European military, **[spending billions on U.S. weapons](https://substack.com/redirect/78de79d9-c650-47b8-89b5-86a6eefde044?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Russian drones violated its airspace last month, escalating tensions to a post-WWII peak.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/78de79d9-c650-47b8-89b5-86a6eefde044?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive Military Buildup** : Poland's 210,000-strong force, third in NATO, includes the battle-ready 18th Mechanized Division and new territorial defense units, with two more divisions forming.
* **Strategic Arms Investment** : Poland spent $50 billion on U.S. weapons in 2023-2024, acquiring Abrams tanks, South Korean rocket launchers, and Himars systems to counter Russian threats.
* **Geopolitical Hotspot** : Sharing borders with Russia's Kaliningrad and Belarus, Poland is pivotal in defending NATO's eastern flank, especially the vulnerable Baltic states.
* **Logistical War Prep** : Poland is upgrading civilian airports and logistics to support a massive NATO troop influx in a potential conflict with Russia.
* **German Reparations Talks** : Poland and Germany discuss Berlin funding Polish defense as WWII compensation, aiming to align their security strategies against Russia.
* **Intense NATO Training** : Last month's Iron Defender wargames involved 30,000 Polish, U.S., and Dutch troops, honing skills with advanced weaponry to deter Russian aggression.

clean_body: "Charlie was a patriot, teacher, and visionary who understood that the strength of our nation lies in an informed and empowered citizenry..." | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "Charlie was a patriot, teacher, and visionary who understood that the strength of our nation lies in an informed and empowered citizenry..." | | | Oct 14 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Scott Bessent praises Charlie Kirk's positive influence as President Trump prepares to award him the the Presidential Medal of Freedom this evening. US Mining stocks boom after Rare Earth mineral tussle with China Silver soars to unprecedented highs Open AI is seeking to build AI Camelot with its latest deals BlackRock, Citi and Goldman's Q3 results are massive Poland spends Billions on American weapons to stand up to Putin Today 's markets + assets: ✅ DOW: 46419.14 (⬆️ 0.76%) ✅ S&P: 6672.52 (⬆️ 0.27%) 🔴 NASDAQ: 22659.34 ( ⬇️ 0.16%) ⚠ ️⬆️CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 19.69 (⬆️ 3.47%) ✅ Gold: $4165.1 (⬆️ 0.78%) ✅ Silver: $50.65 (⬆️ 0.47%) 🔴 Bitcoin: $112,868 (⬇️ 0.59%) Scott Bessent reveals Charlie Kirk's influence on his career, and praises his relentless optimism for America Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent praised Charlie Kirk as a powerful advocate for financial education in America, as well as an aggressive advocate for his appointment to spearhead President Donald Trump's economic agenda. | | ---|---|--- "Charlie Kirk's belief in financial education and opportunity shaped a generation. Charlie was a patriot, teacher, and visionary who understood that the strength of our nation lies in an informed and empowered citizenry," ahead of the Medal of Honor ceremony. Bessent appeared on the Charlie Kirk show earlier today, recounting Kirk's remarkable influence on if own career. "Everyone knows Charlie was a family man, he was a christian, and a patriot, bu the Charlie I knew was also an educator," Bessent explained. "One of the reasons I'm sitting here today is because Charlie was such an aggressive and forceful advocate for me to become Secretary of the Treasury because of the time we spent together." "His financial breath and depth was incredible,... he was optimistic and always talked about the future, how do we get ahead and how do we stay ahead," Bessent added. President Trump will Kirk the Presidential Medal of Freedom this evening at the White House, marking what would have been the 32-year-old's birthday--barely a month after his assassination at a Utah campus event shocked the nation and ignited a conservative revival. Trump announced the honor on September 11 and joined Kirk's widow Erika at her Arizona memorial, TPUSA's Future: Charlie 's Widow Takes CEO Helm--Erika Kirk, elected Turning Point USA's new chief executive, vows to rally young conservatives in his name, expanding merchandise to fuel the movement he sparked worldwide. Faith-Driven Impact Echoes : Colleagues like producer Andrew Kolvet praise Kirk for proving liberty's endurance across generations, while pastors credit his God-rooted conviction with awakening global faith and freedom revivals. | | ---|---|--- The delivers twice the clarity of traditional devices, thanks to , it's already won over 540,000+ users -- and experts call it the biggest breakthrough in hearing technology in over a decade. and hear the difference yourself -- check if you qualify today! American rare earth mining stocks soar as Trump talks tough with China In the latest round of the fiery U.S.-China trade clash, President Donald Trump's tariff threats against Beijing's rare earth export curbs for American miners, exposing deep national security vulnerabilities in vital minerals powering weapons, EVs, and tech--while the Pentagon races to hoard $1 billion in stockpiles. | | ---|---|--- Miners ' Stocks Skyrocket Dramatically: USA Rare Earth leapt over 18%, Critical Metals climbed 18%, Energy Fuels vaulted 11%, and MP Materials gained 8% in early trading, fueled by escalating trade tensions. Pentagon Accelerates Mineral Hoard : The Department of War intends to ramp up a $1 billion US critical minerals stockpile to counter foreign dependencies, targeting essentials required for advanced weaponry and robotics amid supply chain risks and accelerating global tensions. JPMorgan Pledges Security Investments : America's biggest bank has to U.S. national security firms, addressing over-reliance on overseas sources for minerals vital to manufacturing and defense. Dimon 's Stark Security Warning: JP Morgan's CEO Jamie Dimon decries America's "painful" foreign vulnerabilities in critical resources, signaling long-term push for domestic independence despite Trump's de-escalation hints. Harsh Words : Jeremy Siegel, professor emeritus of finance at the University of Pennsylvania went further. Speaking on CNBC of previous administrations to confront this issue. "It's scandalous that we don't have a rare earth strategic reserve ... we let China monopolize 90% of refining rare earth materials," ... "Where were we, realizing the importance of these?" Silver prices cool slightly (but not by much) after London short squeeze Silver prices surging above $53 an ounce in a brutal short squeeze gripping London's illiquid market, as investors scramble for bullion amid soaring demand and crippling lease rates over 30%. | | ---|---|--- Historic Price Surge Unfolds: Spot silver hit unprecedented premiums, trading $1.60 above New York levels, forcing frantic (and expensive) transatlantic flights to a privilege usually reserved for gold bars. Global Liquidity Crunch Emerges : Surging Indian demand depleted local bars, widening London-New York premiums to $3 an ounce last week, now narrowed to $1.6 amid the urgent air cargo flights for metal. London 's Liquidity Crunch Intensifies: Elevated one-month lease rates for silver (the cost of borrowing silver on the London market) has shifted above 30%, making exiting a short position or rolling over a current short position prohibitively expensive, amplifying volatility in a metal who's market is nine-times-smaller than gold. Broader Metals Rally Echoes: Gold broke through $4,100 per ounce during trading on Monday, brining to eight the number of weekly gains in a row. Platinum and palladium also jumped, fueled by ETF inflows and geopolitical tensions like U.S.-China trade wars. Correction Risks Loom Large: Without central bank buying to stabilize it, analysts warn silver's rally could trigger a sharp pullback if investment flows ease, unwinding London's supply tightness. Goldman Sachs warns of disproportionate pullback without central bank support, as waning investment flows could unravel the rally and heighten investor volatility. Slight Ease Offers Respite: Markets before the US markets open with Silver dropping from its peak, but currently are still above $50 an oz. OpenAI announces a massive deal blitz as they seek to build the ultimate AI In a bold infrastructure blitz, OpenAI to build custom AI accelerator racks, combined with their other recent deals it signals their intention to seize control of the "full AI stack" from chips to data centers, to consumer devices. | | ---|---|--- Custom Accelerators Revolutionize Inference : OpenAI intends to co-develop Broadcom server racks optimized for AI model-specific tasks. The racks, deploying in late 2026, enable rack-level integration of computing power, memory, and Ethernet for unprecedented efficiency. Massive Compute Deals Fuel Ambition : Recent framework deals with Nvidia have secured 10 gigawatts of computing power with $100 billion backing, while their deal with AMD will supply 6 gigawatts of Instinct GPUs in a deal potentially granting OpenAI a 10% stake in AMD if milestones are completed. Hardware Acquisition Sparks Innovation : A $6.4 billion buyout of former Apple director Jony Ive's "io" startup intends to brings screenless, voice-driven AI wearables to market, aiming to redefine human-AI interactions beyond traditional gadgets. DevDay Tools Lock In Developers : At their DevDay event OpenAI announced software advancements including API bundles, and a ChatGPT App Store targeting 800 million users intended to foster vertical integration to supplant legacy products like Microsoft and Salesforce with AI workflows. Oracle 's AMD AI Gambit! Oracle Cloud Infrastructure announced Tuesday it Instinct MI450 AI chips starting in late 2026, offering a powerful alternative to Nvidia's dominant GPUs for advanced AI workloads and intensifying competition in the booming cloud computing sector. Massive AMD Chip Rollout : Oracle plans to integrate 50,000 Instinct MI450 GPUs into rack-scale systems, enabling 72 chips to collaborate seamlessly enabling complex AI algorithm deployment. Strategic Nvidia Alternative : The move targets training AI models to handle new tasks, where Oracle executives predict strong customer uptake for AMD's offerings allowing them to break Nvidia's 90% grip on the market. Market Competition Surge : Oracle's bet, alongside their $300 billion cloud pact with Open AI, signals broader ecosystem shifts and bolstering enterprise AI innovation against rivals like Microsoft and Amazon. BlackRock, Goldman and Citi announce blockbuster 3rd Quarter results reeled in a staggering $205 billion in client inflows during the third quarter, fueled by surging ETF investments and a landmark acquisition of HPS Investment Partners, propelling total assets under management to a record $13.5 trillion amid booming markets. ETFs Surpass Milestone Mark : Exchange-traded funds hit over $5 trillion in assets, with $153 billion in net inflows, underscoring investor rush to liquid, diversified vehicles. Alternatives Surge Post-Acquisition : HPS deal added $165 billion in client assets, elevating private markets total to $663 billion and boosting performance fees 33% to $516 million. Earnings Edge Analyst Expectations : Adjusted EPS climbed 1% to $11.55, with revenue jumping 25% to $6.5 billion, despite higher integration costs from recent buys. 2030 Vision Targets Quadrupling : CEO Larry Fink eyes $400 billion more in alternatives, entering a momentum-building Q4 with unprecedented potential for clients and shareholders. stunned Wall Street Tuesday with third-quarter earnings of $2.24 per share and $22.09 billion in revenue, smashing forecasts of $1.90 and $21.09 billion, fueled by record revenues across all divisions amid surging investment banking and trading activity. Record Revenues Surge Across Board : Every Citigroup division notched its best third-quarter performance ever, with markets up 15% and services climbing 7% year-over-year. Net Income Jumps 15 Percent : Profits reached $3.8 billion excluding impairments, a 15% increase from last year, highlighting robust business momentum. Expenses Rise on Mexico Deal : Costs swelled 9% due to fees tied to selling a 25% stake in Banamex ahead of its public offering. Shares Soar, CEO Praises Strategy : Stock rose 1% premarket--up 36% year-to-date--while CEO Jane Fraser credited AI and digital investments for driving innovation and returns. reports third-quarter earnings Tuesday, with analysts forecasting a blockbuster $11 per share amid tariff-fueled market volatility boosting trading desks and a 22% surge in investment banking fees from surging mergers and IPOs. Tariffs Ignite Trading Surge : Trump's tariff policies spark volatility in bonds, currencies, commodities, and stocks, priming Goldman's fixed-income trading for $3.19 billion and equities for $3.9 billion in expected revenue. M &A Boom Fuels Fees: Investment banking fees projected at $2.15 billion, riding a 22% year-over-year revenue jump was driven by accelerating mergers and IPO activity. Wealth Arm Hits Peak : Record-high stock markets supercharged the asset and wealth management division, with Monday's $7 billion Industry Ventures acquisition set to amplify growth in venture capital supervision. Shares Soar 37 Percent : Goldman stock is up sharply year-to-date, capitalizing on Wall Street's volatile edge as peers like JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley gear up for their own earnings reports this week. Poland gears up to defend NATOS's eastern border from Russia Poland, fearing future Russian aggression, has transformed into NATO's largest European military, after Russian drones violated its airspace last month, escalating tensions to a post-WWII peak. | | ---|---|--- Massive Military Buildup : Poland's 210,000-strong force, third in NATO, includes the battle-ready 18th Mechanized Division and new territorial defense units, with two more divisions forming. Strategic Arms Investment : Poland spent $50 billion on U.S. weapons in 2023-2024, acquiring Abrams tanks, South Korean rocket launchers, and Himars systems to counter Russian threats. Geopolitical Hotspot : Sharing borders with Russia's Kaliningrad and Belarus, Poland is pivotal in defending NATO's eastern flank, especially the vulnerable Baltic states. Logistical War Prep : Poland is upgrading civilian airports and logistics to support a massive NATO troop influx in a potential conflict with Russia. German Reparations Talks : Poland and Germany discuss Berlin funding Polish defense as WWII compensation, aiming to align their security strategies against Russia. Intense NATO Training : Last month's Iron Defender wargames involved 30,000 Polish, U.S., and Dutch troops, honing skills with advanced weaponry to deter Russian aggression. * Thanks for reading The Capitalist! _**Begin forwarded message:**_ Hi Peter - **Happy Indigenous Peoples ' Day! **Today is a day to honor the strength, resilience, and rich history of all Indigenous people across the entire country. As the former President and a proud member of Navajo Nation, I believe it's crucial to reflect on the fact our state still doesn't officially recognize Indigenous Peoples' Day. Our state's refusal to formally acknowledge this day is a painful reminder that the voices and experiences of Native peoples continue to be ignored and overlooked. If elected, I would be the first-ever Native member of Congress from Arizona -- but I need your help to get there. We're building a warchest ahead of a tough campaign next year, [**and I 'm so grateful for anything you can chip in.**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/uBGCoUHj3ghcSIwl0gplhg~~/AAPPABA~/03JVG7GAmqp6cOLAxNe63Ob8-aRvwUnSLSUtcgaj-XiopwuFV_KDJbsQbpPIoIPb8-Bh-Aukv16_Va4rZNQSawarbqNTbwoFIWCtAjiKxuRPuWujOUxdZonaY5gEC7cmntsMVTr7SIGXnhaVYpKB4KCtvQnrm1cD0gQnGSSkkbxLmdxKIGWj-HIRs-uUYrAOzdni0S4KEV59ILNQ_CMahzYPfQ8i-gFP9GVOtgedCGG5ej2TVSkuxoSzj5-bsorF0JljM4a9EpMp4Y-oLpQoJVXTWJmWRvMB1hlKV_JtarXmiks_zCHZxPvxrOs4-XAy5asng4Nptak6a9eKxyR-zez6jlhNQy2zZYFCYXNFp8A2ezl4eq-HffnHqtjRHt8-)

Jonathan Nez is running for Congress in AZ-02 to be our state's first-ever Native member of Congress, and he needs your help to build the movement needed to win next year. - - | Begin forwarded message: Hi Peter - Happy Indigenous Peoples ' Day! Today is a day to honor the strength, resilience, and rich history of all Indigenous people across the entire country. As the former President and a proud member of Navajo Nation, I believe it's crucial to reflect on the fact our state still doesn't officially recognize Indigenous Peoples' Day. Our state's refusal to formally acknowledge this day is a painful reminder that the voices and experiences of Native peoples continue to be ignored and overlooked. If elected, I would be the first-ever Native member of Congress from Arizona -- but I need your help to get there. Thank you, President Trump!

Americans voted for safe streets and a secure border, and with President Trump back in the White House, they are getting exactly that, Fellow Conservative.

**CBS NEWS: Illegal crossings along U.S.-Mexico border plummet to lowest annual level since 1970**

As a Navy SEAL, I've served overseas and seen firsthand what happens when you have a porous border.

The violent, illegal alien thugs who Joe Biden let invade our country and terrorize our communities for four years have been put on notice. Fellow Conservative, we are safer thanks to President Trump.

But Democrats are doing whatever they can to undo our victories in the Senate. Liberal cities are protesting and blocking ICE agents from doing their jobs.

Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats are going to do whatever they can to pick up seats to chip away at our America First, conservative Senate majority.

That's why I want to hear from you, Fellow Conservative. It's critical that we mobilize conservatives like you before our midterm elections.

I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

It’s clear that the Republican Party has fallen completely in line with Team Extreme

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117266202/575907363/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBiMjliNC0yMmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv0QK8T6JZwHRn7mYTxeWTPpGRJsrmjpH7PDZc2ZhkQ=) Hey there, it’s Andrea. I know you’re busy, so I’ll keep this quick. Here’s where we’re at: It's been**TWO WEEKS (!!!)** since Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress shut down the government rather than fix the health care crisis they created. ICE is grabbing people off the streets, terrorizing our communities, and sowing chaos and confusion for President Trump to seize more power and continue to trample over the rule of law. name: Team Crow
subject: It’s clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team,

When the President of the United States stands in front of our generals and our admirals, threatening American cities, saying that we’re at war with Democrats and Democratic-run cities — it’s clear we are in a dangerous moment.

Trump has called his political opponents “scum” and “enemies of the state.” He has deployed active-duty American troops against U.S. citizens in our communities. And he is waging an all-out war on freedom of speech and those who dare to speak out against him.

Jason served three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. He witnessed the sacrifices his brave fellow soldiers and their families made every single day, in service to the country we call home.

He didn't put on the uniform to serve a king — but that's what Donald Trump is acting like.

Jason is working to elect a new generation of Democratic leaders who will not be afraid to fight and take a stand against this chaos. Will you chip in to support this work today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-oct25?amount=]

clean_body: Jason Crow For Colorado [] Team, When the President of the United States stands in front of our generals and our admirals, threatening American cities, saying that we’re at war with Democrats and Democratic-run cities — it’s clear we are in a dangerous moment. Trump has called his political opponents “scum” and “enemies of the state.” He has deployed active-duty American troops against U.S. citizens in our communities. And he is waging an all-out war on freedom of speech and those who dare to speak out against him. Jason served three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. He witnessed the sacrifices his brave fellow soldiers and their families made every single day, in service to the country we call home. He didn't put on the uniform to serve a king — but that's what Donald Trump is acting like. Jason is working to elect a new generation of Democratic leaders who will not be afraid to fight and take a stand against this chaos. Will you chip in to support this work today? Hey folks,
_Endless Urgency_ just went "live" in person for the very first time. And for this debut, I couldn't imagine a better guest than **Congressman Maxwell Frost** -- a Gen Z leader who's telling the truth about what it really means to fight from the inside.
We went deep on the chaos ICE is causing in Chicago, the never-ending government shutdown, the next generation of leaders stepping up in Congress, and yes -- even a little Yu-Gi-Oh. But underneath all of it was this shared belief: that change doesn't come from one big moment. It comes from **a million acts of resistance** -- ordinary people doing small, relentless things that add up.
We talked about what that looks like right now -- and how _**you**_ can be part of it.
_**[Watch the first-ever live, in-person episode of Endless Urgency exclusive on YouTube](https://substack.com/redirect/359f3307-5d2f-442b-aad6-ad44b99bf291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[and subscribe there for more videos like this👇](https://substack.com/redirect/359f3307-5d2f-442b-aad6-ad44b99bf291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ffeac82-b4b2-4175-8c8e-53d98d395d32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
With urgency,
-- Mike
[Watch the full interview »](https://substack.com/redirect/0ffeac82-b4b2-4175-8c8e-53d98d395d32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

That's why my Democracy Defense Fund is teaming up with Shawn Harris's campaign to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and push back against the flood of corporate cash. If everyone reading this chipped in just $5, we could fully fund Shawn's monthly fundraising goal. name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Celebrate 250 years of American valor with your free American flag
body:
For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation’s heroes.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmhiv07qgev52hbu3jib2a5bt04g41pf52b89kv0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmeob2chh2bs)
---
Friend, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zft9voba34em9pa2moj53bk1slcfea5797tua578_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmeob2chh2bs)
---
**We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale.**

[**To mark the occasion, I want to send you a full-size (3x5ft) American flag when you make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to support the American Veterans Center 's historic campaign: American Honor 2025.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgstoasulv8ddj96gftqua1km7ursipl3fb3d33g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmeob2chh2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your FREE Flag Today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmm4lhmdlc2s15m1cm9flcfao6ea1nflg4rsga3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmeob2chh2bs)
---
This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Friend -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Friend, make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time -- and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn71b88dfqmpl75e2abaj2nhdnf34477uvskiuq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmeob2chh2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your Free Flag Today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5a3ph85mgar99919vr701brabr5874np3kg9cko_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmeob2chh2bs)
---
Friend, throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall.

**I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom.**

Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future.
---
Sincerely,

Tim Holbert
President
American Veterans Center
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcb34meort9s9mbbgjer7civd4m7apdinmuro70_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmeob2chh2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znbul5tpd0j4t1r2n3pelrmrde2bicogjq9gm598_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6ao33cjgmcoh1k8gn48n24hjm6o31ctjm2oj4c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1idumbvc1effpqvku071ckvlfr5e91212ptq628_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c5jmeob2chh2bs)_

Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Roy Cooper right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117266996/575910117/838791086?&amount=10&refcode=ea.640dd0a3-25a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.640dd0a3-25a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBkZDBhMy0yNWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fc_egUaF56XcvSVdFvFnEKSY4O9Fw5D-G4t0-h6a6CI=)** | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117266997/575910118/838791086?refcode=ea.640dd0a3-25a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.640dd0a3-25a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBkZDBhMy0yNWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fc_egUaF56XcvSVdFvFnEKSY4O9Fw5D-G4t0-h6a6CI=)**

Peter, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And Peter, I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years._
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign from Day One by splitting a donation between my campaign and Roy Cooper's – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117266998/575910119/838791086?refcode=ea.640dd0a3-25a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.640dd0a3-25a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBkZDBhMy0yNWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fc_egUaF56XcvSVdFvFnEKSY4O9Fw5D-G4t0-h6a6CI=)**

Let’s win this thing,
— Janet Mills
Governor of Maine
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: John Bisognano, NDRC
subject: The American people are tired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
How you can help make this a reality
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117267103/575910487/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNzNkYTgxLTI1YTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K8CxAiM_D-kL4yInePlqUKaicAvDmjPy-iYkqFf7Ih8=&emci=87783fbf-13a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=1d73da81-25a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Looking at our country after eight months of the Trump administration, I can say one thing with confidence: Americans are tired. Tired of the division and infighting. Tired of a government that puts the interests of billionaires and corporations over the needs of the people. Tired of lawmakers who can’t come together when it counts the most. **Peter, people are craving more unity in our politics.** The National Democratic Redistricting Committee has been around for nearly a decade, so I’ve seen firsthand how gerrymandering and slicing and dicing districts leads to greater polarization. It means less competition in general elections, less accountability of politicians to their voters, and fewer reasons for lawmakers to work beyond partisan lines. **That’s why we’re fighting for a healthier democracy — one where our politicians reach across the aisle and, more importantly, can be held accountable by voters.** [**If you’re craving a healthier democracy, fight alongside us by making a donation today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117267104/575910488/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_BeyondExtremism_email_20251014-NDRC-Tier1-BeyondExtremism_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251014-NDRC-Tier1-BeyondExtremism_&utm_campaign=BeyondExtremism&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNzNkYTgxLTI1YTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K8CxAiM_D-kL4yInePlqUKaicAvDmjPy-iYkqFf7Ih8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: How you can help make this a reality | Peter, Looking at our country after eight months of the Trump administration, I can say one thing with confidence: Americans are tired. Tired of the division and infighting. Tired of a government that puts the interests of billionaires and corporations over the needs of the people. Tired of lawmakers who can’t come together when it counts the most. Peter, people are craving more unity in our politics. The National Democratic Redistricting Committee has been around for nearly a decade, so I’ve seen firsthand how gerrymandering and slicing and dicing districts leads to greater polarization. It means less competition in general elections, less accountability of politicians to their voters, and fewer reasons for lawmakers to work beyond partisan lines. That’s why we’re fighting for a healthier democracy — one where our politicians reach across the aisle and, more importantly, can be held accountable by voters. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = — Biz John Bisognano President, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: George Whitesides HQ
subject: California Democrats are fighting back.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

In less than a month, California voters go to the polls and make a decision that could change the fabric of our race and the House majority.

Prop 50 is a measure on November’s ballot to redraw California’s congressional maps in response to Texas’ undemocratic scheme to add more GOP seats to hold the House majority – an unprecedented power grab from national Republicans to keep control of Congress to carry out the Trump Administration’s every command.

But California Democrats aren’t letting the GOP get away with it that easily. If passed, Prop 50 would level the playing field for next year’s midterm elections, defend fairness in our democracy, and give voters a voice while Republicans want to erase them.

We need to prepare for any outcome in a race as important as this one. Ballots are out, and we need to know where our supporters stand:

Do you support Prop 50?
⚪ Yes
⚪ No
⚪ Unsure

Take the poll >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/RwWIfp9hokmzpHiydAIzvQ2?refcode=em-10.14.25-all-b

Thank you,

Team Whitesides

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: indefensible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, there’s no reason to trust Republicans, particularly when it comes to healthcare.

---
| | Peter, there’s no reason to trust Republicans, particularly when it comes to healthcare. These are people who have attempted to repeal the Affordable Care Act more than 70 times over the last 15 years. Their One Big Ugly Law guts Medicaid and decimates rural hospitals all to give massive tax breaks to GOP billionaire donors. Right now, more than 20 MILLION Americans are receiving notices that their healthcare costs will skyrocket. And where are House Republicans in the midst of this healthcare crisis? On vacation. It’s indefensible, Peter. You deserve better. Democrats will NOT back down. It’s time to cancel the cuts, lower the cost and save healthcare. Keep the faith, Hakeem

clean_body: Peter, there’s no reason to trust Republicans, particularly when it comes to healthcare. | | Peter, there’s no reason to trust Republicans, particularly when it comes to healthcare. These are people who have attempted to repeal the Affordable Care Act more than 70 times over the last 15 years. Their One Big Ugly Law guts Medicaid and decimates rural hospitals all to give massive tax breaks to GOP billionaire donors. Right now, more than 20 MILLION Americans are receiving notices that their healthcare costs will skyrocket. And where are House Republicans in the midst of this healthcare crisis? On vacation. It’s indefensible, Peter. You deserve better. Democrats will NOT back down. It’s time to cancel the cuts, lower the cost and save healthcare. Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Thank airports for refusing to play Kristi Noem's propaganda video
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Thank airports for refusing to play Kristi Noem's wildly inappropriate video](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5340b52-b65f-4bb5-8d93-33b072a5a4e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb84184e4-9338-4de0-bd5f-5ada749a0566/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2cbf8c29-c5af-4017-85ed-8d846677265c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) then share with friends to help build support!)_ Kristi Noem, Homeland Security Secretary who knows nothing about homeland security, has sent a video to the nation's airports of her attacking Democrats for the government shutdown. And she wants it played in airport security lines, so hapless travelers from around the globe will have no choice but to watch her idiocy. But [multiple airports are refusing to do it](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8dd5754-ef0f-476e-9b0e-d1b24f46f2f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), including Las Vegas, Portland, and 3 in NYC (and possibly many more). They are objecting to the video's absurdly partisan message, and the fact that it is likely illegal (violation of the Hatch Act). Good for them for doing the right thing, in spite of MAGA shouting, and let's let them know that we stand with them. [**Please add your name, and join us in saying "We thank the airports who have refused to play Noem's video, and urge others to join them."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T445a4ca4-18b1-46a6-91a4-1adc1df471e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: $75 Billion for ICE Raids — Not Working Families, Home Depot Stays Silent
body:
ICE Gets $75 Billion. Families Get Nothing

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=141b50a43c&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | |

Dear Peter,

Yesterday, ICE raided **Woodland Hills, California** , in the heart of our district, detaining 20 day laborers in a Home Depot parking lot. Witnesses say one man was forcibly pushed up against a fence, even though he had a green card.These raids are part of **Trump’s fascist agenda** : a **$75 billion budget over four years** fueling the removal of brown people, bypassing due process, and detaining or deporting them to concentration camps or countries where they have no familial ties. **Federal courts and human rights organizations are actively challenging these unlawful and discriminatory practices.** Tax dollars are being spent on these **illegal, hateful actions** instead of feeding hungry children, supporting the underemployed, providing healthcare, or caring for the sick and elderly. Shockingly, **Home Depot** — the site of yesterday’s raid — has remained silent, refusing even to comment on these inhumane snatchings in their own parking lot.You know who else is complicit? My opponent, Brad Sherman. We must act. Your support empowers organizations to:
* **Alert communities** before raids occur

* **Hold corporations accountable

**
* **Protect immigrant families** and human dignity

[**Stand with us. Defend our neighbors. Donate today.**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=f86ac7b295&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=46ac7adc4f&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| |
**In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=ef60058787&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

Sometimes we'd have to go to several stores or even shopping malls for what we needed. | | | | | TUESDAY, October 14, 2025 Good Afternoon! We all know Amazon Prime for the fast shipping--but did you know it also hides a treasure chest of perks most people never use? Our friends at dug up nine of the best hidden Prime benefits, from grocery discounts to free music and more. You might already be paying for more magic than you realize. --Cole CEO, The Flyover * Once upon a time we had to make lists and physically go to stores when we needed things. Sometimes we'd have to go to several stores or even shopping malls for what we needed. Then one day, out of the heavens, came Amazon. For many of us, and movies is enough reason to fork over the But if those reasons haven't been enough to entice you to join Prime, maybe some of these lesser-known incentives will tempt you to sign up. Are you taking advantage of your Amazon Prime perks? Free music/podcasts, access to lightning deals, and Whole Foods discounts are Make sure you're not missing out, and get the most out of your Prime membership with help from our deal-finding experts.
