name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: ridiculous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Jon needs our help today, Peter.
#

Peter,
As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than _$10 million_ on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous.
Why so much money, this far from Election Day?
Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. _That_ is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign.
_And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back._
If Jon is going to defend this seat, we _really_ need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens.
[**Can Jon Ossoff count on you to contribute $5, $50 or whatever you can afford to help him lay the foundation for a winning Senate reelection campaign here in Georgia?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251014-1-subs&t=1&akid=922%2E5691347%2EFlw10M)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251014-1-subs&t=2&akid=922%2E5691347%2EFlw10M)**
We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but _Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations _from the very start._
Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending.
So here’s the truth:
**Jon needs our help _today_ , Peter.**
_He is literally MAGA’s #1 target._
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book.
So yes, this election will be tough.
But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.
Let’s do it again.
[**Please, use this link to support Jon’s reelection campaign. Every donation counts. Every donation sends a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight and win.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251014-1-subs&t=3&akid=922%2E5691347%2EFlw10M)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.OC00ws&amount=5&refcode=em251014-1-subs&t=4&akid=922%2E5691347%2EFlw10M)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.OC00ws&refcode=em251014-1-subs&t=5&akid=922%2E5691347%2EFlw10M)**
---
****
Thank you!
\- Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=6&akid=922%2E5691347%2EFlw10M) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=922%2E5691347%2EFlw10M) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

Dear Friend,
My final trial is closing in.
**An Obama-aligned Attorney General is forcing me into a rigged _state_ trial where President Trump legally can’t save me with a _federal_ pardon.**
In an earlier letter to you, I said that I’ve been left with no pardon, no lifeline, and _no cavalry coming over the hill._
But boy, was I wrong!
Over 1 MILLION Americans signed the “ _People’s Pardon of Rudy W. Giuliani._ ” THANK YOU!
And now, a new report from _The Arizona Republic_ shows the Attorney General is losing ground in her witch hunt against me:
| **Decision time nears: Attorney General Mayes outlines options...**
“...she did not rule out walking away from the high-profile prosecution”
---
**There _was_ a cavalry coming over the hill. It was YOU – the American people.**
But the battle isn’t won yet... Until I am proclaimed a **_FREE_ _MAN_** , until ALL charges are dropped, and until I’m no longer facing _20 YEARS_ IN PRISON, _I will not stop fighting_!
With “decision time” for the Attorney General fast approaching – and a real chance this wrongful prosecution could be dropped – I’m asking YOU to add your name to the public letter to “**FREE RUDY.** ”

We've got to let you know, Team, that **a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes** passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again.The bill, last known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. **The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. ** “ _Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in_ ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ _A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will_.” “ _A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional_ ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin. The chaos and dysfunction in Washington are worse than ever — and it’s all because the Republican majority is more focused on partisan infighting than actually governing.

**Democrats only need to flip THREE seats to take back the House in 2026.**

And Michigan?

We’ve got **FIVE** competitive seats — three to flip and two to defend.

That’s why I launched my Majorities Are Made in Michigan initiative to protect my own battleground seat in MI-03 and support Democrats across the state. clean_body: Democrats only need to flip THREE seats to take back the House in 2026. | = The chaos and dysfunction in Washington are worse than ever — and it’s all because the Republican majority is more focused on partisan infighting than actually governing. Democrats only need to flip THREE seats to take back the House in 2026. And Michigan? We’ve got FIVE competitive seats — three to flip and two to defend. That’s why I launched my Majorities Are Made in Michigan initiative to protect my own battleground seat in MI-03 and support Democrats across the state. Your contribution will be amplified by FIVE times. With a single contribution, you can support the following five seats — two to hold, and 3 to flip: → MI03 (HOLD) → MI04 (FLIP) → MI07 (FLIP) → MI08 (HOLD) → MI10 (FLIP) = | | | = | = If we want to take back the House majority, we need to build a firewall right here in Michigan. That means protecting health care, fighting extremism, and making sure Congress works for working people, not billionaires and special interests. This isn’t just about one race. It’s about the path to the House majority, andMichigan is at the center of it. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar goes directly into the fight to flip the House. – Hillary Scholten * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Graham Platner
subject: Nothing pisses me off more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Literal billionaires have taken over our government. And all Democratic leadership can do is send us another fundraising text?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96637?refcode=em20251014-9572&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9572%2E614464%2EEPzsJ8)
Peter,
Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising text from Democrats talking about how they’re fighting fascism... Because it’s such B.S. We’re not idiots. Everyone knows most of them aren’t doing jack right now to fight back.
People are being kidnapped into unmarked vans by masked police. There is a genocide happening in Palestine. Literal billionaires have taken over our government. And all Democratic leadership can do is send us another fundraising text?
**My name is Graham Platner, and I’m the Marine Corps veteran and Democrat running for U.S. Senate against Susan Collins here in Maine.** I’m not going to speak in platitudes or shy away from what I believe. There is a war going on in this country, and the oligarchy and the fascists are winning right now.
**Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country.** We have an opportunity to replace her with a working-class Democrat – one who won’t take money from corporations or AIPAC.
But I’m not a wealthy guy, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win. **If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I need folks like you to chip in now to our campaign.**
**[Please, will you split a donation right now between our campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate with a Democrat who will actually fight to defend our democracy like Democrats oughta be?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96637?refcode=em20251014-9572&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9572%2E614464%2EEPzsJ8)**
In the history of this nation, power has never been just willingly handed to the people. Another mealy-mouthed Democrat isn’t going to fix things or protect our constitution.
I’m ready to go to the United States Senate and fight – but I need your help today to get there.
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

clean_body: "The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it."| | | | | Dear Peter, We’re coming on Halloween night to take over the darkness with light! This will be a powerful, jam-packed day filled with Jesus, unity, and revival. The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it. We’re RECLAIMING TERRITORY from the enemy, and Halloween is about to get ROCKED by the Holy Spirit! God is doing powerful things in Baton Rouge, and the seeds of revival have been sown. Now we’re expectant for a harvest! Join us for a Friday night, faith-filled revival on the Bayou—and be ready to watch the Holy Spirit move in POWER! WATCH THE REVIVE IN 25 BATON ROUGE PROMO ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | We’re coming on Halloween night to take over the darkness with light! This will be a powerful, jam-packed day filled with Jesus, unity, and revival. FULL SCHEDULE ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ 🕒 3:00 PM | Outreach 📍 Free Speech Alley — right in front of the LSU Student Union(310 LSU Student Union, Baton Rouge, LA 70803) 🚶 4:30 PM | Jesus March We’ll march through the LSU campus declaring the name of Jesus! 🙌 6:00 PM | Let Us Worship Event 📍 7085 Burbank Dr, Baton Rouge, LA 70808 Want to serve and be part of what God is doing? Sign up 👉 [[HERE]]() If you are coming to the outreach, the march or have any questions, email mailto:Reece@seanfeucht.com?subject=Revive in 25 - Baton Rouge "Reece@seanfeucht.com" Let’s bring revival to Baton Rouge! 🔥 | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

You are the Hope of America!

America is at a turning point—and her hope is found in the hearts and homes of her mothers.

We’re thrilled to invite you to join Kimberly Fletcher, Founder and President of Moms for America®, for a brand-new 4-week course:

HANDS OF HEAVEN: HEALING AMERICA FROM THE INSIDE OUT

In this inspiring series, Kimberly shares stories, principles, and real-life examples that reveal how mothers have always been
God’s way of bringing healing and change to the world. You’ll discover:

* The powerful influence mothers have on the heart of a nation

* The true epic story of America and our divine heritage of liberty

* How today’s culture is reshaping our children—and what we can do about it

* How to raise patriots who will carry the torch of freedom forward

Each 60-minute session will uplift, educate, and empower you to make a difference right where you are—at your kitchen table, in
your community, and in your country.

DATES & DETAILS

* When: Every Monday in November, beginning November 4th

* Time: 5 p.m. Pacific, 6 p.m. Mountain, 7 p.m. Central, 8 p.m. Eastern

* Where: Online via live Zoom webinar—link provided upon registration.

THIS IS A ONE-TIME-ONLY EVENT

This special course will not be available on our website or in the MFA library.
The only way to experience Hands of Heaven is to register for the course before it ends.

Don’t miss your opportunity to be part of this exclusive gathering of mothers standing together to heal America from the inside
out.

Reserve your spot today! clean_body: America is at a turning point—and her hope is found in the hearts and homes of her mothers. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] You are the Hope of America! America is at a turning point—and her hope is found in the hearts and homes of her mothers. We’re thrilled to invite you to join Kimberly Fletcher, Founder and President of Moms for America®, for a brand-new 4-week course: HANDS OF HEAVEN: HEALING AMERICA FROM THE INSIDE OUT In this inspiring series, Kimberly shares stories, principles, and real-life examples that reveal how mothers have always been God’s way of bringing healing and change to the world. You’ll discover: The powerful influence mothers have on the heart of a nation The true epic story of America and our divine heritage of liberty How today’s culture is reshaping our children—and what we can do about it How to raise patriots who will carry the torch of freedom forward Each 60-minute session will uplift, educate, and empower you to make a difference right where you are—at your kitchen table, in your community, and in your country. DATES & DETAILS When: Every Monday in November, beginning November 4th Time: 5 p.m. Pacific, 6 p.m. Mountain, 7 p.m. Central, 8 p.m. Eastern * Where: Online via live Zoom webinar—link provided upon registration. THIS IS A ONE-TIME-ONLY EVENT This special course will not be available on our website or in the MFA library. The only way to experience Hands of Heaven is to register for the course before it ends. Don’t miss your opportunity to be part of this exclusive gathering of mothers standing together to heal America from the inside out. Reserve your spot today! [] Whether you join from home or with friends, Hands of Heaven will remind you that your hands—the hands that serve, teach, and nurture—are the very hands God uses to heal nations. [] [] ☝️ Click above to register☝️ LIKE WHAT WE DO? Your tax-deductible gift to Moms for America® will help support us in our mission to Empower Moms, Promote Liberty, and Raise Patriots! DONATE TODAY [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

Derek – Adam has stood up to Donald Trump, Pam Bondi, Kash Patel, and anyone else who worked to undermine our rule of law.
Why?
Because it matters to you and your family. Because it matters for the longevity and integrity of our democracy. And it matters that there is an equal application of the law for _everyone_ , not two sets of rules for the elite and for everyone else.
**[Do you agree and want to see the rule of law upheld in this country? name: Anika Page
subject: Mississippi’s Night to Celebrate - Have You Reserved Your Seat?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/gala-12850280?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good afternoon Friend,
In just a few days, Mississippi’s leaders, friends, and supporters will gather for _A Celebration of Mississippi Success_ on **Thursday, October 23rd** at the **Country Club of Jackson** — and I would love for you to be there with us. This evening is all about celebrating how far our beautiful state has come — the growth, the opportunities, and the remarkable progress we’ve made together. We’re honored to welcome **Governor Tate Reeves** and **Rich Lowry** , Editor-in-Chief of _National Review_ , as our keynote speakers. Together, they’ll reflect on Mississippi’s achievements and share their vision for an even brighter future.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=01fb82c0cc&e=5703353baa)
---
_Purchase your tickets by clicking on the photo above!_
| **Event Details:**
* Thursday, October 23, 2025
* Country Club of Jackson
* Doors open at 6:30 PM, Gala starts at 7 PM
* Individual tickets are $75

It’s going to be an evening of inspiration, conversation, and community — a chance to celebrate Mississippi’s story and the people who make it so special. A limited number of individual tickets remain — and we’d love to see you there.
---
| [Purchase Your Tickets Here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=57dd4d12d8&e=5703353baa "Purchase Your Tickets Here!")
---
| We look forward to celebrating this season of Mississippi success with you.
---
| |
---
Warmest wishes,

Anika Page
Director of Operations
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=d28583f4e5) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=d28583f4e5).

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Defend our health care. Defend our communities. Defend our democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
**1,500 of our community health care centers are in crisis.[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPpigPq7jZJL_osDIzDBZhPUiOcDlkncfwKq2Jk1U0VK6OZwn1YHOITbjRVcnExx9j07_FQag1KzKabX3PJoAxEAS4QMkhb2a4lJsmXwRA7iw1E9Jwai2tHScqqi4WQr7yXfzXEpmTKBLPL2IPKfaHZ9ao6qZAiewJSWxkgx8hN-0bSjUuZ6rj9TQCpT4rKAx2TC3iihVWGK5Hk2d3pdbpVYZ_PqEPqClhVpXXRTkDSZID_3y2xH02qYWWR-d9NrXp6HH2Roy5-yeC-Rn6YTLz99ZRj915F0ytQdYKDfK9fJ_/4kq/M2qgxkTRRiKGuvm2qkwdeA/h0/h001.2yo4FE5Q-wFvjXLoch_an78rHzsZxkzIn9yQx6XKrSw)****[Will you chip in to our work advocating for community health care centers and supporting local leaders who are fighting for our health care?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnN3OEGsTH4qpa5WG2Q5KUZqEBbgWGSSjpTSpKFLiQ4A9W-GBbbjeY4LJZX-rmUv3XHuAFw5_x7tHEqz02jfYInXOuhkqt5tEU8samUL1BJULCMYdk0oZKgV3O8JpwhcC0WvA_2qSPXi1h-SDvFw7f53csxAM74t8OcTee9pus2j5M9vICgYKYCBi5g2hnn0q5tu4O758I6Hhm4nCMEWimwPl78nLnaBDiPuhyvR8VqhXyIvE020C8R93r1CNFRUx0egkbpQPZ8CLx8DgTQ9cpLl7mgKelIUtfMn620TABHbbZ4_tjWpIaUMWTOZCyT_YABzNyBchxOgEU6XxrF1MjUj3oFW9sDVXSMg5mgFV0EId-/4kq/M2qgxkTRRiKGuvm2qkwdeA/h1/h001.NU03cimEuaaD8gMHkXJxAVt2nRiVLP_PuUrEjGf3JRM)**
* * *
**** Peter, we’re in a health care crisis. A recent survey shows [over half of U.S. health workers](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRinX8RyDlgKWeKjij8E4pbjFGnGPgynLH9SQ-8LTV5FLHk8gvA7eCyWg2t7wRhgIgcJvwbKAhPsWJZAwI9ty7MbDcTF6DLpEPcKE304VT9WiC3J8QqUbbc_alosOMcprN4qUQIjDCXj6GaiNp4-PHkWPbSzdiBCvfUuwfOqFG755YklL44cQV6-RFW7QMfgqOnztBrXzHAwM3XAWZsIn0LCukyV3ZwkmVC89X6gvRspOqId3NgSQrzptP2k3XsYc80GnaRQAhqtVoBOXrCSxDAiMazmxqzSdR3nlOD_HXL0MITM3O2YWHUShOBd76dG_WsEFplESG03E0v3bzu5IwUIsbJBluivxBVRMgZWgoTnhmdU40zjjo-HPOOE6l9FDu49brh1Of-qlGzpDdZMxll8YEWX7lDPwAI0dHEj0ooFvaSjM5y_G2cXF5MicJAZmgF7k7VbPwrMCZMcg3DWYj7aPi3l4RduDvoSDQnddsFIstNmwjfBP8MDz2vQWVx8BqvceZB39zALUrRK1bhHzSO9MyjCkw2nzRSEixyH2V37q6-rx8Atm5HFG2bKyOUt3z1KwAdTxS3_cfUAc0Sw8N0XAHEsAsrftdwX_GjwINrY7Y/4kq/M2qgxkTRRiKGuvm2qkwdeA/h2/h001.-sQFocY0v-IFmstGq4FmvTxOVn6zXXtjYstK1N3MIlw) plan to leave their jobs in the next year. _That’s terrifying!___ Health care is the largest employment sector in America. More than [17 million people](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uut15jeBop1T7GISkpKatzo7UOFtQH1EcbKDIjYRdEotmVcZppH4vfAXPDqhbO3wAp2lsfsW89Rs12ZvJRWtH1T030BXHtrZwkFu-EdDRijFbD7WEsQr3PxHqUMWutwP4UHfcqOoM8sQUoKTjTN6k1vjbYOdFn4IAU9MKjOAt2nqnByoVH2hIL_XX7X0x6CxVtEOu58NC7Gmyxe-H6krk-iyeaXA-4xLQ_oS-oz24hlE69FLNQCk0CW8o_CrVQxoRyVdgJI-caFcKRPIS_Ujt_HT9wkYsE0IvNw0-tRrGLG6BAWYOS8Z7m5zuRWEeMWwOAZ-VPwXS8sDw-UfxbVyC9AN-uMOGgynbbyiLA0xdthOJSVOmIeMtECMgaRWkVOFhHYjPkwdKOuECCWhyncdbj5dalTSIYPGuAIGbsnSNQYZt9TLihrTr-Gt8PzcTIqbT9O1mSjfflY8vskhJ1wcoDsI/4kq/M2qgxkTRRiKGuvm2qkwdeA/h3/h001.v9Yhmt6SuvK1jlBwLvk0SB4s5wp6GaLob4uDnv3k1Bs) work in it, and our communities depend on them every single day. Community health centers serve over [30 million](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRiqyF9qqBg7E6a2QSZUx2m-rEvBYPQyY4I5ArPkIgb8WGoxRRiBsZeGbY6PAbdw4Te8Va61pcWGSkmRIiWqgDd_M5soSGLDooS8u29v22Fb0RTZw18wIlx9jp10O-gud6O79sAEWWYWPVaMofEopjAH34_pnDbHbIiBvYqeh2UH7xIPhoRYAtI-ZYN8f4XIDV1Vv2J08fXD4HX9i9J9uyffwH_xhEvOLQpfbt1XaXbv91kFJzFux7XeSgi53nltGTQUwEgXf3zIR77IH92V2OK8gjJDDGxT_08gcb3n0IoABim-7RP02g9Dx4P9-8OdPD0TsivBlQKwmNlOYGGvmi6qCXKUgGT_Nrj04xyyOou5AywrNfpWluSBWVTSMnhJRIaGWIOjcBUdsx6A29za9dEyP3P3Xjk-didq2OetMvp8F9RF6ULJVWgzHGv2k18dqizqHN1pGtuwl0eaC_JOXP6vn_-r2rnH00znF-zqIhtz4QMsv8zEGkwbVcrLWCObT-EMTjnbjF1xPnrINQXW1KVsbs7bkzjhHlZgo-QH0Qj_3k8Z-F7YkI-bX7Q6nyp7ITuw/4kq/M2qgxkTRRiKGuvm2qkwdeA/h4/h001.rBX8dM9aifpHXXvPjpIrLPkYqL3wZ3pYjyYnpvUZgBw) Americans, especially in rural and underserved communities. But Trump and MAGA are threatening them by slashing Medicaid, Medicare, and ACA funding and unlawfully blocking billions already approved for vital health programs. If they succeed, millions will lose care, workers will lose jobs, and vulnerable communities will be left without the support they need. _Community health centers are lifelines. They save lives, provide jobs, and keep families healthy. Protecting them isn’t just health policy, it’s part of defending our democracy and building the resistance to Trump’s cruel agenda._ **At Local Democracy Project, we’re fighting to protect funding and build a stronger pipeline of local health care professionals, and supporting local leaders who stand with health workers and patients. But we need your help.** ******[Chip in today to protect community health centers and defend care for all.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnN1NW-R-Va81j1TLqOPyiT5gvtIJ5_KzSfty243fxxiZqHdM9DIfc-aqv5c_q8W6XIstWmDTLhVQIWoOV7XV6TR3vzvQiHsPOeiyOSIxj2vjBhwzVhVGZFhWUlBfcRypwXrXLIHSorVHKW1C7_SLVxKn_JZO7RdjAcvXH57hqvv0jB6pZDD43qVpDjZ0XpDbFYETD3Sk_ruWZKo8wfPw1yyVG8sI7NyipaP7xkzxnekrSTBjnQp_uLxrbQUSM9R5TWFLEFUILdv2bk8QmFyWcFqmtKoT0mF6Cy7uoqlaPTLyu5dFDSzK74tK-QkZNi_RlTRuLgL0pnYDAyT8wtbE2DngRGxJt8wf-Qiy9rrEfk_ue/4kq/M2qgxkTRRiKGuvm2qkwdeA/h5/h001.jV2zFMy7TcnWqNyQeoNyXmXnd7S_Aq0KJw4oCw6abeM)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | 1,500 of our community health care centers are in crisis. Peter, we’re in a health care crisis. A recent survey shows plan to leave their jobs in the next year. That’s terrifying!_ Health care is the largest employment sector in America. More than work in it, and our communities depend on them every single day. Community health centers serve over Americans, especially in rural and underserved communities. But Trump and MAGA are threatening them by slashing Medicaid, Medicare, and ACA funding and unlawfully blocking billions already approved for vital health programs. If they succeed, millions will lose care, workers will lose jobs, and vulnerable communities will be left without the support they need. Community health centers are lifelines. They save lives, provide jobs, and keep families healthy. Protecting them isn’t just health policy, it’s part of defending our democracy and building the resistance to Trump’s cruel agenda. At Local Democracy Project, we’re fighting to protect funding and build a stronger pipeline of local health care professionals, and supporting local leaders who stand with health workers and patients. But we need your help. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Act local. Change everything \- Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. body:
I can’t stand by and do nothing while our country is in danger

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117271226/575924389/1866411932?refcode=251014_fw_fwsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTk4YTFkNC0yZmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxtw0c5VR6QAKgKRFR88_inG5xGN6sZneZpVsZq5VDw=)

| Seth Moulton here. Fred Wellman is running for Congress in Missouri, so I wanted to pass along this message and ask that you [**split a contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117271235/575924401/584874463?refcode=251014_fw_fwsplit_box&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTk4YTFkNC0yZmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxtw0c5VR6QAKgKRFR88_inG5xGN6sZneZpVsZq5VDw=) between my campaign and his.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117271244/575924407/921511002?refcode=251014_fw_fwsplit_p1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTk4YTFkNC0yZmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxtw0c5VR6QAKgKRFR88_inG5xGN6sZneZpVsZq5VDw=)
Hi there,
My name is Fred Wellman. I served in the Army for 22 years and am now the host of the _On Democracy_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network. **I’m excited to share some big news: I’m the Democrat running for Congress in one of the most competitive swing districts in the nation. **
This isn’t the email I thought I’d be sending you today. But with the government shutdown and Ann Wagner doing nothing to fix it, we need leaders who will stand up and do whatever it takes to fix it. I’m done waiting.
**[If you’re ready to join my campaign, can you split a donation of $20 today between Seth Moulton and me to become one of our first 5,000 Founding Donors? If you want to learn more, please keep reading this.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117271247/575924417/921511002?refcode=251014_fw_fwsplit_l1&amount=20&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTk4YTFkNC0yZmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxtw0c5VR6QAKgKRFR88_inG5xGN6sZneZpVsZq5VDw=)**
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117271250/575924420/921511002?refcode=251014_fw_fwsplit_b1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTk4YTFkNC0yZmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxtw0c5VR6QAKgKRFR88_inG5xGN6sZneZpVsZq5VDw= "https://secure.actblue.com/")
---
A Missouri native, I graduated from Kirkwood High School and then attended West Point. In the Army, I served as an aviator and later as a public affairs officer. For much of my career, I led soldiers in combat, flew helicopters in Desert Storm and Iraq, and served as a spokesman for generals leading America’s toughest and most important fights.
After retiring from the Army, I kept looking for ways to serve, founding a public affairs firm to advocate for veterans and military families, volunteering at a field hospital in New York at the height of COVID, and working with the Lincoln Project in 2020 to help beat Trump. My oath to serve our country and uphold our Constitution is sacred and endures for life.
I returned home to Missouri four years ago and once again rolled up my sleeves to help organize the thousands of donations for refugees coming to St. Louis from Afghanistan as Kabul fell.
Now, I host the _On Democracy with FPWellman_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network, having key conversations about how to address rising authoritarianism, inequality, and Trump’s assault on our democracy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117271254/575924425/921511002?refcode=251014_fw_fwsplit_p2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTk4YTFkNC0yZmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxtw0c5VR6QAKgKRFR88_inG5xGN6sZneZpVsZq5VDw=)
**Meanwhile, my MAGA Congresswoman—Ann Wagner—is content to let Trump rule as a dictator. She has spent her entire career selling us out, ignoring her constituents, and getting richer. She hasn’t even bothered holding an open town hall in thirteen years. In one of the most critical swing districts in the country, here in my home state of Missouri, this cannot continue. **
That’s why I’m running.
**Because working Americans are getting priced out of the American Dream. **
**Because our kids deserve the same rights, freedoms, and opportunities we had. **
**Because the time for sitting on the sidelines is over. **
After two decades in uniform, I know what it looks like to fight for this country. I watched brave men and women give everything to defend our freedoms, including two of my own soldiers in Desert Storm. Their sacrifice reminds me every day that democracy is worth fighting for.
Now, Trump wants to crown himself America’s first king, and Ann Wagner is helping him get there. They have taken healthcare away from millions, destroyed the economy, gutted the VA, politicized our national defense, and are ripping apart our democratic institutions piece by piece.
**I won’t stand by while they sell out working families. I’m a fighter – and I’m ready to take this fight to Washington. I know you are ready to fight, too. **
**[That’s why I’ll ask one more time, can you split a donation between Seth Moulton and me to become one of the first 5,000 Founding Donors of our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117271262/575924432/921511002?refcode=251014_fw_fwsplit_l2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTk4YTFkNC0yZmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxtw0c5VR6QAKgKRFR88_inG5xGN6sZneZpVsZq5VDw=)**

clean_body: I can’t stand by and do nothing while our country is in danger | = | Seth Moulton here. Fred Wellman is running for Congress in Missouri, so I wanted to pass along this message and ask that you = between my campaign and his. = Hi there, My name is Fred Wellman. I served in the Army for 22 years and am now the host of the On Democracy podcast on the MeidasTouch Network. I’m excited to share some big news: I’m the Democrat running for Congress in one of the most competitive swing districts in the nation. This isn’t the email I thought I’d be sending you today. But with the government shutdown and Ann Wagner doing nothing to fix it, we need leaders who will stand up and do whatever it takes to fix it. I’m done waiting. = | = "" A Missouri native, I graduated from Kirkwood High School and then attended West Point. In the Army, I served as an aviator and later as a public affairs officer. For much of my career, I led soldiers in combat, flew helicopters in Desert Storm and Iraq, and served as a spokesman for generals leading America’s toughest and most important fights. After retiring from the Army, I kept looking for ways to serve, founding a public affairs firm to advocate for veterans and military families, volunteering at a field hospital in New York at the height of COVID, and working with the Lincoln Project in 2020 to help beat Trump. My oath to serve our country and uphold our Constitution is sacred and endures for life. I returned home to Missouri four years ago and once again rolled up my sleeves to help organize the thousands of donations for refugees coming to St. Louis from Afghanistan as Kabul fell. Now, I host the On Democracy with FPWellman podcast on the MeidasTouch Network, having key conversations about how to address rising authoritarianism, inequality, and Trump’s assault on our democracy. = Meanwhile, my MAGA Congresswoman—Ann Wagner—is content to let Trump rule as a dictator. She has spent her entire career selling us out, ignoring her constituents, and getting richer. She hasn’t even bothered holding an open town hall in thirteen years. In one of the most critical swing districts in the country, here in my home state of Missouri, this cannot continue. That’s why I’m running. Because working Americans are getting priced out of the American Dream. Because our kids deserve the same rights, freedoms, and opportunities we had. Because the time for sitting on the sidelines is over. After two decades in uniform, I know what it looks like to fight for this country. I watched brave men and women give everything to defend our freedoms, including two of my own soldiers in Desert Storm. Their sacrifice reminds me every day that democracy is worth fighting for. Now, Trump wants to crown himself America’s first king, and Ann Wagner is helping him get there. They have taken healthcare away from millions, destroyed the economy, gutted the VA, politicized our national defense, and are ripping apart our democratic institutions piece by piece. I won’t stand by while they sell out working families. I’m a fighter – and I’m ready to take this fight to Washington. I know you are ready to fight, too. = | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" I’ve got one tattoo. It says, “I’m not done yet.” It was the theme of my Army retirement speech. Whenever I hit hard times and thought I was all but finished, I remembered that line. I dusted myself off and got back in the fight. I’m not done yet. You’re not done yet. Missouri is not done yet. America is not done yet. Join me. —Fred Wellman Democratic Candidate for MO-2 [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: Autism Health
subject: Join Us for Our Upcoming Webinar!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Upcoming Webinar with Robert Miller!**
---
|
---
| Join us on **Saturday, October 25, 2025 at 11:00 AM PT / 2:00 PM ET** for a live Zoom webinar with **Robert (Bob) Miller, BCTN, ANWPB** on the _Epigenetic and Genetic Factors Leading to Increased NLRP3, Histamine, and Glutamate in ASD_. Bob will unpack how specific genetic variants, when combined with environmental/epigenetic triggers, can upregulate the **NLRP3 inflammasome** , dysregulate **histamine** pathways, and elevate **glutamate** excitotoxicity in autism spectrum disorder. Expect a clear, mechanism-focused walkthrough and practical insights on how these pathways intersect and what that means for individualized support strategies. Bob is a **Board-Certified Traditional Naturopath** who specializes in genetic-specific nutrition and founded the **NutriGenetic Research Institute** to study links between genetic variants and clinical presentations. He has presented multi-year research programs on complex chronic illness and mast-cell/HEME/NADPH-related mechanisms, and has educated thousands of practitioners internationally on applying functional genomics in care.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6221e79d49&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
|
---
|
## **Introducing Our Headline Speaker, Aaron Siri!**
---
|
---
| We are thrilled to announce that **Aaron Siri, Esq.** will be joining us as a **headline speaker** at the 2026 **Autism Health Summit**! Known for his groundbreaking legal work in medical freedom and health rights, Aaron Siri has become one of the most influential voices advocating for transparency, informed consent, and ethical medical policy. His powerful message and commitment to truth have inspired millions, and his presence at the Autism Health Summit promises to be one of our most impactful sessions yet. This **transformative 3-day event** brings together world-class experts, parents, practitioners, and advocates from around the globe to share cutting-edge research, innovative therapies, and inspiring stories of hope and healing. **CME credits available for professionals!

Autism Health Summit 2026**
**Location:** Legacy Center Resort & Spa, San Diego, CA
**Dates:** April 24–26, 2026

**Special October Ticket Pricing** **General Admission:**
~~$345~~ → **$295**
PLUS **an extra $25 off** with the code **Spooky25** **VIP Admission:**
~~$445~~ → **$395**
PLUS **an extra $25 off** with the code **Spooky25** All ticket prices will increase in **2026** , so this is the **perfect time to secure your spot** at the lowest rate of the year.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2e14db2cac&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
|
---
|
### **Join Autism Health at The Big Blue Bash!**
---
|
---
| Autism Health is honored to support our friends at the **National Police Defense Foundation (NPDF)** and the **Federal Law Enforcement Officers Association (FLEOA)** at the upcoming **Big Blue Bash** — a prestigious evening celebrating our nation’s heroes in law enforcement. The event will take place at the world-renowned **Mar-a-Lago Club in Palm Beach, Florida** , bringing together leaders, advocates, and supporters from across the country for a night of unity, recognition, and purpose. This year’s Big Blue Bash will feature special guests, distinguished speakers, live entertainment, and opportunities to support critical programs that protect those who protect us. We’re proud to stand alongside NPDF and FLEOA in honoring the men and women who serve our communities with courage and integrity. To learn more and secure your spot at this unforgettable evening, visit [NPDF.org](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=54ccb7107d&e=3a42edfdc4). Let’s come together to celebrate, connect, and continue building partnerships that strengthen our mission of advocacy, education, and community impact.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=e08f8edf16&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---

San Diego, CA**

name: Team Taylor
subject: Right-wing groups will spend eye-popping numbers to defeat us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251014-701&t=1&akid=702%2E294397%2EK9EB_C)
This is what we’re up against, folks:
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251014_1_ak.5G-Hrh&amount=10&refcode=em20251014-701&t=2&akid=702%2E294397%2EK9EB_C)
That’s not a typo. One **_billion_** dollars has been spent to silence voices, suppress votes, and keep power in the hands of the ultra-wealthy.
Here in Wisconsin, those same dark-money groups are already gearing up to defeat Judge Chris Taylor and buy more control of our state Supreme Court.
They’ll spend eye-popping numbers to run attack ads and smear campaigns because they know Judge Chris Taylor is committed to ensuring everyone gets a fair shot in our judicial system.
**But while right-wing special interests may have an initial cash advantage, we have people power.**
[**By chipping in $10 or any amount today, you’ll help us reach voters early so that when right-wing money floods in, we already have the grassroots momentum to fight back.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251014_1_ak.5G-Hrh&amount=10&refcode=em20251014-701&t=3&akid=702%2E294397%2EK9EB_C)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251014_1_ak.5G-Hrh&amount=10&refcode=em20251014-701&t=22&akid=702%2E294397%2EK9EB_C)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *

name: Cori Bush
subject: This movement is alive because of you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act]
Hi Peter,
I want to pause for a moment and say thank you.
This movement has never been about one person. From the beginning, it’s been about us: neighbors and supporters coming together to demand something better for St. Louis.
None of what we’ve already accomplished in just 11 days would have been possible without you.
The truth is, speaking out and standing strong has never been easy. But what keeps me going is knowing that I am not alone in this fight. I have you, and thousands more, standing right beside me.
Now, with almost two weeks until my first end-of-month deadline for this campaign, I need to ask: will you join me again? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act]
Your support today is more than a donation. It’s proof that this movement is alive, strong, and ready to keep fighting.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act]
Let’s show the world that St. Louis is built different, and so are we.
With gratitude,
Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251014_thankyou_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [https://www.coribush.org]

From the beginning, it’s been about us: neighbors and supporters coming together to demand something better for St. Louis. None of what we’ve already accomplished in just 11 days would have been possible without you. The truth is, speaking out and standing strong has never been easy. But what keeps me going is knowing that I am not alone in this fight. I have you, and thousands more, standing right beside me. Now, with almost two weeks until my first end-of-month deadline for this campaign, I need to ask: will you join me again? [] Your support today is more than a donation. It’s proof that this movement is alive, strong, and ready to keep fighting. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] Let’s show the world that St. Louis is built different, and so are we. With gratitude, Cori [] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise . As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities. Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] Paid for by Cori For Us Cori For Us PO Box 12404 St. Louis, MO 63132 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Jane Fonda
subject: You’re not an ATM

body:
I refuse to wake up the morning after Election Day with regrets.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117271848/575926423/2105508926?refcode=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMTE4ZDI3LTMxYTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y7pl5LFO_NB1Tjd4J80UGihlvrjOSpaoKVvBwvRXuWM=) I know you probably get a lot of fundraising emails asking for money, often from sources that are unclear about their intentions — some shouting “600% MATCH!” or warning that missing a donation will doom the entire resistance. **That’s not how we do things at JanePAC. You’re not an ATM to us. You’re a real person with a real life, real bills, and real hopes for our planet’s future. And you deserve honesty about where your support goes.** **[So before I ask you to chip in your first online donation today, I want to share three tangible ways your contribution makes an incredible difference for our climate movement:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117271849/575926424/2105508926?refcode=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMTE4ZDI3LTMxYTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y7pl5LFO_NB1Tjd4J80UGihlvrjOSpaoKVvBwvRXuWM=)** **1️⃣ Rallying climate voters:** Your support directly powers our work to get voters to the polls in the final 21 days before Election Day. These local and statewide races in Virginia, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and beyond are too often decided by just a handful of votes — and they’re exactly where the biggest climate decisions are made every single day. **2️⃣ Standing up to Big Oil:** The fossil fuel industry spent $445 million in 2024 to elect Donald Trump and they’ve already dumped at least $5 million into key states this year to crush our endorsed candidates. **3️⃣ Fueling real solutions:** Your support helps us recruit volunteers, run digital campaigns on social media, and reach people who’ve never heard of these races — but whose lives will be directly affected by their outcomes. _And it’s working._ This year alone, we've won 7 critical races and advanced strong climate champions through competitive primaries. This is the needle-moving work our planet and our communities have been waiting for – and we have dozens more on the ballot in just 21 days. **That’s proof that this movement matters. That you matter in this fight. That’s why my team set a goal to raise $25,000 by Thursday to ensure every one of our endorsed climate champions has the support they need to win.** **[Can I count on you to chip in any amount you can afford right now to help power one of our final pushes before Election Day?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117271850/575926425/2105508926?refcode=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMTE4ZDI3LTMxYTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y7pl5LFO_NB1Tjd4J80UGihlvrjOSpaoKVvBwvRXuWM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117271851/575926426/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMTE4ZDI3LTMxYTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y7pl5LFO_NB1Tjd4J80UGihlvrjOSpaoKVvBwvRXuWM=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117271852/575926427/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.b0118d27-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMTE4ZDI3LTMxYTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y7pl5LFO_NB1Tjd4J80UGihlvrjOSpaoKVvBwvRXuWM=)

That’s not how we do things at JanePAC. You’re not an ATM to us. You’re a real person with a real life, real bills, and real hopes for our planet’s future. And you deserve honesty about where your support goes. = 1️⃣ Rallying climate voters: Your support directly powers our work to get voters to the polls in the final 21 days before Election Day. These local and statewide races in Virginia, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and beyond are too often decided by just a handful of votes — and they’re exactly where the biggest climate decisions are made every single day. 2️⃣ Standing up to Big Oil: The fossil fuel industry spent $445 million in 2024 to elect Donald Trump and they’ve already dumped at least $5 million into key states this year to crush our endorsed candidates. 3️⃣ Fueling real solutions: Your support helps us recruit volunteers, run digital campaigns on social media, and reach people who’ve never heard of these races — but whose lives will be directly affected by their outcomes. And it’s working. This year alone, we've won 7 critical races and advanced strong climate champions through competitive primaries. This is the needle-moving work our planet and our communities have been waiting for – and we have dozens more on the ballot in just 21 days. That’s proof that this movement matters. That you matter in this fight. That’s why my team set a goal to raise $25,000 by Thursday to ensure every one of our endorsed climate champions has the support they need to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

# **[Vance Discusses Border Policy](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
If Sunday morning’s interview between Vice President J.D. Vance and ABC’s George Stephanopoulos was supposed to be a routine political Q&A, it quickly became anything but. In fact, what unfolded was a masterclass in deflection—but not from Vance. The real dodging came from Stephanopoulos, who spent nearly the entire segment trying to corner the Vice [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._gh7E7xN4p4NqGa0DPPq4Q)
# **[Macron Issues Statement Following Peace Deal](http://trk.libertyledger._gh7E7xN4p4NqGa0DPPq4Q)**
---
“Success has many fathers, but failure is an orphan.” That old maxim has rarely felt more relevant than in the aftermath of today’s extraordinary news: Israeli hostages are coming home and hostilities are, for now, ceasing. It’s a diplomatic breakthrough of historic proportions—orchestrated by President Donald Trump—and predictably, the usual suspects on the Left are [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._gh7E7xN4p4NqGa0DPPq4Q)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MzIxMDIifQ/A9hselauIG3NtEBPnN2FrA)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-e6sUER-gpE_UmccS2CPkw)
# **[Vance Has Intense Interview During Appearance On ABC](http://trk.libertyledger.-e6sUER-gpE_UmccS2CPkw)**
---
In a moment that instantly lit up the political landscape, Vice President J.D. Vance did what few Republicans in high office have done so directly—he challenged the media’s priorities to their face, in real time, on national television.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-e6sUER-gpE_UmccS2CPkw)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/oQqqio0mTs0169WTMqHx-A)
# **[Congresswoman Comments On The Shutdown](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/oQqqio0mTs0169WTMqHx-A)**
---
If you want a case study in how fast politics can twist from principled stand to political self-immolation, look no further than Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/oQqqio0mTs0169WTMqHx-A)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._AFyMy2tFvw)
# **[Blinken Comments On Peace Deal](http://trk.libertyledger._AFyMy2tFvw)**
---
In a moment as symbolic as it was seismic, President Donald Trump stood in Jerusalem today just as 20 hostages—held by Hamas for over two years—were finally freed. It was a scene that echoed with historical weight and unmistakable irony.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._AFyMy2tFvw)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/oNc_M6CZVrBjyUxm8mY_Kg)
# **[Turning Point Launches Counter Programming](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/oNc_M6CZVrBjyUxm8mY_Kg)**

---
We are demanding that the city prioritize low-income homeowners and renters over large corporate developers. The H.O.M.E. Initiative is a great opportunity to address the housing crisis, but too little of the funding goes to the people who need it most.
Specifically, we call on the city to increase funding for home repairs, rental assistance, acquisition and preservation of affordable housing, and homelessness prevention.
[Rally with us!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117272070/575927110/1226745623?utm_source=EM_FL_OPA_20251014_rsvp_homerally_team_oc_act_xx_sbt2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ZWZkM2NmLTMxYTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-3qZfwU54jD0e8IVUUBFUkX-iR6shxm0DhKo1B2pY9Y=&emci=7373039a-23a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e4efd3cf-31a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1206669)

See you there,
Cara Tratner
One PA

**The debt is exploding. The dollar is shrinking. If you would like to pause emails from Team Warner until the federal government reopens,[_**please let us know by completing this form**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272207/575927561/222818858?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_251014_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY0NDg1My0zMmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4FIEESPjoj2OhupL32L5tWp41cJFimgWs3EV4wFCn8A=&emci=4527b716-14a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bef44853-32a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4568237)._ Derek,

We know you’re likely getting a lot of emails from candidates and causes right now. That’s why we’re asking:

[**_Is there anything we can say to convince you to pitch in your first $5 donation to Senator Warner’s reelection campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272209/575927564/1424898392?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_251014_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY0NDg1My0zMmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4FIEESPjoj2OhupL32L5tWp41cJFimgWs3EV4wFCn8A=)

What if we told you that there’s only 21 days until Virginia’s elections?

Or that if we flip the governor's office from red to blue and elect Abigail Spanberger – especially with record voter turnout – we can send a message to Trump and the GOP that folks want to put a check on their party’s extremism and chaos?

Would it make a difference if we told you not only are national Republicans spending big to defeat Virginia Democrats ahead of the elections in 21 days, but they're coming for this Senate seat, too? They could make our race one of their top targets next year, because they know Democrats have no path to a Senate majority without Virginia.

**Grassroots donors like you are key to helping Democrats fight back, hold the line, and win across Virginia.**

[**_So please, if you can, chip in $5 before our mid-October deadline so we can reach our $75,000 goal and keep VA blue >> clean_body: with only 21 days to go until Virginia’s elections | | | = We understand that many Americans are directly impacted by the government shutdown. If you would like to pause emails from Team Warner until the federal government reopens,. Derek, We know you’re likely getting a lot of emails from candidates and causes right now. That’s why we’re asking: = What if we told you that there’s only 21 days until Virginia’s elections? Or that if we flip the governor's office from red to blue and elect Abigail Spanberger – especially with record voter turnout – we can send a message to Trump and the GOP that folks want to put a check on their party’s extremism and chaos? Would it make a difference if we told you not only are national Republicans spending big to defeat Virginia Democrats ahead of the elections in 21 days, but they're coming for this Senate seat, too? They could make our race one of their top targets next year, because they know Democrats have no path to a Senate majority without Virginia. Grassroots donors like you are key to helping Democrats fight back, hold the line, and win across Virginia. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Whether or not you donate today, please know you’re an important part of this grassroots team. Thank you for staying engaged and involved at a critical moment for Virginia and our country. Thank you, Team Warner Before you go: Mark Warner is leading the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable – but that could make his race a top Republican target next year. We need to be prepared for his toughest and most expensive reelection campaign yet. =****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| _Hamden Mayoral Debate Weds_!

Featuring Green Party candidate Patricia Vene-Saavedra!
Hosted by the Hamden Regional Chamber of Commerce Govt. Affairs Committee.
_WEDS OCT 15:_
_Hand out Patricia's cards with GPCT Co-chair Keith Foster at 5:45!_
Doors open at 6pm
Debate starts at 6:30PM!

Thornton Wilder Auditorium
2901 Dixwell Ave
Hamden

body:
Did you catch Tina on Gavin Newsom’s podcast? |
#
---
Peter, Tina joined Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker on California Governor Gavin Newsom’s podcast this weekend. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272280/575927781/-780220320?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGM3NjE5OS0zMmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7PBcCVrz0laV4XW_daLOZubXMu8tVGZUbKqaJ5jWns0=) All three Governors are fighting back against Donald Trump’s plans to nationalize the federal guard and send American troops onto the streets of American cities. They talked about the authoritarian implications of these attacks, how they are standing up for their states, and why it’s so important to not back down. Tina summed it up when she said, **“Every state is under threat now. We don’t want active military in our streets. This is the United States of America. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: What I said on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
We’ve seen this happen before in other countries. |
---
Peter, in the United States of America, we have no kings. But Donald Trump believes he’s above the law. This Saturday, Americans across the country will exercise our right to free speech by peacefully protesting and speaking out against Donald Trump’s authoritarian tactics, but Trump and Republicans are already trying to change the narrative, calling those of us who plan to protest “terrorists.” **I’ll be joining Arizonans at the No Kings Rally in Phoenix this Saturday.** I recently spoke on _MSNBC_ about Trump’s ever-increasing efforts to silence his critics. Here’s what I said: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272400/575928249/-666600677?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTVhMDQ4NS0zM2E5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-sV5QCisHivPkMFQCOuFLm2EGCW8KXmALzEqZ4y2adU=) _“That is exactly what authoritarian regimes do. I know this firsthand, my parents fled an authoritarian regime to come to this country in the 70s [and] warned me growing up about all of the things that are happening here in the United States today. And I really hope that Americans — whether you’re a Democrat, Independent, or Republican — wake up to that, because now is the moment that we need to mobilize and organize and fight back.”_ **We’ve seen this happen before in other countries, Peter. My family more than most. The escalation of authoritarianism by the Trump administration should be alarming to all of us.** [It’s up to each and every one of us to continue standing up against this administration. I’m speaking out as loudly as I can, but I’ve been the subject of Republican attacks before, and this will only make me a bigger target. Will you chip in to help me fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272401/575928250/-666600677?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTVhMDQ4NS0zM2E5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-sV5QCisHivPkMFQCOuFLm2EGCW8KXmALzEqZ4y2adU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272402/575928251/-666600677?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTVhMDQ4NS0zM2E5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-sV5QCisHivPkMFQCOuFLm2EGCW8KXmALzEqZ4y2adU=)

clean_body: We’ve seen this happen before in other countries. | Peter, in the United States of America, we have no kings. But Donald Trump believes he’s above the law. This Saturday, Americans across the country will exercise our right to free speech by peacefully protesting and speaking out against Donald Trump’s authoritarian tactics, but Trump and Republicans are already trying to change the narrative, calling those of us who plan to protest “terrorists.” I’ll be joining Arizonans at the No Kings Rally in Phoenix this Saturday. I recently spoke on MSNBC about Trump’s ever-increasing efforts to silence his critics. Here’s what I said: = “That is exactly what authoritarian regimes do. I know this firsthand, my parents fled an authoritarian regime to come to this country in the 70s [and] warned me growing up about all of the things that are happening here in the United States today. And I really hope that Americans — whether you’re a Democrat, Independent, or Republican — wake up to that, because now is the moment that we need to mobilize and organize and fight back.” We’ve seen this happen before in other countries, Peter. My family more than most. The escalation of authoritarianism by the Trump administration should be alarming to all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

body:
TN Dems - let's get to work

| | | | | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fourtenn.org%2F/1/010f0199e433b7b1-75107de8-0aed-4151-bf66-7057fd3b6eef-000000/s3psiNTIEeVAdDHAJXhuREeug5o=233)
---
Hello Peter,
---
| | **Tennessee Politics October Updates**
It's one week on from the CD-07 primary and there's a lot going on for us here in Tennessee. Here's our October digest with ways you can get involved this fall:

**TN-07 Primary Winner!**
**Aftyn Behn** is now in the process of converting her team for the general special and is bringing on additional people who have run these types of races in the past. If you have questions about the campaign, or want to connect with Aftyn, you can email Josh Sulier at [josh@invictuscampaigns.com](mailto:josh@invictuscampaigns.com). **To contribute** : [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aftyn-behn-website/](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Faftyn-behn-website%2F/1/010f0199e433b7b1-75107de8-0aed-4151-bf66-7057fd3b6eef-000000/JAWAn-WjhFTsfcQDtfhT4-Bj5Lw=233)Aftyn is hitting the ground running with conversations with key people at a national level. I have seen articles about her on most of the news platforms. There will be in-person fundraisers for Aftyn. Keep an eye on her website.
[Poll Memo for TN-07 from Engage Y’all](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fdocument%2Fd%2F1ebYbirifCDce0oQVld1eUHMkaZDSmnRc%2Fedit%3Fusp=drive_link%26ouid=117680632998012248876%26rtpof=true%26sd=true/1/010f0199e433b7b1-75107de8-0aed-4151-bf66-7057fd3b6eef-000000/5A5vGXGvX3H7WxIkcRpzyCuN0-o=233)If you’re interested in diving into the polling and Engage Y’all’s plans for the Special Election in December, you can [RSVP at this calendar invite for a video call](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fcalendar.google.com%2Fcalendar%2Fu%2F0%2Fevent%3Faction=VIEW%26eid=MGhob2gwYnVmcGpsZmN1bm12bDFyN29iaGggcm9iZXJ0d2RveWxlMTFAbQ%26tok=MjEjZXdpbGV5QGVuZ2FnZXlhbGwuY29tYmExNGMyYTg5NTYyMWU0NzE3ZjQwZDUyY2I4MzU4YjUwZGFkMmUyNQ%26ctz=America%2FChicago%26hl=en%26es=1/1/010f0199e433b7b1-75107de8-0aed-4151-bf66-7057fd3b6eef-000000/0GPvXJ9oVpKrIArXsa1-xWzir3w=233) on 10/15 at 7pm CT. If you have questions, call or text Bob Doyle at 202-285-5492.

**Events**
10/15/2025As noted above Engage Y'all PAC are holding a **video call tomorrow at 7pm CT** to talk about their plans for the December Special Election and answer questions. If you're interested in attending [**RSVP HERE**](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fcalendar.google.com%2Fcalendar%2Fu%2F0%2Fevent%3Faction=VIEW%26eid=MGhob2gwYnVmcGpsZmN1bm12bDFyN29iaGggcm9iZXJ0d2RveWxlMTFAbQ%26tok=MjEjZXdpbGV5QGVuZ2FnZXlhbGwuY29tYmExNGMyYTg5NTYyMWU0NzE3ZjQwZDUyY2I4MzU4YjUwZGFkMmUyNQ%26ctz=America%2FChicago%26hl=en%26es=1/2/010f0199e433b7b1-75107de8-0aed-4151-bf66-7057fd3b6eef-000000/cTrQ34qxyCmnpRPt07TPs6O72Oo=233)**.**
10/20/2025**James Talarico, Senate candidate from Texas** and rising star in the Democratic Party, will be in town for a fundraiser at my house.[https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/Talarico-for-Texas-Nashville-October](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.numero.ai%2Fcontribute%2FTalarico-for-Texas-Nashville-October/1/010f0199e433b7b1-75107de8-0aed-4151-bf66-7057fd3b6eef-000000/YbOb_TazCtaJYgbxOw3TOEWoR3U=233)
**Special Note**
Justin Pearson has announced that he's going to primary Congressman Cohen. If you want to connect with Justin, email Cameron Rawlings at [cameron@votejustinj.com](mailto:cameron@votejustinj.com). Cameron has joined Justin's campaign as the Finance Director and he'll gladly arrange any conversations.To Contribute: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justinjpearsonct](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjustinjpearsonct/1/010f0199e433b7b1-75107de8-0aed-4151-bf66-7057fd3b6eef-000000/RhBauYNuVZ8wJM2ZKAH83HIraho=233)
Thank you for all of your support here in TN and across the country!!!
---
In solidarity,
Chris Murdock
Our Tennessee Future PAC Team

---
_Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight._

name: Team Pou
subject: Are you registered to vote? The deadline is TODAY
body:
Everything you need to make your voice heard

| |
---
Hi friend, The election this November is one of the most important we have faced. What happens in New Jersey next month will serve as a bellwether for the midterms. MAGA believes they’ve been making inroads in New Jersey, and this is our first opportunity to show up and fight back. **That’s why every single vote matters.** Voting in New Jersey is easy, but the deadline to register is TODAY. Make your plan to vote today by visiting the official New Jersey voting portal below. | [Portal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272821/575929685/-1371854476?ms=251014_tp_voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc2OGE1MDUtMzVhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0sQkbdFTDPeGHLg1MY42smrcDmr307I32bZxgjR1omQ=&emci=c61b0521-0fa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2768a505-35a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17143604)
---
Here in New Jersey, we have easy and secure voting. **[Make sure to check your voter registration here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272822/575929686/-1533514524?ms=251014_tp_voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc2OGE1MDUtMzVhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0sQkbdFTDPeGHLg1MY42smrcDmr307I32bZxgjR1omQ=&emci=c61b0521-0fa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2768a505-35a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17143604)**
If you’re already registered, early voting opens on Saturday, October 25th, and will remain open until Sunday, November 2nd.
Election Day is Tuesday, November 4th.
**[You can find information about voter registration, mail-in ballots, early voting, and polling locations below:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272823/575929687/-1371854476?ms=251014_tp_voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc2OGE1MDUtMzVhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0sQkbdFTDPeGHLg1MY42smrcDmr307I32bZxgjR1omQ=&emci=c61b0521-0fa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2768a505-35a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17143604)**
[Learn More](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117272824/575929688/-1371854476?ms=251014_tp_voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc2OGE1MDUtMzVhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0sQkbdFTDPeGHLg1MY42smrcDmr307I32bZxgjR1omQ=&emci=c61b0521-0fa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2768a505-35a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17143604)
---
When more people vote, our democracy grows stronger. So share this link with your friends, your family, and your neighbors. Let’s make sure every voice in New Jersey is heard loud and clear.
In solidarity,
Team Pou
| | |
---|---|---

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. clean_body: Everything you need to make your voice heard | | Hi friend, The election this November is one of the most important we have faced. What happens in New Jersey next month will serve as a bellwether for the midterms. MAGA believes they’ve been making inroads in New Jersey, and this is our first opportunity to show up and fight back. That’s why every single vote matters. Voting in New Jersey is easy, but the deadline to register is TODAY. Make your plan to vote today by visiting the official New Jersey voting portal below. | Here in New Jersey, we have easy and secure voting. If you’re already registered, early voting opens on Saturday, October 25th, and will remain open until Sunday, November 2nd. Election Day is Tuesday, November 4th. When more people vote, our democracy grows stronger. So share this link with your friends, your family, and your neighbors. Let’s make sure every voice in New Jersey is heard loud and clear. In solidarity, Team Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . ## ICYMI: Winsome Earle-Sears- The next governor of Virginia...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e95c7d5d-113a-4c63-ae9d-590be2d94b71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Tonight at 6pm ET the President's pollster Jim McLaughlin - join us for the premiere
Tune in for my conversation with top pollster Jim McLaughlin as we break down the latest on Trump's approval, the New York City Mayor's race, New Jersey Governor's race, the Virginia race ands how the government shutdown is playing! Click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/69eedce2-48ce-4177-8308-100b0ad12164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us at 6pm.

## Top tweets...
[@seanspicer](https://substack.com/redirect/6e0e27ac-b9f0-4264-9b48-2a977b93dbb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): President Trump was on the go for almost 40 hours straight - making historic peace deals -- this should silence the critics for a couple hours
[@seanspicer](https://substack.com/redirect/49caadba-e341-489b-b099-cfd710cd7285?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Democrats won't open the government because they need a talking point for their October 18th rally. Sad!
## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/69eedce2-48ce-4177-8308-100b0ad12164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/69eedce2-48ce-4177-8308-100b0ad12164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Coming up today I'm talking with the president's pollster Jim McLaughlin. Tomorrow, I'm joined by Senator Eric Schmitt and Glenn Beck. Thursday we've got a great panel featuring Amber Duke, Jessica Anderson, and Ashley Hayek. Finally, finishing out the week we've got special guest Steve Bannon on Friday. You won't want to miss it!

Head over to my new page, where you can find all the show discounts and codes!
[Sponsors and more...](https://substack.com/redirect/05f7ea7a-5f6b-453e-ae65-40c140dc4afa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Trump gets the job done...
He got it done.
After years of turmoil, an Israel-Hamas peace deal has finally been reached. . . including the release of hostages.
It's a huge accomplishment--talk about the art of the deal.
And Trump did it as only he could.
Of course the left still doesn't want to give him credit (though Time Magazine at least tipped their hat to him in their latest issue).
Some are literally [calling for a ceasefire](https://substack.com/redirect/0dd99316-1772-49af-b107-cea083278ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "not arranged by Trump".
Even the Nobel Peace Prize committee refuses to acknowledge how incredible this is.
Let's be honest, if anything deserves the Nobel Peace Prize, it's orchestrating this peace deal.
But the left being bitter doesn't change what a huge accomplishment this is.
Let's break it down just what makes it so impressive. ...
