name: David Hogg
subject: Janet Mills’ decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re supporting Graham Platner for Senate. Join us.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251014-1&t=1&akid=2742%2E587540%2E3rECEr)
Hey Peter, we’ve got some pretty big news today:
**Leaders We Deserve is endorsing Graham Platner for U.S. Senate in Maine.**
Graham Platner is:
* A Marine and U.S. Army veteran
* An oyster farmer
* Chair of the Sullivan Planning Board

Now he’s running to defeat Republican Susan Collins and win back this seat for working Mainers, and he’s already making waves with his bold, progressive policy vision.
Graham is attracting standing room only crowds in multiple cities, generating national headlines, earning endorsements from progressive leaders and unions, and receiving millions in campaign contributions from folks across the country.
But surprise, surprise: The Democratic establishment is trying to thwart him by backing Governor Janet Mills, who just announced her Senate campaign today.
**[Graham needs our support NOW. Split a $5 contribution to show the Democratic establishment that we’re with Graham — _not_ the status quo.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251014_1_platner.GLgXNI&refcode=em20251014-2742&amount=5&t=3&akid=2742%2E587540%2E3rECEr)**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251014_1_platner.GLgXNI&refcode=em20251014-2742&amount=5&t=4&akid=2742%2E587540%2E3rECEr)
Leaders We Deserve exists because we need generational change. And that’s on clear display in this race. Janet Mills is a 77-year-old who has held multiple offices in Maine. If elected she would be the oldest first-term Senator in US history and would serve alongside Maine’s Senior Senator, Angus King, who is 81 years old. This isn’t meant as an attack on her. _It’s just the way it is._ And with how much is on the line in this fight, we desperately need a new bench of bold leaders.
Graham Platner isn’t in this race just to run against Republican Susan Collins — **he’s running against the billionaire class that owns the political establishment.**
He’s ready to ban billionaires from buying elections and dismantle the “billionaire economy” in favor of one that works for working families and small businesses.
We know Graham can beat Susan Collins and her billionaire backers — but first he needs our support in the Democratic primary. That’s right: _Graham has to beat the status quo _twice_ in this election._ And we’re 100% ready to help him do just that.
**[Peter, can we count on you to split $5 between Graham Platner and Leaders We Deserve right now? We can win this fight if we stand together.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251014_1_platner.GLgXNI&refcode=em20251014-2742&amount=5&t=5&akid=2742%2E587540%2E3rECEr)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251014_1_platner.GLgXNI&amount=5&refcode=em20251014-2742&t=24&akid=2742%2E587540%2E3rECEr)**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251014-1&t=25&refcode2=2742_587540_3rECEr&akid=2742%2E587540%2E3rECEr)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2742%2E587540%2E3rECEr)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)

Leaders We Deserve exists because we need generational change. And that’s on clear display in this race. Janet Mills is a 77-year-old who has held multiple offices in Maine. If elected she would be the oldest first-term Senator in US history and would serve alongside Maine’s Senior Senator, Angus King, who is 81 years old. This isn’t meant as an attack on her. It’s just the way it is. And with how much is on the line in this fight, we desperately need a new bench of bold leaders. Graham Platner isn’t in this race just to run against Republican Susan Collins — he’s running against the billionaire class that owns the political establishment. He’s ready to ban billionaires from buying elections and dismantle the “billionaire economy” in favor of one that works for working families and small businesses. We know Graham can beat Susan Collins and her billionaire backers — but first he needs our support in the Democratic primary. That’s right: Graham has to beat the status quo twice in this election. And we’re 100% ready to help him do just that. Thank you for your support, David Hogg

_My wife Lauren is running for office as a Republican in battleground Georgia, and if you donated to her campaign recently, I can’t THANK YOU enough._ But there’s a side of Lauren she’d never brag about...As her husband, I think you deserve to hear it. **Can I get just two minutes of your time, Peter?** It started way back in high school when Lauren and I first met. We fell in love, and at just 17, she got pregnant with our first child. We were young. We were scared. And we were surrounded by voices telling us we would have no future if we kept the baby.**_People told Lauren she was throwing her life away. That abortion was her only way out._** Long story short, we heard _every single lie_ the Democrats push on young women — that motherhood is a mistake, that life begins only when it’s convenient, and that faith should take a back seat to fear._**But Lauren stood firm. She chose LIFE. She chose OUR SON. She chose to FIGHT.**_ I’d never admired her more.Because she didn’t just survive — _she thrived_. She finished high school, graduated from Georgia State University with a Bachelor’s in English, and went on to become the **YOUNGEST FEMALE MEMBER** of the Georgia House.

clean_body: | | | Peter, My wife Lauren is running for office as a Republican in battleground Georgia, and if you donated to her campaign recently, I can’t THANK YOU enough. But there’s a side of Lauren she’d never brag about...As her husband, I think you deserve to hear it. Can I get just two minutes of your time, Peter? It started way back in high school when Lauren and I first met. We fell in love, and at just 17, she got pregnant with our first child. We were young. We were scared. And we were surrounded by voices telling us we would have no future if we kept the baby.People told Lauren she was throwing her life away. That abortion was her only way out. Long story short, we heard every single lie the Democrats push on young women — that motherhood is a mistake, that life begins only when it’s convenient, and that faith should take a back seat to fear.But Lauren stood firm. She chose LIFE. She chose OUR SON. She chose to FIGHT. I’d never admired her more.Because she didn’t just survive — she thrived. She finished high school, graduated from Georgia State University with a Bachelor’s in English, and went on to become the YOUNGEST FEMALE MEMBER of the Georgia House. And now, she’s running against a well-funded Democrat backed by the political establishment in Atlanta. And she’s not doing it for power, but to PROTECT the values she lives every single day. I’ll be the first to tell you, the Left can’t stand Lauren. They’re ATTACKING her for being a bold, unapologetic, America-First mom who puts families and faith above everything else. They HATE that she’s living proof that conservative, pro-life women are strong, capable, and ready to lead. The truth is, they’re trying to shut Lauren down because she’s fighting for your God-given rights – the same way she fought for the God-given right for our son to live. They haven’t succeeded yet — but they’re getting close. That’s why Lauren needs we can give her. Because if we don’t draw the line right now, we risk losing everything we’ve fought so hard to preserve. Lauren’s ready to fight. I’ve seen it in her since day one.The only question is... For faith, family, and freedom,Zak Daniel | | Paid for by Daniel for Georgia. PO Box 5, Forsyth, GA, 31029 |

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117273975/575933575/-1180208493?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU1MzRiNjAtMzhhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bMUtL3bbwEcYdKTAxHWdh0ySdchA5-_E_RfrWKHkggM=) I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I could _never_ live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover. Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger _every single day_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it. **So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins.[MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority. I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years._
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.

name: T-minus 3 weeks
subject: Epic showdown underway in the cradle of American democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Pennsylvania is the battlefield on which MAGA is launching a sneak attack on American democracy. We have to fight to win this race on Tuesday, Nov. 4.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qzaPPJHiU0iOVLmJO7V9Nptgq2IBWUdVP7w4YJReRXlAlOlElMfKtqrbmWmuJhhW_-iV3mF6ITOY7agBApuo5DcYo92f5kafxI3YutmSqkyi2OlbgrIr2-6ogRTxNSABrPvtRqe4zkEpV_rV9bCK8dLrzv9bD37a5bA1d1MxPnFCf6ccDErtp3UrbNmNT007P2QFRhO4-BsbYqWCPnChMU2VZrzf3YfppHJpC_Y30Ck=&c=Ig6kfjKMo2SuQhmme3gyrbYqFoMdLNwydBkfR2UI-b_UowgbzfY_gQ==&ch=OPLo7dHXQpq6rpChjhnXET7pi5W5lR6JcRJiJmeGUEQ-rMHp2pCWew==)
---
|
Peter,
Symbols are powerful forces that can change the course of history--for better or for worse.
And the symbolism behind this race for control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court will take your breath away: Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy as we know it. It's where the Declaration of Independence was drafted and signed in 1776, and where the United States Constitution was drafted in 1789.
That's why MAGA is spending millions of dollars, and fighting tooth and nail to win like it is a presidential election. If they knock out three Democratic seats on the highest court in Pennsylvania all in one election, it would be a right-wing rallying cry heard around the country.
The PA Supreme Court has stood firmly against MAGA's most terrifying desires: preventing the GOP from instituting a total abortion ban, stopping them from throwing out hundreds of thousands of valid votes in key elections, and thwarting Republican attempts to gerrymander PA's congressional map.
The 5-2 Democratic majority on the Court has protected all of us from the outsized national impact that would follow MAGA getting what they want in PA. That's why what happens here in just three more weeks will have massive consequences for everyone across America.
Now, all of that is at stake -- and with the 2026 Midterm (and the 2028 presidential election) just around the corner, the timing could not be worse.
But if we win, MAGA would suffer a devastating blow. Together, we can show that democracy is alive and well--and we won't give up without a fight.
[We have three weeks left to do all that we can to win this fight. And we need your help right now. Can you rush a contribution of any amount to help win this battle for the soul of America?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qzaPPJHiU0iOVLmJO7V9Nptgq2IBWUdVP7w4YJReRXlAlOlElMfKtqrbmWmuJhhW_-iV3mF6ITOY7agBApuo5DcYo92f5kafxI3YutmSqkyi2OlbgrIr2-6ogRTxNSABrPvtRqe4zkEpV_rV9bCK8dLrzv9bD37a5bA1d1MxPnFCf6ccDErtp3UrbNmNT007P2QFRhO4-BsbYqWCPnChMQ_PD8qZjxhrgn2GJG4qE4E=&c=Ig6kfjKMo2SuQhmme3gyrbYqFoMdLNwydBkfR2UI-b_UowgbzfY_gQ==&ch=OPLo7dHXQpq6rpChjhnXET7pi5W5lR6JcRJiJmeGUEQ-rMHp2pCWew==)

body:
Pennsylvania is the battlefield on which MAGA is launching a sneak attack on American democracy. We have to fight to win this race on Tuesday, Nov. 4.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gNwS9nCZ2SUATeOrp2VRwsUyt5YTyPToX_TyMrmo1NKdilJFWBcnd2RHRvEKe4F4p0NJ25Y0FvveqkB8ZOxWudcbyyUP5DiX7HjVgpxivQxRHrGEK2sW4aVUAnxuAfHKBr9S1qbZ5hFNngxeyL-sI3EGB8RFisl0Y9TG4S_v6ffhSIKpGGkQQQqQKLXBoQhkWiehJLhNhzhXPT0bl6I81DZzIng_4XAxDk7isFL__os=&c=1pdn16lTeTFWLp0TqpREFnLO1K7jeCuuOAS3HhvUX_TuYgj5zdpwRA==&ch=UnlfzoMaAaAiPCo9Kf-K1fKlKqoJk0i8-6RezIj4DFKSH4ZIDtjCzA==)
---
|
Peter,
Symbols are powerful forces that can change the course of history--for better or for worse.
And the symbolism behind this race for control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court will take your breath away: Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy as we know it. It's where the Declaration of Independence was drafted and signed in 1776, and where the United States Constitution was drafted in 1789.
That's why MAGA is spending millions of dollars, and fighting tooth and nail to win like it is a presidential election. If they knock out three Democratic seats on the highest court in Pennsylvania all in one election, it would be a right-wing rallying cry heard around the country.
The PA Supreme Court has stood firmly against MAGA's most terrifying desires: preventing the GOP from instituting a total abortion ban, stopping them from throwing out hundreds of thousands of valid votes in key elections, and thwarting Republican attempts to gerrymander PA's congressional map.
The 5-2 Democratic majority on the Court has protected all of us from the outsized national impact that would follow MAGA getting what they want in PA. That's why what happens here in just three more weeks will have massive consequences for everyone across America.
Now, all of that is at stake -- and with the 2026 Midterm (and the 2028 presidential election) just around the corner, the timing could not be worse.
But if we win, MAGA would suffer a devastating blow. Together, we can show that democracy is alive and well--and we won't give up without a fight.
[We have three weeks left to do all that we can to win this fight. And we need your help right now. Can you rush a contribution of any amount to help win this battle for the soul of America?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gNwS9nCZ2SUATeOrp2VRwsUyt5YTyPToX_TyMrmo1NKdilJFWBcnd2RHRvEKe4F4bSwRYO1oMl8VDFNi-SRslwcHt-x6bTLPiJTGYUhi4OT1FtxJ1Tu_ei6FPijhlo5e4dzoka0EmGdy7JgJbkYDLaKzH2s9PtBh9NVM603YcPbe1mkgTx30V_q7uR9Vup-OeqNvTMIc_86sXJVTvMbD2eba0SStd0yIjRE3Qx72kICwyeNLOcFCsQ==&c=1pdn16lTeTFWLp0TqpREFnLO1K7jeCuuOAS3HhvUX_TuYgj5zdpwRA==&ch=UnlfzoMaAaAiPCo9Kf-K1fKlKqoJk0i8-6RezIj4DFKSH4ZIDtjCzA==)

subject: a moment of gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
This district is one of the most competitive in the country, and your commitment ensures we can continue to defend it, respond to attacks, and fight for accountability.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117274532/575935459/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-10-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDM1YTNjMy0zOWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=52naSJdNGI28TIun2YWJ7-6Iol7GTczFeZXsCuK-GJY=)

| Peter,

I want to take a moment to say thank you. Thanks to your support, we met our FEC fundraising goal last month. Every contribution made a real difference in keeping our campaign strong and competitive.

I know things are especially difficult right now. With the government shutdown affecting so many Americans, it’s easy to feel frustrated and powerless. I want you to know that I’m working every day to protect Americans from Republican cruelty and dysfunction.

Your support makes that work possible.

This district is one of the most competitive in the country, and your commitment ensures we can continue to defend it, respond to attacks, and fight for accountability.

Thank you for standing with me. I’m proud to represent this district, and I’m grateful to have your support as we continue this fight.

—Laura
---

Friend, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkTGP2zwMhn-NvDmQKNuyBw-HLzC-DndrR4Gh6ESoJbmS7KL_vshdhu7dCPIlX_Lh93f7jn7z8f6BgWc6vc3FEm98y1gZevmbMZe0YuDsyYKEvlWyVZ3dcyo7U7Ux4UkWGjeTGzQ0PCszyM5oKbvmMY8DjNgz8OAGtU5qJB5XniYz4HRDosbPz6lKqg6k6rW8GGlgWKeeSBszOik6eewOK5cLpVg4n1j9yT7G9IxSvFAKzTY_at2L0G8CFgFLYToyXzCyS_WpELB8XYGxPblyxlha4lg5C1hIoaJRcztplG1n5NiOktZWdyD5prlXYIReSjoysaXkWOjrf98-DIzaCBiOGmxg548g9JUD-u2V_OoQ-vrA7LD8sEg_XyXCsKO_R6Gvb6_N7P8ppvzJ-SWqnMNfVk2e3f7Lb5svgxGdvD-tPgHUf3vfOcOfAAAA__-1CawG)

**We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale.**

[**To mark the occasion, I want to send you a full-size (3x5ft) American flag when you make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to support the American Veterans Center 's historic campaign: American Honor 2025.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkTGP2zwMhn-NvDmQKNuyBw-HLzC-DndrR4Gh6ESoJbmS7KL_vshdhu7dCPIlX_Lh93f7jn7z8f6BgWc6vc3FEm98y1gZevmbMZe0YuDsyYKEvlWyVZ3dcyo7U7Ux4UkWGjeTGzQ0PCszyM5oKbvmMY8DjNgz8OAGtU5qJB5XniYz4HRDosbPz6lKqg6k6rW8GGlgWKeeSBszOik6eewOK5cLpVg4n1j9yT7G9IxSvFAKzTY_at2L0G8CFgFLYToyXzCyS_WpELB8XYGxPblyxlha4lg5C1hIoaJRcztplG1n5NiOktZWdyD5prlXYIReSjoysaXkWOjrf98-DIzaCBiOGmxg548g9JUD-u2V_OoQ-vrA7LD8sEg_XyXCsKO_R6Gvb6_N7P8ppvzJ-SWqnMNfVk2e3f7Lb5svgxGdvD-tPgHUf3vfOcOfAAAA__-1CawG)
---
[ **Claim Your FREE Flag Today**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkTGP2zwMhn-NvDmQKNuyBw-HLzC-DndrR4Gh6ESoJbmS7KL_vshdhu7dCPIlX_Lh93f7jn7z8f6BgWc6vc3FEm98y1gZevmbMZe0YuDsyYKEvlWyVZ3dcyo7U7Ux4UkWGjeTGzQ0PCszyM5oKbvmMY8DjNgz8OAGtU5qJB5XniYz4HRDosbPz6lKqg6k6rW8GGlgWKeeSBszOik6eewOK5cLpVg4n1j9yT7G9IxSvFAKzTY_at2L0G8CFgFLYToyXzCyS_WpELB8XYGxPblyxlha4lg5C1hIoaJRcztplG1n5NiOktZWdyD5prlXYIReSjoysaXkWOjrf98-DIzaCBiOGmxg548g9JUD-u2V_OoQ-vrA7LD8sEg_XyXCsKO_R6Gvb6_N7P8ppvzJ-SWqnMNfVk2e3f7Lb5svgxGdvD-tPgHUf3vfOcOfAAAA__-1CawG)
---
This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, %FIRST% -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Friend make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time -- and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkTGP2zwMhn-NvDmQKNuyBw-HLzC-DndrR4Gh6ESoJbmS7KL_vshdhu7dCPIlX_Lh93f7jn7z8f6BgWc6vc3FEm98y1gZevmbMZe0YuDsyYKEvlWyVZ3dcyo7U7Ux4UkWGjeTGzQ0PCszyM5oKbvmMY8DjNgz8OAGtU5qJB5XniYz4HRDosbPz6lKqg6k6rW8GGlgWKeeSBszOik6eewOK5cLpVg4n1j9yT7G9IxSvFAKzTY_at2L0G8CFgFLYToyXzCyS_WpELB8XYGxPblyxlha4lg5C1hIoaJRcztplG1n5NiOktZWdyD5prlXYIReSjoysaXkWOjrf98-DIzaCBiOGmxg548g9JUD-u2V_OoQ-vrA7LD8sEg_XyXCsKO_R6Gvb6_N7P8ppvzJ-SWqnMNfVk2e3f7Lb5svgxGdvD-tPgHUf3vfOcOfAAAA__-1CawG)
---
[ **Claim Your Free Flag Today**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkTGP2zwMhn-NvDmQKNuyBw-HLzC-DndrR4Gh6ESoJbmS7KL_vshdhu7dCPIlX_Lh93f7jn7z8f6BgWc6vc3FEm98y1gZevmbMZe0YuDsyYKEvlWyVZ3dcyo7U7Ux4UkWGjeTGzQ0PCszyM5oKbvmMY8DjNgz8OAGtU5qJB5XniYz4HRDosbPz6lKqg6k6rW8GGlgWKeeSBszOik6eewOK5cLpVg4n1j9yT7G9IxSvFAKzTY_at2L0G8CFgFLYToyXzCyS_WpELB8XYGxPblyxlha4lg5C1hIoaJRcztplG1n5NiOktZWdyD5prlXYIReSjoysaXkWOjrf98-DIzaCBiOGmxg548g9JUD-u2V_OoQ-vrA7LD8sEg_XyXCsKO_R6Gvb6_N7P8ppvzJ-SWqnMNfVk2e3f7Lb5svgxGdvD-tPgHUf3vfOcOfAAAA__-1CawG)
---
Friend throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall.

**I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom.**

Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future.
---
Sincerely,

Tim Holbert
President
American Veterans Center

clean_body: Each year, we host the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C., bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. | | | Friend, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce " American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes," a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations. But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it. This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year. We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale. This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, %FIRST% -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free. Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars. And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you. To some, it may look like just a flag. But to those who served, it 's a promise kept. It flew over the beaches of Normandy. It sailed with the Pacific fleet. It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home. This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend. Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last. Friend throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall. I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom. Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future. Sincerely, Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | -

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: Trump orders sell-off of Alaskan lands during shutdown — this is WILD corruption:
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMwNTg1NDQS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMyMDc5Nzc3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
DEVELOPING... despite the ongoing government shutdown, Trump has quietly deemed the
permitting process for polluters “essential” — and just ordered the approval of
over 200 miles of roadway opening Alaska’s wilderness to destructive mining. The proposed Ambler Road Project is opposed by Alaska Native communities and
would greenlight the destruction of hundreds of miles of wilderness. It
threatens permanent devastation for Alaskan ecosystems and wildlife, all to
benefit foreign mining interests. The environmental implications are horrible. And, this speculative project would
compete against existing mines that cannot run economically — threatening to
despoil this unique wilderness and then go belly up, leaving taxpayers and local
Alaskans with the cleanup costs and toxic legacy. We can’t let Trump speculate with our public lands just because he got cozy with
their executives. The environmental movement is mobilizing to stop this project,but we need YOUR help. Right now, there’s an incredible opportunity to power the
resistance to Trump’s dirty agenda — a group of donors will TRIPLE MATCH all
gifts up to $50,000 until October 31. The best thing you can do right now to fight for the environment is to renew your LCV membership. Right now, $5 is all it takes to renew >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ The proposed Ambler Road Project would cross more than 3,000 streams and riversover 200 miles in a part of Alaska that is important for subsistence and
wildlife, and it would threaten water sources and fisheries with toxic
contamination. This is just the latest example of Trump continuing to sell off our public lands
to corporationsin order to serve the interests of his billionaire buddies in the fossil fuel,
logging, and mining industries. It’s corruption, plain and simple: while government services and federal lands
remain closed to ordinary Americans, the White House remains open for business
to serve Trump’s corporate cronies. Peter, Trump may have these billionaires in his back pocket, but we
have something even more powerful in our corner: we have YOU and a community of
people who care about our environment. Because this fight is so important, a
group of donors will TRIPLE your impact when you renew your LCV membership
before October 31. Please don’t wait: renew your membership for just $5 to TRIPLE your impact >> https://links.messages.lcv. Thanks for everything you do for the environment, Peter. Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13058544&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMyMDc5Nzc3NwS2&spReportId=MjMyMDc5Nzc3NwS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13058544&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMyMDc5Nzc3NwS2&spReportId=MjMyMDc5Nzc3NwS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Charlie Kirk Continues to Change the World
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Today, we remember Charlie Kirk — a life that continues to inspire change.

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
---
| | Friend, Today, we pause to reflect on the life and legacy of a man who inspired millions – Charlie Kirk. No one understood – or understood the heart of America’s youth – better than Charlie Kirk. He gave his voice and his energy to empowering the next generation, and his words continue to echo in classrooms, churches, and communities across the nation.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/9-KdCV_v6qCe/YVVkZEo5NEFPem9XOENKNWRTNm1VMklIUDZPcVZNYlpxTEs1MDBFZlU1NHp4YklIczhEeVZkeElqNk5qU1RlVVBwK3ltUmkzZmhueG10VkFRcU9NTVg1dTRzQWd2cVBTc0M1OVB4YXNvQ3M9S0/)
---
| | Charlie continues to change the world, not only through the movement he helped build but also through the example he set of conviction, compassion, and courage. The best way to honor Charlie’s legacy is to live as he did: with strength in our faith, confidence in our values, and a commitment to lifting up others. May Charlie’s memory be a blessing, and may his example continue to guide Oregon and the nation. \- Oregon Republican Party
---
---

---

name: JB Pritzker
subject: This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Let me cut to the chase.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251014_1_pritzker.z0sqZX&refcode=em20251014-1&t=1&akid=2884%2E582294%2E6kiHVR)
JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
_We can’t let that happen._
Chris Pappas is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:
**[If you can, please make a $5 donation right now to help Chris Pappas win in New Hampshire and put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251014_1_pritzker.z0sqZX&refcode=em20251014-1&t=2&akid=2884%2E582294%2E6kiHVR)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251014_1_pritzker.PNt-4N&amount=5&refcode=em20251014-1&t=21&akid=2884%2E582294%2E6kiHVR)**
Thank you for standing up,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251014-1&t=22&refcode2=2884_582294_6kiHVR&akid=2884%2E582294%2E6kiHVR)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2884%2E582294%2E6kiHVR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=24&akid=2884%2E582294%2E6kiHVR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2884%2E582294%2E6kiHVR)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

| **Hello from Jackson County Oregon!**
**Please see the information from the Secretary of State.****If you have friends or family in Oregon, that have not yet registered to vote, please let them know that today is the last day to register and be able to vote in the November 4th election.**
---
---
|
# Register by October 14th to Receive a Ballot for the November 4th Special Election
SALEM, OR — The deadline to register to vote for the upcoming November 4, 2025, Special Election is **Tuesday, October 14, 2025.** “Every election counts, especially right now,” said **Secretary of State Tobias Read**. “This is how we hold government accountable to the people. These special elections might not always grab headlines, but they shape the things that touch your life every day — your schools, your water, your safety. The best thing any of us can do for Oregon, and for our democracy, is to show up and vote — every single time. Our elections are secure, accurate, and fair. Let’s prove that participation still matters.”More than 1 million eligible Oregon voters have the opportunity to weigh in on issues such as:
* Bonds to improve the safety and security of buildings and classrooms in the Lake Oswego and West Linn-Wilsonville School Districts.
* An increase to the transient lodging tax in the City of Medford.
* Dozens of levies that would affect your local taxes and provide funding for public safety, parks, libraries, and community centers.

Not every county is holding a special election. **You will only be mailed a ballot if you’re eligible to vote for a contest on the ballot**.The following counties have a special election this November:

Oregonians may also choose to register by completing a voter registration form and returning it to a county elections office.In Oregon, you must be a U.S. citizen, a resident of the state, and at least 16 years old to register to vote. Oregonians must be 18 years old by Election Day to cast a ballot.Already registered? You can use the [My Vote](https://app.dvcomms.net/api/Communication/Click?prm=MbIJ7QHiWuivoqqogirwlpBkeUQ4ZWfIn0GDIdO_iG3HxHcEFpM6GDPJGjKrEqhgifh5i5UxI2Za-zMEO27AYm3V41qc1w3wtnRgVul0o0HylQmWm_uffQ97euDfW3KOG4n5CRJUhJCFUFp8ZL0fViiSwUHGHKmR2419rmItWPdvJ_cTsGKVQZNz59CAfsLiAOhk2GMlX2e_TbxgLLnStJ21q1LxuR8a7LCX_aFe1K41&target=e338b21f-f14b-4c20-a735-0e2bddceaf13 "https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com%2F%3Furl=https%253A%252F%252Flinks-1.govdelivery.com%252FCL0%252Fhttps%253A%25252F%25252Fsos.oregon.gov%25252Fvoting%25252Fpages%25252Fmyvote.aspx%25253Flang%253Den%252F1%252F0100019682473841-fecce48d-664f-4c74-a7f9-2f2543ce06c1-000000%252Fcr1B1TS4uolTYvfaPYWB6Id7eVSKSqcMi6SOAun-pe8%253D403%26data=05%257C02%257Cemma.snodgrass%2540sos.oregon.gov%257Cc152b0335d9542e2152608dd8736f68f%257Caa3f6932fa7c47b4a0cea598cad161cf%257C0%257C0%257C638815392315962015%257CUnknown%257CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%253D%253D%257C0%257C%257C%257C%26sdata=5Hmco9%252B9mHxkI5iIgwO9otPwGY9mnGyKqz1%252F8YUsLJg%253D%26reserved=0/1/01000199e36d38af-e2a7fe12-c15d-4ab2-8176-ebd185b8f862-000000/PnNhuH_RazVg4r8OJ4tZwJoaBdxC0Az535IO6kvFhFg=427") tool to view your voter registration information and make any necessary updates, including if you recently moved.County Clerks will begin mailing ballots on October 15. Voters should fill out their ballots and return them by 8 p.m. on November 4, 2025.**Due to recent changes at the United States Postal Service, it is recommended that voters who want to mail in their ballots do so no later than October 30, 2025.** After that, voters should either take their ballot to a local USPS office and request a manual postmark no later than November 4th or return their ballot to a secure drop box no later than 8 p.m. on November 4th. Find those drop boxes at [OregonVotes.gov](https://app.dvcomms.net/api/Communication/Click?prm=MbIJ7QHiWuivoqqogirwlpBkeUQ4ZWfIn0GDIdO_iG3HxHcEFpM6GDPJGjKrEqhgifh5i5UxI2Za-zMEO27AYm3V41qc1w3wtnRgVul0o0HylQmWm_uffQ97euDfW3KOG4n5CRJUhJCFUFp8ZL0fViiSwUHGHKmR2419rmItWPdvJ_cTsGKVQZNz59CAfsLiAOhk2GMlX2e_TbxgLLnStJ21q1LxuR8a7LCX_aFe1K41&target=e5ed518d-e1ef-4f5d-930f-ac96a97f452c "https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsos.oregon.gov%2Fvoting%2FPages%2Fdrop-box-locator.aspx/1/01000199e36d38af-e2a7fe12-c15d-4ab2-8176-ebd185b8f862-000000/BPzyrW6tlWl5gnUXlhm29OH8V5Jal1MxtoUJcaxC3Lw=427").For more information, visit our website: [OregonVotes.gov](https://app.dvcomms.net/api/Communication/Click?prm=MbIJ7QHiWuivoqqogirwlpBkeUQ4ZWfIn0GDIdO_iG3HxHcEFpM6GDPJGjKrEqhgifh5i5UxI2Za-zMEO27AYm3V41qc1w3wtnRgVul0o0HylQmWm_uffQ97euDfW3KOG4n5CRJUhJCFUFp8ZL0fViiSwUHGHKmR2419rmItWPdvJ_cTsGKVQZNz59CAfsLiAOhk2GMlX2e_TbxgLLnStJ21q1LxuR8a7LCX_aFe1K41&target=775844d3-ba1f-4941-800e-866fb250183f "https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com%2F%3Furl=https%253A%252F%252Flinks-1.govdelivery.com%252FCL0%252Fhttps%253A%25252F%25252Fsos.oregon.gov%25252Fvoting-elections%25252FPages%25252Fdefault.aspx%252F1%252F0100019682473841-fecce48d-664f-4c74-a7f9-2f2543ce06c1-000000%252FGIOqL6eu9YxX3cfvYGR03ZgQuPMrb0E77O9_Ws8VAWM%253D403%26data=05%257C02%257Cemma.snodgrass%2540sos.oregon.gov%257Cc152b0335d9542e2152608dd8736f68f%257Caa3f6932fa7c47b4a0cea598cad161cf%257C0%257C0%257C638815392315977538%257CUnknown%257CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%253D%253D%257C0%257C%257C%257C%26sdata=fYATenYK107EBh3%252BdJQRl6HUQv0XghIQl7W1X5uJWAg%253D%26reserved=0/1/01000199e36d38af-e2a7fe12-c15d-4ab2-8176-ebd185b8f862-000000/mWvsLJwTYw4PFm6692HtIr36ohDZq9Uk5QbbopBzImk=427").

clean_body: | | | | Hello from Jackson County Oregon! Please see the information from the Secretary of State.If you have friends or family in Oregon, that have not yet registered to vote, please let them know that today is the last day to register and be able to vote in the November 4th election. | Register by October 14th to Receive a Ballot for the November 4th Special Election SALEM, OR — The deadline to register to vote for the upcoming November 4, 2025, Special Election is Tuesday, October 14, 2025. “Every election counts, especially right now,” said Secretary of State Tobias Read. “This is how we hold government accountable to the people. These special elections might not always grab headlines, but they shape the things that touch your life every day — your schools, your water, your safety. The best thing any of us can do for Oregon, and for our democracy, is to show up and vote — every single time. Our elections are secure, accurate, and fair. Let’s prove that participation still matters.”More than 1 million eligible Oregon voters have the opportunity to weigh in on issues such as: Bonds to improve the safety and security of buildings and classrooms in the Lake Oswego and West Linn-Wilsonville School Districts. An increase to the transient lodging tax in the City of Medford. Dozens of levies that would affect your local taxes and provide funding for public safety, parks, libraries, and community centers. Not every county is holding a special election. You will only be mailed a ballot if you’re eligible to vote for a contest on the ballot.The following counties have a special election this November: "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" Eligible voters can register online at "". Oregonians may also choose to register by completing a voter registration form and returning it to a county elections office.In Oregon, you must be a U.S. citizen, a resident of the state, and at least 16 years old to register to vote. Oregonians must be 18 years old by Election Day to cast a ballot.Already registered? You can use the "" tool to view your voter registration information and make any necessary updates, including if you recently moved.County Clerks will begin mailing ballots on October 15. Voters should fill out their ballots and return them by 8 p.m. on November 4, 2025.Due to recent changes at the United States Postal Service, it is recommended that voters who want to mail in their ballots do so no later than October 30, 2025. After that, voters should either take their ballot to a local USPS office and request a manual postmark no later than November 4th or return their ballot to a secure drop box no later than 8 p.m. on November 4th. Find those drop boxes at "".For more information, visit our website: "". | | | | | © Jackson County Republican Party 2025. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: P.O. Box 1801 Medford, OR 97501 | | |

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Ceasefire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1886%2E791427%2E1iPFNh)
Friend, I’m sure you’ve heard the news: A ceasefire deal has been reached for Gaza.
Hostages on both sides have been exchanged, including the remaining Israeli hostages taken on October 7th and over 2,000 Palestinians who have been held indefinitely in Israeli prisons for years. Gazans are returning to the rubble where their homes once stood in areas that have been off-limits for months.
After two long years, I pray that this ceasefire is the real deal, and that the Israeli bombardment of Gaza is finally over.
This is a moment to celebrate after so much loss — **but we must remain vigilant until a lasting peace is secured.**
The IDF still has troops across the Gaza strip, and just this morning nine Palestinians were shot dead by IDF soldiers as they returned to their homes. The international community must keep up the pressure until Israel withdrawals fully from Gaza and reconstruction efforts are under way. Those who participated in war crimes and genocide must be held accountable.
And looking beyond this moment, there is still much work to do to ensure Palestinian self-determination, sovereignty, and security.
Israel continues to occupy the West Bank and allow settlements to expand, taking away Palestinian homes and territory in an effort to deny Palestinians their own state. Palestinians in the West Bank live under apartheid conditions, subjected to constant civil rights abuses, checkpoints, and segregation. There are still thousands of Palestinians held in Israeli prisons without trial. And Palestinians living within Israel’s borders are still treated as second-class citizens.
That’s why I’m asking you: **Take this moment to reaffirm your support for the rights and dignity of Palestinians,** and the cause of lasting peace for all in the region.
Over the last two years we have built an incredible movement in defense of Palestinian humanity. More people than ever are educated on this decades-long struggle and we must continue to bring more people into the fold as we fight for the future of Palestine. We have achieved a huge goal with this ceasefire — now we must keep pushing.
So if you are looking to take action today, the next step must be ensuring that as much humanitarian aid and supplies to rebuild get into Gaza as humanly possible:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-ceasefire/?source=em251014-1-180&akid=1886%2E791427%2E1iPFNh)
Halving aid into Gaza would be unacceptable, and I am putting together a petition for my fellow members of Congress and the Trump administration to ensure that this ceasefire is respected and that Israel does not impede the flow of aid. Humanitarian aid must be unconditional and reach every person who has been starved, bombed, and displaced by Israel for the last two years.
**[Sign on to my petition to show your support for a truly permanent ceasefire and keep up the pressure on Israel to ensure maximum humanitarian aid reaches Gaza. This is one of the most important struggles for justice of our time — momentum is on our side, but we must remain vigilant.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-ceasefire/?source=em251014-1-180&akid=1886%2E791427%2E1iPFNh)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-ceasefire/?source=em251014-1-180&akid=1886%2E791427%2E1iPFNh)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1886%2E791427%2E1iPFNh)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1886%2E791427%2E1iPFNh)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1886%2E791427%2E1iPFNh)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1886_791427_1iPFNh&akid=1886%2E791427%2E1iPFNh)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

body:
Our latest ad

**You'll want to see this ad.**
As you read this, we're three weeks from Election Day, people are returning their ballots, and we are on the air with one of our best and most powerful ads yet.
If we can make sure Californians who want to put a check on Trump's unchecked power return their ballots, then we are going to win. And there is no better messenger to get that done than former President of the United States Barack Obama.
**[Listen to Barack Obama. Watch our latest ad here.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/5265?t=1&akid=2679%2E4767699%2EdFlo4r)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/5265?t=2&akid=2679%2E4767699%2EdFlo4r)
Like we've said before, this is one of many ads all sharing one central message: we have to stop Donald Trump's efforts to rig the next election. But it's only possible with your support. Don't stop now.
Team Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have heard the calls do "Do something!" and I agree. As Republicans re-draw maps in states across the country, California will fight fire with fire. We can't let them rig the next election without a fight.
God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
[**Please make a contribution to help us get it done. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. It all ads up fast and we'll put it right to work to help us win this election. Thank you.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4181?c0=erra-em.RqFVJb&refcode=em251014-2-ab&t=3&akid=2679%2E4767699%2EdFlo4r)

As you read this, we're three weeks from Election Day, people are returning their ballots, and we are on the air with one of our best and most powerful ads yet. If we can make sure Californians who want to put a check on Trump's unchecked power return their ballots, then we are going to win. And there is no better messenger to get that done than former President of the United States Barack Obama. Like we've said before, this is one of many ads all sharing one central message: we have to stop Donald Trump's efforts to rig the next election. But it's only possible with your support. Don't stop now. Team Newsom i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸 I have heard the calls do "Do something!" and I agree. As Republicans re-draw maps in states across the country, California will fight fire with fire. We can't let them rig the next election without a fight. God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act. If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | **

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 10/14/2025
body:
At Mesa County rally, Anthony Watson challenges crowd to trade outrage for obedience
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado is balancing recovery, reform, and political tension this week. [In Pagosa Springs, flooding along the San Juan River](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) forced evacuations and caused widespread damage before waters finally receded, prompting a week-long emergency declaration. [In Nederland, a fire that destroyed several downtown businesses](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) has sparked a wave of community-led rebuilding efforts.
[Meanwhile, water users across the West face two pivotal Colorado River decisions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) that could reshape how seven states divide shrinking resources between cities, farms, and ecosystems. And in Vail, a private retreat hosted by the nonprofit Colorado Opportunity Caucus drew scrutiny after [reports surfaced that 17 Democratic lawmakers met with lobbyists behind closed doors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), raising new transparency and ethics questions.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Nationally, tensions flared over security, immigration, and foreign policy. [New revelations suggest the FBI secretly monitored communications](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) involving multiple Republican senators, prompting comparisons to “Watergate” and renewed calls for accountability. At the same time, federal investigators have [identified more than 1,000 suspected cases of immigration fraud in Minneapolis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) under “Operation Twin Shield,” with prosecutions now pending. Abroad, [President Trump delivered a powerful address to the Israeli Knesset](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), celebrating hostage releases and calling for a “new era of peace,” [as analysts praised his pragmatic, pressure-based diplomacy ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)for helping restore rare stability in the Middle East.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Cory Gaines warns that [the State Land Board’s proposed sale of Conejos County grazing lands](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) could sideline rural communities. Meanwhile, Aimee Tooker argues that [Westerners deserve a true voice in land management](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), urging reform of the Antiquities Act to protect property rights. Together, they call for balance—ensuring those who live and work the land have a real seat at the table.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, October 14, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[At Mesa County rally, Anthony Watson challenges crowd to trade outrage for obedience](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
No bulls, no broncs—the arena lights belonged to a different crowd. Sun broke in strips across a clouded sky after a full day of rain. Over 500 filled the grandstands for a different kind of roundup with local pastors, community leaders and a two-time Olympian. Bookcliff led off with the Star-Spangled Banner and closed beneath candlelight with God Bless America.
In between, voices from across western Colorado pressed a plain charge. Obedience. Courage. And everyday faith.
Commissioner Bobbie Daniel was among the first to speak, representing Mesa County’s role as a sponsor of the event. “The foundation of America is not government, but people, families, community, churches, and everyday citizens who choose courage over comfort and conviction over convenience,” she said. “We believe in hard work and faith and family and freedom. We believe the truth matters—and courage still counts.” Her words set the tone for what followed—a program less about politics than the strength of conviction.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[La Jara land deal raises questions about public access and state priorities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado State Land Board is considering selling a parcel of land in Conejos County, known as the La Jara property, which is currently used for grazing but also valued by hunters and anglers.
* Conservation groups and Colorado Parks and Wildlife support the sale, arguing it would keep the land in public hands for recreation, while critics worry it could displace local agricultural leaseholders without guaranteeing continued grazing access.
* The State Land Board contends that selling the property could generate more revenue for public schools through interest-bearing proceeds, with a final decision scheduled for October 15.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The sword is passed: Honoring Charlie Kirk’s bold stand for truth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | OCTOBER 12** _As we conclude this series on The Sword of the Spirit, my heart feels both heavy and hopeful. Heavy, because we mourn the loss of a strong, confident voice for truth and a dear friend of Rocky Mountain Voice—Charlie Kirk. Hopeful, because his legacy shows us the trail we are called to follow, with no exceptions, and in my opinion, there is no better way to close this powerful series._
**[School unions gave $11K to Jeffco candidate who admitted to a sealed juvenile sexual offense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | OCTOBER 10**
When the Jefferson County Education Association endorsed Michael Yocum for school board this fall, few voters—perhaps not even the union itself—knew the full story. According to verified audio recordings obtained by Rocky Mountain Voice (RMV), Yocum privately acknowledged a deferred adjudication involving a sealed juvenile sexual offense. Yocum received thousands in funding and endorsements from education-aligned groups. __
**[More Than Colorado: How Friendship and Faith Are Expanding the Rocky Mountain Voice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | OCTOBER 9** ___Let me tell you about a longtime friend of mine—and now a dear friend of Rocky Mountain Voice—Joe Cherry, CEO and Founder of Exectras in Houston, Texas. As I write this, I’m sitting in his remarkable home in Houston, Texas. My wife, Sherrie, continues her fight against Glioblastoma Stage 4 Brain Cancer, and we’re working with the team at MD Anderson to handle this relentless disease._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---
****🏜️**DID YOU KNOW?** **Sudan has more pyramids than any other country in the world.
** Here’s a geography surprise — Sudan actually outnumbers Egypt when it comes to pyramids, and by a wide margin. Archaeologists have uncovered around 255 pyramids across Sudan, compared to roughly 100 in Egypt, making it the true pyramid capital of the world.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Every step we take towards making the State our Caretaker of our lives, by that much we move toward making the State our Master." – Dwight D. Eisenhower
|

Trump will do anything to SILENCE her and other incredible Democrats taking a stand — but we won’t let him.

name: AOC
subject: We cannot allow healthcare to become a luxury good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Due to the Trump healthcare cuts, the New York Essential Plan is set to be eliminated next year — all while Republicans refuse to call the House back into session during a shutdown to avoid negotiating on healthcare.
**That won’t stop us**.
This week, I spent some time in The Bronx going through some of our resident’s healthcare bills to better figure out how we can fight back as we continue the fight for Medicare For All.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251014-video.DfmKtG&refcode=em20251014-9950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu)
Americans have started to skip and ration their prescription doses even further due to the GOP healthcare cuts.
Don’t believe me? Check your mail. Notices are going out of entire plan eliminations and extreme premium hikes.
We can’t afford this. That’s why we’re fighting back.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251014-video.DfmKtG&refcode=em20251014-9950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251014-video.DfmKtG&refcode=em20251014-9950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251014-video?refcode=em20251014-9950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=9950_2526796_f11Sfu&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251014-9950-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=9950%2E2526796%2Ef11Sfu)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:

In case you missed the news, Michael Bennet has a new – _and even more far-right_ – opponent in the race.
And worst of all: **Lauren Boebert just endorsed his campaign.**
He's fully in lockstep with President Trump and MAGA extremists' plan to let the military use American cities as "training grounds" and cut health care for working families while funneling your hard-earned tax dollars into handouts for billionaires. And he aims to succeed by infiltrating our political discourse with _talk_ about exorcising "demons" and "spiritual warfare."
In short: Colorado can't afford for him to win this race – **_[but that's only half of why we're asking you to chip in $5 to Michael's campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117276144/575940839/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk951-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZlNzY3NS00MGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F5rG2GDKSSwqXFiLlvTYo9TGd4XG4duVjb0_KsY7MO0=)_**

**The other reason is that tomorrow night at 11:59 p.m. is Michael's mid-month fundraising deadline.** So, between the big gap left to hit our $30,000 goal on time and the stakes growing higher than ever in Colorado's governor's race, this campaign has ZERO room for error.
Because falling short this soon would send a signal to national Republicans (and their special interest donors) that our movement is lagging.
If that happens, it'll trigger a flood of money and attack ads against Michael – and without your support, this grassroots-powered campaign might not have the resources necessary to fight back.
But as a vital member of this team, YOU have the power to stop that worst-case scenario from becoming this campaign's reality after tomorrow at midnight. **[So please, friend, will you pitch in $5, $25 or anything you can spare before then to help Michael overcome this new challenge and keep up the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117276146/575940841/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk951-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZlNzY3NS00MGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F5rG2GDKSSwqXFiLlvTYo9TGd4XG4duVjb0_KsY7MO0=)**

Peter,

Across the country, Donald Trump is targeting Black women in power for doing exactly what we need more leaders to do: lead with fearlessness and truth.

From Letitia James to Fani Willis to Lisa Cook, he’s attacked, mocked, and prosecuted the women who dared to hold him accountable.

_This isn’t politics as usual. It’s a pattern._

**Trump is trying to intimidate Black women because he knows the truth: when we lead, we hold him accountable.**

That’s exactly why Seated Together, Emerge’s leadership program for Black women, is more essential than ever.

Seated Together gives Black women leaders who want to run for higher office the tools, community, and confidence to keep leading, even when they’re targeted. It’s how we make sure they’re not standing alone — but standing together, stronger than ever. We’re proud that every cohort of this program has produced a member of Congress.

But we need to keep building.

[_**Can you chip in $25 right now to help us grow Seated Together and support Black women ready to lead and fight back?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117276435/575942131/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-10-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjOTQzNmMzLTQwYTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wnIg7VKFff0kq5FTU8bk8jylcATVXFqs9PPx5f8ij9c=)

clean_body: Trump is trying to intimidate Black women because he knows the truth: when we lead, we hold him accountable. | = | = Peter, Across the country, Donald Trump is targeting Black women in power for doing exactly what we need more leaders to do: lead with fearlessness and truth. From Letitia James to Fani Willis to Lisa Cook, he’s attacked, mocked, and prosecuted the women who dared to hold him accountable. This isn’t politics as usual. It’s a pattern. Trump is trying to intimidate Black women because he knows the truth: when we lead, we hold him accountable. That’s exactly why Seated Together, Emerge’s leadership program for Black women, is more essential than ever. Seated Together gives Black women leaders who want to run for higher office the tools, community, and confidence to keep leading, even when they’re targeted. It’s how we make sure they’re not standing alone — but standing together, stronger than ever. We’re proud that every cohort of this program has produced a member of Congress. But we need to keep building. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Trump can threaten us all he wants — we’re not backing down. — A’shanti F. Gholar President & CEO, Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Letitia James
subject: Isn’t it ironic?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
| | | |
---
Team, Donald Trump – an actual convicted felon – just indicted me on baseless charges.
**Does anybody else see the irony here?**
This is the same man who’s been found liable for fraud.
The same man who used the presidency to enrich himself and punish his critics.
The same man who now seeks to weaponize our justice system for his own political retribution.
Let me be crystal clear: I will _not_ be intimidated. I will _not_ be silenced. And I will _not_ back down from holding the president accountable.
Because the truth is faith and fear cannot share the same space. And so I refuse to be fearful – but fearless. And I will continue doing my job to protect New Yorkers and defend the rule of law.
[**But make no mistake: Trump and his allies are trying to tear down anyone who stands in their way. Your support has the power to help me fight back and continue my work to block their unconstitutional agenda. Will you be one of 20,000 fearless supporters I’m counting on to make a split donation between my campaign and NV Dems so that I can stand tall in the face of this baseless indictment and keep fighting for justice?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu_hjK98iroObSdPglX9oSTbol6QdJPoUr-S_48x_L5qCxAOt5JvmXlvwa9-xCwqzXGUGLpNIDAdPDhVVfpYeuwHFxXiPfitMsR86BKfdCnvbAxxVfZyxmS3wP3hdi2fFrD7o0jNYOp9e83Mu32IvELyCbB2B_jHZXwBwMydfBF_oqNfMreQdJibQ74W3sJATFYM6uB639gTNpyrH16Kr0KqFncOhU7UzyCMR0yEU_Xlwuu0dvAdx_ZJrbmPOHUN4rHvps1zqPDGezUGlImHBpnW8kwYIPyfzkJiGcSAyr9dCYHxv44cMG-IBRjuvJuOLfK8CZOq21Ko2FRG7YSl8nhUFmQeOcLQcyE8v2YBJ50n-YTPXR2IKHTrIbbFM-cb2I/4kq/_mzqvAsiTeSvUULSrAdQcA/h0/h001.U_DwzN02quxp_cLfvExa1ANe0JJ5Bf3Ne4nMo8bdMqI)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Just $5.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
And why it's so important

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE)

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6995?t=2&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE)
---
**$5.**
That's what I'm humbly asking you to **[chip in to my campaign](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6996?t=3&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE)** ahead of my critical mid-month deadline.
| | [Chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6997?t=4&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE)
---
**$5** because I'm a lifelong Michigander who has spent my career fighting for our families, our small businesses, and our manufacturing economy. And I need your help to take this fight to the Senate.
**$5** because flipping the Senate blue is Democrats' best chance of keeping the Trump administration in check – and we simply can't do that if we lose here in Michigan.
**$5** because this race is on track to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – in the country. My mid-month deadline is _tomorrow_ , and I simply can't reach my $100,000 goal without your help.
**I know it might not seem like much – but if everyone reading this chipped in $5, we'd get there in no time! That's the power of the grassroots movement we're building, null. It's made up of thousands of folks like you giving $5 when they can – and I really need you with me today.**
**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 – or anything at all – right now to help reach this critical goal so we can keep Michigan blue and win a Democratic Senate majority next November?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6997?t=5&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE)**
| | | [Chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6997?t=6&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE)
---
| | [Chip in another amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6996?t=7&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE)
---
Thank you in advance for giving what you can. It means so much to have you with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6998?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6995?t=9&akid=1085%2E49239%2E-LlrPE)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: Quick — leaders mentioned YOU in today’s meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Top NRSC leaders brought you up in today’s meeting — we need your vote on the policy checklist. | fellow American,

They put your name on the table today — not as a joke, not as fluff. In our leadership meeting with key NRSC folks, senators, and senior staff, _your_ state came up as one they’re watching.

_That matters._

**So here’s what’s going on: we’re building a plan to keep the Senate and protect hardworking families — and we need your clear ‘yes’ or ‘no’ on a few bold priorities.** This isn’t a poll. It’s not marketing. It’s the map we’ll follow.

**I’m asking you for two things, and both take less than a minute.**
**1.** Click the button below.
**2.** Tell us which priorities you support. (It’s one page. Honest.)

name: Scott Presler
subject: I can’t believe what I’m seeing in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
Everything is breaking our way

| | | | |
---
Friend, please take 3 minutes to read every word of this email.
Last week, polling in the New Jersey’s governor’s race started to show what I’ve been seeing for a long time.**The race is officially tied.**
The polling for Republican nominee Jack Ciattarelli continued to improve this week and we are truly in the midst of a tectonic shift in New Jersey... All that’s left now is to do the hard work between now and Election Day to turn out every Republican voter in the state.
That’s where I have even more good news.**Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a far higher rate than Democrats.**
This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... So far, Democrat voters have requested more than twice as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, so they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do.
Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day.
That’s why my grassroots team is on the ground registering voters, chasing mail-in ballots, and preparing to launch our massive get out the early vote program. And if you take a look at these numbers, you know we’re making an impact.
[SPONSOR A STAFFER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bloQ/?__vbtrk=MzI3MDU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3MDU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Patriot, that’s where you come in.
**We need your help to make the difference.** By sponsoring an Early Vote Action staffer, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025.
**_[Every new voter we register, every mail-in ballot we chase down, and every Republican we get to the polls brings us one vote closer to victory](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bloQ/?__vbtrk=MzI3MDU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3MDU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I’m counting on you to deliver the resources we need to win again, you know I’ll be on the ground doing the hard work with the grassroots either way, but with your support our impact will be felt by far more voters.
**_[So, please, if you haven’t already, consider sponsoring a staffer on my grassroots action team and help us bring home victory](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bloQ/?__vbtrk=MzI3MDU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3MDU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
_In Liberty,_
**Scott Presler**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bloQ/?__vbtrk=MzI3MDU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI3MDU4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: Mobilizing our communities when it matters most
body:
You can help youth leaders share their vision for a liberated future. | | | United We Dream’s gatherings are **_so much more_** than workshops, Peter. They are spaces where our team of leaders, trainers, and badass organizers — empowered by our ancestors and the resilience of our people — are building a movement with everyday people who power this country. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIrOUlwWjpQzVV4gwYriNXR3ZPFkCzWHMM8UJhW9YN5QmYkwttOEJE5xMOFRpoJoPrH4N8YbSj1b6fQuLwOgRT4P9ZGH0RJy4wuhmGuuv64zbPHyXUyscHoCtUAJJIBbN71UluGTu4NLpNWLuKEgnuBaXLeYi5vSIBPxgPq2NpyGPI213XgqFJA6s4bhzekEfB2R2yMq8nCDPhKoPIGuhyylFLW1uZMwm1Enflq-RqX_wvpGoXJ9u7m1o4ZMIa2R1h5uu0MpQ69RcL712Sf0ZKoBIOY8ltQ6yUyNMMZdjVbx2ykSJuj-YCGDhVhV7yJ8njCOc0OQoflL-Wj2aaWxvr82dYsYKqiQmuoBErqqKHpEA/4kq/w7fRrEwZRyamE-G8BenZng/h0/h001.ghoXRocaIX5GFI46VEqq9an-EsUCtm2KxAvpYyCEbHY) Youth leaders from every corner of the country attend these meetings to hone their organizing skills and mobilize their communities at a time when transformation is needed most. Last month, we gathered in California, and we’re planning two more in-person gatherings in the next month, as well as our 2025 Digital Congress. [**Your support is what brings these gatherings together. clean_body: You can help youth leaders share their vision for a liberated future. | | | United We Dream’s gatherings are so much more than workshops, Peter. They are spaces where our team of leaders, trainers, and badass organizers — empowered by our ancestors and the resilience of our people — are building a movement with everyday people who power this country. Youth leaders from every corner of the country attend these meetings to hone their organizing skills and mobilize their communities at a time when transformation is needed most. Last month, we gathered in California, and we’re planning two more in-person gatherings in the next month, as well as our 2025 Digital Congress. | | Through our upcoming movement-building Train-the-Trainer program, we will equip a new generation of organizers with a dynamic curriculum, one-on-one coaching, and collective strategy. Our mission is to grow courage, skills, and collective power to resist authoritarian threats and create communities rooted in dignity and joy. Your support helps us build a national movement led by young people — especially college students, first-generation and mixed-status families, undocumented youth, folks with disabilities, and allies like you. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thank you for standing with us. — Matias, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: I'll get right to it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter, it's Gov. Andy Beshear here — and I’ll get right to it:

In less than one month, we have critical elections that we need to be prepared for.

In New Jersey and Virginia, key governors races will be decided. Down-ballot campaigns for state legislatures, school boards, and local offices are ramping up. And every single one of these races matters.

Every election determines whether families have access to affordable healthcare, whether workers earn a fair wage, and whether kids get access to the education they deserve. These aren’t just names on a ballot — _they’re decisions that shape people’s daily lives._

That’s why In This Together PAC is working to invest directly in the campaigns of candidates who believe in decency, honesty, service, and putting people ahead of politics. We’re helping elect for-the-people leaders who will do what’s right, who fight for their communities, and who refuse to give in to corporate special interests.

This work only works if we do it together. The money we raise goes directly toward helping good candidates and good people in tight races reach more voters and share their message with the people who need to hear it most—whether that’s through digital ads, mail, doors, or directly supporting a campaign.

[**But it takes resources to do this work. If you believe in candidates who lead with heart and put people first, I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can today.
