clean_body: Peter, it's Gov. Andy Beshear here — and I’ll get right to it: In less than one month, we have critical elections that we need to be prepared for. In New Jersey and Virginia, key governors races will be decided. Down-ballot campaigns for state legislatures, school boards, and local offices are ramping up. And every single one of these races matters. Every election determines whether families have access to affordable healthcare, whether workers earn a fair wage, and whether kids get access to the education they deserve. These aren’t just names on a ballot — they’re decisions that shape people’s daily lives. That’s why In This Together PAC is working to invest directly in the campaigns of candidates who believe in decency, honesty, service, and putting people ahead of politics. We’re helping elect for-the-people leaders who will do what’s right, who fight for their communities, and who refuse to give in to corporate special interests. This work only works if we do it together. The money we raise goes directly toward helping good candidates and good people in tight races reach more voters and share their message with the people who need to hear it most—whether that’s through digital ads, mail, doors, or directly supporting a campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Gov. | | Dear Peter,
---
Don’t you love those moments when you realize how far we’ve come, how many wins we’ve celebrated together—and how many opportunities still lie ahead?
---
That’s the spirit behind our newly released [**Annual Report 2024–25: Together We’re Reviving the Range**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117277579/575945951/-65724158?utm_campaign=ar-24-25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ea-ar&ms=public&sourceid=1129073&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5NGZkYzFkLTQ0YTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CaZUNG2bpILlPjOrJe4oaYuq3au2n_XP25o-uiW0FdM=&emci=5ad2508a-8da4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d94fdc1d-44a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1504551). We invite you to open the report and stroll down memory lane (on a redwood-lined path, of course), where our shared victories come together in one uplifting story—a celebration of what you’ve made possible and a vision of where we’re headed.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117277580/575945953/-65724158?utm_campaign=ar-24-25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ea-ar&ms=public&sourceid=1129073&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5NGZkYzFkLTQ0YTktZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CaZUNG2bpILlPjOrJe4oaYuq3au2n_XP25o-uiW0FdM=&emci=5ad2508a-8da4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d94fdc1d-44a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1504551)
---
This year, we acquired and permanently protected redwood forestland in Sonoma County, connecting vulnerable landscapes that wildlife and people depend on. We partnered with community organizations to give hundreds of young people the chance to build meaningful connections with the redwoods. And on the North Coast, our bold restoration is not only healing forests but also boosting local economies with jobs and opportunity. And there’s so much more. Your support makes all of this possible. We’re deeply grateful—and continually inspired—by your steadfast commitment to these irreplaceable forests. Thank you!
---

clean_body: Rewinding the tape on a tremendous year| | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Don’t you love those moments when you realize how far we’ve come, how many wins we’ve celebrated together—and how many opportunities still lie ahead? That’s the spirit behind our newly released . We invite you to open the report and stroll down memory lane (on a redwood-lined path, of course), where our shared victories come together in one uplifting story—a celebration of what you’ve made possible and a vision of where we’re headed. This year, we acquired and permanently protected redwood forestland in Sonoma County, connecting vulnerable landscapes that wildlife and people depend on. We partnered with community organizations to give hundreds of young people the chance to build meaningful connections with the redwoods. And on the North Coast, our bold restoration is not only healing forests but also boosting local economies with jobs and opportunity. And there’s so much more. Your support makes all of this possible. We’re deeply grateful—and continually inspired—by your steadfast commitment to these irreplaceable forests. Thank you! | | See you under the canopy, Save the Redwoods League | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States CONNECT WITH US | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Randy Villegas
subject: I’d love your personal endorsement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress [#]
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/117525/images/Villegas%20Logo.png]
Big news.

I’m honored to share some brand-new endorsements that have come in over the past couple of weeks: Congressman Ro Khanna, Latino Victory Fund, and Leaders We Deserve have all officially endorsed our campaign for Congress!

These endorsements aren’t just statements of support -- they’re a sign that our grassroots campaign is gaining serious momentum.

They join a growing coalition that includes dozens of local leaders, educators, and community advocates who are uniting behind our campaign to take on corporate power and fight for working families.

We’d love your endorsement too. If you haven’t yet, add your name to officially endorse my campaign to unseat David Valadao in CA-22. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q4-2025?refcode=em-10.14.25-all-c]

Endorse Randy [https://secure.ngpvan.com/iH-yFQud50iKFMeO1s8XRA2]

- Randy

P.S. Check out our full endorsement list below. Fair warning, it's a long list. That’s what happens when a campaign is powered by real people.

Community & Elected Leaders
* Ro Khanna - U.S. Congress, California’s 17th District
* Leticia Perez - Kern County Supervisor
* Bryan Osorio - Delano City Councilman and former Mayor
* Anthony Fuentes - Bakersfield School Board of Education President
* Chris Cruz-Boone - Bakersfield School Board of Education Clerk Pro Tem
* Brooke Malley Ault - Bakersfield School Board of Education Area 5 Trustee
* Jose Gurrola - Former Mayor of Arvin
* Joe Soria - Lindsay City Councilman
* Jose Sigala - Tulare City Councilman
* Emmanuel Soto - Visalia City Councilman
* Rey Leon - Mayor of Huron
* Ruben Macareno - Tulare County Board of Education Area 2 Trustee
* Celia Maldonado-Arroyo - Tulare County Board of Education Area 1
* Connie Diaz - College of the Sequoias District Trustee Ward 4
* Jevon Price - Tulare Local Healthcare District Board Area 3 Director

Team, it’s Jay Jones with some urgent news to share:
The Republican Attorneys General Association (RAGA) has doubled its investment in Jason Miyares’ campaign – they’ve now poured more than $8.5 million into Virginia to try and buy this race.
That’s more any national committee has spent in Virginia this year.
Why? Because they’re terrified of losing their most loyal Trump ally.
The truth is, Jason Miyares has spent his entire career siding with Donald Trump over Virginia families. (He also just received Trump’s endorsement!)
Miyares has pushed for extremist abortion bans, abandoned Virginia workers, and done nothing to help the thousands of families struggling under rising everyday costs – all while cozying up to MAGA donors and corrupt special interests.
I’m not running to play their game. I’m running to protect our rights and return the AG’s office to what it should be: a watchdog for the people.
But to counteract this flood of right-wing cash, I need your help. Will you pitch in $25 today to give our campaign a boost and help us stand up to Jason Miyares and his MAGA agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=25]

Hi, it's Congressman Robert Garcia, the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, working to hold this lawless administration accountable.
**Let me be clear: Tom Homan needs to be fired immediately.**
Trump’s hand-picked “border czar” has been running a cruel, chaotic, and deeply un-American operation — targeting families, spreading hate, and using fear as a political weapon.
**But that’s not all. He was also caught on tape allegedly accepting a $50,000 bribe — only for Trump’s Justice Department to quash all efforts to hold him accountable.**
As Democrats, we can’t let this stand. We need leaders who believe in compassion, order, and justice — not lawlessness, cruelty, and chaos.
That’s why I’m calling for Tom Homan to be fired, and I’m not backing down. But I need you in this fight, and if we want any hope of winning it, we need to raise $20,000 before my mid-month fundraising deadline.
**[Can I count on you to chip in $10 or more right now to help my team raise the funds it needs to continue working to hold this administration accountable and deliver real oversight for the American people? Our mid-month fundraising deadline is just a few days away, so any dollar helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117278013/575947431/789508428?refcode=251014_RG_border-czar&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODZkN2NmNy00NGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oJ3JrN4U8prZlkpj3Kz9zWV_hFwp4HoryLW2aHHg53c=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117278014/575947432/-309737922?refcode=251014_RG_border-czar&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODZkN2NmNy00NGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oJ3JrN4U8prZlkpj3Kz9zWV_hFwp4HoryLW2aHHg53c=)

body:

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=6EQgypyfKCuBYgfvlumAiu1KjfVh0A1Tz1Ph6gNGD5zH910VfSDD9U4gO8fNfsy2jspymuzLkTWtD1S6wxH7HGd1cuKJWauJwrKVroZ6LN%2Fqk082RCQTWFRSTRdcda%2BazSlT%2FzDcHtZG2HMgYCYFys8pVhaifZ26%2BneSJQiyR8Gtg7PcsMOUbrXmw8UX%2BQzvWRuPw%2Ft4yvSLFuQGNqJ4aUMFTBZ4A7AIYTrzqT9frzUli4D7WuqQbQaCHQsr%2B%2FO7LnqDAQdspKLPjKLXqSNc7YwCgmFepjjhMRwj8Sda2TwUAHRU5dtpEMnXvi%2BJMiZI6TSaMUNVp1pj41Tq6bFOXdh5JHtvTnYp7z3%2FwvDbIfARpI%2B2fw%2Fa%2FKC54KgoUhM1mQZRnujecLpHVg9GvaJgwmA%2FvfS%2F0o1oVtHN6bHfWeIzhR1zfJmkFoxEAQ%2Fpj2vA)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117277983/575947397/2021534627?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_101425_PSCEARLY_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDc0MmQxMC00NWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P3Y-ct59c5Qht2We8ud1uMjxbxQ2zk_N51ZMGeIa19E=)
---
Peter — early voting is now underway in Georgia, and some of the most important — and overlooked — **races on the ballot are for the Public Service Commission (PSC)**! Over the past several years, the all-Republican PSC has approved repeated utility rate hikes with little public scrutiny. Georgians are now paying **$43 more every month** on average for electricity. **That’s hundreds of dollars a year** — straight out of your pocket — **while the utility companies report record profits**! This is the result of policy choices made behind closed doors by commissioners who aren’t looking out for everyday Georgians. That’s why Democrats Peter Hubbard and Dr. Alicia Johnson are stepping up. They’re ready to hold utility companies accountable, fight for lower power bills, **and make sure families — not corporations — come first**. This election is our chance to flip two seats on the PSC and stop this pattern of unchecked rate hikes, and turnout will decide everything! [If you’re planning to vote, thank you. If you can do more, consider helping us reach more voters across the state. clean_body: Your power bill is on the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter — early voting is now underway in Georgia, and some of the most important — and overlooked — races on the ballot are for the Public Service Commission (PSC)! Over the past several years, the all-Republican PSC has approved repeated utility rate hikes with little public scrutiny. Georgians are now paying $43 more every month on average for electricity. That’s hundreds of dollars a year — straight out of your pocket — while the utility companies report record profits! This is the result of policy choices made behind closed doors by commissioners who aren’t looking out for everyday Georgians. That’s why Democrats Peter Hubbard and Dr. Alicia Johnson are stepping up. They’re ready to hold utility companies accountable, fight for lower power bills, and make sure families — not corporations — come first. This election is our chance to flip two seats on the PSC and stop this pattern of unchecked rate hikes, and turnout will decide everything! = | | = — Georgia Dems | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
# When Everything You've Worked For Is at Risk, There's Only One Move That Makes Sense...
**The debt is exploding. The dollar is shrinking. And seniors are going back to work just to survive.** Dear Friends, Imagine waking up one morning and realizing that everything you thought was safe... isn’t. Your savings, your retirement accounts, even the value of the dollar in your wallet—it’s all being quietly eroded. You’ve already seen the warning signs:
* **$37 trillion in national debt** —and growing by a trillion every hundred days.
* Inflation making it harder and harder to stretch a dollar.
* **Bank of America confirming** the dollar has already lost **10.7% of its value this year**.
* Banks failing, BRICS rising, and the global stage shifting against America.

And now? **Senior citizens across the country are being forced out of retirement—back to work—because they can no longer live on what they saved.** Let me ask you: _Will you wait until it’s your turn? Or will you decide—right now—that your future deserves protection?_ Here’s what you can do immediately: pick up the phone and call **Monetary Gold** [ (888) 411-GOLD (4653)](tel:888-411-4653). We’ll show you a simple, proven strategy to shift part of your paper assets into **gold and silver** —real money that has held its value for thousands of years. When markets crash, when dollars collapse, when banks fail... gold and silver don’t. They remain. They protect. They secure. Every day you wait, uncertainty rises... but right now, you can choose differently. [Click here to get your Complimentary Presidential Gold Guide](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4555h&__onlt=h), and let yourself feel the confidence of knowing you’ve taken the first step toward securing your financial future. Decide now to safeguard your savings. Call Monetary Gold today [(888) 411-GOLD (4653)](tel:888-411-4653) —and give yourself the peace of mind of knowing your future is protected, no matter what happens next. |

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=c907b643-45a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=c907b643-45a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4]
Peter,
Roughly 1.4 million federal employees are either furloughed or working without pay during this government shutdown, and what does POTUS do to try to fix this? Nothing, because he’s playing golf [https://www.thedailybeast.com/trump-79-spends-second-shutdown-weekend-golfing/] .
Trump has never – and WILL never – look out for our families, and his latest move to hit the links over the weekend once more shows he’s a washed-up billionaire detached from the struggles of working people. Meanwhile, MAGA cheers him on.
DONATE to TOP PAC to help us ramp up our voter engagement going into 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=c907b643-45a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=c907b643-45a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=c907b643-45a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4]
Trump and Republicans created this crisis. THEY control the House, Senate, and White House and chose to shut down the government instead of passing a budget that protects healthcare and serves our country.
WE THE PEOPLE need to step up, speak out, and get ready for a busy midterm election year that will soon be here.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: let us explain (Social Security)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10364%2E434096%2EOItg_7)
| | |
---
[**Derek, The Washington Post just reported that Trump and his team are preparing a new plan to push hundreds of thousands of people off of Social Security. Will you chip in to help us reach our $20,000 mid-month goal and then let us explain?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51784?t=2&akid=10364%2E434096%2EOItg_7)
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51785?t=3&akid=10364%2E434096%2EOItg_7)
---
Derek, here's what's happening:
**FIRST:** Trump closed SSA offices, cut staff, and made it harder for seniors to get help over the phone. Checks were even delayed.
**THEN:** Trump's Treasury secretary let it slip that Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill – now _law_ – hides a backdoor plan to privatize Social Security.
**AND NOW:** Trump and his team are pushing a plan to make it harder for older Americans to qualify for disability benefits – which could cost hundreds of thousands of people their benefits.
The master plan? Break Social Security, run it dry, and sell the scrap off to Wall Street so they can gamble with Americans’ retirement money. 😤
John’s not letting that happen. He reintroduced the **Billionaires Income Tax Act** to make the ultrawealthy pay their fair share in taxes – money that can be used to shore up funding for vital programs like Social Security.
John’s standing up to Trump’s Social Security schemes, but he needs your support to raise the alarm. **[Can you chip in $5, $25, or anything you can spare before midnight tomorrow to help us meet our $20,000 goal?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51784?t=4&akid=10364%2E434096%2EOItg_7)** 🙏

name: Fred Wellman
subject: Ann Wagner helped shut down the government. So I’m running against her.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
I can’t stand by and do nothing while our country is in danger
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5828?t=1&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
Hi there,

My name is Fred Wellman. I served in the Army for 22 years and am now the host of the _On Democracy_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network. I’m excited to share some big news: **I’m the Democrat running for Congress in one of the most competitive swing districts in the nation.**

This isn’t the email I thought I’d be sending you today. But with the government shutdown and Ann Wagner doing nothing to fix it, we need leaders who will stand up and do whatever it takes to fix it. I’m done waiting.

[_**If you’re ready to join my campaign, can you split a donation of $25 today between The Long Run PAC and me to become one of our first 5,000 Founding Donors? If you want to learn more, please keep reading this.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5828?t=2&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
| [DONATE NOW ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5828?t=3&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
A Missouri native, I graduated from Kirkwood High School and then attended West Point. In the Army, I served as an aviator and later as a public affairs officer. For much of my career I led soldiers in combat, flew helicopters in Desert Storm and Iraq, and served as a spokesman for generals leading America’s toughest and most important fights.

After retiring from the Army, I kept looking for ways to serve, founding a public affairs firm to advocate for veterans and military families, volunteering at a field hospital in New York at the height of COVID, and working with the Lincoln Project in 2020 to help beat Trump. My oath to serve our country and uphold our Constitution is sacred and endures for life.

I returned home to Missouri four years ago and once again rolled up my sleeves to help organize the thousands of donations for refugees coming to St. Louis from Afghanistan as Kabul fell.

Now, I host the _On Democracy with FPWellman_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network, having key conversations about how to address rising authoritarianism, inequality, and Trump’s assault on our democracy.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5828?t=5&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
**Meanwhile, my MAGA Congresswoman—Ann Wagner—is content to let Trump rule as a dictator. She has spent her entire career selling us out, ignoring her constituents, and getting richer. She hasn’t even bothered holding an open town hall in thirteen years.
In one of the most critical swing districts in the country, here in my home state of Missouri, this cannot continue.**

That’s why I’m running.

**Because working Americans are getting priced out of the American Dream.
Because our kids deserve the same rights, freedoms, and opportunities we had.
Because the time for sitting on the sidelines is over.**

After two decades in uniform, I know what it looks like to fight for this country. I watched brave men and women give everything to defend our freedoms, including two of my own soldiers in Desert Storm. Their sacrifice reminds me every day that democracy is worth fighting for.

Now Trump wants to crown himself America’s first king and Ann Wagner is helping him get there. They have taken healthcare away from millions, destroyed the economy, gutted the VA, politicized our national defense, and are ripping apart our democratic institutions piece by piece.

**I won’t stand by while they sell out working families. I’m a fighter – and I’m ready to take this fight to Washington. I know you are ready to fight too.**

[_**That’s why I’ll ask one more time, can you split a donation between The Long Run PAC and me to become one of the first 5,000 Founding Donors of our campaign?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5828?t=6&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5829?t=7&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5830?t=9&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5831?t=11&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5832?t=13&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5833?t=15&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
I’ve got one tattoo. It says “I’m not done yet.” It was the theme of my Army retirement speech. Whenever I hit hard times and thought I was all but finished I remembered that line. I dusted myself off and got back in the fight.

I’m not done yet.
You’re not done yet.
Missouri is not done yet.
America is not done yet.

Join me.

—Fred Wellman
Democratic Candidate for MO-2
* * *
| | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5834?t=17&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597, Milwaukee, WI 53201
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4144?t=18&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8) | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4145?t=19&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8) | | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4146?t=20&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---|---|---|---
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5834?t=21&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---
[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5835?t=22&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)
---

We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=23&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8). You can also sign up to [receive fewer emails](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=24&akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8).
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.mandelabarnes.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5636%2E196590%2Ef77PT8)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Private data belongs to Oregonians — not Donald Trump.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251014em-mmfr1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251014em-mmfr1]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
Earlier this month, President Trump’s Department of Justice once again demanded Oregon’s full voter-registration database — names, driver’s license numbers, partial Social Security numbers — the kind of information that could easily be misused or weaponized.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251014em-mmfr1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251014em-mmfr1]
And my response was simple: No way! .
Oregon already provides the public voter information required by law. But private data? That belongs to Oregonians — not to Donald Trump, not to any president, and certainly not to a federal agency trying to intimidate voters.
This is about more than privacy. It’s about trust in democracy itself. Once people believe their personal information isn’t safe, participation drops. And that’s exactly what these attacks are designed to do.
But my job as Secretary of State is to protect your right to vote. And that’s what I’m doing.
I need your help to push back. We’ve set a $10,000 mid-month goal by October 15 to fund our voter-education outreach and digital efforts to make sure every Oregonian knows their vote and data are safe. Can I count on you to make a critical contribution toward this goal right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251014em-mmfr1]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251014em-mmfr1]
Oregon pioneered vote-by-mail. We built one of the nation’s most transparent and secure election systems. We did it by trusting voters — not targeting them.
Let’s show Washington that Oregonians won’t be bullied. Let’s protect our right to vote and our right to privacy.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251014em-mmfr1]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=7w6qE3ERaPlydlksJkudT66N%2Fq4bzjqNTE1%2FNGo3E0EZRoQpzUWbvv0HiMBzQxolELivJcQGGX3Mg%2FrRje06mDW9k3SaIL3BgeUFJKW9nTfGH5wOwss8KRegVjRp7S40nKSWi%2BQ%2BGDAZTN3Z2asyn3OXntFl0SwfVnapkHg5NXZiNP2%2Bmpm5THVlVYPACx1o48cBZj1sllKADw3xCpH%2BGhpmDoowpdLyluhfZmNqSI0eV0C1%2B3tQQrvcY5ULLEX6ouKCM4YY9fEgaEc%2F9TgMOaskpn47%2Bjf9AhsY%2F7kT6r34wkklNN2u1Gs6p3Bu6TlHOS3Q5%2F7w3Znn%2BdKLcEbSrJ8SZ17YLlT3WIdmXmtPZTZ6cnOZWh5MU4S3RdbVZAZLT3%2BtCDOnfI8qnIrt5HcIqwJQaAdgtepIjouN5S9NODB7BHBAG8fVoUxPyxYZ6eSc .

name: Janet Mills
subject: I’m running to flip Maine’s U.S. Senate seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117278223/575948110/513678374?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzI2ZmYyZi00NmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=is2dxiNBdG4qldMnEblTedpOD8DSH1DutYJc6fGYbU4=) I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I would _never_ forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.

Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger _every single day_.

**So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to flip Maine’s U.S. Senate seat blue.** [**_MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority. I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.

My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.

I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.

But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**

_And I'm the only Democrat to win a statewide election in Maine in the last 20 years._

So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.

This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.

We flipped Kentucky blue. Now it's Abigail Spanberger's turn in Virginia.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117278480/575948827/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-14_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTM3ODk0MDYtNDdhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K5agDWvOiKnwwVXd-F7sIS6uSRTKb20Hqu-5aeg6th0=)
Peter, I know a thing or two about winning close elections.
I'm the Democratic Governor of Kentucky, a state Donald Trump won by thirty points. Back in 2019, our margin of victory was 0.4%. I faced long odds both times I was at the top of the ballot, but our team refused to take any vote for granted.
_And I know my friend Abigail Spanberger shares that same attitude._
Abigail is not out here picking fights. She's talking with Virginians, hearing their concerns, and laying out an agenda to do right by them — starting by bringing down costs and bringing back jobs.
_Now, that means something, and I sure hope it's enough to convince you to send her a donation today._
[_**Will you contribute to Abigail Spanberger's campaign before her mid-month fundraising deadline on Thursday? clean_body: We flipped Kentucky blue. Now it's Abigail Spanberger's turn in Virginia. = Peter, I know a thing or two about winning close elections. I'm the Democratic Governor of Kentucky, a state Donald Trump won by thirty points. Back in 2019, our margin of victory was 0.4%. I faced long odds both times I was at the top of the ballot, but our team refused to take any vote for granted. And I know my friend Abigail Spanberger shares that same attitude. Abigail is not out here picking fights. She's talking with Virginians, hearing their concerns, and laying out an agenda to do right by them — starting by bringing down costs and bringing back jobs. Now, that means something, and I sure hope it's enough to convince you to send her a donation today. = = = = = = = Thanks for giving what you can, Andy Beshear Governor, Kentucky = By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This program changed lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251014-1104&t=1001&akid=1107%2E251025%2ERQIDtC ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251014-1104&t=1002&akid=1107%2E251025%2ERQIDtC ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi Peter,

When I led Detroit’s Health Department, I helped launch a program that
provided tens of thousands of kids with free glasses.

[ An ]An old photo of Abdul standing with a group of kids who benefitted from
the glasses programPhoto Credit: Vision To Learn

It changed lives. Kids who were falling behind in school because they
couldn’t see the board could finally read, focus, and thrive.

That’s the kind of progress we can make on a larger scale in the U.S.
Senate — when we build a government that actually invests in people.

But people always ask: “How are you going to pay for that?”

Here’s my answer: In a moment of deep inequality, maybe billionaires
should pay their fair share. It’s time for a billionaire tax.

Maybe if you make enough for your kids’ kids to need for nothing, you can
pay a little more so the kids in your community can see the board in
class. So families don’t have to choose between rent and prescriptions. So
the infrastructure that keeps our communities alive actually works.

We could do all of that if our government weren’t bought and sold by
corporations and billionaires who’d rather hoard their wealth than invest
in the people who made it possible.

That’s why I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money — and I’m the only
candidate in this race who’s never taken their money.

I’m not running to do their bidding. I’m running to do right by our
communities. But to take them on, I need grassroots power behind me.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251014-1-ak.LNyCoX&amount=10&refcode=em20251014-1104&t=1004&akid=1107%2E251025%2ERQIDtC ]If you’re with me, pitch in $10 today. Your support gives
our campaign the resources to go toe-to-toe with wannabe oligarchs and
win.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251014-1-ak.LNyCoX&amount=10&refcode=em20251014-1104&t=1023&akid=1107%2E251025%2ERQIDtC ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1107%2E251025%2ERQIDtC
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1107%2E251025%2ERQIDtC

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The first week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This is Justin Pearson, current Tennessee State Representative and Justice
Democrats’ third Democratic primary candidate for 2026. Someone who is
rarely seen without his community by his side.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251014-jp.5CeC1h&refcode=em20251014-37108&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37108%2E1203867%2Efk0YR0 ]Photo of Justin Pearson surrounded by community members at a rally

Justin is running for Congress in Tennessee’s 9th congressional district
against this guy: Rep. Steve Cohen, who is rarely even seen in his
community at all. He’s a politician who has been in elected office for
over 40 years and doesn’t have much to show for it, except a community
struggling with worse poverty, environmental racism, and gun violence than
when he was first elected.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251014-jp.5CeC1h&refcode=em20251014-37108&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37108%2E1203867%2Efk0YR0 ]A photo of Steve Cohen.

Justin has gone up against tough fights before. He led a group of
environmental activists to block the Byhalia crude oil pipeline in a
low-income, 95 percent Black community already impacted by decades of
pollution.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251014-jp.5CeC1h&refcode=em20251014-37108&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37108%2E1203867%2Efk0YR0 ]A photo of Justin speaking into microphones surrounded by activists
protesting the Byhalia oil pipeline.

He was expelled from his seat in the Tennessee State House by Republicans
just weeks after he was sworn in, all for simply participating in a gun
violence prevention protest. He was reinstated soon after and then won
re-election with nearly 94% of the vote.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251014-jp.5CeC1h&refcode=em20251014-37108&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1005&akid=37108%2E1203867%2Efk0YR0 ]Justin standing at a podium in a suit with both of his arms raised
above his head.

Recently, he’s been fighting to stop Elon Musk and his massive xAI data
center from illegally spewing toxic, cancer-causing air pollution in his
South Memphis neighborhood, which has long faced environmental racism from
corporate polluters.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251014-jp.5CeC1h&refcode=em20251014-37108&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1006&akid=37108%2E1203867%2Efk0YR0 ]Justin speaking at a rally surrounded by activists with signs opposing
Elon Musk's xAI data center.

Now, he’s running for Congress in Tennessee's 9th district to give the
working-class communities of Memphis a real fighter in DC who knows their
struggles.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251014-jp.5CeC1h&refcode=em20251014-37108&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1007&akid=37108%2E1203867%2Efk0YR0 ]Photo of Justin surrounded by community members at a rally

Just like Summer Lee, Ilhan Omar, Delia Ramirez, and other Justice
Democrats, Justin can bring fresh, bold leadership to the halls of power —
but he’s depending on support from everyday people like you to get him
there.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251014-jp.5CeC1h&refcode=em20251014-37108&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1008&akid=37108%2E1203867%2Efk0YR0 ]Help us close out the first week of Justin’s campaign on a strong note:
split $5 or whatever is meaningful to you to power our
movement today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251014-jp.5CeC1h&refcode=em20251014-37108&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1027&akid=37108%2E1203867%2Efk0YR0 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, This is Justin Pearson, current Tennessee State Representative and Justice Democrats’ third Democratic primary candidate for 2026. Someone who is rarely seen without his community by his side. [ ]Photo of Justin Pearson surrounded by community members at a rally Justin is running for Congress in Tennessee’s 9th congressional district against this guy: Rep. Steve Cohen, who is rarely even seen in his community at all. He’s a politician who has been in elected office for over 40 years and doesn’t have much to show for it, except a community struggling with worse poverty, environmental racism, and gun violence than when he was first elected. [ ]A photo of Steve Cohen. Justin has gone up against tough fights before. He led a group of environmental activists to block the Byhalia crude oil pipeline in a low-income, 95 percent Black community already impacted by decades of pollution. [ ]A photo of Justin speaking into microphones surrounded by activists protesting the Byhalia oil pipeline. He was expelled from his seat in the Tennessee State House by Republicans just weeks after he was sworn in, all for simply participating in a gun violence prevention protest. He was reinstated soon after and then won re-election with nearly 94% of the vote. [ ]Justin standing at a podium in a suit with both of his arms raised above his head. Recently, he’s been fighting to stop Elon Musk and his massive xAI data center from illegally spewing toxic, cancer-causing air pollution in his South Memphis neighborhood, which has long faced environmental racism from corporate polluters. [ ]Justin speaking at a rally surrounded by activists with signs opposing Elon Musk's xAI data center. Now, he’s running for Congress in Tennessee's 9th district to give the working-class communities of Memphis a real fighter in DC who knows their struggles. [ ]Photo of Justin surrounded by community members at a rally Just like Summer Lee, Ilhan Omar, Delia Ramirez, and other Justice Democrats, Justin can bring fresh, bold leadership to the halls of power — but he’s depending on support from everyday people like you to get him there. name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: How Many Women Have to Give Birth in an Ambulance?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
That is the devastating reality right now in parts of our district, after the hospital in Halifax County decided to close its birthing unit.

| | | | | [|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=4143566ce6&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | | | |
---
| |
Friend,

I'm Dr. Gary Miller, running for the 49th House of Delegates district here in Southside Virginia.
Long before I got into politics, I became a doctor to serve my community. There are many problems we face, but none more so than healthcare access. We just released a new video about a problem that faces many places, **but especially Southside.**
**Hospitals scattered across our Commonwealth and country are under attack**. They're under attack by cost-cutting corporate monopolies and by our own Federal Government. **A third of my patients depend on Medicaid to pay for their care.** In other places, it's more.

**The attacks are already succeeding.** Augusta Health Group in the Shenandoah Valley **just closed three primary care facilities,** anticipating the fallout from Washington D.C.'s "Big Beautiful Bill" that **slashes Medicaid by hundreds of billions of dollars.**
Long before this mess, Sentara Health in Halifax County had begun winding down their operations due to an aging population and profit-saving measures, cutting their birthing unit. **Now, women in labor have to drive anywhere from forty-five minutes to two hours to get care in an actual hospital** \- be it Danville, Lynchburg, Durham, or South Hill.**D.C.'s mistakes with Medicaid and Medicare could force Sentara to cut even more or even shut down.**
If one could turn back the clock, our hospitals in Danville and South Boston were once nonprofit, publicly-owned facilities, created during the Hill-Burton Act of 1946 in the New Deal. Most of our people were born there. In the present day, they were sold to the highest bidder after the Great Financial Crisis of 2009. **Now, women are routinely giving birth in ambulances.**
[**I can remember a time when we believed in our community's future. I don't remember rolling over.**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=97df770b8c&e=606d7e9aa2)
If Halifax hospital shuts down, people in need will come to Danville, or South Hill, putting more stress on their systems, staff, and resources. If Martinsville hospital falls, they come to Danville as well, putting stress on us. Federal cuts will do the rest. Similar holds true across the country. **We can't afford to give an inch.**
**Too many folks don't know what's going on.** Too many folks don't know what's at stake. **We have to save our hospitals and shore up Medicaid in Virginia.**
[**Lives hang in the balance. I'm asking for your help to get the word out.**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=de173228cd&e=606d7e9aa2)****

I'd be grateful for anything you can send.
With gratitude,
Dr. Gary MillerCandidate for House of Delegates District 49

clean_body: That is the devastating reality right now in parts of our district, after the hospital in Halifax County decided to close its birthing unit. | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I'm Dr. Gary Miller, running for the 49th House of Delegates district here in Southside Virginia. Long before I got into politics, I became a doctor to serve my community. There are many problems we face, but none more so than healthcare access. We just released a new video about a problem that faces many places, but especially Southside. Hospitals scattered across our Commonwealth and country are under attack. They're under attack by cost-cutting corporate monopolies and by our own Federal Government. A third of my patients depend on Medicaid to pay for their care. In other places, it's more. The attacks are already succeeding. Augusta Health Group in the Shenandoah Valley just closed three primary care facilities, anticipating the fallout from Washington D.C.'s "Big Beautiful Bill" that slashes Medicaid by hundreds of billions of dollars. Long before this mess, Sentara Health in Halifax County had begun winding down their operations due to an aging population and profit-saving measures, cutting their birthing unit. Now, women in labor have to drive anywhere from forty-five minutes to two hours to get care in an actual hospital \- be it Danville, Lynchburg, Durham, or South Hill.D.C.'s mistakes with Medicaid and Medicare could force Sentara to cut even more or even shut down. If one could turn back the clock, our hospitals in Danville and South Boston were once nonprofit, publicly-owned facilities, created during the Hill-Burton Act of 1946 in the New Deal. Most of our people were born there. In the present day, they were sold to the highest bidder after the Great Financial Crisis of 2009. Now, women are routinely giving birth in ambulances. If Halifax hospital shuts down, people in need will come to Danville, or South Hill, putting more stress on their systems, staff, and resources. If Martinsville hospital falls, they come to Danville as well, putting stress on us. Federal cuts will do the rest. Similar holds true across the country. We can't afford to give an inch. Too many folks don't know what's going on. Too many folks don't know what's at stake. We have to save our hospitals and shore up Medicaid in Virginia. ** If that video struck you, I'd be grateful for anything you can send. With gratitude, Dr. Gary MillerCandidate for House of Delegates District 49 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE 121 Bell Ct.Danville, VA 24541 | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Gary Miller for House of Delegates 121 Bell Ct Danville, VA 24541-4907 USA

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

I know your time is limited, so I’ll be blunt: If we don’t catch up NOW , it’ll cripple my campaign for Governor. Every day, they’re sending RADICAL operatives to chase me around South Carolina and scare me into submission. But they don’t scare me, Peter. What does? Losing our country to the Demonic Trans Perverts who want my head on a stick. And that’s exactly what will happen if we don’t PUNCH BACK. The Democrats are raising MILLIONS to destroy me.I’m up against the wall. $1 from EVERY patriot like you —the truckers, teachers, waitresses, cops, firefighters, and everyone else working their asses off just to make ends meet— could save my campaign. Every dollar fuels our movement, whether it’s spreading new yard signs across the state or buying pizza and water for my grassroots volunteers. I’m begging you, Peter: Time is running out. Thank you for standing with me. Hold The Line. — Nancy Mace | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 |

clean_body: Republicans still won’t come to the table. | Peter, We’re now two full weeks into Donald Trump’s government shutdown–and Republicans in Congress still won’t lift a finger to fix the health care crisis they created. They just canceled another week of session. That means they’ve been on vacation for three weeks while millions of Americans are watching their health care costs skyrocket. It’s a complete abdication of responsibility. And get this: Speaker Mike Johnson is still refusing to seat Rep.-elect Adelita Grijalva –the final signature we need to force a vote on the Epstein files. It’s a blatant attempt to protect Trump’s allies and cover up the truth. Yassamin isn’t backing down. She’s calling out the corruption, fighting to end the shutdown, and standing up for every family whose costs are climbing because Republicans chose billionaires over you. But she can’t do it alone. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Speaker Johnson and the GOP are putting predators and profiteers ahead of working families. # **Trump criticizes Time Magazine featured cover: "This is a super bad picture and deserves to be called out"**
President Trump blasted Time magazine on Truth Social for what he called the "Worst of All Time" cover photo, claiming they "disappeared" his hair and created an unflattering low-angle shot that made something look "like a crown--but an extremely small one."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/28d52c00-f603-41d2-93f3-55edfdb2cf3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **[Trump's feedback:](https://substack.com/redirect/51c1cf97-0995-4be1-bd7b-d612e792c721?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _" Time Magazine wrote a relatively good story about me, but the picture may be the Worst of All Time. They "disappeared" my hair, and then had something floating on top of my head that looked like a floating crown, but an extremely small one. Really weird! I never liked taking pictures from underneath angles, but this is a super bad picture, and deserves to be called out. What are they doing, and why?" _the President wrote on Truth Social.
* **Magazine features Trump 's peace deal:** Time's upcoming issue includes a lead story about how Trump and his Cabinet brokered the Israel-Hamas peace deal, with the controversial cover photo showing Trump from below with the sun's rays illuminating his hair against the magazine's white logo.
* **Hostage exchange completed:** Trump returned home after traveling to Israel and Egypt as the peace agreement took effect, with Hamas releasing all 20 living hostages held since October 7, 2023, in exchange for Israel freeing nearly 2,000 Palestinian prisoners.

| Here’s the truth about where we are: Going into 2025, we had a rock solid plan to lay the necessary groundwork to retake the U.S. House Majority. We were going to spend the year replicating the playbook from last cycle that helped us flip three seats from red to blue: 📣 **Hiring organizers** to mobilize against the Trump Administration’s harmful policies and start talking to voters early; 📝 **Blanketing community events** with literature and information about how to register to vote and get involved ahead of 2026; 🏠 **Opening regional offices** as hubs for volunteers and activists; We even developed a whole strategic plan for how this would come together and in what phases activations would happen. **Then, Donald Trump saw how effective our plan was and got worried.** He called up his MAGA cronies in Texas and other red states to try to stack the deck for 2026 and ensure that no matter how many seats we flipped here in California, Republicans could still cling to a House Majority. That’s why Gov. Gavin Newsom launched his Election Rigging Response Act and mission. _Now, the focus has shifted to passing Proposition 50 and cancelling out Donald Trump’s efforts to rig 2026 before a single vote has been cast._ The California Democratic Party is working day and night to help pass Prop 50 this November because we know this may be our last chance to put a check on Donald Trump’s unrelenting abuses of power. **But because of Donald Trump’s dirty tricks, we’ve lost time and budget that we needed to devote to flipping U.S. House seats.** When Proposition 50 passes in November, we will have an _**extremely truncated timeline**_ to stand up our swing seat operations. **[There were no better options. clean_body: Our plan terrified Donald Trump | = | Here’s the truth about where we are: Going into 2025, we had a rock solid plan to lay the necessary groundwork to retake the U.S. House Majority. We were going to spend the year replicating the playbook from last cycle that helped us flip three seats from red to blue: 📣 Hiring organizers to mobilize against the Trump Administration’s harmful policies and start talking to voters early; 📝 Blanketing community events with literature and information about how to register to vote and get involved ahead of 2026; 🏠 Opening regional offices as hubs for volunteers and activists; We even developed a whole strategic plan for how this would come together and in what phases activations would happen. Then, Donald Trump saw how effective our plan was and got worried. He called up his MAGA cronies in Texas and other red states to try to stack the deck for 2026 and ensure that no matter how many seats we flipped here in California, Republicans could still cling to a House Majority. That’s why Gov. Gavin Newsom launched his Election Rigging Response Act and mission. Now, the focus has shifted to passing Proposition 50 and cancelling out Donald Trump’s efforts to rig 2026 before a single vote has been cast. The California Democratic Party is working day and night to help pass Prop 50 this November because we know this may be our last chance to put a check on Donald Trump’s unrelenting abuses of power. But because of Donald Trump’s dirty tricks, we’ve lost time and budget that we needed to devote to flipping U.S. House seats. When Proposition 50 passes in November, we will have an extremely truncated timeline to stand up our swing seat operations. = = = = = = Thank you, \- The California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Christina Bohannan (personal)
subject: Treat others the way you want to be treated
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
When my daughter was little...

| Peter,

When my daughter was little, I used to tell her: Who you surround yourself with matters. Choose friends who are kind, who listen, who stand up for you — and be that kind of friend in return.

It's such a simple lesson: treat others the way you want to be treated.

But it's one Mariannette Miller-Meeks seems to have missed. She's refused to meet with her constituents — even saying she'll hold a town hall “when hell freezes over." She's refused to listen to constituents' concerns and refused to take action on their behalf. That's not who we are as Iowans. We listen to each other, and we show up, even when the going gets tough.

I'm running because I believe Iowans deserve better — they deserve a leader who listens, cares, and acts with integrity. Those are the values I've always taught my daughter, and that's what I'll bring to Congress.

**If you believe in that kind of leadership, too, please chip in before our mid-month deadline tonight. Your support keeps this campaign strong and rooted in the values we share >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cb-q4-2025?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117279579/575952539/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251014_MM3_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251014_MM3_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9138ac1d-4aa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTM4YWMxZC00YWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miLTgmb-Q1rccgCyYmJVv6NzzZqI1a2ti3ggITVr2_E=)**

Thank you,

Christina

**_But we know there’s a world where Ohioans have a government that actually works for them_ — where we don’t have to worry about the next crisis that puts the wealthy few ahead of everyone else.**

That’s why we need to reach our $20,000 mid-month goal — to organize, reach voters, and make sure we can defeat the Ohio Republicans like Senator Jon Husted who turned their backs on Ohio families.

[**_Every dollar helps us build the campaign we need to win in 2026. clean_body: | = Team, here are 3 numbers you need to know right now: 583,000 : that’s how many Ohioans could see their healthcare premiums double because Republicans refuse to end their reckless shutdown and lower healthcare costs for Ohioans. 90% : that’s the share of Ohio businesses that say they expect to raise prices in the coming months because Republican-driven tariffs are driving up their costs and disrupting supply chains. $5 : that’s all it takes to help us reach voters across the state and build the grassroots movement that can finally hold the GOP accountable at the ballot box next year. = While Republicans play games in Washington, Ohio families are feeling the fallout: higher costs, lost paychecks, and unaffordable healthcare. But we know there’s a world where Ohioans have a government that actually works for them — where we don’t have to worry about the next crisis that puts the wealthy few ahead of everyone else. That’s why we need to reach our $20,000 mid-month goal — to organize, reach voters, and make sure we can defeat the Ohio Republicans like Senator Jon Husted who turned their backs on Ohio families. = Thank you, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

body:
[PETITION] [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117279693/575952972/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVmYzBjYi00YWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMIc-lFBRSgYRLyjLt9e34EvxAVy0vXUvAGYJVj8yOA=&emci=c733c14b-16a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b55fc0cb-4aa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

There’s A LOT happening during this Republican government shutdown– _and mostly all of it is bad_. So, we’re here to break it all down for you and show you how Republicans are working against the American people.

**FIRST:** Republicans, at the request of Donald Trump, refused to fully fund our government. More than 750,000 workers across the country have been furloughed, forced to stay home instead of taking a paycheck.

**THEN:** Despite signing the Government Employee Fair Treatment Act in 2019, ensuring all federal employees receive back pay during a shutdown, Trump is on record saying some workers just _"don't deserve back pay."_ He's completely going against his own word to protect federal workers.

**NOW:** Trump is directing his administration to start laying off these furloughed workers, using the government shutdown as a ploy to strip government agencies of hardworking Americans. 4,000 federal workers have been fired from their jobs, with the potential for more layoffs to come in the future. Agencies hit the hardest include the Department of Education and Health and Human Services.

Peter–this isn’t just bad governing. This is targeted action by Republicans against Democrats. Trump said it himself, he’s going after “Democrat programs” in our government as the first places to get rid of federal staff.

But these are not “Democrat programs.” Programs that uplift our children in school, that give aid to those suffering from mental health issues, that help us prepare for future public health crises are supporting ALL Americans, and they don't deserve to be used as political pawns in Republicans’ government shutdown game.

What Republicans are doing to our government is shameful. **How can anyone tell our federal workers and their families to just "hang tight" while Congress sits on its hands? We can't let this continue.**

[**Will you stand with Kim today in demanding Republicans return to work, fund the government, and protect pay for federal workers? Add your name to our petition immediately to fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117279694/575952973/-1421055830?ms=em25_251014_payche_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_251014_payche_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_251014_payche_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251014_payche_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Y69lXSzEjV/4Ma88Fyat/8g1wki7VigRMbhKWZlepfXDrxA74oLIOicD6Yqc3d0I2BIA4HfDIrCyMjQHosLUns8WiZwvMGHWnrhlOLNrY5A/gdvQrNDDnghQLONwQkv3pJ30jzSTb2s1b3/jIFrTSJP4MUm0RyJxus8i/nfv7BQ=&refcode2=b55fc0cb-4aa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVmYzBjYi00YWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMIc-lFBRSgYRLyjLt9e34EvxAVy0vXUvAGYJVj8yOA=&emci=c733c14b-16a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b55fc0cb-4aa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338) [SIGN ON NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117279695/575952974/-1421055830?ms=em25_251014_payche_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_251014_payche_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_251014_payche_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251014_payche_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Y69lXSzEjV/4Ma88Fyat/8g1wki7VigRMbhKWZlepfXDrxA74oLIOicD6Yqc3d0I2BIA4HfDIrCyMjQHosLUns8WiZwvMGHWnrhlOLNrY5A/gdvQrNDDnghQLONwQkv3pJ30jzSTb2s1b3/jIFrTSJP4MUm0RyJxus8i/nfv7BQ=&refcode2=b55fc0cb-4aa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVmYzBjYi00YWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMIc-lFBRSgYRLyjLt9e34EvxAVy0vXUvAGYJVj8yOA=&emci=c733c14b-16a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b55fc0cb-4aa9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338) Thank you,

What Republicans are doing to our government is shameful. How can anyone tell our federal workers and their families to just "hang tight" while Congress sits on its hands? We can't let this continue. Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

subject: Freedom isn’t free.

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=2f1e64a8b1314d4fbe1ad57b3f2d0306&_e=d6gvDyCOIT4dDPT7JHHGjNBhyPC1eQ66sFQWYogiVHUv335wPtreNk95JYA2OQn33D7CFxJ0TuX0pcEJTjJYoEK0nssuRrLPq72phuK6W39MCq7NkU0cy762iKdSoW-faHOdOkuSaW-xBKpLY0BeEVBW4r2H1vQ7CrDLzcTs-ai9nCb-H_Uf9SnN0xL_JP8V0PL9TrlcEBmzV-gg1t-l8aJzpo8CqcjpGeUWFbSQ4QEJ54z_rMsowMba0eW-V7uhumBz0hnEm-dr6BFHo8dvS_pIeQV4pJYvsiVRtSJn6H6tU1TbXKvxw0rJ6b0FMupYJMc3w-dHKy2mR0IwQLAHEN6QQs0c4l5R65WZMF2fgUIBMFkVlk6W0muSLbu-QVRGB-2qwXxHDS0HFqIlSt15L18R60h7-x2l6fPi_yDL1nO3kP5-gOQ0zPWpt42jDuWZA3z9pRgm1xtDTMRSLBJNp7Lwy-Uv4bbfd5r-Sx3zMUaMJNo9C7_acvwCYPhyOsURVf-lIYOA7lF0ik8d6WQ8uuvmuCAYkzkPYKkupYv9nWw%3D)

Patriot,

You and I have a few things in common. We work hard for everything that we've earned.

I completed two tours in Afghanistan. I felt a call to service because I love my country and wanted to do anything to repay it for the tremendous opportunities it has given me throughout my life.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=2f1e64a8b1314d4fbe1ad57b3f2d0306&_e=d6gvDyCOIT4dDPT7JHHGjNBhyPC1eQ66sFQWYogiVHUv335wPtreNk95JYA2OQn33D7CFxJ0TuX0pcEJTjJYoEK0nssuRrLPq72phuK6W39MCq7NkU0cy762iKdSoW-faHOdOkuSaW-xBKpLY0BeEQN1wocbJIQ_rvu9SljpuY-jTM6x_MddZHjLHi8KwzxgMA-gjt3l_W3Fe-o26amAgAVru65mnronG2cZJDsO7UoXeuLDS6IcfW3wqeFzakl-rXwtZVYl36XmCbDEl6Rg26RbprL2dmF_OvrpEdpmNNAsNCYtTHusml0gKO3ZCVP6ONDNuMY0MEAQM5E3V4oPec7xiE978ZYVD8wBbfqH4cx8FL-9tB0NdeTpOknY44CTCCd-hYDq_xMjtPsRaVwuPS7NNv1lLVxIOX5V7PgYqJBsImk7mbfmnlNSXtcy1xSN0x3iCBSg2mXXZ3vqZVZJt4LgkYZWk6wpV7XwBS74CJKFHKhxLG06dGfo9spef6o6z3bRf0UXQyAY-ibs_-y1uA-mpcp1PG4KrXySXHTC75rhhPwRXWbiQdhs2rOQx4Sp)
| [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=2f1e64a8b1314d4fbe1ad57b3f2d0306&_e=d6gvDyCOIT4dDPT7JHHGjNBhyPC1eQ66sFQWYogiVHUv335wPtreNk95JYA2OQn33D7CFxJ0TuX0pcEJTjJYoEK0nssuRrLPq72phuK6W39MCq7NkU0cy762iKdSoW-faHOdOkuSaW-xBKpLY0BeEQN1wocbJIQ_rvu9SljpuY-jTM6x_MddZHjLHi8KwzxgwmoPpbZwFKmFKQxk_-UmAFRwOcmAjTmq0Fo-e6-Nk8bRPY9FR6Fk9_2Bj02ntsbiIg6M-xre958VNJD8QodcQ5VhbcOpkfH_7nUs7LgZ8qFo4eNpuNEYzmBwCz6EbvoJ41ceTmYJTuI-lbg-DaJX_TRYQlX9bV0Y1NIcz30-PQvfZFw0-oESnUEuSoLuJlefaKEqpRULxZbf4DVkfSi3TMpExK9b9zg9xtfKc1HBHX6n8JBHncrbTBVAmD3VjqfA-yLRwaE_c-rgxyt-kR0lSGuIjqI1TO47PASu3smVFoozQwKZUt39b2Pj9sQGmqZKmEuXlCrkmNikUAaEwMz6GYKXrt6KN4uU7OuawH79LtCsQX8v-1R2bUDmEnU0yuFC)
---

**After all, Freedom isn 't free.**

It was the honor of a lifetime to serve alongside my brothers in Afghanistan, and I would do it all again in a heartbeat.

When I left the service, I thought my duty was over. I did my tours, and I suffered every hardship and trial that came along with it.

Then, I watched helplessly as 13 Americans lost their lives in a botched withdrawal.

I felt like I needed to do something to prevent this from happening again. I know firsthand that bad leadership gets soldiers killed. The Biden administration wrote off these living, breathing men and women to statistics on a spreadsheet.

[**These patriots who volunteered to serve their country deserved better, and that’s why I decided to run for Congress.**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=2f1e64a8b1314d4fbe1ad57b3f2d0306&_e=d6gvDyCOIT4dDPT7JHHGjNBhyPC1eQ66sFQWYogiVHUv335wPtreNk95JYA2OQn33D7CFxJ0TuX0pcEJTjJYoEK0nssuRrLPq72phuK6W39MCq7NkU0cy762iKdSoW-faHOdOkuSaW-xBKpLY0BeEQN1wocbJIQ_rvu9SljpuY-jTM6x_MddZHjLHi8KwzxgWKUR6tjEpxUm5ioCDUtOqJlYqZrzOTxOx3ZByx9ALGEkxeWcPlwZKK4jFQj4e_6mMeWGYxDo1TK7-PDuGSUZete1_Ntj5LwMhAOXcB1IBw3YzIEuzzg97OxBnDIbo-bqUvJXDpbrWoS8ap4f1Iug0a3X3DCcDLbjObfcVJjX-gJ-c_HZ46T3kH_Yi7iGNjyUQyuFOfsY1i_1Hy0ff6maQ77rUQyq3Sb_Gl7S84_uLeXAI--C1GPVUaua9n7pc4e1GxyTAuoG-eRVTHiL2CUHE6qb3rP-gCj97H_qdvMZG7MUoBj7gRfdw8fXemYBVcLSEgEfOVmdMpLwb0VCsR4fgfd6Kf4_6BszDsw6fZ8YANdldnbCpbJeAYWYZWmOpMr6)

Sometimes I feel like being a politician is almost as hard as being a Green Beret, especially when these fundraising deadlines peek their heads around the corner.

**I hate asking for money, and my team knows I tend to put off fundraising. I put off these messages until the last possible moment.**

I'll come out and say it.

[**I need your help - I have an upcoming fundraising deadline and we’re far behind our goal.**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=2f1e64a8b1314d4fbe1ad57b3f2d0306&_e=d6gvDyCOIT4dDPT7JHHGjNBhyPC1eQ66sFQWYogiVHUv335wPtreNk95JYA2OQn33D7CFxJ0TuX0pcEJTjJYoEK0nssuRrLPq72phuK6W39MCq7NkU0cy762iKdSoW-faHOdOkuSaW-xBKpLY0BeEQN1wocbJIQ_rvu9SljpuY-jTM6x_MddZHjLHi8KwzxgeD-95zcuainT6ZAgppI3TWKTsjt2Ssk1APvR3869_5yY8ogMxt7J3-xdlZgS_CJF9F9f5Jhbc3dZjSr3ozbs1WxQx0xNs0m_pYNbu6XOy6-53JWIViyqopB8GFti6f7XUnsI59JQoCHctO9nXk06C2boH-ipAxgwrOKlnUPLEytOH_Fm2wkod9nHjM-U12vJGPNz_JQ4-NH5WrdcoJS1XdufGuab5yt_m6AlB3zblTDBVrQCwWx8TlwXTqD93XZG3R9fBBFgXCIs_SouIfOWXw7v07R8G8BQpTDPF9KSwJSQ0yRQqAe7j3CeM7d5l0RcUTGrW7ldBNXM75ROR2M6xlBiWZZUElPGVcxSaeA-zoYxOlJbiJmq2hhKwAHIomB5)

If you're half the patriot I think you are, I have no doubt I can count on you.

[**I'd be grateful if you could spare just $15 and skip a few coffees. My team needs to hit this fundraising goal if we’re going to secure President Trump’s Majority & continue to Make America Great Again. **](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=2f1e64a8b1314d4fbe1ad57b3f2d0306&_e=d6gvDyCOIT4dDPT7JHHGjNBhyPC1eQ66sFQWYogiVHUv335wPtreNk95JYA2OQn33D7CFxJ0TuX0pcEJTjJYoEK0nssuRrLPq72phuK6W39MCq7NkU0cy762iKdSoW-faHOdOkuSaW-xBKpLY0BeEQN1wocbJIQ_rvu9SljpuY-jTM6x_MddZHjLHi8Kwzxg-iQ04kJG7HBVIWQkYRP8Z0bpJL9trvrlSPbUH1z7B5Vhi_M9zdcCoaI_F6641vhnyINQFOVYnde0Mx1KXkws2gXxAJc_sxV4dDRoLpfagujOnzV1sN9z00UyUuGNLNETNNw0lI-t4AAMX7lqs2Tpk5or2spzAMhunFSTL3ZL6L7QYB3wiUrQDlEnMm947tTvydBtAJbOI9OUubb3isOW_VMWxUVwPL_qOfVDoMaT6TlhAxIGQgjUlw0rdrUB-6q5R5jwjB1zEPzMR2w8UJ_lstn7kUlJl7KXDIpPJ3QkmCQnKfm-k0Xr-Qqqx7y9OC6ty88qUMgmGcbK0-eUt48rNiLhQmKCa2ZVui12WlmnS1Ww63vcAoDI068hrXz6NpCR)

clean_body: | Patriot, You and I have a few things in common. We work hard for everything that we've earned. I completed two tours in Afghanistan. I felt a call to service because I love my country and wanted to do anything to repay it for the tremendous opportunities it has given me throughout my life. | After all, Freedom isn 't free. It was the honor of a lifetime to serve alongside my brothers in Afghanistan, and I would do it all again in a heartbeat. When I left the service, I thought my duty was over. I did my tours, and I suffered every hardship and trial that came along with it. Then, I watched helplessly as 13 Americans lost their lives in a botched withdrawal. I felt like I needed to do something to prevent this from happening again. I know firsthand that bad leadership gets soldiers killed. The Biden administration wrote off these living, breathing men and women to statistics on a spreadsheet. Sometimes I feel like being a politician is almost as hard as being a Green Beret, especially when these fundraising deadlines peek their heads around the corner. I hate asking for money, and my team knows I tend to put off fundraising. I put off these messages until the last possible moment. I'll come out and say it. If you're half the patriot I think you are, I have no doubt I can count on you. Thank you, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

_For Camilla City Council - District 2/Post 2_ We know how to compete in pivotal Georgia elections, and we know how to win. In January 2021, we helped power U.S. Senators Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to victory in their runoff races. And later that year, after the nation’s eyes were no longer on the Peach State, we also helped elect 43 candidates in Georgia municipal elections. With your support, this team has kept on endorsing and electing voting rights champions — including in 33 Georgia General Assembly races last year, helping to flip three seats that had been held by Republicans and secure one victory by just 48 votes. **Races like these help decide how elections are run, and local elected officials make many of the decisions that have the biggest impact on people’s daily lives.** [**So we aren’t sleeping on these races, and we know you won’t either. clean_body: Races like these help decide how elections are run | | | Every year is an election year in Georgia. In 2025, we’ve identified key races where this team can make a major difference to defend democracy in our state and in our country. We’re excited to announce our endorsements for municipal office in Georgia for the 2025 elections below — champions for democracy who will defend our rights and freedoms. = Gabrielle Nelson For Port Wentworth City Council - District 1 Melody Kelley For Sandy Springs City Council - District 2 Joyce Denson For Mayor of Toomsboro Erica Nicole Pope For Dacula City Council - At Large Sam Foster For Mayor of Marietta Nora Gaudet For Marietta City Council - Ward 3 Kay Turner For Grovetown City Council Garnet Morris For Hiram City Council - Post 5 (LRG) Kristen Daddow-Rodriguez For Sandy Springs City Council - District 5 Tara Overzat For Sandy Springs City Council - District 3 Barney W. Nicole Linder For Suwanee City Council - Post 5 (LRG) Omega Finney For City of McDonough Council - District 1 Colette R. Jenkins For Albany City Commissioner - Ward 5 Jeremiah Florence For Camilla City Council - District 2/Post 2 We know how to compete in pivotal Georgia elections, and we know how to win. In January 2021, we helped power U.S. Senators Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to victory in their runoff races. And later that year, after the nation’s eyes were no longer on the Peach State, we also helped elect 43 candidates in Georgia municipal elections. With your support, this team has kept on endorsing and electing voting rights champions — including in 33 Georgia General Assembly races last year, helping to flip three seats that had been held by Republicans and secure one victory by just 48 votes. body:
Republicans in Congress are letting ACA tax credits expire at the end of the year.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117279948/575953867/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDAwYzFjYS00YmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F13XZmy0d1ngNRWTKWZgWcyqqaRffgzHUzLkYZAPMtk=&emci=a67e22d8-44a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7400c1ca-4ba9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9818364)
