| | Trump and Republicans in Congress have created one crisis after another. This time, they've set our country barreling toward a health care calamity. While the trillion-dollar blow to Medicaid earlier this year is rightfully getting most of the coverage, another lesser-known piece of the Republican budget bill will raise health insurance premiums for millions of Americans, unless Republicans work with us to stop it. Unless Republicans decide to put partisan politics aside, this month, millions of families will get a letter from their insurance company notifying them that their premiums are going up. In some cases, premiums will double, or even triple. That's hundreds – and in some cases thousands – of dollars per month that families were counting on to buy groceries, pay their rent or mortgage, or make a car payment. That might not mean much to Trump's harem of billionaires, but for nurses, teachers, and firefighters, that can mean the difference between being able to cover rent and groceries for the month. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117279949/575953868/2069884342?ms=2025-10-14-aca&refcode=2025-10-14-aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDAwYzFjYS00YmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F13XZmy0d1ngNRWTKWZgWcyqqaRffgzHUzLkYZAPMtk=&emci=a67e22d8-44a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7400c1ca-4ba9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9818364) Every time Republicans could have acted to stop this, they instead chose to block Democratic bills and double down to raise premium costs. And now they've forced a government shutdown to try and keep these premium increases in place. The clock is ticking on these cost increases. Republicans control the White House, the Senate, and the House. I'm ready and willing to work with anyone who wants to keep costs down and reopen the government. But I will not support a Republican bill that raises costs and kicks millions of people off their health care. I'm not going to stop doing what I can to bring Republicans to the negotiating table to keep costs down. **We have to raise our voices – and loudly – if we want any chance of spurring action.** [**If you agree that Congressional Republicans should join us to keep health insurance premiums down, add your name today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117279950/575953869/2069884342?ms=2025-10-14-aca&refcode=2025-10-14-aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDAwYzFjYS00YmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F13XZmy0d1ngNRWTKWZgWcyqqaRffgzHUzLkYZAPMtk=&emci=a67e22d8-44a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7400c1ca-4ba9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9818364) [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117279951/575953870/2069884342?ms=2025-10-14-aca&refcode=2025-10-14-aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDAwYzFjYS00YmE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F13XZmy0d1ngNRWTKWZgWcyqqaRffgzHUzLkYZAPMtk=&emci=a67e22d8-44a9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7400c1ca-4ba9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9818364) More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

body:
|
---
| | In case you didn't hear the news last week: Val officially has a Republican opponent in this race – and they are raising money hand over fist targeting flippable districts like this one. Mike Johnson is out to shore up Republican control of the House and ram through President Trump's agenda on ICE, troops in our cities, and raising health insurance premiums. [**Val is taking on the MAGA extremists right here in Oregon. [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7258560/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvQVRjZ2JxcG5tdA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTQ/LbmNsamtZdXZYUA/qP2hpZHM9bmMzRUt1TnpyaThFdzBscw/gaO7NSg/s2qe11fd2dc)

[ ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7258560/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW52ZXN0bWVudHJhcml0aWVzLmNvbS9zaWx2ZXItb24tdGhlLWxhdW5jaGluZy1wYWQtZnJlZS10aGlua2VyLWRhaWx5Lw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTQ/LbmNsamtZdXZYUA/gaO7NSg/s7rf5b2fd7f)
In today’s volatile financial landscape, silver is quietly positioning itself for a breakout and most investors aren’t paying attention.
In our free book, _Silver on the Launching Pad_ , James R. Cook and a team of financial insiders expose the forces shaping silver’s future. From suppressed prices to global supply strains, this eye-opening read reveals why silver may be the most undervalued asset in the market.
**Here’s what you’ll learn:**
* **Why Silver Is Poised to Surge:** Discover how price pressure and market forces could trigger a dramatic rise.
* **Industrial Demand Is Exploding:** Solar, tech, and defense sectors are consuming silver faster than it can be mined.
* **Insider Warnings You Can’t Ignore:** Hear directly from analysts and whistleblowers about what’s happening behind the scenes.

This book is free but the insights could be priceless.
[_Claim Your Copy Now_](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7258560/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW52ZXN0bWVudHJhcml0aWVzLmNvbS9zaWx2ZXItb24tdGhlLWxhdW5jaGluZy1wYWQtZnJlZS10aGlua2VyLWRhaWx5Lw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTQ/LbmNsamtZdXZYUA/gaO7NSg/s7rf5b2fd7f)
To your financial future,

**The Investment Rarities Team**
_Trusted Since 1973_
Questions? Call us at **800-328-1860** to speak with a silver and gold expert.
[Get the Book Now](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7258560/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW52ZXN0bWVudHJhcml0aWVzLmNvbS9zaWx2ZXItb24tdGhlLWxhdW5jaGluZy1wYWQtZnJlZS10aGlua2VyLWRhaWx5Lw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMTQ/LbmNsamtZdXZYUA/gaO7NSg/s7rf5b2fd7f)

While Pramila is focused on protecting health care for poor and working people, our campaign is working hard to reach our $16,000 mid-month goal.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251014-5527-footer&t=1&akid=5527%2E420207%2EhZ01xK)
Peter, there are _so many things_ happening right now:
* **We’re about to enter the third week of the government shutdown,** and Trump and his MAGA allies are refusing to protect health care and reopen the government.

* **Republicans _still_ won’t swear in Representative-elect Adelita Grijalva,** who won her special election over two weeks ago and would be the final vote needed on a discharge petition to force a House vote on releasing the Epstein Files.

* **Everyone from Fox News to “Libs of TikTok” are coming after Pramila** for advocating nonviolent resistance to Trump’s authoritarianism, with one Republican lawmaker in Arizona even saying she should be “tried, convicted, and hanged.”

And while Pramila is focused on protecting health care for poor and working people, our campaign is working hard to reach our $16,000 mid-month goal before tomorrow’s deadline.

name: Cliff Schecter with Blue Amp
subject: “The United States of Amnesia and Chains: The Deportation of a Child”
body:
When a 13-year-old boy is kidnapped by ICE, it's not "law enforcement" -- it's the state declaring that cruelty is the point.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.5NnRqhnGYHEp3dyaMsm2oQ2M5sZ4f-tmgqA3DUlaBec?) for more

---
# ["The United States of Amnesia and Chains: The Deportation of a Child" ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176088620&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2MDg4NjIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjA0ODExNDUsImV4cCI6MTc2MzA3MzE0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NgmMbijGGy2WHyXmofOoryCvO5csQicjaD0rTpqXy6k)
### When a 13-year-old boy is kidnapped by ICE, it's not "law enforcement" -- it's the state declaring that cruelty is the point.
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)
---
| Oct 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176088620&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2MDg4NjIwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDQ4MTE0NSwiZXhwIjoxNzYzMDczMTQ1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nNhgMQLQgK-NFGxauEeaY-xEhqCkj5yb4PoAM-b9f-k&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/29816db6-1018-43d8-b32d-dd7fdf356034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
#### **🔥[We're Gearing Up For "No Kings Day" This Saturday! Support Our Efforts & Get All Our Coverage With A Paid Subscription!](https://substack.com/redirect/29816db6-1018-43d8-b32d-dd7fdf356034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)🔥**
[I Support No Kings Day!](https://substack.com/redirect/29816db6-1018-43d8-b32d-dd7fdf356034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As of this column, somewhere in Virginia, a 13-year-old boy has been sitting in a cage for four days--and counting.
The United States federal government locked him up and carted him away from his Massachusetts home on October 10th, like a sack of contraband, with all the care and dignity this nation now reserves for its brown-skinned children.
The teenage boy committed no crime. He was simply noticed.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/111278c5-9746-4d49-8b3e-f8ed1067c88d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Trump regime in Washington--whose [orange-hued standard-bearer would struggle to spell "due process"](https://substack.com/redirect/111278c5-9746-4d49-8b3e-f8ed1067c88d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) without a teleprompter--now presides over a deportation machine so obscene, _so gleefully inhuman_ , it sweeps children into vans and calls it justice.
In this case, the boy had an interaction with local police (not even an arrest), and ICE, ever hungry for fresh meat, then pounced like a pack of jackals.
We are told this is "law enforcement." **It is actually[state-sponsored kidnapping](https://substack.com/redirect/24e7811e-653c-4ae8-ae3d-dde2c07bd53d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[, with badges](https://substack.com/redirect/24e7811e-653c-4ae8-ae3d-dde2c07bd53d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ec10b5c6-c7dc-4133-aea1-12f74ce76eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This was not a cartel boss plucked from his mansion. This was a 13-year old, _somebody 's child_.
Taken from his family, removed from his junior high school, and driven hundreds of miles to rot in a juvenile facility. He is not a flight risk. He is not a threat.
He is just brown, unprotected, and unlucky enough to live under a Trump administration that believes cruelty is next to godliness.
* * *
Support independent reporting - subscribe now.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.5bijhskollP_q1u99ap2xXUpRgk83TXwOgO-rvGBpEA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=176088620)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b0ae563-6ff9-43e6-9be3-fd68de7ca460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This grotesque spectacle comes amidst what the Trump administration's ICE agents have referred to as "Operation Midway Blitz." A title so pompous it could've been cooked up by a failed screenwriter on on a meth binge.
What it actually is, of course, is a dragnet focused mostly on Illinois, but also reaching into other states.
It is designed to terrorize immigrant communities into silence and retreat. It is bureaucracy gone feral, steered by the moral sensibilities of a hungry and crazed wild dog.
In the evangelical fervor of Trumpism 2.0--[where the Constitution is weaponized ](https://substack.com/redirect/ec10b5c6-c7dc-4133-aea1-12f74ce76eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and compassion is considered treasonous--there is no room for nuance. To Trump Gestapo agents and sycophants, a brown child is not a human being, but a potential deportation statistic.
A headline. And a warning.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ba871fb6-2bda-4259-a872-f752d4dd98fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And the system obliges.
Judges must now force ICE to explain why, exactly, they're imprisoning a seventh grader with no criminal charges, no family, and no say. A[ federal judge has ordered the Trump administration to give the boy a bail hearing](https://substack.com/redirect/ba871fb6-2bda-4259-a872-f752d4dd98fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in front of an immigration judge by October 17.
* * *
Support independent reporting - subscribe now.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.5bijhskollP_q1u99ap2xXUpRgk83TXwOgO-rvGBpEA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=176088620)
* * *
Meanwhile, the boy sits in a cell--likely bewildered, probably afraid, and certainly learning firsthand what the Land of the Free does to its uninvited guests.
This is not immigration policy. **This is moral necrosis.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bd15f3c0-a993-4222-8a8a-d35fd992cfc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A government that terrorizes children for political optics is not a republic--it is a [carnival of goons dressed in flag pins, administering tyranny](https://substack.com/redirect/bd15f3c0-a993-4222-8a8a-d35fd992cfc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) under fluorescent lights.
Every official who signed the paperwork to abduct this boy should be publicly named, shamed, and chased from public life.
Every uniformed coward who placed him in a van should have to answer to the American public--though I suspect most are too gutless to identify themselves, never mind take of their ICE face coverings and masks.
Let's dump the euphemisms. What happened here was not "detention."
It was abduction under color of law. If a private citizen did it, it would be a federal felony. But when the Trump administration does it, [it's just another line item in a Stephen Miller spreadsheet](https://substack.com/redirect/d76e9e82-d8cd-4ab7-bab3-1c943d63fde7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d76e9e82-d8cd-4ab7-bab3-1c943d63fde7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After days of silence, a spokesperson for ICE claimed the 13-year old boy in question had a firearm in his possession and a record of breaking and entering.
Even if that's true, (a big "if" given this ICE spokesperson's record of dishonesty) legal experts say that still doesn't justify hauling this child to a detention facility 500 miles away.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0fa8fba-f123-46e4-923f-a8bbc901a8ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Some MAGA types will argue, as they always do, that "laws must be enforced." And that this boy's Brazilian parents should not have come to the United States years ago "illegally."
**But law without humanity is no law at all** --it is merely the outward shell of justice, emptied of all meaning.
Once upon a time in the United States, slavery was legal. The Trail of Tears was legal. The internment of Japanese-American families was legal.
* * *
Support independent reporting - subscribe now.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.5bijhskollP_q1u99ap2xXUpRgk83TXwOgO-rvGBpEA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=176088620)
* * *
_Legality, as history shows us,[is often just the camouflage worn by evil when it wishes to appear respectable](https://substack.com/redirect/ec10b5c6-c7dc-4133-aea1-12f74ce76eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
There are still those MAGAs who will shrug at this and will find reasons to excuse Trump's ICE reign of terror.
To them I say: may you someday be judged not by your good fortune, but by your worst hour. And may you receive exactly the mercy you were willing to extend to this boy.
Because that is what we are truly talking about here--not law, nor policy, nor border security. We are talking about mercy. [About decency.](https://substack.com/redirect/111278c5-9746-4d49-8b3e-f8ed1067c88d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
About the most basic test of civilization: how it treats the defenseless.
And today, America has failed that test--again--with boots on, teeth bared, and a 13-year old child in chains.
#### **🔥[We're Gearing Up For "No Kings Day" This Saturday! Support Our Efforts & Get All Our Coverage With A Paid Subscription!](https://substack.com/redirect/29816db6-1018-43d8-b32d-dd7fdf356034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)🔥**
[I Want A "No Kings" Paid Subscription!](https://substack.com/redirect/29816db6-1018-43d8-b32d-dd7fdf356034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The Trump administration is weaponizing the government to defeat me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=826%2E181023%2EhLrzsY)
It's Mikie Sherrill.
I need you to hear about the reporting from the other week:
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-sherrill.JfODNg&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=826%2E181023%2EhLrzsY)
**CBS News is reporting that the Trump administration improperly released my personal records from my time in the Navy. It’s a shameful attempt to smear my record.**
This is a wildly unprecedented — and blatantly illegal — weaponization of the federal government. All part of an effort to ensure that the president’s preferred candidate wins an election.
These military records detail my early life, and go so far as to include my Social Security number and insurance records. There are supposed to be several layers of checks set up to prevent something like this.
This isn’t just about me. Any member of the United States military that the Trump administration sees as an enemy can have their personal data exposed.
And it’s incredibly dangerous.
[**Donald Trump and MAGA extremists have shown that they will stop at nothing to defeat me. So I’m asking: please rush a split donation to my campaign and Jocelyn Benson and help me fight back against the attempts to smear my name.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-sherrill.JfODNg&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=826%2E181023%2EhLrzsY)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly and Respectfully
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We've got a ton of work ahead if we're going to have any shot at this. It won't be easy. But if you'd be willing to help me, I'd be extremely grateful.
#

Friend, Mark Kelly here.
Just a few things for you, if you've got a minute to spare:
First, our health care system is in serious danger. Congress needs to reach a compromise that doesn't end with millions of people getting screwed over. But the government has been shut down for two weeks because Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress refuse to work with Democrats on a solution. Mike Johnson won't even call his members back for a vote.
There just isn't any excuse for this kind of politics. We run for office to serve the public. We serve in a position of great responsibility and trust. People are depending on us. But Trump and Republican leadership in the House and Senate just don't seem to care.
So, here's the situation. Priority one is to fix this, and I'm willing to work in good faith with anybody to do that. Priority two is to take back Congress, check Trump’s power, and get this country working properly again.
We've got a ton of work ahead if we're going to have any shot at this. It won't be easy. But if you'd be willing to help me, I'd be extremely grateful.
Now, this is the part where I ask you humbly and respectfully:
[**Can you make a donation today, before my mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow? We're behind on our goals, and the timing is not great. Anything helps.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25.Iw7SM3&refcode=em251014-2-700k&t=1&akid=6216%2E6688874%2E0kWWE3)

clean_body: | | | | They’re standing together. Peter, Democrats keep claiming they’re “running their own races,” but here’s the truth: Virginia Democrats are circling the wagons to protect their own. Career politician Abigail Spanberger is betting that if we stay home, voters will forget about Jay Jones’s scandal. Even worse—she refuses to demand he drop out. That’s not leadership. That’s cowardice. Virginia cannot afford a Governor who hides when tough decisions need to be made.** We need leaders with courage, not silence. That’s why your support matters right now. With your vote and support we WILL elect Winsome Earle-Sears, John Reid, and Jason Miyares next month. | | | This is the most important moral election of our lifetime. It’s clearer than ever, Peter: North Carolina’s Republican lawmakers feel no duty to our state or their constituents. Their only concern is securing the GOP hold on power at every possible level.
**We just learned that the General Assembly plans to redraw North Carolina’s congressional maps — maps that have already been gerrymandered to give the GOP a lock on power — to OUST a Democratic representative from NC and grant their party another seat in Congress.**
It’s clear that extreme Republicans will go to any lengths, including making dirty political deals, to keep control in Washington. They will silence the voices of voters here in North Carolina to get what they want.
We have to fight back, Peter. If Republicans are going to steal another congressional seat from Democrats, it’s even more important that we flip this U.S. Senate seat blue and end the GOP’s hold on Washington.

clean_body: All at the expense of NC voters. | NC GOP legislators are targeting Democratic seats... all to give national Republicans an edge in Congress. = | = It’s clearer than ever, Peter: North Carolina’s Republican lawmakers feel no duty to our state or their constituents. Their only concern is securing the GOP hold on power at every possible level. We just learned that the General Assembly plans to redraw North Carolina’s congressional maps — maps that have already been gerrymandered to give the GOP a lock on power — to OUST a Democratic representative from NC and grant their party another seat in Congress. It’s clear that extreme Republicans will go to any lengths, including making dirty political deals, to keep control in Washington. They will silence the voices of voters here in North Carolina to get what they want. We have to fight back, Peter. If Republicans are going to steal another congressional seat from Democrats, it’s even more important that we flip this U.S. Senate seat blue and end the GOP’s hold on Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: Team Lizzie
subject: UPDATE: Texas Redistricting Trial Concludes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
After nine days of testimony, a panel of three federal judges has finished hearing the case over whether Republicans intentionally weakened minority voting power when redrawing the Texas congressional map. The judges will now decide if the map can be used in the 2026 elections.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf_tjf?refcode=lpf_tjf_251014 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf_tjf?refcode=lpf_tjf_251014]
Here’s what we know:
Republican lawmakers redrew our congressional map this summer in a process shrouded in secrecy—one that minority advocates say was designed to weaken the voting power of Black and Latino Texans. Federal courts since 2019 have deemed partisan gerrymandering legal, while racial discrimination in redistricting is against the law. During the hearing, Texas officials claimed the map was drawn for “partisan” reasons, not racial ones. But the evidence tells a different story.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf_tjf?refcode=lpf_tjf_251014 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf_tjf?refcode=lpf_tjf_251014]
New testimony revealed that the redraw was directed by national Republican operatives—coordinating directly with the Trump White House and the U.S. Department of Justice. The mapmaker himself, Adam Kincaid, admitted to deleting messages, ignoring public input, and following political marching orders instead of listening to Texans.
Plaintiff groups acting on behalf of minority Texans including the Mexican American Legal Defense and Educational Fund, made it clear in closing arguments—this was not about politics. It was an intentional effort to dilute minority representation, and that’s illegal.
Now, the judges’ decision will determine whether Texans get the fair representation we deserve—or face another election under an illegal map. With candidate filing for 2026 starting November 8, a ruling could come any day—and no matter what, it’s likely to head to the Supreme Court next.
As you know, the Texas Justice Fund has been at the forefront of this fight, taking on the state to ensure our maps are fair and our democracy stays strong. But these legal battles are long and costly—and TJF needs our help.
DONATE TO TJF [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf_tjf?refcode=lpf_tjf_251014]
Together, we can make sure every Texan’s vote counts equally—and keep fighting for fair maps and fair representation.
Thanks,
Team Lizzie
P.S. Don’t forget to join Team Lizzie TOMORROW, Oct. 15 for a virtual phonebank with Congresswoman Sara Jacobs to support Proposition 50 in California.
PHONEBANK WITH US! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/858314/]
This ballot initiative, the Election Rigging Response Ac t, would allow mid-decade redistricting to undo GOP power grabs—but only if it passes.
https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/858314/ [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/858314/]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpf_tjf?refcode=lpf_tjf_251014]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: Outspent
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

**Please don’t click away from this important message.**
Jon Ossoff’s campaign team here: In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make a contribution to Jon’s reelection campaign.
But first, we are asking for just a few minutes of your time to try and explain why this request is so important.
Trump’s MAGA allies are spending massive sums of money to defeat Jon because they know if they win this race in Georgia, they can lock in Senate control for the GOP and get rid of one of the strongest anti-corruption voices in the Senate.
_We can’t let that happen._
But right now, we have been outspent in a big way. The GOP and their Super PACs have already spent more than $10 million on this race, and we need your help to fight back.
[**Can you please split $5 or whatever you can between Jon’s reelection campaign and Ruben Gallego today?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251014-1-90&t=1&akid=4017%2E734936%2EVKbZkd)
To win, _and win decisively,_ our team is already building a huge statewide campaign. That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state. We’re building and we’ve got to keep building bigger and faster every day.
**That all takes resources right now.**
We will fight back. And we _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone.
For our campaign, the vast majority of the donations we receive come from people giving $5, $10, $25 at a time. _And the single largest source of those donations is from emails like this one._
[**So please. Split a donation between Jon Ossoff’s campaign and Ruben Gallego today if you can. There’s no time to lose in building a winning campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251014-1-90&t=2&akid=4017%2E734936%2EVKbZkd)
Thank you!
Team Ossoff

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4017%2E734936%2EVKbZkd). disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117281576/575959316/1240337417?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWFjMjI4MS01MWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRLmW_rqRYM73n1_So-8euuRwCkfhcu4iy9FAPSzN-U=) I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I would _never_ forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover. Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger _every single day_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it. **So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins.[_MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority. Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117281579/575959319/1240337417?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWFjMjI4MS01MWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRLmW_rqRYM73n1_So-8euuRwCkfhcu4iy9FAPSzN-U=)** | | [ DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117281583/575959325/1240337417?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWFjMjI4MS01MWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRLmW_rqRYM73n1_So-8euuRwCkfhcu4iy9FAPSzN-U=)

I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And I'm the only Democrat to win a statewide election in Maine in the last 20 years._
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[_Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign from Day One by splitting a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117281586/575959329/1240337417?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.14_Janet-Mills-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWFjMjI4MS01MWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRLmW_rqRYM73n1_So-8euuRwCkfhcu4iy9FAPSzN-U=)**

clean_body: because I love Maine with everything I’ve got. = I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover. Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger every single day and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it. So today I’m officially announcing my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins.= | | = I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got. My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor. I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished. But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. Frankly, I would never forgive myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love. And I'm the only Democrat to win a statewide election in Maine in the last 20 years. So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you. This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Janet Mills and Kirsten Gillibrand immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Let’s win this thing, – Janet Mills Governor of Maine * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Trump’s ICE is working to gain unauthorized access to cellphones.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We need answers.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117281655/575959437/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251011Cells_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGE3MjQ4Ny01MWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKXoNeKZGrWRb8mlxieZQeKU_-NCMa39gc-PGL4TmZY=) Peter,

In Congress, I am working with my Democratic colleagues to demand an answer to a critical question: **Why is Trump’s ICE using foreign-made spyware to gain access to Americans’ cell phones?**

I am deeply concerned that Immigration and Customs Enforcement has activated a contract with Paragon Solutions, an Israeli company that produces surveillance software called Graphite. This software can gain unauthorized access to cell phones without the owner's consent or knowledge, including encrypted applications, location data, messages, and photographs. It’s as simple as receiving a message on a platform like WhatsApp to become infected – **no clicks required.

Given Trump and his administration’s complete disregard for our constitutional rights and desire to implement mass deportations, I am concerned that ICE will abuse this tool to spy on immigrants, people of color, and anyone who speaks in opposition to ICE’s blatant and frequent abuse of power.**

Graphite has already been reportedly used to spy on French President Emmanuel Macron, a Saudi journalist, and other prominent activists and academics. This is a human rights, privacy, and national security issue.

[**Peter, we cannot allow Trump and his cronies to get away with ignoring the rule of law, and I vow to work to hold them accountable. Help support my campaign so I can continue to serve as a check and balance on this administration by chipping in $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117281656/575959438/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251011Cells_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGE3MjQ4Ny01MWE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKXoNeKZGrWRb8mlxieZQeKU_-NCMa39gc-PGL4TmZY=)

ICE has been lawless and reckless under Trump, and we need answers on whether ICE will respect 4th Amendment protections against warrantless search and seizure for people in the US.

Together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

clean_body: EMILYs List women are running to fight for our rights. But Republicans are flooding the field with cash. | = Hi Peter, I'm Callie Fines, the chief financial officer at EMILYs List, and I wanted to personally check in with you as we enter the final stretch before Election Day 2025. In just a few short weeks, voters across the country will head to the polls, and our EMILYs List women are working hard to turn out every last vote. They're showing up in communities, knocking on doors, and standing up for women and families in every corner of the country. But right now, Republicans are outraising us. And as we get closer to Election Day, every dollar matters even more. That's why we launched our Final Sprint Fund to raise $100k over the next three days. | = Behind our fundraising numbers are real-world stakes: more field offices, more support to volunteers, and more ads reaching undecided voters — for our side and theirs. Every dollar Republicans pour in helps them drown out our message and attack the women leading this fight to take back power. Every dollar we bring in helps us fight back harder. That's why I'm reaching out. We’re updating supporter records and as of today, 21 days out from Election Day, this is where you stand: Supporter Record for Peter 📅 Cycle: 2025–2026 💪 Status: Pending Support = Every dollar you give today powers the women on the front lines running for governor, Congress, state legislatures, and critical down-ballot offices nationwide. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With gratitude, Callie Fines (she/her/hers) Chief Financial Officer, EMILYs List Thank you for your support! Donation records are tied to email address, so if you've donated very recently, with a different email address, or offline, the information above may not reflect your complete donor record. But don't worry, we have your gift recorded! = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Letitia James
subject: Oh, the irony.
body:
I’m not fearful – I’m fearless. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117282656/575962843/-1350843575?&refcode=E15680-20251014-LetitiaJames-Image-DeadlineOther&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVhNGQxMTctNTRhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GVwO26tPxScIHCqjYL7gvVvj8mRFWpsglUSYNfRpl-I=) Peter, Donald Trump – an actual convicted felon – just indicted me on baseless charges. Does anybody else see the irony here? This is the same man who’s been found liable for fraud. The same man who used the presidency to enrich himself and punish his critics. The same man who now seeks to weaponize our justice system for his own political retribution. Let me be crystal clear: I will _not_ be intimidated. I will _not_ be silenced. And I will _not_ back down from holding the president accountable. Because the truth is faith and fear cannot share the same space. And so I refuse to be fearful – but fearless. And I will continue doing my job to protect New Yorkers and defend the rule of law. **But make no mistake: Trump and his allies are trying to tear down anyone who stands in their way. subject: Gosar, Crane, and Biggs want to mine sacred tribal lands
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
We won’t stand for it. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117282739/575963077/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY0NTA3ZTAtNTRhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-FJ9Fqq4r0D--rV9OA61bGF60I2qaHfPufDhtvVeLFE=)

Hi there, **Paul Gosar, Eli Crane, and Andy Biggs just introduced federal legislation to strip protections from two Arizona national monuments so corporations can mine and drill on sacred tribal lands.** [**If you’re as outraged as we are, could you chip in $10 to help us flip more AZ Congressional Districts blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117282740/575963078/541746778?amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY0NTA3ZTAtNTRhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-FJ9Fqq4r0D--rV9OA61bGF60I2qaHfPufDhtvVeLFE=) | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117282741/575963079/79744751?amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY0NTA3ZTAtNTRhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-FJ9Fqq4r0D--rV9OA61bGF60I2qaHfPufDhtvVeLFE=)
---
Gosar, Crane, and Biggs’ proposed legislation targets Baaj Nwaavjo I'tah Kukveni-Ancestral Footprints of the Grand Canyon National Monument in northern Arizona and Ironwood Forest National Monument in southern Arizona.
**Their goal? Open these protected lands to uranium mining and extractive industries.**
Gosar claims these monuments have "locked up thousands of acres" that should be available for "responsible mining" and "energy development." But here's what he's really saying: corporate profits matter more than sacred tribal lands, endangered species, and Arizona's precious water resources.
**Fourteen tribal nations that have been stewards of the Grand Canyon region fought for these protections. Now AZ Republicans want to sell them out to the mining industry.**
The Havasupai Tribe strongly opposes uranium mining on these lands. The monuments protect culturally significant sites, rare wildlife, and water resources that Arizona communities depend on.
**And Arizona voters across the political spectrum support these monuments.**
A recent poll found strong support for continued protection of Baaj Nwaavjo and tribal involvement in managing protected lands. Yet Gosar, Crane, and Biggs are pushing ahead anyway.
**[Will you chip in $10 to help us defeat these extremists and protect Arizona?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117282742/575963080/79744751?amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY0NTA3ZTAtNTRhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-FJ9Fqq4r0D--rV9OA61bGF60I2qaHfPufDhtvVeLFE=)**
[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117282743/575963081/79744751?amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY0NTA3ZTAtNTRhOS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-FJ9Fqq4r0D--rV9OA61bGF60I2qaHfPufDhtvVeLFE=)

The choice is clear: protect sacred lands and Arizona's environment, or let corporations mine and drill wherever they want.
We’re glad you’re on our side.
— AZ Dems

subject: POLITICO: Leaked messages expose Young Republicans’ racist chat

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
If you needed one reason to get fired up for the November 2025 elections, here it is:
A Politico exclusive just exposed a group of Republican operatives trading racist, violent, and openly hateful talk in a private group chat. They joked about gas chambers, used racial slurs, and even celebrated Hitler.
This is how the next generation of MAGA leaders speak when they think no one is watching, and it's exactly the kind of bullying, violent mindset we cannot allow to wield power over our communities. And with Trump in the White House, they feel emboldened.
But just because extremists have a seat at the table in the White House doesn't mean their language or their values are America's values. We know better, and we're ready to prove it at the ballot box.
This is one of the many reasons GOTV PAC is ramping up our turnout operations in New Jersey, Virginia, and Pennsylvania this fall. These are states where organized, local voter contact – not social media outrage or cable news theatrics – decides races up and down the ballot. When we show up in force, we stop people who glorify cruelty from turning their private bigotry into public power.
Will you stand with us today and put real muscle behind turnout in these battlegrounds? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10142025]

subject: I’m addressing the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Primetime, on Hannity
| | | |
## **_MAGA ALERT: I’m addressing the nation!_**

This is Eric Trump, tonight I’ll be going on Hannity LIVE to drop a MAGA Truth Bomb that you ABSOLUTELY can not miss.
I just announced my FIRST book,**_Under Siege_** , and I’m letting TOP Patriots like yourself get a sneak peak into the world of MAGA!!

---
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[READ EVERYTHING](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
My family has been under siege since my father came down the Trump Tower escalator. From raids on my childhood home at Mar-a-Lago, to assassination attempts and countless witch-hunt cases, the attacks didn’t just target my family, they targeted America.
But I wouldn’t trade it for anything. It’s all been worth it for MAGA and supporters like you!
I dive into these highs and lows, and share some never-released-before stories in my book. I discuss life in the Trump world, my time as head of a multibillion-dollar empire, share stories about The Celebrity Apprentice, and my time on the campaign trail. Read it now and better understand our movement!
[READ NOW](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you for all you do for MAGA,
Eric Trump

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_sherrill2025.Z2Cj9n&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251014_PM2_V1_S1&t=3&akid=9067%2E5257348%2Ey67Hgv)
Derek, there are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race:
**This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall.** In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey — making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was.
**I’m showing our nation a new way forward.** My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to — no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first, Derek. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it.
**As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation.** What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism — and show the nation that there’s a better path forward.
**[All eyes are on New Jersey, Derek, and this race is a toss-up. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff today to help me win and chart a better path forward for my state and our country?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_sherrill2025.Z2Cj9n&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251014_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9067%2E5257348%2Ey67Hgv)**

Peter, it’s Rep. Zoe Lofgren. I’ll keep this quick. Donald Trump just said he’s open to invoking the Insurrection Act if federal courts block him from sending the National Guard to Democratic-controlled cities. Let me be clear, Peter. Donald Trump’s deployment of the National Guard in cities like Portland, Baltimore, and Los Angeles is not only dangerous – it’s illegal. **But invoking the Insurrection Act would give Trump license to weaponize the military against US citizens just because he disagrees with them.**And coming from a President who was impeached for inciting an _actual_ insurrection in 2021? Give me a break. I’ve spent my entire career in Congress protecting our democracy from foreign and domestic threats, and I won’t let it be fractured by a 34-time felon and wannabe King. **[But I need your support to keep protecting Americans from Trump’s unlawful actions, so please chip in anything you can afford to my re-election campaign today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117283132/575964365/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-10-14_BIN_DOC_ES-33179&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTZhZDY3Yy01OGE5LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9TYajVxm4Jx3trCMLOVS-jB42I7HKw6TzgrX_-mmxA=)**
